data/event_scripts.s.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle1_Text_Memorize: {PLAYER} memorized the secret code\nwritten on the scroll.
data/event_scripts.s.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle1_Text_SecretCo: A secret code is written on it.
data/event_scripts.s.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle_Text_DoorLocke: The door is locked.\p...On closer inspection, this is written\non it: “Write the secret code here.”
data/event_scripts.s.UnknownString_81A0E68: {STR_VAR_1} might like this program.\n... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...\pBetter get going!
data/event_scripts.s.UnknownString_81A0ED6: What should I do for fun today?
data/event_scripts.s.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStoreElevator_Tex: Welcome to LILYCOVE DEPARTMENT STORE.\pWhich floor would you like?
data/event_scripts.s.UnknownString_81A0F70: The HALL OF FAME will be accessed.
data/event_scripts.s.Route111_Text_1A0F93: The sandstorm is vicious.\nIt's impossible to keep going.
data/event_scripts.s.Text_NoRegisteredItem: An item in the BAG can be registered\non SELECT for convenience.
data/event_scripts.s.gText_PokemonTrainerSchoolEmail: There's an e-mail from POKéMON TRAINER\nSCHOOL.\p... ... ... ... ... ...\pA POKéMON may learn up to four moves.\pA TRAINER's expertise is tested on the\nmove sets chosen for POKéMON.\p... ... ... ... ... ...
data/event_scripts.s.gText_NicknameReceivedPokemon: Want to give a nickname to the\n{STR_VAR_2} you received?
data/event_scripts.s.UnknownString_81A1141: {PLAYER} is out of useable POKéMON!\p{PLAYER} whited out!
data/event_scripts.s.gText_ComeBackWithSecretPower:
Do you know the TM SECRET POWER?\pOur group, we love the TM SECRET
POWER.\pOne of our members will give it to you.
Come back and show me if you get it.\pWe'll accept you as a member and sell
you good stuff in secrecy.
data/event_scripts.s.gText_NurseJoy_OkayIllTakeYourPokemon: Okay, I'll take your POKéMON for a\nfew seconds.
data/event_scripts.s.gText_NurseJoy_Pokerus:
Your POKéMON may be infected with
POKéRUS.\pLittle is known about the POKéRUS
except that they are microscopic life-\lforms that attach to POKéMON.\pWhile infected, POKéMON are said to
grow exceptionally well.
data/event_scripts.s.SealedChamber_InnerRoom_Text_1A138B: It sounded as if a door opened\nsomewhere far away.
data/event_scripts.s.SealedChamber_OuterRoom_Text_1A13BE: There is a big hole in the wall.
data/event_scripts.s.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A13DF: I'm terribly sorry. The COLOSSEUM\nis undergoing adjustments.
data/event_scripts.s.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A141C: I'm terribly sorry. The TRADE CENTER\nis undergoing inspections.
data/event_scripts.s.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A145C: I'm terribly sorry. The RECORD CORNER\nis under preparation.
data/event_scripts.s.Text_1C6C2B: テストよう　メッセージです！\nポケモンの　せかいへ　ようこそ！
data/event_scripts.s.Text_1C6C4B: テストよう　メッセージです！\nかんばん　です
data/event_scripts.s.Text_1C6C62: テストよう　メッセージです！\nざひょう　チェックの　イベントです

data/field_move_scripts.inc.UseCutPromptText: This tree looks like it can be CUT down.\pWould you like to CUT it?
data/field_move_scripts.inc.CannotUseCutText: This tree looks like it can be CUT down.
data/field_move_scripts.inc.UseRockSmashPromptText: This rock appears to be breakable.\nWould you like to use ROCK SMASH?
data/field_move_scripts.inc.CannotUseRockSmashText: It's a rugged rock, but a POKéMON\nmay be able to smash it.
data/field_move_scripts.inc.UseStrengthPromptText: It's a big boulder, but a POKéMON\nmay be able to push it aside.\pWould you like to use STRENGTH?
data/field_move_scripts.inc.UsedStrengthText: {STR_VAR_1} used STRENGTH.\p{STR_VAR_1}'s STRENGTH made it possible\nto move boulders around.
data/field_move_scripts.inc.CannotUseStrengthText: It's a big boulder, but a POKéMON\nmay be able to push it aside.
data/field_move_scripts.inc.AlreadyUsedStrengthText: STRENGTH made it possible to move\nboulders around.
data/field_move_scripts.inc.CannotUseWaterfallText: A wall of water is crashing down with\na mighty roar.
data/field_move_scripts.inc.UseWaterfallPromptText: It's a large waterfall.\nWould you like to use WATERFALL?
data/field_move_scripts.inc.CannotUseDiveText: The sea is deep here. A POKéMON may be\nable to go underwater here.
data/field_move_scripts.inc.UseDivePromptText: The sea is deep here.\nWould you like to use DIVE?
data/field_move_scripts.inc.UnderwaterCannotUseDiveText: Light is filtering down from above.\nA POKéMON may be able to surface here.
data/field_move_scripts.inc.UnderwaterUseDivePromptText: Light is filtering down from above.\nWould you like to use DIVE?
data/field_move_scripts.inc.SurfacingBlockedText: There is something in the way above.\nDIVE can't be used here.
data/field_move_scripts.inc.SweetScentNothingHereText: There appears to be nothing here...

data/maps/AbandonedShip_CaptainsOffice/t.AbandonedShip_CaptainsOffice_Text_NoSucc: I'm investigating this ship on behalf\nof CAPT. STERN.\pHe also asked me to find a SCANNER,\nbut I haven't had any success...
data/maps/AbandonedShip_CaptainsOffice/t.AbandonedShip_CaptainsOffice_Text_OhCanY: Oh! That's a SCANNER!\pListen, can I get you to deliver that\nto CAPT. STERN?\pI want to investigate this ship a\nlittle more.
data/maps/AbandonedShip_CaptainsOffice/t.AbandonedShip_CaptainsOffice_Text_ThisIs: This ship is called S.S. CACTUS.\nIt seems to be from an earlier era.

data/maps/AbandonedShip_Corridors_1F/tex.AbandonedShip_Corridors_1F_Text_CharlieI: What's so funny about having my inner\ntube aboard the ship?
data/maps/AbandonedShip_Corridors_1F/tex.AbandonedShip_Corridors_1F_Text_CharlieP: It's not easy throwing POKé BALLS\nwhile hanging on to an inner tube!
data/maps/AbandonedShip_Corridors_1F/tex.AbandonedShip_Corridors_1F_Text_IsntItFu: Isn't it fun here?\nI get excited just being here!

data/maps/AbandonedShip_Corridors_B1F/te.AbandonedShip_Corridors_B1F_Text_DuncanI: When we go out to sea, we SAILORS\nalways bring our POKéMON.\lHow about a quick battle?
data/maps/AbandonedShip_Corridors_B1F/te.AbandonedShip_Corridors_B1F_Text_DuncanP: The ship's bottom has sunk into the\ndepths.\pIf a POKéMON knew how to go underwater,\nwe might make some progress...
data/maps/AbandonedShip_Corridors_B1F/te.AbandonedShip_Corridors_B1F_Text_DoorIsL: The door is locked.\p“STORAGE” is painted on the door.
data/maps/AbandonedShip_Corridors_B1F/te.AbandonedShip_Corridors_B1F_Text_Inserte: {PLAYER} inserted and turned the\nSTORAGE KEY.\pThe inserted KEY stuck fast, but the\ndoor opened.

data/maps/AbandonedShip_HiddenFloorCorri.AbandonedShip_HiddenFloorCorridors_Text_: The door is locked.\p“RM. 1” is painted on the door.
The door is locked.\p“RM. 2” is painted on the door.
The door is locked.\p“RM. 4” is painted on the door.
The door is locked.\p“RM. 6” is painted on the door.
{PLAYER} inserted and turned the\nKEY.\pThe inserted KEY stuck fast, but the\ndoor opened.

data/maps/AbandonedShip_HiddenFloorRooms.AbandonedShip_HiddenFloorRooms_Text_Brig: It's bright and shiny!\nBut it's just trash...

data/maps/AbandonedShip_Rooms2_1F/text.i.AbandonedShip_Rooms2_1F_Text_HalIntro: HAL: While searching for treasures,\nwe discovered a TRAINER!
data/maps/AbandonedShip_Rooms2_1F/text.i.AbandonedShip_Rooms2_1F_Text_HalDefeat: HAL: We couldn't win even though\nwe worked together...
data/maps/AbandonedShip_Rooms2_1F/text.i.AbandonedShip_Rooms2_1F_Text_HalPostBatt: HAL: We can't find any treasures...\nI wonder if someone got them already?
data/maps/AbandonedShip_Rooms2_1F/text.i.AbandonedShip_Rooms2_1F_Text_HalNeedTwoP: HAL: You don't even have two POKéMON.\nYou can't expect to beat us like that.
data/maps/AbandonedShip_Rooms2_1F/text.i.AbandonedShip_Rooms2_1F_Text_LoisIntro: LOIS: Oh? We were looking for some\ntreasure, but we only found a TRAINER.
data/maps/AbandonedShip_Rooms2_1F/text.i.AbandonedShip_Rooms2_1F_Text_LoisPostBat: LOIS: I wonder where the treasures\nare hidden?\pI already know what I'm going to buy\nwhen I find them!
data/maps/AbandonedShip_Rooms2_1F/text.i.AbandonedShip_Rooms2_1F_Text_LoisNeedTwo: LOIS: Don't you have two POKéMON?\nWe'll have to battle another time!
data/maps/AbandonedShip_Rooms2_1F/text.i.AbandonedShip_Rooms2_1F_Text_HalRematchI: HAL: We've been searching for\ntreasures all this time.\pOur POKéMON have grown stronger, too.\nLet us show you, okay?
data/maps/AbandonedShip_Rooms2_1F/text.i.AbandonedShip_Rooms2_1F_Text_HalRematchP: HAL: We can't find any treasures,\nwe lose at POKéMON...\pI want to go home... But if I say that,\nshe gets all angry with me...
data/maps/AbandonedShip_Rooms2_1F/text.i.AbandonedShip_Rooms2_1F_Text_HalRematchN: HAL: You don't even have two POKéMON.\nYou can't expect to beat us like that.
data/maps/AbandonedShip_Rooms2_1F/text.i.AbandonedShip_Rooms2_1F_Text_LoisRematch: LOIS: Oh, hi, we meet again!\pJust like us, you haven't given up\nsearching for treasures!\pHow about we battle, and the loser has\nto give up looking?
LOIS: We'll raise our POKéMON more.\pWe're not going home until we find our\ntreasures!
LOIS: Don't you have two POKéMON?\nWe'll have to battle another time!

data/maps/AbandonedShip_Rooms2_B1F/text..AbandonedShip_Rooms2_B1F_Text_PerfectPla: This is a perfect place to go exploring!\nIt's exciting here!\pI bet there're amazing treasures on\nboard.

data/maps/AbandonedShip_Rooms_1F/text.in.AbandonedShip_Rooms_1F_Text_TakingALookA: Ships of this sort are rare, so I'm\ntaking a look around.\pHmhm...\nThere appear to be other cabins...

data/maps/AbandonedShip_Rooms_B1F/text.i.AbandonedShip_Rooms_B1F_Text_GettingQuea: Urrrrppp...\pI'm getting queasy just being aboard\nthis ship...\pIt's not even moving, but...

data/maps/AquaHideout_1F/text.inc.AquaHideout_1F_Text_196AFD:
What? What? What do you want with 
TEAM {EVIL_TEAM}?\pOur BOSS isn't here! He's gone off to
snatch something important!\p... ...
Where did he go?\pWahaha! Do you really think I'd tell
you something that crucial?
data/maps/AquaHideout_1F/text.inc.AquaHideout_1F_Text_196BC5:
What? What? What do you want with 
TEAM {EVIL_TEAM}?\pOur BOSS isn't here!
He's gone off to jack a submarine!\p... ...
Where did he go?\pWahaha! Do you really think I'd tell
you something that crucial?
data/maps/AquaHideout_1F/text.inc.AquaHideout_1F_Text_196C83:
What? What? What do you want with 
TEAM {EVIL_TEAM}?\pOur BOSS isn't here! He's on his way to
MT. PYRE on ROUTE 122!\p... ...
Why did he go?\pWahaha! Do you really think I'd tell
you something that crucial?
data/maps/AquaHideout_1F/text.inc.AquaHideout_1F_Text_196D46:
What? What? What do you want with
TEAM {EVIL_TEAM}?\pOur BOSS isn't here!
He's on his way to SLATEPORT CITY!\p... ...
Why did he go?\pWahaha! Do you really think I'd tell
you something that crucial?
data/maps/AquaHideout_1F/text.inc.AquaHideout_1F_Text_196E3D: I took the loss for the TEAM, but\nI did my job...

data/maps/AquaHideout_B1F/text.inc.AquaHideout_B1F_Text_196E6F: If you want to know the secret about\nour HIDEOUT, you have me to beat!
data/maps/AquaHideout_B1F/text.inc.AquaHideout_B1F_Text_196ECC: Our HIDEOUT's secret?\pWell, let's just say...\nThere's a submarine at the far end!\pBut, by now...\nKekekeke...
data/maps/AquaHideout_B1F/text.inc.AquaHideout_B1F_Text_196F39: Fuel supply loaded A-OK!\nIn-cruise snacks loaded A-OK!\pNothing left to do but KO a pesky\nmeddler!
data/maps/AquaHideout_B1F/text.inc.AquaHideout_B1F_Text_196FB5: Humph!\nThis was supposed to happen!\pMy mission was to just hold you up!
data/maps/AquaHideout_B1F/text.inc.AquaHideout_B1F_Text_196FFD: Yawn... Keeping watch over the\nHIDEOUT bores me. I'll take you on.
data/maps/AquaHideout_B1F/text.inc.AquaHideout_B1F_Text_197056: If you scurry too much, other TEAM\n{EVIL_TEAM} members might get you.

data/maps/AquaHideout_B2F/text.inc.AquaHideout_B2F_Text_197093:
Hehehe...\pGot here already, did you?
We underestimated you!\pBut this is it!\pI'm a cut above the GRUNTS you've seen
so far.\pI'm not stalling for time. I'm going
to pulverize you!
data/maps/AquaHideout_B2F/text.inc.AquaHideout_B2F_Text_197162: Hehehe!\pWhile I was toying with you, our BOSS\ngot through his preparations!
data/maps/AquaHideout_B2F/text.inc.AquaHideout_B2F_Text_1971AE:
Hehehe!\pOur BOSS has already gone on his way to
some cave under the sea!\pIf you're going to give chase, you'd
better search the big, wide sea beyond\lLILYCOVE.\pBut will you find it then?
Hehehe!
data/maps/AquaHideout_B2F/text.inc.AquaHideout_B2F_Text_197270: Wahahah, I grew weary of waiting!\nYou owe me a battle, too!
data/maps/AquaHideout_B2F/text.inc.AquaHideout_B2F_Text_1972EF:
Warp panels, the HIDEOUT's pride
and joy!\pYou're clueless about where you are,
aren't you?\pFluster and tire out the enemy, then
lower the boom! That's our plan!
data/maps/AquaHideout_B2F/text.inc.AquaHideout_B2F_Text_197390: What's wrong with you?\nYou're not tired at all!
data/maps/AquaHideout_B2F/text.inc.AquaHideout_B2F_Text_1973C0: That reminds me... I can't remember\nwhere I put the MASTER BALL.\pIf I fail to guard it, our BOSS will\nchew me out...

data/maps/BattleTower_BattleRoom/text.in.BattleTower_BattleRoom_Text_19ACDC: We will restore your POKéMON to\nfull health.
data/maps/BattleTower_BattleRoom/text.in.BattleTower_BattleRoom_Text_19AD09: You will be facing opponent no. {STR_VAR_1}.\nAre you ready?
data/maps/BattleTower_BattleRoom/text.in.BattleTower_BattleRoom_Text_19AD3C: Would you like to save and\nquit the game?
data/maps/BattleTower_BattleRoom/text.in.BattleTower_BattleRoom_Text_19AD66: Would you like to cancel your BATTLE\nROOM challenge?

data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_199F2C: Welcome to the BATTLE TOWER!\pPlease register with me to enter\na BATTLE ROOM.
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_199F79: Would you like to make a BATTLE ROOM\nchallenge?
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_199FA9: We'll be looking forward to your\nnext challenge.
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_199FDA: Before entering a BATTLE ROOM, your\nprogress must be saved. Is that okay?
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A024: There are two BATTLE ROOMS,\nLevel 50 and Level 100.\lWhich would you like to challenge?
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A07B: Please select the POKéMON you wish\nto enter.
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A0A8: I'll direct you to your BATTLE ROOM now.
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A0D1:
The BATTLE TOWER is a facility made
especially for POKéMON battles.\pWithin the TOWER are many BATTLE ROOMS.\pIn each BATTLE ROOM, seven TRAINERS
await your challenge.\pBeat all seven, and you will be rewarded
with a fabulous prize.\pYou may also take a break from your
challenge by saving your progress.\pMake sure you save properly or you
won't be able to resume your challenge.
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A249: Excuse me!\pYou don't have three eligible POKéMON.\pYou must have three different POKéMON\nof Level 50 or less to enter.\pThey also must be holding different\nkinds of items.\pEGGS{STR_VAR_1} ineligible.\pPlease come see me when you are ready.
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A32D: Excuse me!\pYou don't have three eligible POKéMON.\pYou must have three different POKéMON\nto enter.\pThey also must be holding different\nkinds of items.\pEGGS{STR_VAR_1} ineligible.\pPlease come see me when you are ready.
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A3FD: Excuse me!\pYou didn't save before you quit your\nchallenge last time.\pBecause of that, your challenge so far\nhas been disqualified. Sorry!
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A4BB: For beating seven TRAINERS in a row,\nyou have earned this fabulous prize!\p
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A520: Oh, your BAG appears to be full.\pPlease make room in your BAG, then come\nsee me.
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A589: Your record will be saved.\nPlease wait.
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A5CE: Before entering a BATTLE ROOM, your\nprogress will be saved. Please wait.
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A617: You're finally about to face the\n50th TRAINER.\pFrom here on, every time you beat seven\nTRAINERS in a row, your POKéMON will\lreceive a commemorative RIBBON.\pGood luck!
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A6BE: Here are some RIBBONS for beating\nseven tough TRAINERS in a row.\p{PLAYER} received some RIBBONS!
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A719: {PLAYER} put the RIBBONS on the\nchallenger POKéMON.
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A747: Hello, hello!\nYou're going to battle here, right?\pCan you tell me what's going through\nyour mind as you prepare for battle?
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A7C3: Oh, wow, you'll tell me?\nGreat! Then, what's your answer?
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A7FD: Oh, so you don't think much about it?\nYou're one cool customer.
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A83D: Hunh? You changed your mind?\nI guess you're fickle.
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A871: Okay, so that's how you feel?\nThat's quite original.\pThanks!
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A8AE:
The number of matches you win in a row
is recorded.\pThe record is posted beside the
registration counter.\pIt's also on the back of your
TRAINER'S CARD.
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A946: Once you've entered the BATTLE TOWER,\nyou can't leave until you either lose\lor you beat seven TRAINERS in a row.\pYou'd best be certain that you're up\nto the challenge.
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19A9EE:
Hahahaha! Pure magnificence!
Pure magnificence indeed!\pDo you realize what you've achieved?
You've beaten 50 TRAINERS in a row!\pYes, purely magnificent!\pAs the OWNER of the BATTLE TOWER,
let me give you a memento!
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19AAC4:
Wahahaha! Pure magnificence!
Absolutely pure magnificence indeed!\pDo you realize what you've achieved?
You've beaten 100 TRAINERS in a row!\pYes, absolutely magnificent!\pAs the OWNER of the BATTLE TOWER,
let me give you a memento!
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19ABAA: I suggest you keep it displayed.\nIt will surely attract attention.
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19ABED: Oh?\nYour PC has no room for this...\pBut it would be a shame to waste this...\nPlease come back for this!
data/maps/BattleTower_Lobby/text.inc.BattleTower_Lobby_Text_19AC55: I'm overwhelmed with satisfaction after\nseeing your magnificent performance.\pIt makes the building of the BATTLE\nTOWER all worthwhile!

data/maps/BattleTower_Outside/text.inc.BattleTower_Outside_Text_199C6F: BATTLE TOWER\n“Win it all and be the best, TRAINERS!”
data/maps/BattleTower_Outside/text.inc.BattleTower_Outside_Text_199CA4: This is the BATTLE TOWER.\pTRAINERS bring their best-raised\nPOKéMON for elimination-style matches.
data/maps/BattleTower_Outside/text.inc.BattleTower_Outside_Text_199D06: Hello, are you here for the ferry?\nMay I see your TICKET?
data/maps/BattleTower_Outside/text.inc.BattleTower_Outside_Text_199D40: {PLAYER} doesn't have the TICKET...\pI'm terribly sorry.\pYou must have a TICKET to board\nthe ferry.
data/maps/BattleTower_Outside/text.inc.BattleTower_Outside_Text_199D9D: {PLAYER} flashed the TICKET.\pPerfect! That's all you need!\pAnd where would you like to go?
data/maps/BattleTower_Outside/text.inc.BattleTower_Outside_Text_199E29: Please sail with us another time!
data/maps/BattleTower_Outside/text.inc.BattleTower_Outside_Text_199E4B: Please board the ferry and wait for\ndeparture.
data/maps/BattleTower_Outside/text.inc.BattleTower_Outside_Text_199E7A: Then, where would you like to go?
data/maps/BattleTower_Outside/text.inc.BattleTower_Outside_Text_199E9C: I'm not leaving until I've beaten 35\nTRAINERS in a row!
data/maps/BattleTower_Outside/text.inc.BattleTower_Outside_Text_199ED4: Gee, there're a lot of tough-looking\nTRAINERS here.\lI'm not good enough to enter yet...

data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_TinyIslandCommunity: DEWFORD TOWN is a tiny island community.\nIf something gets trendy here,\leveryone picks up on it right away.
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_TownSign: DEWFORD TOWN\n“A tiny island in the blue sea.”
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_GymSign: DEWFORD TOWN POKéMON GYM\nLEADER: BRAWLY\l“A big wave in fighting!”
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.Route104_Text_LandedInDewfordDeliverLett: MR. BRINEY: Ahoy!\nWe've hit land in DEWFORD.\pI suppose you're off to deliver that\nLETTER to, who was it now, STEVEN!
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_SetSailBackToPetalburg: MR. BRINEY: Have you delivered your\nLETTER?\pOr were you meaning to sail back to\nPETALBURG?
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_PetalburgWereSettingSai: MR. BRINEY: PETALBURG it is, then!\pAnchors aweigh!\nPEEKO, we're setting sail, my darling!
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_GoDeliverIllBeWaiting: MR. BRINEY: Then you go on and deliver\nthe LETTER. I'll be waiting.
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.Route109_Text_BrineyLandedInDewford: MR. BRINEY: Ahoy!\nWe've hit land in DEWFORD!\pYou just go on and tell me whenever\nyou want to set sail again!
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_WhereAreWeBound: MR. BRINEY: Ahoy!\nFor you, I'll go out to sea anytime!\pNow, my friend, where are we bound?
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_PetalburgWereSettingSai: MR. BRINEY: PETALBURG, is it?\pAnchors aweigh!\nPEEKO, we're setting sail, my darling!
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_SlateportWereSettingSai: MR. BRINEY: SLATEPORT, is it?\pAnchors aweigh!\nPEEKO, we're setting sail, my darling!
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_JustTellMeWhenYouNeedTo: MR. BRINEY: Just tell me whenever you\nwant to set sail again.
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_GettingItchToFish: This is a renowned fishing spot.\nAre you getting the itch to fish?
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_GiveYouOneOfMyRods: I hear you, and I like what\nyou're saying!\pI'll give you one of my fishing RODS.
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_ThrowInFishingAdvice:
And, as an added bonus, I'll even throw
in a little fishing advice!\pFirst, you want to face the water,
then use the ROD.\pFocus your mind...
If you get a bite, pull on the ROD.\pSometimes you can snag something
immediately, but with bigger catches,\lyou need to time the pulls on your ROD\lto haul them in.
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_ThatsTooBadThen: Oh, is that so?\nThat's too bad, then.
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_GreatHaulInSomeBigOnes: Is that right! That's great!\nHaul in some big ones!
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_FishingAdvice:
Oh, hey, don't get down on yourself!
I'll give you a little fishing advice.\pFirst, you want to face the water,
then use the ROD.\pFocus your mind...
If you get a bite, pull the ROD.\pSometimes you can snag something
immediately, but with bigger catches,\lyou need to time the pulls on your ROD\lto haul them in.
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_XIsTheBiggestHappeningT:
I like what's hip, happening, and trendy.
I'm always checking it out.\pListen, have you heard about this new
“{STR_VAR_1}”?\pThat's right!
Of course you know!\pI mean, sheesh,
“{STR_VAR_1}”...\lIt's the hottest thing in cool!\pWherever you're from,
“{STR_VAR_1}”\lis the biggest happening thing, right?
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_TellMeWhatsNewAndIn: Hunh?\nIt's not the hip and happening thing?\pWell, hey, you have to tell me,\nwhat's new and what's “in”?
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_OfCourseIKnowAboutThat:
Hunh?
“{STR_VAR_2}”?\p... ...\p...Uh... Yeah! That's right!
Yeah, I knew that! Knew it all along!\pOf course I know about that!
“{STR_VAR_2},” right?\pYeah, that's it, it's there!
Isn't “{STR_VAR_2}”\lthe coolest, or what?\pIt's the hippest thing in hip.
You think I'd not know about it?\p“{STR_VAR_1}”...
It's, like, so five minutes ago.\pNow, “{STR_VAR_2}” is
what's vital and in tune with the times!
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_XHuhIThinkYIsCool: Hmm...\n“{STR_VAR_2},” huh?\pBut personally, I think\n“{STR_VAR_1}”\lis what's real in cool.
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_HearOfAnyTrendsComeShar: Well, if you hear of any happening new\ntrends, come share them with me, okay?
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_YeahDefinitionOfInRight: Yeah, absolutely right!\p“{STR_VAR_1}” is the\ndefinition of “in” right now.
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_PinnacleOfCool: “{STR_VAR_2}” is at\nthe pinnacle of cool right now.

data/maps/DewfordTown_Gym/text.inc.DewfordTown_Gym_Text_GymGuideAdvice:
Hey, how's it going, CHAMPION-
bound {PLAYER}?\pDEWFORD's GYM LEADER BRAWLY commands
FIGHTING-type POKéMON.\pGoing against him with NORMAL-type
POKéMON is asking for trouble.\pFIGHTING POKéMON will lay a serious
smack down on NORMAL POKéMON,\lso be careful!\pWhat's worse, the GYM is as dark as
the ocean floor.\pBut it will get brighter after defeating
the TRAINERS in your way.\pHey, okay, go for it!
data/maps/DewfordTown_Gym/text.inc.DewfordTown_Gym_Text_GymGuidePostVictory: Whoah! It's turned too bright in here!\pYour future is bright, too!
data/maps/DewfordTown_Gym/text.inc.DewfordTown_Gym_Text_HidekiPostBattle: Your skill overcame my strength!\nYour technique is commendable!
data/maps/DewfordTown_Gym/text.inc.DewfordTown_Gym_Text_TessaIntro: There's no need for BRAWLY to be\ninvolved!\pI'll crush you!
data/maps/DewfordTown_Gym/text.inc.DewfordTown_Gym_Text_TessaDefeat: But... How?\nHow could I lose so easily?
data/maps/DewfordTown_Gym/text.inc.DewfordTown_Gym_Text_TessaPostBattle: I'm not going to waste this loss.\nI'll use it to motivate me to train!\pOne day I'll become a GYM LEADER...\pNo, I'll become the POKéMON LEAGUE\nCHAMPION!
data/maps/DewfordTown_Gym/text.inc.DewfordTown_Gym_Text_LauraIntro: Don't you dare brush me off!\nIt's not my fault if you cry!
data/maps/DewfordTown_Gym/text.inc.DewfordTown_Gym_Text_LauraPostBattle: I battle in the dark to make my heart\nstronger.\pBut because it's so dark, I can never\nsee BRAWLY's face...
data/maps/DewfordTown_Gym/text.inc.DewfordTown_Gym_Text_BrawlyIntro:
I'm BRAWLY!
DEWFORD's GYM LEADER!\pI've been churned in the rough waves
of these parts, and I've grown tough\lin the pitch-black cave!\pSo you wanted to challenge me?
Let me see what you're made of!
data/maps/DewfordTown_Gym/text.inc.DewfordTown_Gym_Text_BrawlyDefeat: Whoah, wow! You made a much bigger\nsplash than I expected!\pYou swamped me!\pOkay, you've got me.\nTake this GYM BADGE!
data/maps/DewfordTown_Gym/text.inc.DewfordTown_Gym_Text_KnuckleBadgeInfoTak:
The KNUCKLE BADGE makes all POKéMON
up to Level 30, even those you get in\ltrades, obey without question.\pAnd, you'll be able to use the HM move
FLASH outside of battle.\pIf you'd like, use this TECHNICAL
MACHINE, too.
data/maps/DewfordTown_Gym/text.inc.DewfordTown_Gym_Text_ExplainBulkUp: That TM08 contains BULK UP.\pIt's a move that raises both ATTACK\nand DEFENSE stats.
data/maps/DewfordTown_Gym/text.inc.DewfordTown_Gym_Text_BrawlyPostBattle: I can see your talent becoming a giant\nwave to cause a storm of astonishment\lamong TRAINERS one day!
data/maps/DewfordTown_Gym/text.inc.DewfordTown_Gym_Text_GymStatueCertified: DEWFORD TOWN POKéMON GYM\pBRAWLY'S CERTIFIED TRAINERS:\n{PLAYER}

data/maps/DewfordTown_Hall/text.inc.DewfordTown_Hall_Text_CantImagineLifeWit: What's in vogue? Why, it has to be\n“{STR_VAR_1}”!\pI can't imagine what life would be like\nwithout “{STR_VAR_1}”!
data/maps/DewfordTown_Hall/text.inc.DewfordTown_Hall_Text_GettingBoredOfTren: What's in vogue? Why, it has to be\n“{STR_VAR_1}”!\pBut I'm getting kind of bored with it.\pI should look for the next big thing.
data/maps/DewfordTown_Hall/text.inc.DewfordTown_Hall_Text_TeachingMonAboutTr: I'm teaching my POKéMON about\n“{STR_VAR_1},”\lbut it's not going well.\pIt's a bit too much, I think.
data/maps/DewfordTown_Hall/text.inc.DewfordTown_Hall_Text_DeepLinkBetweenXAn: I'm studying up on the hip and trendy\n“{STR_VAR_1}” now.\pIs it true that there's a deep link\nbetween “{STR_VAR_1}”\land “{STR_VAR_2}”?
data/maps/DewfordTown_Hall/text.inc.DewfordTown_Hall_Text_MyHunchWasRight: Oh!\nSo, my hunch was right!\pI'm one step closer to being hip and\nhappening, yowza!
data/maps/DewfordTown_Hall/text.inc.DewfordTown_Hall_Text_NotEasyToKeepUp: What?!\nIs that so?!\pIt's not easy for an older fellow like\nme to keep up with trends!
data/maps/DewfordTown_Hall/text.inc.DewfordTown_Hall_Text_TVShowAboutTrend: This whole business about\n“{STR_VAR_1}”...\lIsn't there a TV show on it?
data/maps/DewfordTown_Hall/text.inc.DewfordTown_Hall_Text_CollectTrendMercha:
I collect official
“{STR_VAR_1}”\llicensed merchandise.\pI have official
“{STR_VAR_1}” dolls...\pOfficial “{STR_VAR_1}”
brand clothing...\pAnd officially licensed
“{STR_VAR_1}”\lpicture books.\pHeheh, I own!
I'm not sharing anything with you!
data/maps/DewfordTown_Hall/text.inc.DewfordTown_Hall_Text_BooksAboutTrend:
IDENTIFYING GOOD
“{STR_VAR_1}” &\lBAD “{STR_VAR_1}”...\pTHE LINK BETWEEN
“{STR_VAR_1}” AND\lPOKéMON...\pUSEFUL
“{STR_VAR_1}”...\pIt's neatly jammed with books about
“{STR_VAR_1}.”
data/maps/DewfordTown_Hall/text.inc.DewfordTown_Hall_Text_SawTrendCoolestThi: I saw “{STR_VAR_1}”!\nCool, huh?\pIt's, like, the coolest thing going!\pIt was awesome!\nIt was the real thing, oh yeah!
data/maps/DewfordTown_Hall/text.inc.DewfordTown_Hall_Text_AllegedTrendNotAut: Oh, no, no, no.\pThat alleged\n“{STR_VAR_1}”\lyou claim to have seen - it's not.\pThe authentic article is much...\nHow should I say it?\lSharper, yet more mellifluous!\pAh, no matter. It's astonishing!
data/maps/DewfordTown_Hall/text.inc.DewfordTown_Hall_Text_ComposedTrendTheme:
Hey, listen, I composed a theme song
for “{STR_VAR_1}.”\p“{STR_VAR_1}”
is really popular right now.\pOkay, listen!
... ...\pOh!
{STR_VAR_1}!\pWonderful
{STR_VAR_1}!
data/maps/DewfordTown_Hall/text.inc.DewfordTown_Hall_Text_WorkOnYourSinging: ... ...\pI dare say, chap, it would pay for you\nto work on your singing before you\ltrifle yourself with\l“{STR_VAR_1}.”
data/maps/DewfordTown_Hall/text.inc.DewfordTown_Hall_Text_OrganizeTrendParty: Anyway, as I was saying earlier, we\nshould get together and organize a\l“{STR_VAR_1}” party\lon the island.
data/maps/DewfordTown_Hall/text.inc.DewfordTown_Hall_Text_BrilliantIndeed: Oh, a smashing good idea!\pIt will settle once and for all\nwho is the best at\l“{STR_VAR_1}.”\lBrilliant, indeed!\pStarting today, our lives will revolve\naround “{STR_VAR_1}”!
data/maps/DewfordTown_Hall/text.inc.DewfordTown_Hall_Text_TrendHasBecomePart: I was thinking, though...\pWouldn't you agree that\n“{STR_VAR_1}” has\lgrown from being something trendy to\lbeing a part of our daily lives?
data/maps/DewfordTown_Hall/text.inc.DewfordTown_Hall_Text_TrendWeighsHeavily:
Beg pardon?
That much, what?\pHowever, it's true that
“{STR_VAR_1}”\lweighs heavily on your mind, whether\lyou're awake or asleep.\pAbsolutely, you're the
“{STR_VAR_1}”\lPROFESSOR, old sport!
data/maps/DewfordTown_Hall/text.inc.DewfordTown_Hall_Text_IfWeTeamUpWellBeIn: If you and me team up as a combo,\nwe'll be invincible when it comes to all\lthings “{STR_VAR_1}”!
data/maps/DewfordTown_Hall/text.inc.DewfordTown_Hall_Text_WellBeTrendDuo: Spot on, my friend!\pWe shall be the\n“{STR_VAR_1}” DUO!\pIsn't that a ripe image?\nHahahah!
data/maps/DewfordTown_Hall/text.inc.DewfordTown_Hall_Text_GiveYouSludgeBomb:
For me, SLUDGE BOMB is at the peak
of popularity. It's the one.\pHunh? You're telling me that you don't
know about SLUDGE BOMB?\pThat's outright pitiful.
I'll give you one.
data/maps/DewfordTown_Hall/text.inc.DewfordTown_Hall_Text_LoveSludgeBombButT: I love SLUDGE BOMB.\pBut POKéMON with the\n“{STR_VAR_1}”\lmove are in, too.

data/maps/DewfordTown_House1/text.inc.DewfordTown_House1_Text_LotToBeSaidForLi: There's a lot to be said for living on\na small island like this in harmony with\lPOKéMON and the family.
data/maps/DewfordTown_House1/text.inc.DewfordTown_House1_Text_LifeGoesSlowlyOn: I came from the large port of SLATEPORT\nCITY when I married my husband here.\pLife goes by slowly on this little\nisland. But being surrounded by the\lbeautiful sea - that's happiness, too.

data/maps/DewfordTown_House2/text.inc.DewfordTown_House2_Text_WantYouToHaveSil:
Gorge your eyes on this!\pIt's a SILK SCARF. It's right at the
cutting edge of fashion, yeah!\pOh, I can see your eyes twinkling!
You appreciate my dazzling style!\pOh, you're a delight!
Here you go. I want you to have it!
data/maps/DewfordTown_House2/text.inc.DewfordTown_House2_Text_NoRoom: Oh, you don't have room?\pNow, listen tight, this SCARF is a must-\nhave! Why, I would sell all my items\lin order to get it!
data/maps/DewfordTown_House2/text.inc.DewfordTown_House2_Text_ExplainSilkScarf: The SILK SCARF raises the power of\nNORMAL-type moves.\pIt's a marvelous SCARF that will go\nwith almost all POKéMON!
data/maps/DewfordTown_House2/text.inc.DewfordTown_House2_Text_BrawlySoCool:
Wow, you bothered to cross the sea
to visit DEWFORD?\pDid you maybe come here because you
heard about BRAWLY?\pHe's so cool...
Everyone idolizes him.

data/maps/DewfordTown_PokemonCenter_1F/t.DewfordTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_StoneC: There's a stone cavern at the edge\nof town.\pI've heard you can find rare stones\nthere.
data/maps/DewfordTown_PokemonCenter_1F/t.DewfordTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Fainte: Even if a POKéMON faints and can't\nbattle, it can still use a move learned\lfrom a Hidden Machine, HM.

data/maps/EverGrandeCity/text.inc.EverGrandeCity_Text_CitySign: EVER GRANDE CITY\p“The paradise of flowers, the sea,\nand POKéMON.”

data/maps/EverGrandeCity_ChampionsRoom/t.EverGrandeCity_ChampionsRoom_Text_IntroS:
STEVEN: Welcome, {PLAYER}{KUN}.\pI was looking forward to seeing you
here one day.\pYou... What did you see on your
journey with POKéMON?\pWhat did you feel, meeting so many
other TRAINERS like you?\pWhat has awoken in you?
I want you to hit me with it all!\pNow, bring it!
data/maps/EverGrandeCity_ChampionsRoom/t.EverGrandeCity_ChampionsRoom_Text_Defeat: I, the CHAMPION, fall in defeat...\pKudos to you, {PLAYER}{KUN}!\pYou are a truly noble POKéMON\nTRAINER!
data/maps/EverGrandeCity_ChampionsRoom/t.EverGrandeCity_ChampionsRoom_Text_PostBa:
STEVEN: Congratulations!\pThe feelings you have for your
POKéMON...\pAnd the POKéMON that responded to
those feelings with all their might...\pThey came together as one, and created
an even greater power.\pAnd thus, you were able to grasp
victory today!\pYou are rightfully the HOENN region's
new...
data/maps/EverGrandeCity_ChampionsRoom/t.EverGrandeCity_ChampionsRoom_Text_MayAdv: MAY: {PLAYER}{KUN}!\pHere's some advice before you challenge\nthe CHAMPION...
data/maps/EverGrandeCity_ChampionsRoom/t.EverGrandeCity_ChampionsRoom_Text_MayIts: MAY: Huh? What, what, what?\p{PLAYER}{KUN}...\nCould it be that...\lIt's already over?
data/maps/EverGrandeCity_ChampionsRoom/t.EverGrandeCity_ChampionsRoom_Text_Brenda: BRENDAN: {PLAYER}!\pHow would you like some advice before\nyou challenge the CHAMPION?...
BRENDAN: {PLAYER}...\pAre you trying to tell me...\nYou've beaten the CHAMPION?
data/maps/EverGrandeCity_ChampionsRoom/t.EverGrandeCity_ChampionsRoom_Text_BirchA:
PROF. BIRCH: See?
What did I tell you, {RIVAL}?\pDidn't I tell you that you don't need
to worry about {PLAYER}{KUN}?\p... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...
{PLAYER}{KUN}, you've finally done it.\pWhen I heard that you defeated your
own father at the PETALBURG GYM,\lI thought perhaps you had a chance...\pBut to think you've actually become
the CHAMPION!\pAh, yes!\pWhat became of your POKéDEX?
Here, let me see.
data/maps/EverGrandeCity_ChampionsRoom/t.EverGrandeCity_ChampionsRoom_Text_BirchC: PROF. BIRCH: Anyways,\ncongratulations!\pNow, go proudly into the final room!
data/maps/EverGrandeCity_ChampionsRoom/t.EverGrandeCity_ChampionsRoom_Text_Steven: STEVEN: {PLAYER}{KUN}...\pNo, the new CHAMPION!\pCome with me.
STEVEN: I'm sorry, but...\pFrom here on, only those TRAINERS who\nhave become CHAMPIONS may enter.\pYou'll have to wait outside with the\nPROFESSOR.
data/maps/EverGrandeCity_ChampionsRoom/t.EverGrandeCity_ChampionsRoom_Text_MayCon:
MAY: Groan...\p... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...
... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...\pI'm just joking! That's okay!
That's the rule!\p{PLAYER}{KUN}!
Honestly, congratulations!
data/maps/EverGrandeCity_ChampionsRoom/t.EverGrandeCity_ChampionsRoom_Text_Brenda: BRENDAN: ... ... ... ... ... ...\n... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...\pIt can't be helped if that's the rule.\p{PLAYER}, way to go!\nCongratulations!

data/maps/EverGrandeCity_DrakesRoom/text.EverGrandeCity_DrakesRoom_Text_IntroSpee:
I am the last of the POKéMON LEAGUE
ELITE FOUR, DRAKE the DRAGON master!\pIn their natural state, POKéMON are
wild living things. They are free.\pAt times, they hinder us.
At times, they help us.\pFor us to battle with POKéMON as
partners, do you know what it takes?\pDo you know what is needed?\pIf you don't, then you will never
prevail over me!
data/maps/EverGrandeCity_DrakesRoom/text.EverGrandeCity_DrakesRoom_Text_PostBattl:
You deserve every credit for coming
this far as a TRAINER of POKéMON.\pYou do seem to know what is needed.\pYes, what a TRAINER needs is a
virtuous heart.\pPOKéMON touch the good hearts of
TRAINERS and learn good from wrong.\pThey touch the good hearts of
TRAINERS and grow strong.\pGo! Go onwards!
The CHAMPION is waiting!

data/maps/EverGrandeCity_GlaciasRoom/tex.EverGrandeCity_GlaciasRoom_Text_IntroSpe:
Welcome, my name is GLACIA of the
ELITE FOUR.\pI've traveled from afar to HOENN so
that I may hone my ice skills.\pBut all I have seen are challenges by
weak TRAINERS and their POKéMON.\pWhat about you?\pIt would please me to no end if I could
go all out against you!
data/maps/EverGrandeCity_GlaciasRoom/tex.EverGrandeCity_GlaciasRoom_Text_Defeat: You and your POKéMON...\nHow hot your spirits burn!\pThe all-consuming heat overwhelms.\pIt's no surprise that my icy skills\nfailed to harm you.
data/maps/EverGrandeCity_GlaciasRoom/tex.EverGrandeCity_GlaciasRoom_Text_PostBatt: Advance to the next room.\pAnd there, confirm the truly fearsome\nside of the POKéMON LEAGUE.

data/maps/EverGrandeCity_HallOfFame/text.EverGrandeCity_HallOfFame_Text_HereWeHon: STEVEN: This room...\pThis is where we keep records of\nPOKéMON that prevailed through\lharsh battles.\pIt is here that the LEAGUE CHAMPIONS\nare honored.
data/maps/EverGrandeCity_HallOfFame/text.EverGrandeCity_HallOfFame_Text_LetsRecor: STEVEN: Come on, let's record your\nname as a TRAINER who triumphed over\lthe POKéMON LEAGUE, and the names of\lthe partners who battled with you.

data/maps/EverGrandeCity_PhoebesRoom/tex.EverGrandeCity_PhoebesRoom_Text_IntroSpe:
Ahahaha!\pI'm PHOEBE of the ELITE FOUR.
I did my training on MT. PYRE.\pWhile I trained, I gained the ability
to commune with GHOST-type POKéMON.\pYes, the bond I developed with POKéMON
is extremely tight.\pSo, come on, just try and see if you can
even inflict damage on my POKéMON!
data/maps/EverGrandeCity_PhoebesRoom/tex.EverGrandeCity_PhoebesRoom_Text_PostBatt:
There's a definite bond between you
and your POKéMON, too.\pI didn't recognize it, so it's only
natural that I lost.\pYup, I'd like to see how far your bond
will carry you.\pGo ahead, move on to the next room.

data/maps/EverGrandeCity_PokemonCenter_1.EverGrandeCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Lea: The POKéMON LEAGUE is only a short\ndistance after the VICTORY ROAD.\pIf you've come this far, what choice\ndo you have but to keep going?
data/maps/EverGrandeCity_PokemonCenter_1.EverGrandeCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Bel: The long and harrowing VICTORY ROAD...\pIt's like reliving the path one has\ntraveled in life...\pBelieve in your POKéMON and give it\nyour very best!

data/maps/EverGrandeCity_PokemonLeague/t.EverGrandeCity_PokemonLeague_1F_Text_Mus: Beyond this point, only those TRAINERS\nwho have collected all the GYM BADGES\lare permitted to enter.\pTRAINER, let us confirm that you have\nall the GYM BADGES.
data/maps/EverGrandeCity_PokemonLeague/t.EverGrandeCity_PokemonLeague_1F_Text_Hav: You haven't obtained all the BADGES.\pIf you're bound for the POKéMON\nLEAGUE, you must return with them.
data/maps/EverGrandeCity_PokemonLeague/t.EverGrandeCity_PokemonLeague_1F_Text_GoF: TRAINER! Believe in yourself and your\nPOKéMON, and go forth!

data/maps/EverGrandeCity_SidneysRoom/tex.EverGrandeCity_SidneysRoom_Text_190728:
Welcome, challenger!
I'm SIDNEY of the ELITE FOUR.\pI like that look you're giving me.
I guess you'll give me a good match.\lThat's good! Looking real good!\pAll right! You and me, let's enjoy a
battle that can only be staged here\lin the POKéMON LEAGUE!
data/maps/EverGrandeCity_SidneysRoom/tex.EverGrandeCity_SidneysRoom_Text_Defeat: Well, how do you like that? I lost!\nEh, it was fun, so it doesn't matter.
data/maps/EverGrandeCity_SidneysRoom/tex.EverGrandeCity_SidneysRoom_Text_PostBatt: Well, listen to what this loser has\nto say.\pYou've got what it takes to go far.\nNow, go on to the next room and enjoy\lyour next battle!

data/maps/FallarborTown/text.inc.FallarborTown_Text_ShadyFellowAtLab: What's up, what's up?\pI saw a shady fellow scuttling in and\nout of PROF. COZMO's LAB.
data/maps/FallarborTown/text.inc.FallarborTown_Text_RegionKnownForMeteors: This region's been known for meteors\nsince the olden days.\pThey say METEOR FALLS was gouged out\nby a falling meteorite long ago.
data/maps/FallarborTown/text.inc.FallarborTown_Text_MyPreciousAzurill: See! Take a look!\nThis is my precious AZURILL!\pIt's slick and smooth and plushy, too!
data/maps/FallarborTown/text.inc.FallarborTown_Text_HaveYouChallengedFlan:
Have you already challenged FLANNERY,
the LEADER of LAVARIDGE GYM?\pThe girl's grandfather was famous.
He was one of the ELITE FOUR in the\lPOKéMON LEAGUE at one point.\pIt wouldn't surprise me to see FLANNERY
become a great TRAINER in her own\lright.
data/maps/FallarborTown/text.inc.FallarborTown_Text_ContestHallSign: POKéMON CONTESTS\nSUPER RANK REGISTRATION\p“Burst on to the POKéMON scene!”
data/maps/FallarborTown/text.inc.FallarborTown_Text_TownSign: FALLARBOR TOWN\n“A farm community with small gardens.”
data/maps/FallarborTown/text.inc.FallarborTown_Text_MoveTutorSign: MOVE TUTOR'S HOUSE\n“New moves taught to POKéMON.”

data/maps/FallarborTown_ContestHall/text.FallarborTown_ContestHall_Text_DoAllRigh: We do all right in the preliminary round,\nbut we can never win the appeals...\pMaybe it means I have to watch what\nother contestants are doing...
data/maps/FallarborTown_ContestHall/text.FallarborTown_ContestHall_Text_MonAllThe: See!\nMy POKéMON won all these RIBBONS!\pHave your POKéMON earned any RIBBONS?\nYou can check them on your POKéNAV.
data/maps/FallarborTown_ContestHall/text.FallarborTown_ContestHall_Text_CantWinEv: I can't beat GYM LEADERS...\pI can't win any CONTESTS...\pI've been here, there, and everywhere,\nand it's all for naught...

data/maps/FallarborTown_ContestLobby/tex.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_UsedToHa: They had a sketch of my POKéMON up\non the wall over there, but they\lchanged it with a new one already.\pI'm going to enter my HANA in CONTESTS\nso we can get her sketch up again!
data/maps/FallarborTown_ContestLobby/tex.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_AreYouMa: Hi, are you making any {POKEBLOCK}S?\pYou should come by with a bunch of\nBERRIES sometime.
data/maps/FallarborTown_ContestLobby/tex.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_ICreateS: You see how they display a sketch of\na CONTEST winner here?\pI sketch them!\pIf any of your POKéMON wins a CONTEST,\nI'd gladly make a sketch of it!
data/maps/FallarborTown_ContestLobby/tex.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_YourSket: Hello! Congratulations!\pI've put up a sketch of your POKéMON\nright here for everyone to see!

data/maps/FallarborTown_House1/text.inc.FallarborTown_CozmosHouse_Text_Meteorite: PROF. COZMO: Oh...\nI never should have let myself be\lconned into telling TEAM {EVIL_TEAM} where\lyou can find METEORITES...\pThat METEORITE from METEOR FALLS...\nIt's never going to be mine now...
data/maps/FallarborTown_House1/text.inc.FallarborTown_CozmosHouse_Text_IsThatMet:
Oh!
Hah?\pThat item...\pCould it be?\pIs it the METEORITE that TEAM {EVIL_TEAM}
took from METEOR FALLS?\pPlease, may I have it?\pI'm not asking for it for free.
How about in exchange for this TM?
data/maps/FallarborTown_House1/text.inc.FallarborTown_CozmosHouse_Text_PleaseUse: PROF. COZMO: This TM, it represents\nmy feeling of gratitude.\lPlease use it!
data/maps/FallarborTown_House1/text.inc.FallarborTown_CozmosHouse_Text_ReallyGoi: PROF. COZMO: Oh, I can't believe it.\nThis is really, really great!\pThis is really going to help my research!
data/maps/FallarborTown_House1/text.inc.FallarborTown_CozmosHouse_Text_CrushedWi: PROF. COZMO: Oh, but...\nI'm crushed with disappointment...
data/maps/FallarborTown_House1/text.inc.FallarborTown_CozmosHouse_Text_MayIHaveM: PROF. COZMO: Please, may I have that\nMETEORITE?\pI'm not asking for it for free.\nHow about in exchange for this TM?
data/maps/FallarborTown_House1/text.inc.FallarborTown_CozmosHouse_Text_CozmoWent: PROF. COZMO went off to METEOR FALLS\non ROUTE 114 with some people from\lTEAM {EVIL_TEAM}.
data/maps/FallarborTown_House1/text.inc.FallarborTown_CozmosHouse_Text_FeelSorry: Poor PROF. COZMO...\nHe's so depressed... I feel sorry for him.
data/maps/FallarborTown_House1/text.inc.FallarborTown_CozmosHouse_Text_CozmoIsSo: Look at PROF. COZMO...\nHe's so happy! I think it's cute.

data/maps/FallarborTown_House2/text.inc.FallarborTown_MoveRelearnersHouse_Text_I:
I'm the MOVE TUTOR.\pI know all the moves that POKéMON
learn - every one of them - and I can\lteach POKéMON those moves.\pI can teach a move to a POKéMON
of yours if you'd like.\pI'll do it for a HEART SCALE.
I'm collecting those now.
data/maps/FallarborTown_House2/text.inc.FallarborTown_MoveRelearnersHouse_Text_T: Oh! That's it! That's an honest to\ngoodness HEART SCALE!\pLet me guess, you want me to teach\na move?
data/maps/FallarborTown_House2/text.inc.FallarborTown_MoveRelearnersHouse_Text_D: Sorry...\pIt doesn't appear as if I have any move\nI can teach that POKéMON.
data/maps/FallarborTown_House2/text.inc.FallarborTown_MoveRelearnersHouse_Text_H: {PLAYER} handed over one HEART SCALE\nin exchange.
data/maps/FallarborTown_House2/text.inc.FallarborTown_MoveRelearnersHouse_Text_C: If your POKéMON need to learn a move,\ncome back with a HEART SCALE.
Hunh? There isn't a single move that\nI can teach an EGG.

data/maps/FallarborTown_Mart/text.inc.FallarborTown_Mart_Text_DecidingSkittyEv:
I'm having a hard time deciding if I
should make my SKITTY evolve or not.\pI only have to use this MOON STONE,
but it's so hard to decide...\pIf I make it evolve, it will become
much stronger.\pBut it will look so different, too.
data/maps/FallarborTown_Mart/text.inc.FallarborTown_Mart_Text_SellNuggetIFound: This NUGGET I found here...\nI suppose I'll have to sell it, seeing\las how it has no other use.

data/maps/FallarborTown_PokemonCenter_1F.FallarborTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Lane:
Oh, hello.
You are?\pOkay, your name's {PLAYER}{KUN}.
I can see that you're a TRAINER.\pSo that means you use the POKéMON
Storage System I developed.\pHow I arrived at that conclusion is
a simple deductive process.\pYou spoke to me because you wanted
to access something on this PC.\pOh, I'm sorry. I'm LANETTE.\pHonestly, I'm glad to meet you - it's
great you're using the Storage System.\pIf you could, please visit me at home.
My house is on ROUTE 114.
data/maps/FallarborTown_PokemonCenter_1F.FallarborTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Foss: I wonder what POKéMON looked like\nlong, long ago?\pMaybe the FOSSIL MANIAC at the edge\nof town will know.
data/maps/FallarborTown_PokemonCenter_1F.FallarborTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Plan: In the fields of FALLARBOR, we plant\nseedlings of hardy trees that thrive\leven in volcanic ash.

data/maps/FortreeCity/text.inc.FortreeCity_Text_YouSmellSinged: Sniff...\nUm... You, uh...smell singed.\pWere you at a volcano or something?
data/maps/FortreeCity/text.inc.FortreeCity_Text_SomethingBlockingGym: I want to go to the POKéMON GYM, but\nsomething's blocking the way.\pAfter all the bother I went through\ntraining on ROUTE 120...
data/maps/FortreeCity/text.inc.FortreeCity_Text_ThisTimeIllBeatWinona: I've got my pride-and-joy POKéMON\nwith me. This time, I'll beat WINONA.
data/maps/FortreeCity/text.inc.FortreeCity_Text_TreesGrowByDrinkingRain: The ground absorbs rainwater, and\ntrees grow by drinking that water...\pOur FORTREE CITY exists because\nthere's both water and soil.
data/maps/FortreeCity/text.inc.FortreeCity_Text_EveryoneHealthyAndLivel:
The CITY consists of homes built on
trees.\pPerhaps because of that lifestyle,
everyone is healthy and lively.\pWhy, even myself - I feel as if I've
grown thirty years younger.
data/maps/FortreeCity/text.inc.FortreeCity_Text_BugPokemonComeThroughWi: Living on top of trees is okay.\pBut sometimes BUG POKéMON come in\nthrough windows.\lIt can be really startling.
data/maps/FortreeCity/text.inc.FortreeCity_Text_PokemonThatEvolveWhenTr: Some POKéMON evolve when they go\nthrough a Game Link cable.
data/maps/FortreeCity/text.inc.FortreeCity_Text_SomethingUnseeable: Something unseeable is in the way.
data/maps/FortreeCity/text.inc.FortreeCity_Text_UnseeableUseDevonScope: Something unseeable is in the way.\pWant to use the DEVON SCOPE?
data/maps/FortreeCity/text.inc.FortreeCity_Text_UsedDevonScopePokemonFl: {PLAYER} used the DEVON SCOPE.\pAn invisible POKéMON became completely\nvisible!\pThe startled POKéMON fled!
data/maps/FortreeCity/text.inc.FortreeCity_Text_CitySign: FORTREE CITY\n“The treetop city that frolics with\lnature.”
data/maps/FortreeCity/text.inc.FortreeCity_Text_GymSign: FORTREE CITY POKéMON GYM\nLEADER: WINONA\p“The bird user taking flight into\nthe world.”

data/maps/FortreeCity_DecorationShop/tex.FortreeCity_DecorationShop_Text_Merchand: Merchandise you buy here is sent to\nyour own PC.\pThat's fantastic! I wish they could\nalso deliver me home like that.
data/maps/FortreeCity_DecorationShop/tex.FortreeCity_DecorationShop_Text_BuyingDe: I'm buying a pretty desk and I'm\nputting my cute DOLLS on it.\pIf I don't, when I decorate my\nSECRET BASE, my DOLLS will get\ldirty or poked with splinters.

data/maps/FortreeCity_Gym/text.inc.FortreeCity_Gym_Text_GymGuideAdvice:
Yo, how's it going, CHAMPION-
bound {PLAYER}?\pFORTREE GYM LEADER WINONA is a
master of FLYING-type POKéMON.\pShe's waiting at the back of this GYM,
behind the rotating doors.\pShe's waiting for new challengers who
are trying to take wing!\pOkay, go for it!
data/maps/FortreeCity_Gym/text.inc.FortreeCity_Gym_Text_JaredIntro: Behold the elegant battle style of\nBIRD POKéMON!
data/maps/FortreeCity_Gym/text.inc.FortreeCity_Gym_Text_JaredPostBattle: A TRAINER has to be smart to keep\nup with unexpected turns of events.\pLet's see if you have the smarts to\nget to our LEADER?
data/maps/FortreeCity_Gym/text.inc.FortreeCity_Gym_Text_WillIntro: The lovers of BIRD POKéMON aspire\nto join this GYM.\pAs a member of the FORTREE GYM,\nI'm not allowed to lose!
data/maps/FortreeCity_Gym/text.inc.FortreeCity_Gym_Text_WillDefeat: It was too much of a load for me\nto bear...
data/maps/FortreeCity_Gym/text.inc.FortreeCity_Gym_Text_WillPostBattle: The world is huge, and there are\ncountless tough TRAINERS.\pI'm going to keep training and make\nmyself even stronger.
data/maps/FortreeCity_Gym/text.inc.FortreeCity_Gym_Text_TerrellIntro: There's no need for WINONA, our GYM\nLEADER, to deal with you!\pI'm plenty good enough for you!
data/maps/FortreeCity_Gym/text.inc.FortreeCity_Gym_Text_TerrellPostBattle: WINONA is cute and she's strong.\nShe's the ultimate LEADER!\pBlush...
data/maps/FortreeCity_Gym/text.inc.FortreeCity_Gym_Text_KyleeIntro: WINONA taught me personally!\nYou can't beat me easily!
data/maps/FortreeCity_Gym/text.inc.FortreeCity_Gym_Text_KyleePostBattle: Thanks to WINONA, the people of\nFORTREE can live without fear.
data/maps/FortreeCity_Gym/text.inc.FortreeCity_Gym_Text_WinonaIntro:
I am WINONA. I am the LEADER of the
FORTREE POKéMON GYM.\pI have become one with BIRD POKéMON
and have soared the skies...\pHowever grueling the battle, we have
triumphed with grace...\pWitness the elegant choreography
of BIRD POKéMON and I!
data/maps/FortreeCity_Gym/text.inc.FortreeCity_Gym_Text_WinonaDefeat: Never before have I seen a TRAINER\ncommand POKéMON with more grace\lthan I...\pIn recognition of your prowess,\nI present to you this GYM BADGE.
data/maps/FortreeCity_Gym/text.inc.FortreeCity_Gym_Text_ExplainFeatherBadge:
With the FEATHER BADGE, all POKéMON up
to LV 70, even those received through\ltrades, will obey your every command.\pYou will also be able to use the
HM move FLY outside of battle.\pAnd this...
This is a gift from me.
data/maps/FortreeCity_Gym/text.inc.FortreeCity_Gym_Text_ExplainAerialAce: TM40 contains AERIAL ACE.\pIts speed...\nNo POKéMON should be able to avoid it.
data/maps/FortreeCity_Gym/text.inc.FortreeCity_Gym_Text_WinonaPostBattle: Though I fell to you, I will remain\ndevoted to BIRD POKéMON.
data/maps/FortreeCity_Gym/text.inc.FortreeCity_Gym_Text_GymStatueCertified: FORTREE CITY POKéMON GYM\pWINONA'S CERTIFIED TRAINERS:\n{PLAYER}

data/maps/FortreeCity_House1/text.inc.FortreeCity_House1_Text_WouldYouTradeIt: Hi, there's this POKéMON that I'm\nlooking for.\pI want a {STR_VAR_1}.\nDo you have one?\pWould you trade it for my {STR_VAR_2}?
data/maps/FortreeCity_House1/text.inc.FortreeCity_House1_Text_PleaseBeNiceToMo: Thank you!\pI'll be good to your {STR_VAR_1},\nso please be nice to my {STR_VAR_2}!
data/maps/FortreeCity_House1/text.inc.FortreeCity_House1_Text_ThatMonIsntAMon: Wait!\nThat POKéMON isn't a {STR_VAR_1}.\pI guess you don't want to trade\nwith me.
data/maps/FortreeCity_House1/text.inc.FortreeCity_House1_Text_ChangeYourMindSe: Oh, okay. If you change your mind,\nplease come see me.\pI'll be waiting!
data/maps/FortreeCity_House1/text.inc.FortreeCity_House1_Text_PromiseToTakeGoo: Thank you for trading with me!\pI really wanted this POKéMON, so\nI promise to take good care of it!
data/maps/FortreeCity_House1/text.inc.FortreeCity_House1_Text_TradingMemoriesW: Trading POKéMON with others...\pIt's as if you're trading your own\nmemories with other people.

data/maps/FortreeCity_House2/text.inc.FortreeCity_House2_Text_HiddenPowersArou: People... POKéMON...\pTheir hidden powers are aroused by\nliving in natural environments...
data/maps/FortreeCity_House2/text.inc.FortreeCity_House2_Text_CoinInWhichHand: Let this old woman see if your hidden\npower has awoken...\pI hold a coin in my hand.\pNow, tell me, have I palmed it in the\nright hand? Or in the left?
data/maps/FortreeCity_House2/text.inc.FortreeCity_House2_Text_CorrectTryAgainW: Oh! Yes, correct!\pWe shall try again.\pIn which hand have I palmed the coin?\nThe right or left?
Oh! Yes, correct again!\pWe shall try once more.\pIn which hand have I palmed the coin?\nThe right or left? Choose!
data/maps/FortreeCity_House2/text.inc.FortreeCity_House2_Text_YourHiddenPowerH: Oh! Splendid!\nYour hidden power has awoken!\pHere, take this and awaken the hidden\npower of your POKéMON.
data/maps/FortreeCity_House2/text.inc.FortreeCity_House2_Text_ExplainHiddenPow: HIDDEN POWER is a move that changes\nwith the POKéMON.
data/maps/FortreeCity_House2/text.inc.UnknownString_8186585:
The area around FORTREE CITY is like
a jungle.\pIt gets awfully tiring walking around
this city.\pThat's why I use FLY to instantly go to
any city I've visited.

data/maps/FortreeCity_House3/text.inc.FortreeCity_House3_Text_MetStevenHadAmaz:
Speaking of POKéDEXES, I remembered
something.\pI met this TRAINER, STEVEN, when
I was searching for rare stones.\pHoo, boy, he had some amazing POKéMON
with him.\pThey weren't just rare, they were
trained to terrifying extremes!\pHe might even be stronger than the
GYM LEADER in this town...
data/maps/FortreeCity_House3/text.inc.FortreeCity_House3_Text_OhYouHavePokedex: What's that thing you have there?\p... ... ... ... ... ...\pOh, it's called a POKéDEX?\nIt's really awesome!

data/maps/FortreeCity_House4/text.inc.FortreeCity_House4_Text_BringsWorldClose: By being together with POKéMON,\npeople make more and more friends.\pAnd that brings the world closer\ntogether. I think it's wonderful!
data/maps/FortreeCity_House4/text.inc.FortreeCity_House4_Text_AskedWingullToRu: Heheh, I asked my WINGULL to run an\nerrand for me.
data/maps/FortreeCity_House4/text.inc.FortreeCity_House4_Text_WelcomeWingullTa:
Good!
Welcome back, WINGULL!\pHuh? What is this?
What is it holding?\pA MENTAL HERB?
It must have picked it up somewhere.\pBut I'm not a TRAINER, so you can
have it.
data/maps/FortreeCity_House4/text.inc.FortreeCity_House4_Text_FriendsFarAwayTh: Thanks to my WINGULL, I have friends\nwho live far away.

data/maps/FortreeCity_House5/text.inc.FortreeCity_House5_Text_TreeHousesAreGre: The tree houses of FORTREE are great!\pI think it's the number one town for\nliving together with POKéMON.
data/maps/FortreeCity_House5/text.inc.FortreeCity_House5_Text_AdaptedToNature: POKéMON and people have adapted to\nnature to survive.\pThere's no need to make nature\nconform to the way we want to live.

data/maps/FortreeCity_Mart/text.inc.FortreeCity_Mart_Text_SuperRepelBetter: SUPER REPEL lasts a long time, and\nit gets the job done.\pIt's much better than an ordinary\nREPEL.
data/maps/FortreeCity_Mart/text.inc.FortreeCity_Mart_Text_StockUpOnItems: I always stock up on more items than\nI'm sure I'll need.\pYou never know what might happen.\nBetter to be safe than sorry!
data/maps/FortreeCity_Mart/text.inc.FortreeCity_Mart_Text_RareCandyMakesMonG: A RARE CANDY makes a POKéMON grow\nimmediately by one level.

data/maps/FortreeCity_PokemonCenter_1F/t.FortreeCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_GoToSa: Listen, kid, are you working\non a POKéDEX?\pHmm... Go to the SAFARI ZONE.\nThat's my suggestion.
data/maps/FortreeCity_PokemonCenter_1F/t.FortreeCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Record:
Have you done anything at the
RECORD CORNER?\pIt's pretty neat. It mixes and matches
the records of TRAINERS.\pI don't know quite how it works,
but it's cool. It's exciting, even!
data/maps/FortreeCity_PokemonCenter_1F/t.FortreeCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_DoYouK:
Hey, you've got a POKéNAV!
It's the same as mine.\pCheck out the TRAINER'S EYES on it.\pIt shows you TRAINERS who want a
rematch with you.\pIsn't it great?
You have to hand it to DEVON!

data/maps/GraniteCave_1F/text.inc.GraniteCave_1F_Text_194917:
Hey, you.
It gets awfully dark ahead.\lIt'll be tough trying to explore.\pThat guy who came by earlier...
STEVEN, I think it was.\pHe knew how to use FLASH, so he ought
to be all right, but...\pWell, for us HIKERS, helping out those
that we meet is our motto.\pHere you go, I'll pass this on to you.
data/maps/GraniteCave_1F/text.inc.GraniteCave_1F_Text_194A3E:
Teach that hidden move FLASH to a
POKéMON and use it.\pIt lights up even the inky darkness
of caves.\pBut, to use it, you need the GYM BADGE
from DEWFORD's POKéMON GYM.

data/maps/GraniteCave_StevensRoom/text.i.GraniteCave_StevensRoom_Text_194AE5:
That device you have there...
It's a POKéNAV.\pWhen TRAINERS that have POKéNAVS
battle, it keeps a record of how\lthings went, I think.\pOh, pardon me.
My name is STEVEN.\pI'm interested in rare stones, so
I travel here and there.\pOh?
A LETTER for me?
data/maps/GraniteCave_StevensRoom/text.i.GraniteCave_StevensRoom_Text_194BDD:
STEVEN: Okay, thank you.\pYou went through all this trouble to
deliver that. I need to thank you.\pLet me see...
I'll give you this TM.\pIt contains my favorite move,
STEEL WING.
data/maps/GraniteCave_StevensRoom/text.i.GraniteCave_StevensRoom_Text_194C8D: STEVEN: Your POKéMON appear quite\ncapable.\pIf you keep training, you could even\nbecome the CHAMPION of the POKéMON\lLEAGUE one day. That's what I think.\pNow, I've got to hurry along.
data/maps/GraniteCave_StevensRoom/text.i.GraniteCave_StevensRoom_Text_194D43: Oh, your BAG is full...\nThat's too bad, then.

data/maps/InsideOfTruck/text.inc.InsideOfTruck_Text_198FAD: The box is printed with a POKéMON logo.\pIt's a POKéMON brand moving and\ndelivery service.

data/maps/JaggedPass/text.inc.JaggedPass_Text_195DAC: MT. CHIMNEY's JAGGED PASS...\pNow this is what I've always wanted\nin a mountain.\pThis jagged bumpiness...\nIt rocks my soul!
data/maps/JaggedPass/text.inc.JaggedPass_Text_195E3E: Yes, I did lose at POKéMON...\pBut, when it comes to the love of\nthe mountains, I have you beat!
data/maps/JaggedPass/text.inc.JaggedPass_Text_195E9E: This place isn't your casual hike.\nIt's not suited for a picnic.
data/maps/JaggedPass/text.inc.JaggedPass_Text_195EDF: Ohhh, no!\nThe ground is too bumpy...
data/maps/JaggedPass/text.inc.JaggedPass_Text_195F04: Did you know?\pSome people cleverly ride their\nbicycles up this horribly bumpy pass.
data/maps/JaggedPass/text.inc.JaggedPass_Text_195F58: Picnics are fun wherever you go.\nJust like POKéMON!
data/maps/JaggedPass/text.inc.JaggedPass_Text_195F8C: I only lost because the ground is\ntoo bumpy!
data/maps/JaggedPass/text.inc.JaggedPass_Text_195FB9: I'll forget about losing and just\nenjoy this bumpy hike.
data/maps/JaggedPass/text.inc.JaggedPass_Text_195FF2: JAGGED PASS is hard to walk on.\nIt's a good place for training.
data/maps/JaggedPass/text.inc.JaggedPass_Text_196032: It was all over while we were still\ntrying to find a good footing...
data/maps/JaggedPass/text.inc.JaggedPass_Text_196077: If I had an ACRO BIKE, I'd be able to\njump ledges.
data/maps/JaggedPass/text.inc.JaggedPass_Text_1960AA: I got used to this bumpiness.\nI sing while I climb now.
data/maps/JaggedPass/text.inc.JaggedPass_Text_1960E2: It's still not easy to battle on this\nbumpy ground...
data/maps/JaggedPass/text.inc.JaggedPass_Text_196118: I should get an ACRO BIKE from RYDEL\nin MAUVILLE CITY...

data/maps/LavaridgeTown/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Text_MayNiceBadgesTakeThis:
MAY: {PLAYER}{KUN}! Long time no see!\pOh? While I was visiting the hot springs,
you got the LAVARIDGE GYM BADGE.\pYou must have caught good POKéMON...
No, I guess you raised some.\pI guess it would be okay for you to
have this.
data/maps/LavaridgeTown/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Text_MayExplainGoGogglesCh:
MAY: With those GO-GOGGLES, you'll
have no trouble getting through the\ldesert near ROUTE 111.\pBut, wow, {PLAYER}{KUN}...
Challenging GYMS...\pYou're trying hard because you don't
want to lose to me, I bet!\p{PLAYER}{KUN}, I think I should challenge
your dad in PETALBURG GYM.\p{PLAYER}{KUN}, see you again!
data/maps/LavaridgeTown/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Text_BrendanNiceBadgesTake:
BRENDAN: {PLAYER}, hey, it's been a while.
How's it going?\pHmm...
That's a decent collection of BADGES.\pAll right, then.
You may as well have this.
data/maps/LavaridgeTown/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Text_BrendanExplainGoGoggl:
BRENDAN: Keep those with you if you're
planning on going into that desert near\lROUTE 111.\pThere should be some POKéMON that
are exclusively desert-dwellers.\lYou might look around for those.\pAs for me...
I'm considering challenging NORMAN,\lthe GYM LEADER of PETALBURG.\pUnlike you, {PLAYER}, your dad looks like
he really is tough.\pSee you around!
data/maps/LavaridgeTown/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Text_HaveEggWillYouTakeIt:
I have here an EGG.\pI'd hoped to hatch it by covering it in
hot sand by the hot springs.\lBut that doesn't seem to be enough...\pI've heard it would be best if it were
kept together with POKéMON and\lcarried about.\pYou are a TRAINER, yes?
And your POKéMON radiate vitality.\pSo, what say you?
Will you take this EGG to hatch?
data/maps/LavaridgeTown/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Text_HopeYoullWalkPlentyWi: Good! I hope you'll walk plenty with\nthis here EGG!
data/maps/LavaridgeTown/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Text_NoRoomForThisEgg: Oh? You've too many POKéMON.\nThere's no room for this EGG...
data/maps/LavaridgeTown/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Text_AsYouWishThen: As you wish, then...\pIf you have a change of heart about\nhatching this EGG, I will be here.
data/maps/LavaridgeTown/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Text_EverySoOftenEggFoundA: Every so often, an EGG will be found at\nthe POKéMON DAY CARE.\pOr at least that's how the rumor goes.
data/maps/LavaridgeTown/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Text_HotSpringsNeverRunDry: We draw as much hot water as we need,\nand yet the hot springs never run dry.\pIsn't it magical?\pThese hot springs appear near active\nvolcanoes. Veins of water under the\lground are heated by magma to well up\las hot springs.
data/maps/LavaridgeTown/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Text_PokemonNippedBackside: Being buried in this hot sand is...\nSigh...\pSo warm and heavenly...\pEh? Gyaah! Ouch!\pA POKéMON nipped my backside!
data/maps/LavaridgeTown/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Text_OhYouLikeHotSprings: Oh, you like hot springs, do you?\pThat's surprising for one as young\nas you.
data/maps/LavaridgeTown/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Text_BatheInHotSpringsEver: I bathe in the hot springs every day.\pI want to become a beautiful and strong\nGYM LEADER like FLANNERY.
data/maps/LavaridgeTown/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Text_IfPokemonInHotSprings: If people put POKéMON in hot springs,\nit might be seriously strange.\pWhy, it might be an electric bath, or\na bubble bath, or even a lava bath...
data/maps/LavaridgeTown/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Text_HotSpringsClaims: They're claiming that these hot springs\nare good for calming nervous tension,\lrelieving aching muscles, solving\lromantic problems, and attracting\lmoney...
data/maps/LavaridgeTown/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Text_TownSign: LAVARIDGE TOWN\p“POKéMON CENTER HOT SPRINGS\nAn excellent place for relaxing!”
data/maps/LavaridgeTown/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Text_GymSign: LAVARIDGE TOWN POKéMON GYM\nLEADER: FLANNERY\l“One with a fiery passion that burns!”
data/maps/LavaridgeTown/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Text_HerbShopSign: POKéMON HERB SHOP\n“Bitter taste - better cure!”

data/maps/LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F_Text_GymGuideAdvice:
Hey, how's it going, CHAMPION-
bound {PLAYER}?\pLAVARIDGE's GYM LEADER FLANNERY
uses FIRE-type POKéMON.\pHer passion for POKéMON burns stronger
and hotter than a volcano.\pDon't get too close to her - you'll burn!
Hose her down with water and then\lgo for it!
data/maps/LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F_Text_GymGuidePostVi: Yow! That was a scorching hot battle!
data/maps/LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F_Text_ColeDefeat: I'm blinded by sweat in my eyes...
data/maps/LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F_Text_ColePostBattle: Being buried in hot sand promotes\ncirculation.\pIt's effective for healing pain in\nyour joints.
data/maps/LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F_Text_AxleIntro: I'm trying to relieve my stress.\nDon't come along and stress me out!
data/maps/LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F_Text_AxleDefeat: I hope FLANNERY flames you good!
data/maps/LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F_Text_AxlePostBattle: Haaah... Whew...\pIf you spend too much time buried in\nhot sand, it tuckers you out...
data/maps/LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Gym_B1F_Text_AndyIntro: You must be getting tired by now.\nYou'd like to rest in the hot sand,\lwouldn't you?\pBut you should know that maintaining\nyour willpower is an important ability\lfor all TRAINERS.
data/maps/LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Gym_B1F_Text_AndyDefeat: Play with fire, and be burned...
data/maps/LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Gym_B1F_Text_AndyPostBattl: Your skill is real...\nBut our LEADER FLANNERY is strong.\pIf you don't watch yourself, you'll be\nburned seriously.
data/maps/LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F_Text_ZanePostBattle: The temperature of magma is\n392 degrees.\pYour POKéMON beat me, so they should\neasily survive in magma.
data/maps/LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F_Text_SadiePostBattl: I'm going to be a pretty and strong\nTRAINER just like FLANNERY.
data/maps/LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F_Text_FlanneryIntro:
Welcome... No, wait.\pPuny TRAINER, how good to see you've
made it here!\pI have been entrusted with the...
No, wait.\pI am FLANNERY, and I'm the GYM
LEADER here!\pUh...
Dare not underestimate me, though\lI have been LEADER only a short time!\pWith skills inherited from my grand-
father, I shall, uh...demonstrate the\lhot moves we have honed on this land!
data/maps/LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F_Text_FlanneryDefeat:
Oh...
I guess I was trying too hard...\pI... I've only recently become a GYM
LEADER.\pI tried too hard to be someone I'm not.\pI have to do things my natural way.
If I don't, my POKéMON will be confused.\pThanks for teaching me that.
For that, you deserve this.
data/maps/LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F_Text_ExplainHeatBad:
If you have a HEAT BADGE, all POKéMON
up to Level 50, even those you get in\ltrades from other people, will obey\lyou completely.\pAnd, it lets POKéMON use the HM move
STRENGTH outside of battle.\pThis is a token of my appreciation.
Don't be shy about taking it!
data/maps/LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F_Text_ExplainOverhea: That TM50 contains OVERHEAT.\pThat move inflicts serious damage on\nthe opponent.\pBut it also sharply cuts the SP. ATK\nof the POKéMON using it. It might not\lbe suitable for longer battles.
data/maps/LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F_Text_FlanneryPostBa: Your power reminds me of someone...\pOh! I know! You battle like NORMAN,\nthe GYM LEADER of PETALBURG.
data/maps/LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F_Text_GymStatueCerti: LAVARIDGE TOWN POKéMON GYM\pFLANNERY'S CERTIFIED TRAINERS:\n{PLAYER}

data/maps/LavaridgeTown_HerbShop/text.in.LavaridgeTown_HerbShop_Text_WelcomeToHer: Welcome to the HERB SHOP, home of\neffective and inexpensive medicine!
data/maps/LavaridgeTown_HerbShop/text.in.LavaridgeTown_HerbShop_Text_YouveComeToL: You've come to look at herbal medicine\nin LAVARIDGE?\pThat's rather commendable.\pI like you! Take this!
data/maps/LavaridgeTown_HerbShop/text.in.LavaridgeTown_HerbShop_Text_ExplainCharc:
That CHARCOAL I gave you, it's used
for making herbal medicine.\pIt also does wonders when held by
a POKéMON.\pIt intensifies the power of FIRE-type
moves.
data/maps/LavaridgeTown_HerbShop/text.in.LavaridgeTown_HerbShop_Text_HerbalMedici: Herbal medicine works impressively well.\nBut your POKéMON will dislike you for it.\lIt must be horribly bitter!

data/maps/LavaridgeTown_House/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_House_Text_WifeWarmingEggI: My wife's warming an EGG in the hot\nsprings. This is what she told me.\pShe left two POKéMON with the DAY CARE.\nAnd they discovered that EGG!

data/maps/LavaridgeTown_Mart/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Mart_Text_XSpeedFirstStrik: Use X SPEED to add to a POKéMON's\nSPEED in battle.\pThat will help it get in the first\nstrike - a decided advantage!
data/maps/LavaridgeTown_Mart/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Mart_Text_LocalSpecialtyOn: On MT. CHIMNEY's peak, there's a local\nspecialty that you can buy only there.\pGive it to a POKéMON - it will be elated.

data/maps/LavaridgeTown_PokemonCenter_1F.LavaridgeTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Trai: I think POKéMON get closer to their\nTRAINERS if they spend time together.\pThe longer the better.\nThat's what I think.
data/maps/LavaridgeTown_PokemonCenter_1F.LavaridgeTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_HotS: I gave a RED {POKEBLOCK} to my POKéMON.\nIt looks a lot cooler all of a sudden.\pHmm...\nMaybe I ought to eat a RED {POKEBLOCK}.
data/maps/LavaridgeTown_PokemonCenter_1F.LavaridgeTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Trai: Hohoho! Hey, kid, you can reach\nthe hot springs from here.\pIf POKéMON are getting rest, so too\nshould their TRAINERS.

data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_MayShoppingLetsBattle:
MAY: Oh, hey?
{PLAYER}{KUN}, are you shopping, too?\pI bought a whole bunch of DOLLS and
POSTERS.\pOf course, I've also caught a lot of
POKéMON, and I'm raising them\lproperly, too.\pActually, I'm more worried if you're
raising POKéMON properly, {PLAYER}{KUN}.\pI'll battle with you, so you can show
me your POKéMON, {PLAYER}{KUN}.
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_MayNotRaisingPokemon: MAY: Oh, why? {PLAYER}{KUN}, haven't you\nbeen raising your POKéMON?\pThat's not a very good showing as a\nTRAINER...
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_MayBattleMe: MAY: Come on, battle with me, so I can\ncheck out your POKéMON!
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_MayWontBeBeaten: MAY: The POKéMON I raised won't be\nbeaten by your POKéMON, {PLAYER}{KUN}!
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_MayDefeat: ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...\pI remember the battle I had with you,\n{PLAYER}{KUN}, on ROUTE 103.\pThat battle helped you become this\nstrong, {PLAYER}{KUN}, didn't it?
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_MayGoingBackToLittlero: MAY: I'm thinking of going back to\nLITTLEROOT soon.\pI've caught a decent group of POKéMON,\nand my POKéDEX is coming along, so\lI'm going home to show my dad.
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_MayYouGoingToCollectBa: {PLAYER}{KUN}, what are you going to do?\pCollect all the GYM BADGES and take\nthe POKéMON LEAGUE challenge?\pWell, while you're collecting BADGES,\n{PLAYER}{KUN}, I'm going to work on my\lPOKéDEX. I'll complete it before you!\pSee you!
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_MayYouGoingToPokemonLe:
{PLAYER}{KUN}, what are you going to do?\pAre you taking the POKéMON LEAGUE
challenge?\pOr, are you going to complete your
POKéDEX?\pI might've lost to you in battling,
but I'll finish my POKéDEX before you!\pSee you!
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_MayYouGoingToBattleTow:
{PLAYER}{KUN}, what are you going to do?\pAre you taking the BATTLE TOWER
challenge?\pOr, are you going to complete your
POKéDEX?\pI might've lost to you in battling,
but I'll finish my POKéDEX before you!\pSee you!
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_BrendanShoppingLetsBat: BRENDAN: Oh, hey, it's {PLAYER}.\pI'm running an errand for my dad.\nNo, I'm not buying any DOLLS.\pAnyways, it's been a while.\pWant to have a battle to see who's been\nraising POKéMON better?
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_BrendanNoConfidence: BRENDAN: Oh, what's the matter?\nDon't have the confidence?
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_BrendanBattleMe: BRENDAN: Want to battle to see who's\nbeen raising POKéMON better?
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_BrendanWontBeBeaten: BRENDAN: Aww, but you know I'm not\ngoing to lose to no {PLAYER}.
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_BrendanDefeat: Humph...\nYou've done a lot of raising.\pThat stings a bit - I had a head start\non you as a TRAINER...
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_BrendanGoingBackToLitt: BRENDAN: I...\nI plan on going home to LITTLEROOT.\pYou know I'm helping out my dad on his\nPOKéDEX. It's coming together pretty\ldecently, so I should go show him.
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_BrendanYouGoingToColle: {PLAYER}, what are you going to do?\pCollect all the GYM BADGES and take\nthe POKéMON LEAGUE challenge?\pMaybe I'll do that, too...\pWell, anyway, hang in there!
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_BrendanYouGoingToPokem: {PLAYER}, what are you going to do?\pSince you're that strong, are you\ntaking the POKéMON LEAGUE challenge?\pHeh, even me - if I trained my POKéMON\na bit more, I should be stronger than\lyou, {PLAYER}.\pWell, anyway, hang in there!
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_BrendanYouGoingToBattl: {PLAYER}, what are you going to do?\pSince you're that strong, are you\ntaking the BATTLE TOWER challenge?\pHeh, even me - if I trained my POKéMON\na bit more, I should be stronger than\lyou, {PLAYER}.\lMaybe I will go to the BATTLE TOWER.\pWell, anyway, hang in there!
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_MovedLootIntoHideoutTo: Fufufu...\pWe moved more loot into our secret\nHIDEOUT today...\pWh-who are you?!\nI was just talking to myself!
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_ChanceToDoBigThings:
I'm just a GRUNT, so I don't know what
the BOSS is thinking...\pBut being on TEAM {EVIL_TEAM}, I know I'll get
the chance to do big things!\pWh-who are you?!
I was just talking to myself!
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_DontGoNearCaveInCove: Hey, you!\pDon't go near the cave in the cove!\pWhy? You don't need a reason why!\nI'm an adult, so you just listen to me!
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_IfWorldBecomesOurs: If this whole wide world becomes ours,\nTEAM {EVIL_TEAM}'s, it will be a happier\lplace for POKéMON, too.
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_WailmerLeapOutOfWater: There! WAILMER!\nLeap out of the water now!
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_GetLostMessingUpTraini: Hunh? What do you want?\pYou're messing up our training, so can\nyou, like, get lost?
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_ContestHallInTown: The POKéMON that come to this CONTEST\nHALL are all prizewinners.\lThey come from all over the country.\pMy heart swells with excitement!
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_StrangeCaveInCove: Have you seen that strange cave in\nthe cove at the edge of town?
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_GoingToMoveDeleterForH: I'm going to teach my POKéMON some new\nmoves for entering a CONTEST.\pSo, I'm going to see the MOVE DELETER\nand make it forget HM moves.
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_ImFromKanto: I came from KANTO.\pThe HOENN region is beautiful with\nall its water and verdant nature.\pHunh? Wait a second...\pCould there be rare POKéMON that live\nonly in this area?
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_EvilTeamBeenTrainingWa: TEAM {EVIL_TEAM}'s been training their\nWAILMER in the cove.\pWe SAILORS can't get our boats out\nto sea with them in the way!
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_SomeonePuntedEvilTeamO: Ahoy, did you know?\pSomeone punted TEAM {EVIL_TEAM} out of the\nway for us!\pThat got the WAILMER out of the cove,\nso we can get our boats out again.
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_SomeoneStoleMyPokemon: I was taking a relaxing snooze at the\nseaside inn to the sound of waves...\pWhen someone stole my POKéMON!\pWho's the abductor?\nTEAM {EVIL_TEAM}? Is it TEAM {EVIL_TEAM}?
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_MissingPokemonCameBack: My missing POKéMON...\nIt came back without me noticing!
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_ImArtDealer: I'm an ART DEALER.\pI am a buyer and seller of fine art,\nespecially paintings.\pI've heard that the MUSEUM here has\nmagnificent works on exhibit...
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_SeaRemainsForeverYoung: Even as we grow old and wrinkled, the\nsea remains forever young with the\lvivid brilliance of life...\pFwohoho fwohohohoho...
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_SixtyYearsAgoHusbandPr: It was sixty years ago that my husband\nproposed to me here.\lThe sea remains as beautiful as ever.\pMufufufu mufufufufufu...
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_EvilTeamRenovatedCaver:
Hm, you know of the peculiar cavern
in this cove?\pThat had been a natural formation, but
