then that TEAM {EVIL_TEAM} lot came along\land made their renovations.\pThey call themselves the “nature-loving
TEAM {EVIL_TEAM}”!\pBut what they do and what they say
don't match at all!
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_EvilTeamLotGoneForGood: That cave in the cove...\nIt seems someone sealed the entrance,\lso no one can enter it anymore.\pThat TEAM {EVIL_TEAM} lot, they must\nhave gone away for good.
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_CitySign: LILYCOVE CITY\p“Where the land ends and the\nsea begins.”
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_ContestHallSign: POKéMON CONTESTS\nMASTER RANK REGISTRATION\p“Enter CONTESTS with your friends!”
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_MotelSign: COVE LILY MOTEL\p“Remember us as COVE LILY of\nLILYCOVE.”
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_HarborSignUnderConstru: LILYCOVE CITY HARBOR\p“The ferry S.S. TIDAL is under\nconstruction in SLATEPORT CITY.\p“Service is scheduled to begin\nshortly.”
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_HarborSign: LILYCOVE CITY HARBOR\p“Enjoy a delightful cruise on the\nferry S.S. TIDAL.”
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_TrainerFanClubSign: POKéMON TRAINER FAN CLUB\pThe names of TRAINERS are scribbled\nall over the sign...
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_DepartmentStoreSign: LILYCOVE DEPARTMENT STORE\p“Overflowing with great merchandise\nand excitement!\p“A great place to find that something\nyou need!”
data/maps/LilycoveCity/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_MoveDeletersHouseSign: MOVE DELETER'S HOUSE\p“Unwanted POKéMON moves deleted.”

data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_1890D4: This POKéMON won the BEAUTY CONTEST\nhere before.\pWell, guess what? Today, I made it\nwin a SMARTNESS CONTEST!\pMy abilities scare even me...
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_18915F:
I've entered a bunch of CONTESTS,
so I'm seeing how things work.\pIf you're in a COOLNESS CONTEST,
cool moves go over as appeals.\pBut smart moves and cute moves
don't go over well, for instance.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189221: That young man who won earlier had\na whole bunch of different {POKEBLOCK}S.\pCan you win if you had that many\nof those things?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189299: Whoa, isn't this place humongous!\pThe tension in the air... It's not\nlike a CONTEST hall in the sticks.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189301: MC: Okay, SMART POKéMON and their\nTRAINERS, are you ready?!\pGive it your best showing!\nLet's appeal!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189366: JUDGE: Are you enjoying this CONTEST?\pCome back with three friends, and\nall of you may enter a CONTEST!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_1893CE:
Ayayayay...
I entered the wrong CONTEST.\pI entered this tough POKéMON in the
SMARTNESS CONTEST...\pCome on, wow them with a smart-looking
ROCK SMASH.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189463: I've spent many a year, and all my\nwisdom besides, raising this POKéMON\lto be smart.\pIt won't be easily bested by some\nyoung pup's POKéMON.\pMy dear wife, are you seeing this?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189512: There it is!\pIf my POKéMON pulls a smart move next,\nthe audience's excitement will peak!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_18956B: Oh, dear, no!\pMy darling ZUBAT's LEECH LIFE is so\ncute I kept using it over and over!\pBut these mean people don't appreciate\nit at all!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189617: Even when TRAINERS enter the same\nkind of POKéMON, they all seem to use\ldifferent moves for appeals.\pIt's just like the way people have\ndifferent styles for battling.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_1896BE: I think the POKéMON look smarter\nthan their TRAINERS. By a lot.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_1896FE: When all's said and done, I still love\nSMARTNESS CONTESTS.\pThat intellectual green color...\nIt's so... So... Cool.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189771: MC: Are you entering the BEAUTY\nCONTEST, too? Good luck!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_1897AA: JUDGE: Ah, every POKéMON here is a\nmodel of pristine beauty!\pWhy, I almost forgot to score them!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_18980B: A POKéMON this beautiful...\nThere isn't another one like it.\pEveryone's eyes will be glued to\nmy beauty.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189874: Waaaah!\pI brushed and groomed my POKéMON\ncarefully for this CONTEST...\pBut I overdid it...\nMy POKéMON's coat turned all scraggly...\pWhat should I do?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_18990A: This AURORA BEAM is so dazzling,\nthe JUDGE won't be able to see it.\pUh, wait a second...\nThat'll be meaningless, then!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189981: This pretty POKéMON looks just like\nme when I was younger.\pRight when I said that, my husband\nspewed the coffee he was drinking.\pDid I say something funny?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189A1D: You know, as a woman, if I win at a\nBEAUTY CONTEST, sure it makes me\lhappy. More than usual, anyway.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189A82: Wahahahah!\pWill you take a gander at all those\npretty POKéMON!\lI just love this sort of glitz!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189AE1: You can't always win on just beauty\nalone.\pYou have to groom your POKéMON so\nit's nice and glossy like mine.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189B4E: MC: Uh-oh! Hello!\nWe're in the middle of a CONTEST!\pPlease enter at our registration\ncounter and come out, okay?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189BBF: JUDGE: Oh, such charming and cute\nappeals!\pOh, my goodness! What a perfectly\nadorable WATER SPORT appeal!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189C29: Oh, no... My sweet AZURILL was\ndistracted by another POKéMON.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189C67: My POKéMON has never won in a battle,\nbut put it in a CONTEST and look out!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189CB3: My POKéMON's PETAL DANCE is a marvel\nof elegance.\pI won't let anyone disturb its\nperformance.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189D11: Everyone's POKéMON are very cute.\pHowever, if my POKéMON were to make\na cute appeal...\pI'm sure that it would be so much \ncuter than the others.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189DA2: My child is in this CONTEST.\pCome on, dear. Go for it!\nYour POKéMON is the best!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189DF3: I think that girl over there is the\ncutest of the lot.\pWhat's that? They're judging\nPOKéMON by their looks?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189E5F: Ohh, seeing all these cute POKéMON,\nthey make we want to get my own!\pI'm going to go catch some!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..UnknownString_8189EC0: COOLNESS CONTEST STAGE\nBE CHILLED BY COOL POKéMON!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189EF3: BEAUTY CONTEST STAGE\nBE ALLURED BY BEAUTIFUL POKéMON!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189F29: CUTENESS CONTEST STAGE\nBE CHARMED BY CUTE POKéMON!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_189F5C: SMARTNESS CONTEST STAGE\nBE IMPRESSED BY SMART POKéMON!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestHall/text..UnknownString_8189F93: TOUGHNESS CONTEST STAGE\nBE THRILLED BY TOUGH POKéMON!

data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_18848C: I only register four players for\nPOKéMON CONTESTS.\pIf three other players link up, all\nfour may enter the same CONTEST.\pWould you like to take part?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_188521: Before entering a CONTEST, your\nprogress will be saved.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_188559: We hope you will participate another\ntime.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_188584: Would you like to enter a CONTEST?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_1885A7:
When four players are ready, connect
over a Game Link cable, and register\lwith me, please.\pPlease choose the same CONTEST
as your fellow contestants.\pThe CONTEST begins as soon as all
players register their entry.\pAfter that, the usual CONTEST rules
apply.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.UnknownString_81886A8: Once you have linked up, please choose\nthe CONTEST.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_1886DC: Which CONTEST would you like to enter?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_188703: Which POKéMON would you like to enter?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_188750: You may have chosen a different\nCONTEST than another player.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_18878D: You may have made a different\nchoice than another player.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_1887C7: Please wait.\nPress the B Button to cancel...
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_1887F4: We hope you will participate\nanother time.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_188845: Your POKéMON will be entered in\nthe CONTEST.\pYour POKéMON is Entry No. {STR_VAR_2}.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.UnknownString_8188890: Entry No. {STR_VAR_2} is assigned this color\nfor this CONTEST.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.UnknownString_81888E6: Please come through this way.\nGood luck!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_18890F: Congratulations!\pI did a painting of your POKéMON to\ncommemorate its victory...\pWell, your POKéMON's appeals were\nso fantastic, it spurred me into\lpainting better than I usually do.\lLook, see?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.UnknownString_81889D0: The screen switches to display the\npainting.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_1889FD:
What do you think? I'm confident in
what I've done, but do you like it?\pA work of this caliber, it wouldn't look
out of place in an art museum.\pHuh? An art museum really is looking
for paintings?\pDo you think I should take this there?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_188AE8:
What, really? Then, sure, I will take
this painting there right now.\pI'll give it a proper title, too.\pI hope they'll like it and consider
exhibiting this.\pPlease check if they did accept this.
Thank you!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_188BB5: Oh, that's right!\pAs a memento of me painting your\nPOKéMON, please take this.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_188C41: Oh... Then, I guess I'll just take\nthis home with me...\pBut, you know, I would like to take\nthis to the art museum... Okay?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_188CBD: Oh, fine, that's the way it is.\nI will hang this in my own house.\pI'll just have to try harder next time.\nWell, be seeing you.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_188D3C: Hoo, boy... Master Rank CONTESTS,\nhere I come.\pThe world will know that my dearest\nPOKéMON is the cutest being in all\lexistence. The time has come!\lUheheheh.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_188DDA: You can see a whole variety of\nPOKéMON here.\pThat's why I make this place a regular\npart of my daily stroll.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_188E47:
Oh, dear! They still haven't given
you a CONTEST PASS?\pYou should go get one in VERDANTURF
TOWN right away.\pIt's such a thrill having others see
POKéMON that you've raised with care\land love.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_188F07: When you get up to the Master Rank\nCONTESTS, you get your eyes opened\lto striking POKéMON that just scream\lto be painted.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_188F81: The TOUGHNESS CONTEST is like\nextreme, man!\pThose muscular appeals...\nCascading sweat... I swoon!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_188FE3: Day in and day out, I lavished my care\non this POKéMON.\pIts condition is peaking.\nToday, victory is mine!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_ContestLobby/text.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_18904D: I made {POKEBLOCK}S with Mom, Dad and\nBig Sister. They turned out great!\pI bet you can make smoother, better\n{POKEBLOCK}S if you have more people.

data/maps/LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_1F/.LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_1F_Text_Guest:
Hm, so they doubled the guests by
using POKéMON as attractions?\pHm, well, maybe I should make a cute
POKéMON our inn's mascot.\pI wonder if that will attract more
guests to stay with us?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_1F/.LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_1F_Text_NoGue: Oh, sorry, sorry!\nI was too involved in watching TV!\pSince that TEAM {EVIL_TEAM} came to town,\nthe tourists have been staying away.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_1F/.LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_1F_Text_CantS: Hey, down in front!\nI can't see the TV!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_1F/.LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_1F_Text_MonFo:
Amazing! You're telling me a POKéMON
found someone's lost item?\pThat's something. If we had some smart
POKéMON like that...\pWe could recover anything that our
guests mislaid...
data/maps/LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_1F/.LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_1F_Text_Heard:
Oh, sorry, sorry!
I was too involved in watching TV!\pI heard that someone busted the
TEAM {EVIL_TEAM} HIDEOUT.\pThanks to that, we just booked a
reservation from a big group.\pIt was a company called... Uh...
GAME something...
data/maps/LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_1F/.LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_1F_Text_House:
Amazing! A house-sitting POKéMON
caught a burglar?\pThat's something. If we had a tough
POKéMON as a security guard...\pWe would be able to provide our guests
with greater safety.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_1F/.LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_1F_Text_Bette:
Oh, sorry, sorry!
I was too involved in watching TV.\pOh, yes. A big group of guests arrived
a little while ago.\pThey booked in as GAME FREAK, so I
guess they must make games.\pUh-oh, I'd better get working on
their dinner!

data/maps/LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_2F/.LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_2F_Text_ShowM:
I'm the GAME DESIGNER.\pOh, is that right?
You're working on a POKéDEX?\pIt's tough trying to complete it,
but don't give up.\pIf you do complete it, please come
show me.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_2F/.LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_2F_Text_Fille:
Wow! That's awesome!
Yep, it's totally awesome!\pThis POKéDEX is completely filled!
You really must love POKéMON!\pI'm so impressed!\pLet me give you something in
recognition of your feat!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_2F/.LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_2F_Text_ImThe: Me? You're talking to me?\nI'm the PROGRAMMER.\pI wonder what the SLOTS are\nlike here.
I'm the GRAPHIC ARTIST! Aren't the\nPOKéMON of HOENN interesting?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_2F/.LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_2F_Text_Girls: The girl TUBERS, they're cute, hey?\nTo battle against a cute TUBER...\pWhoop, it drives me wild!\pAnd the TWINS! Aren't they cute?\nA 2-on-2 battle with TWINS...\pWhoop, it's unbearably fun!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_2F/.LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_2F_Text_SeaBr: The sea breeze tickles my heart.\nIt feels wonderful here!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_2F/.LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_2F_Text_Never: You never know when and where\npeople will challenge you.\pThat's why I never leave home without\nmy GAME BOY ADVANCE.

data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStoreRo.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStoreRooftop_Text: Don't they have set dates for their\nclear-out sales?\pI watch TV, but they never show any\ncommercials.
Yes! I've been waiting a long time for\nthis clear-out sale.\pThey have items that you can only get\nhere. I'm going to load up, that I am!
It's a VENDING MACHINE.\nWhich drink would you like?
Clang!\pScore! An extra can of {STR_VAR_1}\ndropped down!

data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_1.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_1F_Text_IBu: Whenever I come to the DEPARTMENT\nSTORE, I always end up buying all sorts\lof things because it's so fun.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_1.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_1F_Text_Mom: Today, my mom is going to buy me some\nnice furniture.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_1.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_1F_Text_Buy: I'm buying something for my AZUMARILL\nas a reward for winning a CONTEST.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_1.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_1F_Text_Flo: 1F: SERVICE COUNTER\n    LOTTERY CORNER\p2F: TRAINER'S ZONE\p3F: BATTLE COLLECTION\p4F: TM CORNER\p5F: POKé DOLL FLOOR\pROOFTOP: ROOFTOP PLAZA

data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_2.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_2F_Text_Lea: Learn to use items properly.\nThat's basic, really.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_2.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_2F_Text_Goo: My husband is waiting at home.\nWhat would make a good gift for him?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_2.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_2F_Text_Sto: I'm leaving on a long journey soon.\nI need to stock up on items.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_2.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_2F_Text_Unu: FOR YOUR TRAVELING COMPANIONS\n2F: TRAINER'S ZONE

data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_3.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_3F_Text_Ite: For quickly toughening up POKéMON,\nitems are the best.\pPROTEIN boosts ATTACK, and CALCIUM\nraises SP. ATK.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_3.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_3F_Text_Wan: I want my POKéMON to have more\nendurance.\pI'm trying to decide whether to raise\nDEFENSE with IRON, or SP. DEF with ZINC.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_3.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_3F_Text_Gav: I gave a CARBOS to my POKéMON and its\nSPEED went up.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_3.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_3F_Text_Unu: ESSENTIALS FOR UNBEATABLE TRAINERS\n3F: BATTLE COLLECTION

data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_4.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_4F_Text_Att: Hmm...\pAn attacking move...\nOr a defensive move...\pIt's no easy matter to decide which TM\nmoves should be taught to POKéMON...
data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_4.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_4F_Text_Fif: There are so many different kinds of\nTM moves.\pA catalog I read said there are fifty\ndifferent kinds.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_4.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_4F_Text_Pok: I'd like to get all the different TMs,\nbut a POKéMON learns only four moves.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_4.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_4F_Text_Unu: A SHORTCUT TO POKéMON LEAGUE\n4F: TM CORNER

data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_5.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_5F_Text_Pla: This place is full of cute DOLLS.\pI should buy some for me, instead of\njust for my children.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_5.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_5F_Text_Get: I'm not big enough to raise POKéMON,\nso I'm getting a cute DOLL instead.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_5.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_5F_Text_Sel: They sell many cute MATS here.\pI wonder which one I should get?\nMaybe I'll buy them all...

data/maps/LilycoveCity_Harbor/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Harbor_Text_FerryUnavailabl: I beg your pardon?\nYou're looking for a ship?\pI'm sorry, the ferry service isn't\navailable at present...
data/maps/LilycoveCity_Harbor/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Harbor_Text_MayISeeYourTick: Hello, are you here for the ferry?\nMay I see your TICKET?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_Harbor/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Harbor_Text_NoTicket: {PLAYER} doesn't have the TICKET...\pI'm terribly sorry.\pYou must have a TICKET to board\nthe ferry.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_Harbor/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Harbor_Text_FlashTicketWher: {PLAYER} flashed the TICKET.\pPerfect! That's all you need!\pAnd where would you like to go?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_Harbor/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Harbor_Text_SailAnotherTime: Please sail with us another time!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_Harbor/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Harbor_Text_PleaseBoard: Please board the ferry and wait for\ndeparture.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_Harbor/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Harbor_Text_WhereWouldYouLi: Then, where would you like to go?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_Harbor/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Harbor_Text_SailorFerryUnav: Until they finish making the ferry, we\nsailors have nothing to do...\pI wish they'd get a move on, the folks\nat the SHIPYARD in SLATEPORT.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_Harbor/text.inc.LilycoveCity_Harbor_Text_SailorFerryAvai: The ferry S.S. TIDAL is finally in\noperation.\pThe folks at the SHIPYARD in SLATEPORT\nmust've worked extra hard.\pWell, it's my turn to get busy now!

data/maps/LilycoveCity_House1/text.inc.LilycoveCity_House1_Text_PokemonPartners: POKéMON are partners to people.\nThey aren't our tools.\pUnfortunately, there are some people\nwho fail to understand that...

data/maps/LilycoveCity_House2/text.inc.LilycoveCity_House2_Text_NotAwakeYetHave: Huh? What? What's that?\pI'm not near awake yet...\nYou can have this...
data/maps/LilycoveCity_House2/text.inc.LilycoveCity_House2_Text_SleepIsEssentia: Yawn...\pSleep is essential for good health...\nSleep and regain health...

data/maps/LilycoveCity_House3/text.inc.LilycoveCity_House3_Text_LearnFromMaster:
Oh, my, my! Are you traveling alone?
But you're so young! Good for you!\pI'm sure my kids could learn a thing
or two from you!\pMe? I'm a master of {POKEBLOCK}S.\pIf I get serious just a little, why, I
can concoct great {POKEBLOCK}S.\pWould you like to learn from me, a
master of {POKEBLOCK}S?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_House3/text.inc.LilycoveCity_House3_Text_OhAreYouSure: Oh? Are you sure?\pYou shouldn't always try to do\neverything by yourself, dear!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_House3/text.inc.LilycoveCity_House3_Text_ExplainPokebloc:
Oh, good! You're a smart soul!
This is a bit long, so listen up!\pAre you ready?\pIf you look at {POKEBLOCK}S, you should see
that they are rated on how they feel.\pThe lower the feel rating,
the better it is. Don't forget this!\pA good {POKEBLOCK} has a low feel
rating and a high level.\pA POKéMON can eat more good
{POKEBLOCK}S than ordinary ones, too.\pAnd this is important.\pIf you want to make smooth {POKEBLOCK}S,
use different kinds of BERRIES.\pDon't be stingy - the kinds of BERRIES
affect the smoothness of {POKEBLOCK}S.\pAnd another thing.\pThe more people blending BERRIES, the
smoother the {POKEBLOCK}S.\pThat's why you should talk to other
people and make {POKEBLOCK}S together.\pThat's about all you need to know to
make good {POKEBLOCK}S.\pIf everyone had POKéMON they love,
smooth {POKEBLOCK}S, and a loving family,\lthe world would be a happier place.\pDon't give up, dear!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_House3/text.inc.LilycoveCity_House3_Text_HappyToHaveQuad: When my wife gave birth to quadruplets,\nyou bet I was shocked.\pBut, now, seeing them play together,\nit makes me happy.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_House3/text.inc.LilycoveCity_House3_Text_GoingToWinMulti: We're having MULTI BATTLES, but I know\nI'm going to win.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_House3/text.inc.LilycoveCity_House3_Text_LikeMixingAtRec: We like mixing stuff at the RECORD\nCORNER.\pBut what gets mixed up?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_House3/text.inc.LilycoveCity_House3_Text_MakePokeblocksW: We're going to make super {POKEBLOCK}S\nwith a BERRY BLENDER!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_House3/text.inc.LilycoveCity_House3_Text_GoingToEnterCon: I want to brag about how tough my\nPOKéMON is, so we're going to enter a\lCONTEST together.

data/maps/LilycoveCity_House4/text.inc.LilycoveCity_House4_Text_MysteriesAtBott: This planet's biggest mysteries are\nat the bottom of the sea.\pSomebody said that, but I don't know...
data/maps/LilycoveCity_House4/text.inc.LilycoveCity_House4_Text_UnderwaterTrenc: There's a deep underwater trench\nbetween MOSSDEEP and SOOTOPOLIS.\pThat's what someone told me, anyway.

data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_Welc: Welcome to LILYCOVE MUSEUM.\pPlease take the time to enjoy our\ncollection of fantastic artwork\lfeaturing POKéMON.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_ImCu:
I'm the CURATOR of this MUSEUM of
fine arts.\pIt's heartening to see someone so
young as you in our MUSEUM.\pHave you viewed our collection of
paintings already?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_NotD: Ah, then let me not disturb you.\nPlease, do take your time.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_Have: Oh? I do believe that you seem to\nbe a POKéMON TRAINER.\pHave you an interest in paintings,\ntoo?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_Hono: I see...\pI'm honored that you would visit\nus in spite of that.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_Exce: Ah, excellent!\nYou do like paintings!\pThen, may I ask you to come with me?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_Very: It's a very old painting.\nThe paint is peeling here and there.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_OddL: It's an odd landscape with bizarre\nand fantastic scenery.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_Pain: It's a painting of a beautiful, smiling\nwoman with a POKéMON on her lap.
It's a painting of a legendary POKéMON\nfrom long ago.\pThe artist painted this from\nimagination.
It's a painting of GRASS POKéMON\nswaying in a breeze.\pThey appear to be enjoying the wind's\ngentle caress.
It's a delicious-looking painting\nof BERRIES.\pThis painting could make you hungry!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_Text_BirdPok: It's a replica of a famous sculpture.\pIt depicts an ancient BIRD POKéMON.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_BigP: It's a big POKé BALL carved from a\nblack stone.\pIt was apparently used in festivals\nin the olden days.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_Ston: It's a huge stone tablet inscribed\nwith POKéMON and dense text in the\lsmall characters of an ancient,\lunreadable language.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_Must: Battling with POKéMON is fun,\nI'll grant you that.\pBut one mustn't forget our love for\nthe fine arts.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_This: This ART MUSEUM... Well, you could\nsee many fantastic paintings.\pAnd the CURATOR is a wonderful person.\pAmong artists like myself, this MUSEUM\nis an inspiration.
This lady is pretty!\nShe's like Mommy!
This POKéMON is adorable!\nJust like our little boy!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_Hear: I'd heard that this ART MUSEUM got\nin some new paintings.\pSo, naturally I hurried over.\pAre the new paintings up on the\nsecond floor?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_Cura: Lately, the CURATOR has been\nunusually cheerful.\pI bet something good happened for him.\nDefinitely.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_AimT: I aim to see many great paintings\nhere and learn from them.\pI have this dream of one day having\nmy artwork exhibited here.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_Muse:
The ART MUSEUM has become a favorite
tourist destination.\pIt's great for LILYCOVE...
No, great for the HOENN region!\pThis is what I've heard - a lone TRAINER
procured all the paintings upstairs.

data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_This: This is our special exhibit hall.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_Expl:
As you can plainly see, there is not a
single painting on exhibit.\pHere, I don't wish to exhibit works of
so-called classical art.\pSuch classical works you can see on
our ground floor.\pI wish to exhibit work that is far
different from the classics.\pArt, after all, is not restricted to old,
famous works!\pThis exhibit hall, I wish to fill it with...\pModern and vibrant artworks of
POKéMON seemingly ready to spring\lforth into glorious life!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_Plea:
I beg your pardon. I didn't intend
to monopolize the conversation.\pNow, as you are young, and yet
obviously well traveled...\pYou must encounter lively POKéMON
and works of art depicting them.\pIf you were to come across such a
painting, may we ask you to obtain\lthe artist's permission to exhibit\lit here?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_Wish: I wish to fill this exhibit hall with\nmodern and vibrant paintings of\lPOKéMON.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_Than: Thanks to you, we've added a new\npainting to our collection!\pI've heard it depicts your POKéMON.\nTruly magnificent!\pThank you so very, very much!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_Pain:
Isn't this marvelous?
This collection of paintings!\pEach one of them flawless!
None better than another!\pThese paintings have attracted
more guests to our ART MUSEUM.\pSincerely, I thank you, {PLAYER}.
This is my dream come true!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_Toke: This is merely a token of my gratitude.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_Keep: I will keep this for you until we\nmeet again.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_Hono: Ah, so good to see you, {PLAYER}!\pIt's an honor to have you visit us\non your busy journeys.\pPlease, relax and do enjoy your\nvisit with us.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_ItsP: It's a picture frame with pink-colored\nadornments.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_ItsY: It's a picture frame with yellow-colored\nadornments.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_ItsB: It's a picture frame with blue-colored\nadornments.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_ItsR: It's a picture frame with red-colored\nadornments.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_ItsG: It's a picture frame with green-colored\nadornments.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_NewP: I've been away awhile, so the new\npaintings up here surprised me.\pI wish someone would paint my POKéMON\nthis pretty.
Well... So this is where they show the\ntopical POKéMON paintings.\pI see, these new paintings are indeed\nrather amusing.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_Thes: Wow, is that right?\nThese paintings are of your POKéMON.\pIsn't that just the ultimate joy for\na TRAINER?

data/maps/LilycoveCity_MoveDeletersHouse.LilycoveCity_MoveDeletersHouse_Text_ICan: Uh...\nOh, yes, I'm the MOVE DELETER.\pI can make POKéMON forget their moves.\pWould you like me to do that?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_MoveDeletersHouse.LilycoveCity_MoveDeletersHouse_Text_Whic: Which POKéMON should forget a move?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_MoveDeletersHouse.LilycoveCity_MoveDeletersHouse_Text_MonH: It worked to perfection!\p{STR_VAR_1} has forgotten\n{STR_VAR_2} completely.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_MoveDeletersHouse.LilycoveCity_MoveDeletersHouse_Text_Come: Come again if there are other moves\nto be forgotten.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_MoveDeletersHouse.LilycoveCity_MoveDeletersHouse_Text_EggC: What?\nNo EGG should know any moves.

data/maps/LilycoveCity_PokemonCenter_1F/.LilycoveCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_HowMa: I wonder how many kinds of POKéMON\nthere are in the world?\pIt'd be great to cross seas and\ntrade POKéMON with people far away.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_PokemonCenter_1F/.LilycoveCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Heard: I've been hearing about some rotten\nscoundrels who steal POKéMON and rip\loff METEORITES.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_PokemonCenter_1F/.LilycoveCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Haven: Those rotten scoundrels who steal\nPOKéMON and rip off METEORITES...\pI haven't seen them around recently.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_PokemonCenter_1F/.UnknownString_818A10A: I'm going to get X ATTACK to raise\nATTACK during battle.\pThat way, I'll be guaranteed to win!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_PokemonCenter_1F/.UnknownString_818A168: FULL HEAL is a little expensive,\nbut it is convenient.\pJust one of these can cure any\nPOKéMON status problem.

data/maps/LilycoveCity_PokemonTrainerFan.LilycoveCity_PokemonTrainerFanClub_Text_: Oh, wow!\nIt's {PLAYER}!

I've heard the news!
You're really strong, aren't you?\pWe always argue about who is the
strongest of all TRAINERS here.\pSo when I heard about you, I decided
to be your fan!\pI hope you'll keep on battling other
tough TRAINERS.\pThat way, we'll be able to see more
of your hot, hot battles.\pThat will make the others here see
exactly how great you are.\pRemember, I'm cheering for you,
{PLAYER}!
Yo, {PLAYER}!\nYou're the one we want to win!
The others, they don't know that\nyou're the best of the best!\pIsn't that right, {PLAYER}?\nShow them you've got guts!
I hate to say this, but the TRAINER\neverybody's talking about is\l{STR_VAR_1}, no question about it!\pThat TRAINER's power...\nIt's out of the ordinary.
Darn it... I've been telling people\nthat {STR_VAR_1} is the best now...\pBut no one wants to listen...

I've been hearing things about a
tough new TRAINER.\pThis TRAINER's supposed to be beating
GYM LEADERS, even.\pDo you know anything about this
new TRAINER?
Oh!\n{PLAYER}!\pGo for it!\nI'm pulling for you!

Sigh...
BRAWLY...\pOh, no! Wait!
That's not right! No, no, no!\pI'm your fan through and through!\pSo make me proud!
Go for it!
I can't help it, I can only get to\nlike BRAWLY...
Nobody understands the charm of\nBRAWLY...\pI don't care!\pEven if I'm the only one, I'm going\nto keep cheering for BRAWLY!
Whatever anyone says, my favorite\nTRAINER is DEWFORD's GYM LEADER\lBRAWLY!
You've surpassed your own father in\nevery regard!\pI'm telling you, so there's no question\nabout it at all!
Even when things turned bleak, your\nfather never gave up.\pThis I know to be true.\pYou never give up even if you lose!\nSo keep on battling!

NORMAN battled with more power,
charisma, and showmanship than you.\pEven though people may say that
you're strong...\pYou've still got a long way to go
compared to your father.

You're beginning to get the same
air of awe NORMAN exudes.\pBut there's something conclusively
different between you and NORMAN.\pI can't tell you what that is.
You'll have to find it yourself.

Everyone here, we're all huge fans
of POKéMON battles.\pWe discuss who we consider to be
the strongest of all TRAINERS.\pIf you were to become famous, we
might even become your fans!
Oh, woweee! It's {PLAYER}!\nFor real, too!\pPlease, shake my hand, shake my hand!

I'll always cheer for you, {PLAYER}!
Always, always!\pI don't want to see you lose ever,
{PLAYER}.\pBecause I know you're really, really
strong, {PLAYER}!
{STR_VAR_1} is really cool...\pEveryone thinks so, right, right?
{STR_VAR_1} really is cool, don't\nyou think so?\pEven if it's just me, I'm going to keep\ncheering my favorite TRAINER.
My favorite TRAINER is...\pCool...\pStrong...\pAnd really nice...\pI wish there was a TRAINER like that...
Whoa! It's {PLAYER}!\nWicked!\pWhen I grow up, I want to be strong\nlike you, {PLAYER}!
Even if I'm the only one...\pYou'll always be the only one I\ncheer for, {PLAYER}!\pBecause I believe in you, {PLAYER}!
{STR_VAR_1} is so wickedly cool...\nI want to shake hands with my hero.
Even if I'm the only one...\pI'm never going to stop being\n{STR_VAR_1}'s fan!\pBecause I've heard, {STR_VAR_1}\nnever loses!
{PLAYER}!\nYou are amazing after all!\pEver since I set eyes on you, I knew\nthat you were great.\pIt looks like my eyes didn't deceive me.
Who cares about the others.\nI'm in your corner!\pYou don't need to worry. Just get\nout there and battle like always.

You're a pretty decent TRAINER,
I think.\pBut I also think that {STR_VAR_1}
is number one right now.\pThat's just my opinion.
Don't worry about it too much.
Wow, you really are strong.\nMaybe even stronger than {STR_VAR_1}.\pBut {STR_VAR_1} needs me.\pIf I don't cheer for {STR_VAR_1},\nwho will?
You've changed my mind!\nYou are strong, aren't you?\pI'd like you to tell me how you managed\nto get so strong!
The tougher the situation, the more\nattractively you battle.\pI can't wait for your next battle!
Among the recently hot TRAINERS,\n{STR_VAR_1} is the standout.\pThat toughness, it's simply not normal.\pYou're doing okay, but you're not in\nthe same class as {STR_VAR_1}.
You are really popular...\pYou're strong, and you're caring to\nPOKéMON. No one can knock you.\pBut, you know, I believe in {STR_VAR_1}.\p{STR_VAR_1} is definitely stronger!\nI'm positive!
You...\pImpressive!
Your true worth, it is fine if only\nI recognized it.\pThe others I doubt will understand\nthe hidden power that beats within.
Yes, I see strength in your eyes.\pBut!\pYou still haven't realized your\npotential.

It is true that you are tremendously
powerful.\pBut!
I can tell...\pThat strength cannot be considered
true strength yet!\pTrue strength is...!
... ...\pActually, I have no idea, either.

data/maps/LittlerootTown/text.inc.LittlerootTown_Text_OurNewHomeLetsGoInsi:
MOM: {PLAYER}, we're here, honey!\pIt must be tiring riding with our things
in the moving truck.\pWell, this is LITTLEROOT TOWN.\pHow do you like it?
This is our new home!\pIt has a quaint feel, but it seems to be
an easy place to live, don't you think?\pAnd, you get your own room, {PLAYER}!
Let's go inside.
data/maps/LittlerootTown/text.inc.LittlerootTown_Text_WearTheseRunningShoe:
MOM: {PLAYER}! {PLAYER}! Did you
introduce yourself to PROF. BIRCH?\pOh! What an adorable POKéMON!
You got it from PROF. BIRCH. How nice!\pYou're your father's child, all right.
You look good together with POKéMON!\pHere, honey! If you're going out on an
adventure, wear these RUNNING SHOES.\pThey'll put a zip in your step!
data/maps/LittlerootTown/text.inc.LittlerootTown_Text_ExplainRunningShoes:
MOM: {PLAYER}, those shoes came with
instructions.\p“Press the B Button while wearing these
RUNNING SHOES to run extra-fast!\p“Slip on these RUNNING SHOES and race
in the great outdoors!”
data/maps/LittlerootTown/text.inc.LittlerootTown_Text_ComeHomeIfAnythingHa:
... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...
... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...\pTo think that you have your very own
POKéMON now...\lYour father will be overjoyed.\p...But please be careful.
If anything happens, you can come home.\pGo on, go get them, honey!
data/maps/LittlerootTown/text.inc.LittlerootTown_Text_CanUsePCToStoreItems: If you use a PC, you can store items\nand POKéMON.\pThe power of science is staggering!
data/maps/LittlerootTown/text.inc.LittlerootTown_Text_BirchSpendsDaysInLab: PROF. BIRCH spends days in his LAB\nstudying, then he'll suddenly go out in\lthe wild to do more research...\pWhen does PROF. BIRCH spend time\nat home?
data/maps/LittlerootTown/text.inc.LittlerootTown_Text_IfYouGoInGrassPokemo: If you go in the tall grass at the sides\nof this road, wild POKéMON will appear.
data/maps/LittlerootTown/text.inc.LittlerootTown_Text_DangerousIfYouDontHa: It's not safe to go out there if you\ndon't have any POKéMON with you.
data/maps/LittlerootTown/text.inc.LittlerootTown_Text_CanYouGoSeeWhatsHapp: I can hear someone shouting down the\nroad here.\pWhat should I do? What should we do?\nSomebody has to go help...
data/maps/LittlerootTown/text.inc.LittlerootTown_Text_YouSavedBirch: Boy, am I glad you went and rescued\nthe PROFESSOR.
data/maps/LittlerootTown/text.inc.LittlerootTown_Text_GoodLuckCatchingPoke: Are you going to catch POKéMON?\nGood luck!
data/maps/LittlerootTown/text.inc.LittlerootTown_Text_TownSign: LITTLEROOT TOWN\n“A town that can't be shaded any hue.”

data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.PlayersHouse_1F_Text_IsntItNiceInHere: MOM: See, {PLAYER}?\nIsn't it nice in here, too?
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.PlayersHouse_1F_Text_MoversPokemonGoSetC:
The mover's POKéMON do all the work
of moving us in and cleaning up after.\lThis is so convenient!\p{PLAYER}, your room is upstairs.
Go check it out, dear!\pDAD bought you a new clock to mark
our move here.\lDon't forget to set it!
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.PlayersHouse_1F_Text_ArentYouInterestedI: MOM: Well, {PLAYER}?\pAren't you interested in seeing your\nvery own room?
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.PlayersHouse_1F_Text_GoSetTheClock: MOM: {PLAYER}.\pGo set the clock in your room, honey.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.PlayersHouse_1F_Text_MaybeDadWillBeOn: MOM: Look! It's PETALBURG GYM!\nMaybe DAD will be on!
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.PlayersHouse_1F_Text_ItsOverWeMissedHim: MOM: Oh... It's over.\pI think DAD was on, but we missed him.\nToo bad.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.PlayersHouse_1F_Text_GoIntroduceYourself: Oh, yes.\nOne of DAD's friends lives in town.\pPROF. BIRCH is his name.\pHe lives right next door, so you should\ngo over and introduce yourself.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.PlayersHouse_1F_Text_DidYouMeetProfBirch: MOM: Did you introduce yourself to\nPROF. BIRCH?
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.PlayersHouse_1F_Text_YouShouldRestABit: MOM: How are you doing, {PLAYER}?\nYou look a little tired.\pI think you should rest a bit.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.PlayersHouse_1F_Text_GotDadsBadgeHeresSo: MOM: Oh? Did DAD give you that BADGE?\pThen here's something from your MOM!
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.PlayersHouse_1F_Text_DontPushYourselfToo: Don't push yourself too hard, dear.\nYou can always come home.\pGo for it, honey!
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.PlayersHouse_1F_Text_ReportFromPetalburg: INTERVIEWER: ...We brought you this\nreport from in front of PETALBURG GYM.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.PlayersHouse_1F_Text_TheresAMovieOnTV: There is a movie on TV.\pTwo men are dancing on a big piano\nkeyboard.\pBetter get going!
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.UnknownString_81728E3:
It's the instruction booklet for the
RUNNING SHOES.\p“Press the B Button to run while
wearing your RUNNING SHOES.\p“Lace up your RUNNING SHOES and hit
the road running!”
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.PlayersHouse_1F_Text_TicketFromBrineyCam:
DAD: Hm?\pHey, it's {PLAYER}!\pIt's been a while since I saw you,
but you look...stronger, somehow.\pThat's the impression I get.
But your old man hasn't given up yet!\pOh, yes, I have something for you.
This came to you from someone named\lMR. BRINEY.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.PlayersHouse_1F_Text_PortsInSlateportLil:
DAD: Hm, a TICKET for a ferry?\pIf I recall, there are ferry ports in
SLATEPORT and LILYCOVE.\p{PLAYER}, if you have ambition as a
TRAINER, go to the BATTLE TOWER.\pIt should teach you that there is
no end to a TRAINER's chosen path.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.PlayersHouse_1F_Text_BetterGetBackToGym: I'd better get back to PETALBURG GYM.\pMOM, thanks for looking after the house\nwhile I'm away.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.PlayersHouse_1F_Text_DadShouldStayLonger: MOM: That DAD of yours...\pHe comes home for the first time in a\nwhile, but all he talks about is POKéMON.\pHe should relax and stay a little longer.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.UnknownString_8172C50:
We bring you a special news bulletin.\pWe've received reports of a blue FLYING
POKéMON in various HOENN locales.\pThe identity of this POKéMON has not
yet been determined.\pWe now return you to your regular
movie presentation.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_1.UnknownString_8172D30:
We bring you a special news bulletin.\pWe've received reports of a red FLYING
POKéMON in various HOENN locales.\pThe identity of this POKéMON has not
yet been determined.\pWe now return you to your regular
movie presentation.

data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_2.PlayersHouse_2F_Text_ClockIsStopped: The clock is stopped...\pBetter set it and start it!
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_2.PlayersHouse_2F_Text_HowDoYouLikeYourRoo:
MOM: {PLAYER}, how do you like your
new room?\pGood! Everything's put away neatly!\pThey finished moving everything in
downstairs, too.\pPOKéMON movers are so convenient!\pOh, you should make sure that
everything's all there on your desk.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_2.UnknownString_8172F31: The bookshelf is lined entirely with\nbooks on POKéMON.\pIt's {PLAYER}'s prized collection.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_2.PlayersHouse_2F_Text_Notebook: {PLAYER} flipped open the notebook.\pADVENTURE RULE NO. 1\nOpen the MENU with START.\pADVENTURE RULE NO. 2\nRecord your progress with SAVE.\pThe remaining pages are blank...
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_2.Common_Text_LookCloserAtMap: {PLAYER} took a closer look at the\nHOENN region map.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_BrendansHouse_2.PlayersHouse_2F_Text_ItsAGameCube: It's a Nintendo GameCube.\pA Game Boy Advance is connected to\nserve as the Controller.

data/maps/LittlerootTown_MaysHouse_1F/te.RivalsHouse_1F_Text_OhYoureTheNewNeighbo:
Oh, hello. And you are?\p... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...
... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...\pOh, you're {PLAYER}{KUN}, our new next-door
neighbor! Hi!\pWe have a {STR_VAR_1} about the same
age as you.\pOur {STR_VAR_1} was excited about making
a new friend.\pOur {STR_VAR_1} is upstairs, I think.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_MaysHouse_1F/te.RivalsHouse_1F_Text_WhereHasHusbandGone: Where has my husband gone?\nJust when {PLAYER}{KUN} is visiting, too...\pThat man can never sit still for long...\nHe might be at his LAB.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_MaysHouse_1F/te.RivalsHouse_1F_Text_WentOutSomewhere: Oh, {RIVAL} has gone out somewhere.\pLike father, like child.\n{RIVAL} can't stay quietly at home.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_MaysHouse_1F/te.RivalsHouse_1F_Text_ShouldGoHomeEverySoO:
I think it's wonderful for people to
travel with POKéMON.\pBut you should go home every so often
to let your mother know you're okay.\pShe might not say it, but I'm sure she
worries about you, {PLAYER}{KUN}.

data/maps/LittlerootTown_MaysHouse_2F/te.RivalsHouse_2F_Text_MayGettingReady: POKéMON fully restored!\nItems ready, and... Huh?
data/maps/LittlerootTown_MaysHouse_2F/te.RivalsHouse_2F_Text_MayWhoAreYou:
Huh?
Who... Who are you?\p... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...
... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...\pOh, you're {PLAYER}{KUN}.
So your move was today.\pUm... I'm MAY.
Glad to meet you!\pI...
I have this dream of becoming friends\lwith POKéMON all over the world.\pI... I heard about you, {PLAYER}{KUN}, from
my dad, PROF. BIRCH.\pI was hoping that you would be nice,
{PLAYER}{KUN}, and that we could be friends.\pOh, this is silly, isn't it?
I... I've just met you, {PLAYER}{KUN}.\pEheheh...\pOh, no! I forgot!\pI was supposed to go help Dad catch
some wild POKéMON!\p{PLAYER}{KUN}, I'll catch you later!
data/maps/LittlerootTown_MaysHouse_2F/te.RivalsHouse_2F_Text_BrendanGettingReady: POKéMON fully restored...\nItems all packed, and...
data/maps/LittlerootTown_MaysHouse_2F/te.RivalsHouse_2F_Text_BrendanWhoAreYou:
Hey!
You...\pWho are you?\pOh, you're {PLAYER}, aren't you?
Moved in next door, right?\pI didn't know that you're a girl.\pDad, PROF. BIRCH, said that our new
next-door neighbor is a GYM LEADER's\lkid, so I assumed you'd be a guy.\pMy name's BRENDAN.
So, hi, neighbor!\pHuh? Hey, {PLAYER}, don't you have
a POKéMON?\pDo you want me to go catch you one?\pAw, darn, I forgot...\pI'm supposed to go help my dad catch
some wild POKéMON.\pSome other time, okay?
data/maps/LittlerootTown_MaysHouse_2F/te.RivalsHouse_2F_Text_MayJustCheckingMyPok:
MAY: {PLAYER}{KUN}!\pI was just checking my POKéDEX.\pThere's still a lot of POKéMON that
I've seen but haven't caught.\pAnd there are many others that
I think will evolve.\pI wonder where I should go catch
some POKéMON next?
data/maps/LittlerootTown_MaysHouse_2F/te.RivalsHouse_2F_Text_MayWhereShouldIGoNex: MAY: I wonder where I should go catch\nsome POKéMON next?\pWouldn't it be funny if we ran into each\nother, {PLAYER}{KUN}?
data/maps/LittlerootTown_MaysHouse_2F/te.RivalsHouse_2F_Text_BrendanJustCheckingM: BRENDAN: Hey, it's {PLAYER}.\pI was just checking out my POKéDEX.\pThere are still many POKéMON that\nI need to catch, I know, but this\lis looking pretty good.\pChecking this POKéDEX out gives me\nthe urge to hit the road again.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_MaysHouse_2F/te.RivalsHouse_2F_Text_BrendanWhereShouldIG: BRENDAN: I'm having a hard time deciding\nwhere I should catch POKéMON next.\pHey, {PLAYER}, if I see you while I'm out\ncatching POKéMON, I can pitch you a\lbattle if you'd like.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_MaysHouse_2F/te.UnknownString_8173A76: It's lined with POKéMON picture books.

data/maps/LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchs.UnknownString_8173A9D: POKéMON SPECIES & HABITATS...\nHUMAN & POKéMON COEXISTENCE...\lPOKéMONOLOGY FOR BEGINNERS...\pIt's brimming with books written by\nPROF. BIRCH.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchs.LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchsLab_Text_B:
Hunh? PROF. BIRCH?\pThe PROF's away on fieldwork.
Ergo, he isn't here.\pOh, let me explain what fieldwork is.\pIt is to study things in the natural
environment, like fields and mountains,\linstead of a laboratory.\pThe PROF isn't one for doing desk work.
He's the type of person who would\lrather go outside and experience\lthings than read about them here.
The PROF isn't one for doing desk work.\nHe's the type of person who would\lrather go outside and experience\lthings than read about them here.
PROF. BIRCH is studying the habitats\nand distribution of POKéMON.\pThe PROF enjoys {RIVAL}'s help, too.\nThere's a lot of love there.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchs.LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchsLab_Text_L:
PROF. BIRCH: So, {PLAYER}{KUN}.\pI've heard so much about you from
your father.\pI've heard that you don't have your
own POKéMON yet.\pBut the way you battled earlier,
you pulled it off with aplomb!\pI guess you have your father's blood
in your veins after all!\pOh, yes. As thanks for rescuing me,
I'd like you to have the POKéMON you\lused earlier.\p{PLAYER} received the {STR_VAR_1}!
data/maps/LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchs.LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchsLab_Text_W: PROF. BIRCH: While you're at it, why not\ngive a nickname to that {STR_VAR_1}?
data/maps/LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchs.LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchsLab_Text_M:
PROF. BIRCH: If you work at POKéMON
and gain experience, I think you'll make\la darn good TRAINER.\pMy kid, {RIVAL}, is out on ROUTE 103
studying POKéMON.\pIt might not be a bad idea for you to
go see {RIVAL}. What do you think?
data/maps/LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchs.LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchsLab_Text_G: PROF. BIRCH: Great!\n{RIVAL} should be happy, too.\pGet {RIVAL} to teach you what it\nmeans to be a TRAINER.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchs.LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchsLab_Text_D: PROF. BIRCH: Oh, don't be that way.\nYou should go meet my kid.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchs.LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchsLab_Text_B: PROF. BIRCH: {RIVAL} should be on\nROUTE 103 somewhere.\pIf you or your POKéMON get tired,\nget some rest at home.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchs.LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchsLab_Text_H:
PROF. BIRCH: Oh, hi, {PLAYER}{KUN}!\pI heard you beat {RIVAL} on
your first try. That's excellent!\p{RIVAL}'s been helping with my research
for a long time.\p{RIVAL} has an extensive history as
a TRAINER already.\pHere, {PLAYER}{KUN}, I ordered this for my
research, but I think you should have\lthis POKéDEX.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchs.LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchsLab_Text_E:
PROF. BIRCH: The POKéDEX is a high-tech
tool that automatically makes a record\lof any POKéMON you meet or catch.\pMy kid, {RIVAL}, goes everywhere
with it.\pWhenever my kid catches a rare POKéMON
and records its data in the POKéDEX,\lwhy, {RIVAL} looks for me while I'm out\ldoing fieldwork, and shows me.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchs.LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchsLab_Text_C: PROF. BIRCH: Countless POKéMON await\nyou!\pArgh, I'm getting the itch to get out\nand do fieldwork again!
data/maps/LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchs.LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchsLab_Text_M: MAY: Oh, wow, {PLAYER}{KUN}!\nYou got a POKéDEX, too!\pThat's great! Just like me!\nI've got something for you, too!
data/maps/LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchs.LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchsLab_Text_C:
MAY: It's fun if you can get a lot of
POKéMON!\pI'm going to look all over the place
because I want different POKéMON.\pIf I find any cute POKéMON, I'll catch
them with POKé BALLS!
data/maps/LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchs.LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchsLab_Text_M: MAY: I wonder where I should go look\nfor POKéMON next?
data/maps/LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchs.LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchsLab_Text_B: BRENDAN: Huh...\nSo you got a POKéDEX, too.\pWell then, here.\nI'll give you this.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchs.LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchsLab_Text_C:
BRENDAN: You know it's more fun to
have a whole bunch of POKéMON.\pI'm going to explore all over the place
to find different POKéMON.\pIf I find any cool POKéMON, you bet
I'll try to get them with POKé BALLS.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchs.LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchsLab_Text_B: BRENDAN: Where should I look for\nPOKéMON next...
data/maps/LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchs.LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchsLab_Text_S: It's a serious-looking machine.\nThe PROF must use this for research.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchs.LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchsLab_Text_P: It's a PC used for research.\nBetter not mess around with it.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchs.LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchsLab_Text_C: It's crammed with books on POKéMON.
data/maps/LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchs.LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchsLab_Text_B: It's a book that's too hard to read.

data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_UncleHesTooPeppy: UNCLE: It's because of POKéMON that\nthis boy's got more pep, I suppose...\lBut he's become a bit too peppy...
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_WallyWantToChallengeGy: WALLY: Aww, UNCLE, please?\pI want to challenge this GYM and see\nhow much better I've become.\pPlease? May I, please?
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_UncleYourePushingIt: UNCLE: Now hold on, WALLY.\pSince you started living with POKéMON,\nyou have grown quite a lot stronger.\pBut don't you think you're pushing it\nto suddenly challenge a GYM?
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_WallyWeCanBeatAnyone: WALLY: I'm not pushing it.\pIf I combine forces with RALTS,\nwe can beat anyone!
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_WallyWillYouBattleMe:
WALLY: Oh! Hi, {PLAYER}!\pI've gotten a lot stronger since we
met.\p{PLAYER}, I want you and my UNCLE to
understand that.\p{PLAYER}, please, will you have a
battle with me?
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_WallyMyUncleWontKnowIm: WALLY: Oh... If you won't battle me,\n{PLAYER}, my UNCLE won't know that I've\lbecome really strong.
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_UncleCanYouBattleWally: UNCLE: {PLAYER}{KUN}, was it?\nOn WALLY's behalf, can I ask you to\lbattle with him just this once?\pI don't think he's going to listen to\nany reason the way he is now.
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_WallyHereICome: WALLY: {PLAYER}, thank you.\pOkay... Here I come!
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_WallyIllGoBackToVerdan: WALLY: UNCLE...\nI'll go back to VERDANTURF...
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_ThankYouNotEnoughToBat: {PLAYER}, thank you.\nBeing a TRAINER is tough, isn't it?\pIt's not enough just to have POKéMON\nand make them battle. That isn't what\lbeing a real TRAINER is about.
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_UncleNoNeedToBeDown:
UNCLE: WALLY, there's no need to be so
down on yourself.\pWhy, what's keeping you from becoming
stronger and stronger?\pCome on, let's go home.
Everyone's waiting for you.
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_UncleVisitUsSometime: UNCLE: {PLAYER}{KUN}, it just dawned on me\nthat you must be the TRAINER who kept\lan eye out for WALLY when he caught\lhis POKéMON.\pWhy don't you visit us in VERDANTURF\nsometime?\lI'm sure WALLY would enjoy it.
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_WattsonNeedFavorTakeKe:
WATTSON: Oh, {PLAYER}{KUN}!
You look like you have a lot of zip!\lThat's a good thing, wahahahaha!\pFine! I've decided!
I need a favor, {PLAYER}{KUN}!\pMAUVILLE CITY has an underground
sector called NEW MAUVILLE.\p{PLAYER}{KUN}, I'd like you to go there and
switch off the GENERATOR.\pThe GENERATOR has been running a bit
haywire. It's getting unsafe.\pHere, this is the KEY to get into NEW
MAUVILLE.
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_WattsonWontBeChallenge:
WATTSON: Don't you worry about it.
It won't be a challenge to you.\pThe entrance to NEW MAUVILLE is just
a short SURF away from ROUTE 110.\pThat's it, then, you have my trust!
Wahahahaha!
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_WattsonThanksTakeTM: WATTSON: Wahahahaha!\pI knew it, {PLAYER}{KUN}! I knew I'd made\nthe right choice asking you!\pThis is my thanks - a TM containing\nTHUNDERBOLT!\pGo on, you've earned it!
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_WattsonYoungTakeCharge: WATTSON: Wahahahaha!\pIt pleases me to no end to see the\nyoung step up and take charge!
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_NurseHurtMonBackToHeal: You know, it's cool to have POKéMON\nbattles and stuff...\pBut if your POKéMON gets hurt, you\nhave to nurse it back to health.
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_AllSortsOfPeopleComeTh: The roads of this town stretch north\nand south, and east and west.\pBecause of that, we get all sorts of\npeople coming through.
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_RydelVeryGenerous: Have you been to RYDEL'S CYCLES yet?\pRYDEL, the owner, is a very generous\nman.
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_PokemonCanJumpYouOnBik: Even if you're riding a BIKE, wild\nPOKéMON could jump you.
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_CitySign: MAUVILLE CITY\n“The bright and shiny city of fun!”
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_GymSign: MAUVILLE CITY POKéMON GYM\nLEADER: WATTSON\l“The cheerfully electrifying man!”
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_BikeShopSign: “Ride in gravel and shake up your\nsoul!”\lRYDEL'S CYCLES
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_GameCornerSign: “The play spot for all!”\nMAUVILLE GAME CORNER
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_ExplainTV:
Hi, do you check out TV at all?\pThey've added a bunch of cool new
shows recently.\pTV is so cool. I've seen my friends on
TV just out of the blue.\pAnd, sometimes, they even put you on TV
without telling you.\pI wish I would be on TV sometime.\pThat's why I think you should check
out TVs whenever you can.
data/maps/MauvilleCity/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Text_BeenCheckingOutTV: Hi, have you been checking out TVs?

data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_RydelGreeting: Well, well, what have we here?\nA most energetic customer!\pMe? You may call me RYDEL.\nI'm the owner of this cycle shop.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_DidYouComeFro: RYDEL: Your RUNNING SHOES...\nThey're awfully filthy.\pDid you come from far away?
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_GuessYouDontN: RYDEL: Is that right?\pThen, I guess you have no need for\nany of my BIKES.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_ExplainBikesC:
RYDEL: Hm, hm... ... ... ... ...
... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...\pYou're saying that you came all this
way from LITTLEROOT?\pMy goodness!
That's ridiculously far!\pIf you had one of my BIKES, you could
go anywhere easily while feeling the\lgentle caress of the wind!\pI'll tell you what!
I'll give you a BIKE!\pOh, wait a second!\pI forgot to tell you that there are
two kinds of BIKES!\pThey are the MACH BIKE and the
ACRO BIKE!\pMACH BIKE is for cyclists who want
to feel the wind with their bodies!\pAnd an ACRO BIKE is for those who
prefer technical rides!\pI'm a real sweetheart, so you can
have whichever one you like!\pWhich one will you choose?
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_ComeBackToSwi: RYDEL: If you get the urge to switch\nBIKES, just come see me!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_WantToSwitchB: RYDEL: Oh? Were you thinking about\nswitching BIKES?
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_IllSwitchBike: RYDEL: Okay, no problem!\nI'll switch BIKES for you!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_ExchangedMach: {PLAYER} got the MACH BIKE exchanged\nfor an ACRO BIKE.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_ExchangedAcro: {PLAYER} got the ACRO BIKE exchanged\nfor a MACH BIKE.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_HappyYouLikeI: RYDEL: Good, good!\nI'm happy that you like it!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_OhYourBikeIsI:
Oh? What happened to that BIKE I
gave you?\pOh, I get it, you stored it using your PC.\pWell, take it out of PC storage,
and I'll be happy to exchange it!\pMay the wind always be at your back
on your adventure!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_HandbooksAreI: I'm learning about BIKES while\nI work here.\pIf you need advice on how to ride your\nBIKE, there're a couple handbooks in\lthe back.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_MachHandbookW: It's a handbook on the MACH BIKE.\pWhich page do you want to read?
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_HowToRideMach: A BIKE moves in the direction that\nthe + Control Pad is pressed.\pIt will speed up once it gets rolling.\pTo stop, release the + Control Pad.\nThe BIKE will slow to a stop.\pWant to read a different page?
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_HowToTurnMach:
A MACH BIKE is speedy, but it can't
stop very quickly.\pIt gets a little tricky to get around
a corner.\pRelease the + Control Pad a little
before the corner and slow down.\pWant to read a different page?
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_SandySlopes:
There are small sandy slopes throughout
the HOENN region.\pThe loose, crumbly sand makes it
impossible to climb normally.\pBut if you have a MACH BIKE, you can
zip up a sandy slope.\pWant to read a different page?
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_AcroHandbookW: It's a handbook on the ACRO BIKE.\pWhich page do you want to read?
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_Wheelies: Press the B Button while riding, and the\nfront wheel lifts up.\pYou can zip around with the front\nwheel up using the + Control Pad.\pThis technique is called a wheelie.\pWant to read a different page?
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_BunnyHops: Keeping the B Button pressed, your\nBIKE can hop on the spot.\pThis technique is called a bunny hop.\pYou can ride while hopping, too.\pWant to read a different page?
data/maps/MauvilleCity_BikeShop/text.inc.MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_Jumps:
Press the B Button and the + Control
Pad at the same time to jump.\pPress the + Control Pad to the side
to jump sideways.\pPress it backwards to make the BIKE
change directions while jumping.\pWant to read a different page?

data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_NeedCoinCas: Okay, you wanted some COINS for\nthe games?\pBut you don't have a COIN CASE for\nstowing the COINS.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_WereYouLook: Were you looking for COINS?\pIt's ¥1000 for 50 COINS.\nWould you like some?
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_ThankYouHer: Thank you very much!\nHere are your COINS!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_DontHaveEno: Um... You don't appear to have\nenough money...
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_DontNeedCoi: Oh... You don't need COINS, then?\nGood luck on your adventure!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.UnknownString_8181DB2: It's ¥1,000 for 50 COINS.\nWould you like some?
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_ExchangeCoi: Welcome.\pYou can exchange your COINS for\nprizes here.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_SendToYourH: Thank you!\nWe'll send it to your PC at home.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.UnknownString_8181E93: There isn't any room available for\nplacing {STR_VAR_1}.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_OhIsThatSo: Oh, is that so? \nYou need to save some COINS before\lcoming back here.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.UnknownString_8181F15: Oh, you can't carry any more than that.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_GotTwoOfSam: I made a mistake and got two of the\nsame DOLLS.\pWould you like one of them?
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_YouWantItBu: Huh?\nYou want it, but not right now?
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_DontBeNegat: Oh, don't be so negative!\nYou can have this!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_CantWinJack: There's a prize I want, but I can't win\nthe jackpot.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_NeedCoinCas: Hey, kid, if you want to play here,\nyou need a COIN CASE.\pI think the young lady next door\nhad one. Go see her!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_LuckOnlyLas: My luck can only last so long.\nThis is too much for me.\lHere, take some COINS!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_MauvilleSom: MAUVILLE has something for\neveryone.\pFor me, it's the GAME CORNER.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_RouletteTab: The ROULETTE tables have different\nrates.\pCheck your COINS if you're going to\npick a table.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_EasyToLoseT: It's easy to lose track of time in here. \nI should get back to work.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_CoinsAreNee: COINS are needed to play here in the\nGAME CORNER.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_RouletteOnl: This ROULETTE thing...\nIt's rather demanding.\pWin or lose, it's only by luck.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_UpTo3CoinsC: Up to three COINS can be used to play\nthe SLOTS.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_DifficultTo: It's very difficult to make it stop\nright on “7.”\pIf it stops on “7” during the REEL TIME\nbonus game, you'll receive extra COINS.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_HeresSomeSl:
Here's some information for you
about the SLOTS.\pThe more lightning bolts you stock, the
more REEL TIME chances you get.\pIn a game with the maximum five REEL
TIME chances...\pIt is possible to receive four regular
bonuses, then a big bonus.\pThe big bonus is 660 COINS, but it's
very difficult to get.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_GameCorner/text.i.MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_CantPlayWit: You can't play if you don't have a\nCOIN CASE.

data/maps/MauvilleCity_Gym/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_GymGuideAdvice:
Hey, how's it going, the CHAMPION-
bound {PLAYER}?\pWATTSON, the LEADER of MAUVILLE
GYM, uses ELECTRIC-type POKéMON.\pIf you challenge him with WATER-type
POKéMON, he'll zap them! Bzzt!\pAnd, he's put in switch-controlled doors
all over his GYM! Eccentric!\pHey, go for it!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_Gym/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_GymGuidePostVictor: Whoa, you're electrifying!\nYou've powered the door open!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_Gym/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_KirkIntro: My electric soul, it'll shatter your\ndreams whole, whoah-yeahah!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_Gym/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_KirkDefeat: That was plugged in, amped up,\nover-driven electric, man!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_Gym/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_KirkPostBattle: POKéMON and rock, it's all about heart,\nwhoah yeah!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_Gym/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_ShawnIntro: I trained under WATTSON!\nThere ain't no way I'd lose easily!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_Gym/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_ShawnPostBattle: WATTSON, our GYM LEADER, has been\naround for a long, long time.\pHe was battling even before your\ndaddy was born, that tough coot.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_Gym/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_BenIntro: This GYM's got puzzles!\nIsn't it fun?
data/maps/MauvilleCity_Gym/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_BenPostBattle: WATTSON says he likes setting up\nlittle traps with switches.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_Gym/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_VivianIntro: With my charm and my POKéMON's moves,\nyou'll be shocked!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_Gym/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_VivianPostBattle: I've heard that MAUVILLE was founded\nby WATTSON.\pHe was a TRAINER long before we\nbecame TRAINERS.\lHe must know all sorts of things!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_Gym/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_WattsonIntro:
I've given up on my plans to convert
the city, I have.\pAnd so, I put my time into making
door traps in my GYM.\pOh? Now, what are you doing here?\pWhat's that? You say you've gotten
past all my rigged doors?\pWahahahah!
Now, that is amusing!\pThen, I, WATTSON, the LEADER of
MAUVILLE GYM, shall electrify you!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_Gym/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_WattsonDefeat: Wahahahah!\nFine, I lost!\pYou ended up giving me a thrill!\nTake this BADGE!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_Gym/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_ExplainDynamoBadge:
With the DYNAMO BADGE, POKéMON can
use ROCK SMASH out of battle.\pAnd, it will make your POKéMON a little
bit faster, too.\pHmm...
You should take this, too!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_Gym/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_ExplainShockWave: That TM34 there contains SHOCK WAVE.\pIt's a trustworthy move that never\nmisses! You can count on it!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_Gym/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_WattsonPostBattle: I swell with optimism, seeing a promising\nyoung TRAINER like you!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_Gym/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_GymStatueCertified: MAUVILLE CITY POKéMON GYM\pWATTSON'S CERTIFIED TRAINERS:\n{PLAYER}

data/maps/MauvilleCity_House1/text.inc.MauvilleCity_House1_Text_TakeHMRockSmash: Woohoo, your POKéMON look pretty\nstrong.\pI like that!\nHere, take this HM!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_House1/text.inc.MauvilleCity_House1_Text_ExplainRockSmas: That HM contains ROCK SMASH.\pIf you come across large boulders\nthat block your path...\pWell, use that HM move and smash\nit right out of your way!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_House1/text.inc.MauvilleCity_House1_Text_MonCanFlyOutOfS: Oh, yes, if you smash a rock, a POKéMON\ncould come flying out.

data/maps/MauvilleCity_House2/text.inc.MauvilleCity_House2_Text_BuyHarborMailAt: If I had a BIKE, it'd be easy to cycle to\nSLATEPORT for some shopping.\pI'd be able to buy HARBOR MAIL at the\nPOKéMON MART in SLATEPORT...
data/maps/MauvilleCity_House2/text.inc.MauvilleCity_House2_Text_TradeHarborMail: Oh! You have HARBOR MAIL?\nWill you trade it for a COIN CASE?
data/maps/MauvilleCity_House2/text.inc.MauvilleCity_House2_Text_IllTradeYouCoin: Oh, I'm so happy!\nOkay, I'll trade you a COIN CASE!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_House2/text.inc.MauvilleCity_House2_Text_UseCoinCaseAtGa: That COIN CASE can be used at the\nGAME CORNER.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_House2/text.inc.MauvilleCity_House2_Text_ThatsDisappoint: Oh, that's disappointing.\pA COIN CASE is needed for the\nGAME CORNER.

data/maps/MauvilleCity_Mart/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Mart_Text_ItemsToTemporaril:
There are items that temporarily
elevate the stats of POKéMON.\pThe ones I know you use in battle
are X ATTACK and X DEFEND...\pI do believe that there are others
like them.
data/maps/MauvilleCity_Mart/text.inc.MauvilleCity_Mart_Text_DecisionsDetermin: Use a certain move, or use an item\ninstead...\pThe TRAINER's decisions determine how\nbattles turn out, I think.

data/maps/MauvilleCity_PokemonCenter_1F/.MauvilleCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_ManOv: That man over there, he says weird\nthings!\pHe's funny in a weird way.\nI doubt I'll forget about him!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_PokemonCenter_1F/.MauvilleCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_MyDat: When I accessed the RECORD CORNER,\nthe data for what's hot in DEWFORD\lgot updated.\pNow that bit of data is the same\nas my friend's!
data/maps/MauvilleCity_PokemonCenter_1F/.MauvilleCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Recor: A RECORD CORNER opened upstairs in\nthe POKéMON CENTER.\pI don't know what it's about, but it\nsounds fun. I'll go check it out!

data/maps/MauvilleCity_PokemonCenter_2F/.MauvilleCity_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_18272:
Did you know that you can link battle
at the COLOSSEUM here?\pThey put up your record on the wall
for everyone to see.\pIt's embarrassing if you lose more
often than you win...

data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_1R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_1R_Text_193268: Heh?\pI don't know who you are, but if you get\nin the way of TEAM {EVIL_TEAM}, don't\lexpect any mercy!
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_1R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_1R_Text_1932C5: Hold it right there, TEAM {EVIL_TEAM}!\pWe, TEAM {GOOD_TEAM}, won't allow you to\nget away with your misdeeds!
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_1R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_1R_Text_193320:
Hehehe!
Even TEAM {GOOD_TEAM} joins us!\pBut it's too much trouble to deal with
you all...\pHeh, it doesn't matter!\pWe've got the METEORITE, so off to
MT. CHIMNEY we go!\pHehehe! Be seeing you, you TEAM
{GOOD_TEAM} dingbats!
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_1R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_1R_Text_1933EC:
And you are?\p... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...
... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...\pFine, so you are {PLAYER}{KUN}.\pI am MAXIE. As the head of TEAM MAGMA,
I have dedicated myself to thwarting\lthe dangerous plans of TEAM AQUA.\pWhy? Because TEAM AQUA is a grave
threat to us all.\pThey have committed many destructive
acts in their bid to enlarge the sea.\pWe, TEAM MAGMA, love dry land above
all! TEAM AQUA is our sworn enemy!
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_1R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_1R_Text_193584:
Who might you be?\p... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...
... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...\pAh, so you are {PLAYER}{KUN}.\pI am ARCHIE. As the head of TEAM AQUA,
I have dedicated myself to thwarting\lthe dangerous plans of TEAM MAGMA.\pWhy? Because TEAM MAGMA is a grave
threat to us all.\pThey have committed many destructive
acts in their bid to expand the land.\pWe, TEAM AQUA, love the sea above
all! TEAM MAGMA is our sworn enemy!
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_1R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_1R_Text_193747: {GOOD_LEADER}: Yes, yes, we must!\nWe've got to hurry.\pThere's no telling what TEAM {EVIL_TEAM}\nwill do at MT. CHIMNEY!
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_1R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_1R_Text_1937AA: {GOOD_LEADER}: {PLAYER}{KUN}, you should keep\nan eye out for TEAM {EVIL_TEAM}, too.\pFarewell!
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_1R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_1R_Text_1937EB:
I... I'm COZMO...
I'm a PROFESSOR...\pI usually study METEORITES in
FALLARBOR TOWN...\pThen some people from TEAM {EVIL_TEAM}
made me guide them to METEOR FALLS...\pThey promised me that they would
excavate METEORITES for me...\pBut, I...
TEAM {EVIL_TEAM} tricked me...\pOh... That METEORITE...
It will never be mine now...\pBut that TEAM {EVIL_TEAM}...\pWhat are they going to do with that
METEORITE at MT. CHIMNEY?
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_1R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_1R_Text_19396A: PROF. COZMO: That TEAM {EVIL_TEAM}...\pWhat are they going to do with that\nMETEORITE at MT. CHIMNEY?

data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_1939C5: This is where we DRAGON users do our\ntraining.\pThe CHAMPION even visits.\nNow do you see how special it is here?
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193A35: Urgh!\nI didn't expect you to be so strong!
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193A60: The road ahead remains long and harsh.\pWhen will my POKéMON and I become the\nbest?
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193AB3: Since we met, we have trained hard\nwith our sights on number one.\pHelp us see how much stronger we've\nbecome!
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193B21: Urgh!\nI didn't expect you to be so strong!
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193B4C: You've obviously kept up your\nPOKéMON training.\pSo long as you remain strong, I, too,\ncan become stronger!
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193BB7: JOHN: We've always battled POKéMON\ntogether as a twosome.\lWe've confidence in ourselves.
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193C10: JOHN: Oh, my.\nWe've lost, dear wife.
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193C35: JOHN: We've been married for\nfifty years.\pCome to think of it, I've yet to beat\nmy dear wife in a battle.
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193C9F: JOHN: Well, well, what a young TRAINER!\pWill you battle with us? If so, you'll\nhave to return with more POKéMON.
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193D10: JAY: We've been married for\nfifty years.\pThe bond we share as a couple could\nnever be broken.
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193D6E: JAY: Oh, dear.\nWe've lost, my dear husband.
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193D9A: JAY: Fifty years of marriage...\pIf we ever argued, we always settled\nit with a POKéMON battle...
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193DFB: JAY: Well, well, aren't you a young\nTRAINER?\pIf you'd care to battle with us, you'll\nhave to come back with more POKéMON.
