data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193E75: JOHN: We've always battled POKéMON\ntogether as a twosome.\lWe've confidence in ourselves.
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193ECE: JOHN: Oh, my.\nWe've lost, dear wife.
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193EF3: JOHN: Married for fifty years...\pOn reflection, the dear wife and I,\nwe battled day in and day out...
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193F59: JOHN: Well, well, what a young\nTRAINER!\pWill you battle with us? If so, you'll\nhave to return with more POKéMON.
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_193FCA: JAY: We've been married for\nfifty years.\pWe've supported each other all that\ntime. We've made ourselves strong.
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_19403A: JAY: Oh, dear.\nWe've lost, my dear husband.
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_194066: JAY: Fifty years of marriage...\nMany things have happened.\pI hope that we will continue to make\nhappy memories together.
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_2R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_1940DF: JAY: Well, well, aren't you a young\nTRAINER?\pIf you'd care to battle with us, you'll\nhave to come back with more POKéMON.

data/maps/MossdeepCity/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Text_WantKingsRockStevenGav: I got this from STEVEN, but I don't\nknow what it's good for.\pI think it's called KING'S ROCK.\nDo you want it?
data/maps/MossdeepCity/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Text_YouCanKeepIt: Why would you want it?\nYou're weird.\pYou can keep it, but keep it a secret\nfrom STEVEN.
data/maps/MossdeepCity/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Text_CollectingRocks: Is it really that fun collecting\nrocks? I don't get it.
data/maps/MossdeepCity/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Text_WhatToDoWithWeirdRock: Yeah, you think so, too! What are you\nsupposed to do with some weird rock?
data/maps/MossdeepCity/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Text_WailmerWatching: Around MOSSDEEP, you can see wild\nWAILMER.\pIt's called, uh...\nWhat was it now...\pWAI, WAI, WAI...\pWAILMER watching!
data/maps/MossdeepCity/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Text_SpaceCenterLaunchingRo: The island's SPACE CENTER has been\nlaunching huge rockets.
data/maps/MossdeepCity/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Text_WailmerDisappeared: I'd heard from my mates in LILYCOVE\nthat the herd of WAILMER has\ldisappeared.\pWhat went down over there, I wonder?
data/maps/MossdeepCity/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Text_NiceIfWorldCoveredByFl: Wouldn't it be nice?\pIf the whole world was covered in\nplants and flowers like this island?
data/maps/MossdeepCity/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Text_LifeNeedsSeaToLive:
All life needs the sea to live, even
though it makes its home on the land.\pLife, having run its course, becomes
soil and returns to the land.\pAnd the sea is always connected to
the land.\pYes, like the very shoreline here.
data/maps/MossdeepCity/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Text_SurfExhilarating: A voyage on a ship is fine.\pBut crossing the sea with POKéMON\nusing SURF...\pNow that's an exhilarating trip!\nWouldn't you agree, youngster?
data/maps/MossdeepCity/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Text_SpecialSpaceCenterRock:
This rock has a special meaning to
the people at the SPACE CENTER.\pThey put it here as their wish for
their rockets to fly safely.\pWhen you make a wish, what do you use?
Do you wish upon a star?\pI use a wish tag to make it happen.
That's what I do.
data/maps/MossdeepCity/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Text_GymSign: MOSSDEEP CITY POKéMON GYM\nLEADERS: LIZA & TATE\p“The mystic combination!”
data/maps/MossdeepCity/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Text_SpaceCenterSign: MOSSDEEP SPACE CENTER\n“The closest place to space.”

data/maps/MossdeepCity_GameCorner_1F/tex.MossdeepCity_GameCorner_B1F_Text_OldManG: When I was young, I traveled the world\nas a POKéMON TRAINER.\pNow that I've become an old buzzard,\nmy only amusement is watching young\lTRAINERS battle.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_GameCorner_1F/tex.MossdeepCity_GameCorner_B1F_Text_DoorIsL: The door appears to be locked.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_GameCorner_1F/tex.MossdeepCity_GameCorner_B1F_Text_Challen: A TRAINER named {STR_VAR_1} is\nvisiting my home.\pWould you like to challenge\n{STR_VAR_1}?
data/maps/MossdeepCity_GameCorner_1F/tex.MossdeepCity_GameCorner_B1F_Text_YouWont: You won't battle? I'm disappointed\nthat I can't see you battle...
data/maps/MossdeepCity_GameCorner_1F/tex.MossdeepCity_GameCorner_B1F_Text_KeepItT: Oh, good, good!\pBut my house isn't all that sturdy.\pCould I ask you to keep it down to\na 3-on-3 match?
data/maps/MossdeepCity_GameCorner_1F/tex.MossdeepCity_GameCorner_B1F_Text_SaveYou: Before you two battle, you should\nsave your progress.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_GameCorner_1F/tex.MossdeepCity_GameCorner_B1F_Text_HopeToS: I hope to see a good match!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_GameCorner_1F/tex.MossdeepCity_GameCorner_B1F_Text_MatchEn: The match ended up a draw.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_GameCorner_1F/tex.MossdeepCity_GameCorner_B1F_Text_BattleT: So, it became a standoff.\pIt was a brilliant match in which\nneither side conceded a step!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_GameCorner_1F/tex.MossdeepCity_GameCorner_B1F_Text_BattleW: That was superlative!\pWhy, it was like seeing myself in my\nyouth again!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_GameCorner_1F/tex.MossdeepCity_GameCorner_B1F_Text_BattleL: Ah, too bad for you!\pBut it was a good match.\nI hope you can win next time.

data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_GymGuideAdvice:
Yo, how's it going, CHAMPION-bound
{PLAYER}?\pThe GYM LEADERS here use PSYCHIC-type
POKéMON.\pIf you go up against them with
FIGHTING- or POISON-type POKéMON,\lthey'll inflict horrible damage!\pPlus, they'll come at you with
outstanding combination attacks.\pIf you want to win, you'll need to show
them how tight you are with your\lPOKéMON. Go for it!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_GymGuidePostVictor: Wow, you're astounding!\nYou're one great TRAINER!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_PrestonIntro: Battles hinge on the strength of your\nspirit! The weak-spirited will never win!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_PrestonDefeat: I lost! I must temper my spirit again!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_PrestonPostBattle: The indecisive lose.\nThat's my warning to you.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_VirgilPostBattle: If there are prodigies in the world,\nthen our GYM LEADERS are them!\pHowever, you may be even more talented\nthan them...
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_FritzIntro: Fufufufu... Watch me levitate a POKé\nBALL telekinetically!\pWrooooooooaaaar!\n... ... ... ... ... ... ...\pSometimes, I'm out of sync...
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_FritzDefeat: My POKéMON battling skills are out\nof sync, too!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_FritzPostBattle:
A POKé BALL was too heavy to lift
psychically. But this dust bunny...\pWhoooooooooooooooh!
... ... ... ... ... ...\pNo, I'm not cheating!
I didn't blow on it! Honestly!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_HannahIntro: When you lose to me, don't be too hard\non yourself.\pIt's not that you're weak - I'm just\ntoo strong!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_HannahPostBattle: I'm not going to get down on myself for\nlosing. I just need to train harder.\pPositive thinking - that's my strong\npoint!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_SamanthaIntro: I see it...\nI see your future...\pIf you can beat me, I will tell you\nyour future!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_SamanthaPostBattle: You will wage a terrifically intense\nbattle with our GYM LEADERS...\pThe result...\nYou won't hear it from me!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_MauraIntro: The roads you have traveled...\nWhat you have experienced...\pCome at me with everything you've\nlearned!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_MauraDefeat: You've traveled a path of greatness!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_MauraPostBattle: A bright future awaits those who have\nworked diligently.\pFor those who lazed idly, there is\nonly despair at the end.\pWhat goes around comes around...
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_TateAndLizaIntro:
TATE: Hehehe... Were you surprised?\pLIZA: Fufufu... Were you surprised?\pTATE: That there are two GYM LEADERS?
LIZA: That there are two GYM LEADERS?\pTATE: We're twins!
LIZA: We're twins!\pTATE: We don't need to talk because...
LIZA: We can each determine what...\pTATE: The other is thinking...
LIZA: All in our minds!\pTATE: This combination of ours...
LIZA: Can you beat it?
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_TateAndLizaDefeat: TATE: What?! Our combination...\nLIZA: Was shattered!\pTATE: It can't be helped. You've won...\nLIZA: So, in recognition, take this.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_ReceivedMindBadge: {PLAYER} received the MIND BADGE\nfrom LIZA and TATE.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_ExplainMindBadgeTa: TATE: The MIND BADGE enhances the\nSP. ATK and SP. DEF of POKéMON.\pLIZA: It also lets you use the HM move\nDIVE outside of battle.\pTATE: You should also take this, too.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_ExplainCalmMind:
TATE: That TM04 contains...
LIZA: CALM MIND!\pTATE: It raises SP. ATK and...
LIZA: It raises SP. DEF!\pTATE: It's a move that's perfect...
LIZA: For PSYCHIC POKéMON!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_TateAndLizaPostBat: TATE: Looks like the bond between you\nand your POKéMON is far stronger than\lthe bond that we share as twins.\pLIZA: You will become even stronger!\nWe've battled you, so we know.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_TateAndLizaNeedTwo: TATE: Hehehe... Were you surprised?\pLIZA: That there are two GYM LEADERS?\pTATE: Oops, you have only one...\nLIZA: POKéMON that can battle.\pTATE: We can't battle that way!\pLIZA: If you want to challenge us,\nbring some more POKéMON.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Gym/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_GymStatueCertified: MOSSDEEP CITY POKéMON GYM\pLIZA AND TATE'S CERTIFIED TRAINERS:\n{PLAYER}

data/maps/MossdeepCity_House1/text.inc.MossdeepCity_House1_Text_ItLikesXPokeblo: It likes {STR_VAR_1}S,\ndoesn't it?\pNo, I'm positive of it! It definitely\nlikes {STR_VAR_1}S!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_House1/text.inc.MossdeepCity_House1_Text_DoesntLikeOrDis: It doesn't appear to like or dislike\nany {POKEBLOCK}S.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_House1/text.inc.MossdeepCity_House1_Text_HusbandCanTellP: My husband can tell what kind of\n{POKEBLOCK}S a POKéMON likes at a glance.

data/maps/MossdeepCity_House2/text.inc.MossdeepCity_House2_Text_SisterMailsBoyf: My little sister exchanges MAIL with\nher boyfriend in FORTREE.\pI don't envy her one bit at all.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_House2/text.inc.MossdeepCity_House2_Text_PokemonCarriesM: Even though I can't see my friend in\nFORTREE, my POKéMON carries MAIL back\land forth for us.\pI'm not lonesome, even though we're\napart.

data/maps/MossdeepCity_House3/text.inc.MossdeepCity_House3_Text_YouWantSuperRod:
Hey there, TRAINER!
A SUPER ROD really is super!\pSay all you want, but this baby can
catch POKéMON off the seafloor!\pWhat do you think?
You want it, don't you?
data/maps/MossdeepCity_House3/text.inc.MossdeepCity_House3_Text_SuperRodIsSuper: You bet, you bet!\nAfter all, a SUPER ROD is really super!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_House3/text.inc.MossdeepCity_House3_Text_TryDroppingRodI: If there's any water, try dropping in\nyour ROD and see what bites!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_House3/text.inc.MossdeepCity_House3_Text_GoAfterSeafloor: Go after the seafloor POKéMON with\nyour SUPER ROD.

data/maps/MossdeepCity_House4/text.inc.MossdeepCity_House4_Text_BrotherLikesToF: My little brother says he likes to go\nfind people's SECRET BASES.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_House4/text.inc.MossdeepCity_House4_Text_BrotherLikesToV: My little brother says he likes to\nvisit people's SECRET BASES and have\lPOKéMON battles.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_House4/text.inc.MossdeepCity_House4_Text_YouMadeSecretBa: Was it you who made a SECRET BASE in\n{STR_VAR_1}?
data/maps/MossdeepCity_House4/text.inc.MossdeepCity_House4_Text_MakeSecretBase: You should make a SECRET BASE\nsomewhere. I'll go find it!

data/maps/MossdeepCity_Mart/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Mart_Text_ReviveIsFantastic: REVIVE is fantastic!\pGive it to a fainted POKéMON, and the\nPOKéMON will arise.\pBut be careful, REVIVE doesn't restore\nthe used-up PP of moves.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Mart/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Mart_Text_MaxRepelLastsLong: MAX REPEL keeps all weak POKéMON away.\pOut of all the REPEL sprays, it lasts\nthe longest.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_Mart/text.inc.MossdeepCity_Mart_Text_NetAndDiveBallsRa:
The NET and DIVE BALLS are rare POKé
BALLS that are only made in MOSSDEEP.\pA NET BALL is effective against
BUG-type and WATER-type POKéMON.\pA DIVE BALL works best on POKéMON at
the bottom of the sea.

data/maps/MossdeepCity_PokemonCenter_1F/.MossdeepCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_GymLe: The GYM LEADERS in this town are a\nformidable duo.\pTheir combination attacks are, like,\nexcellent and wow!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_PokemonCenter_1F/.MossdeepCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Abili: Depending on the special abilities of\nPOKéMON, some moves might change\lor not work at all.

data/maps/MossdeepCity_PokemonCenter_2F/.MossdeepCity_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_18D6F: If I win a whole lot of link battles\nand show everyone how good I am,\lI might get a fan following!

data/maps/MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F/te.MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F_Text_Success: The rocket launched safely!\nThat's successful launch no. {STR_VAR_1}!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F/te.MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F_Text_RocketL:
A rocket launch demands perfection.
Not even a 1% margin of error is allowed.\pEven if it's 99% okay, the whole thing
is useless if 1% happens to be no good.\pDespite that, we never stop trying.
Why? It's a dream that never ends.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F/te.MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F_Text_FoundTh: I was taking a stroll down the beach\nwhen I found this.\pIt's not anything I need, so you can\nhave it.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F/te.MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F_Text_HoennFa: The HOENN region has been famous for \nits meteor showers for a long time.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F/te.MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F_Text_DidPoke: Some people claim that POKéMON came\nfrom space. Could it be true?
data/maps/MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F/te.MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F_Text_Rockets: A giant chunk of metal bursts through\nthe skies and flies into space...\pIt boggles my mind!

data/maps/MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_2F/te.MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_2F_Text_Mossdee: MOSSDEEP has mainly sunny weather,\nand its winds are stable.\pIt's an ideal location for launching\nrockets.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_2F/te.MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_2F_Text_Wouldve: If only I was a little younger, I would\nhave liked being an astronaut...\pNo... It's not too late!\nI can and will try!
data/maps/MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_2F/te.MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_2F_Text_WishOrd: I wish ordinary people could go into\nspace one day...

data/maps/MossdeepCity_StevensHouse/text.MossdeepCity_StevensHouse_Text_YouveEarn: STEVEN: {PLAYER}{KUN}?\pYes, this is my place. It's a little\nembarrassing how empty it is here.\pOh, here, you should take this HM.\pIt contains DIVE.\nI've already taught my POKéMON.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_StevensHouse/text.MossdeepCity_StevensHouse_Text_ExplainDi:
STEVEN: While you're using SURF, you
should notice dark patches of water.\pUse DIVE if you come to deep water
like it. You'll drop to the seafloor.\pWhen you want to come back up, use
DIVE again.\pIn some places, it won't be possible
for you to surface, though.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_StevensHouse/text.MossdeepCity_StevensHouse_Text_Underwate:
STEVEN: Apparently, there's an
underwater cavern between\lMOSSDEEP and SOOTOPOLIS.\pYou know, the one that CAPT. STERN
found in his submarine.\pAn underwater cavern...\pThere might be some rare stones down
there... I should go for a DIVE...
data/maps/MossdeepCity_StevensHouse/text.MossdeepCity_StevensHouse_Text_TakeBallC: {PLAYER} checked the POKé BALL.\pIt contained the POKéMON\nBELDUM.\pTake the POKé BALL?
data/maps/MossdeepCity_StevensHouse/text.MossdeepCity_StevensHouse_Text_NoSpaceFo: There is no space for another POKéMON.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_StevensHouse/text.MossdeepCity_StevensHouse_Text_LeftPokeB: {PLAYER} left the POKé BALL where\nit was.
data/maps/MossdeepCity_StevensHouse/text.MossdeepCity_StevensHouse_Text_LetterFro:
It's a letter.\p... ... ... ... ... ...\pTo {PLAYER}{KUN}...\pI've decided to do a little soul-
searching and train on the road.\pI don't plan to return home for some
time.\pI have a favor to ask of you.\pI want you to take the POKé BALL on
the desk.\pInside it is a BELDUM, my favorite
POKéMON.\pI'm counting on you.\pMay our paths cross some day.\pSTEVEN STONE

It's a letter.\p... ... ... ... ... ...\pTo {PLAYER}{KUN}...\pI've decided to do a little soul-
searching and train on the road.\pI don't plan to return home for some
time.\pI have a favor to ask of you.\pI want you to take the POKé BALL on
the desk.\pInside it is a BELDUM, my favorite
POKéMON.\pI'm counting on you.\pIf you'd like, you should also take
the HM DIVE.\pMay our paths cross some day.\pSTEVEN STONE
data/maps/MossdeepCity_StevensHouse/text.MossdeepCity_StevensHouse_Text_Collectio: It's a collection of rare rocks and\nstones assembled by STEVEN.

data/maps/MtChimney/text.inc.MtChimney_Text_195760: LAVA COOKIES are MT. CHIMNEY's local\nspecialty.\pTry one. It's just ¥200.
data/maps/MtChimney/text.inc.MtChimney_Text_1957BA: Oh, dear. You can't buy a thing if\nyou've not got the money.
data/maps/MtChimney/text.inc.MtChimney_Text_195806: A METEORITE is fitted on a mysterious\nmachine...\pThe machine seems to be storing\nenergy in the METEORITE.
data/maps/MtChimney/text.inc.MtChimney_Text_195870: A METEORITE is fitted on a mysterious\nmachine...\pDo you want to remove the METEORITE?
data/maps/MtChimney/text.inc.MtChimney_Text_1958C6: {PLAYER} removed the METEORITE from\nthe mysterious machine.
data/maps/MtChimney/text.inc.MtChimney_Text_195920: This mysterious machine...\nIt makes no response whatsoever.
data/maps/MtChimney/text.inc.MtChimney_Text_19597F: I've been to the hot springs and\nrefreshed my tired bones.\lRight now I'm feeling strong!
data/maps/MtChimney/text.inc.MtChimney_Text_1959D8: Oh, my goodness.\nNow, aren't you something!
data/maps/MtChimney/text.inc.MtChimney_Text_195A04: Well, well, I've lost. I can't call\nmyself an EXPERT now, can I?
data/maps/MtChimney/text.inc.MtChimney_Text_195A45: If you can mesh your heart with those\nof your POKéMON, why, you should be\lable to achieve great things.
data/maps/MtChimney/text.inc.MtChimney_Text_195AAD: Oh, my goodness.\nNow, aren't you something!
data/maps/MtChimney/text.inc.MtChimney_Text_195AD9: Perhaps your heart has become one\nwith the hearts of your POKéMON.
data/maps/MtChimney/text.inc.MtChimney_Text_195B1C: I've got the fire in me, baby.\nI can't stand it! I have to battle!
data/maps/MtChimney/text.inc.MtChimney_Text_195B5F: Ooh, that was a scorching-hot match!
data/maps/MtChimney/text.inc.MtChimney_Text_195B84: The heat of MT. CHIMNEY lights my\nfire, baby!
data/maps/MtChimney/text.inc.MtChimney_Text_195BB2: I've finally made it to MT. CHIMNEY.\nI want to make my POKéMON battle!
data/maps/MtChimney/text.inc.MtChimney_Text_195BF9: The way you battle...\nIt's like a MT. CHIMNEY eruption!
data/maps/MtChimney/text.inc.MtChimney_Text_195C31: Like I said, I've finally made it to\nMT. CHIMNEY. It would be a shame if\lI only do a little sightseeing...\pI want to get in some battles and buy\nCOOKIES as souvenirs.
data/maps/MtChimney/text.inc.MtChimney_Text_195CD8: Since I bathed in the hot springs,\nI've been feeling great!\lI'm sure I'm going to win!
data/maps/MtChimney/text.inc.MtChimney_Text_195D2F: Yowch!\nI'm getting a chill out of the water.
data/maps/MtChimney/text.inc.MtChimney_Text_195D5C: I'll have to take another dip in the\nhot springs. Want to join me?\pJust joking!

data/maps/MtChimney_CableCarStation/text.MtChimney_CableCarStation_Text_19256A: The CABLE CAR is ready to go down.\nWould you like to be on it?
data/maps/MtChimney_CableCarStation/text.MtChimney_CableCarStation_Text_1925BF: Please ride with us another time.

data/maps/MtPyre_1F/text.inc.MtPyre_1F_Text_196151: All sorts of beings wander the slopes\nof MT. PYRE...\pThere is no telling what may happen.\nTake this. It's for your own good.
data/maps/MtPyre_1F/text.inc.MtPyre_1F_Text_1961CE: Have a POKéMON hold that\nCLEANSE TAG.\pIt will help ward off wild POKéMON.
data/maps/MtPyre_1F/text.inc.MtPyre_1F_Text_196218: Did you come to pay your respect\nto the spirits of departed POKéMON?\pYou must care for your POKéMON a lot.
data/maps/MtPyre_1F/text.inc.MtPyre_1F_Text_196283: This is the final resting place of my\nZIGZAGOON. I cherished it...

data/maps/MtPyre_2F/text.inc.MtPyre_2F_Text_1962C6: LUKE: We're here on a dare.\pHeheh, if I show her how cool I am,\nshe'll fall for me. I know it!\pI know! I'll cream you and show her\nhow cool I am!
data/maps/MtPyre_2F/text.inc.MtPyre_2F_Text_196368: LUKE: Well, we lost but that's okay!\nI'm right here by your side.\lWe'll make it through this dare!
data/maps/MtPyre_2F/text.inc.MtPyre_2F_Text_1963CB: LUKE: If you want to take me on, bring\nsome more POKéMON.\pIf you don't, I won't be able to show\noff how cool I am to my girl!
data/maps/MtPyre_2F/text.inc.MtPyre_2F_Text_196449:
DEZ: I came here on a dare with my
boyfriend.\pIt's really scary, but I'm with my
boyfriend. It's okay.\pI know! I'll get my boyfriend to look
cool by beating you!
data/maps/MtPyre_2F/text.inc.MtPyre_2F_Text_196504: DEZ: We're lovey-dovey, so we don't\ncare if we lose!
data/maps/MtPyre_2F/text.inc.MtPyre_2F_Text_196539: DEZ: If you want to challenge us, you\nshould bring at least two POKéMON.\pMy boyfriend's strong.\nJust one POKéMON won't do at all.
data/maps/MtPyre_2F/text.inc.MtPyre_2F_Text_1965BB: Memories of my darling SKITTY...\nMy eyes overflow thinking about it.
data/maps/MtPyre_2F/text.inc.MtPyre_2F_Text_196600: Ooch, ouch... There are holes in the\nground here and there.\pI didn't notice and took a tumble from\nthe floor above.
data/maps/MtPyre_2F/text.inc.MtPyre_2F_Text_196674: Hey! Are you searching for POKéMON?\nYou came along after me! You're rude!
data/maps/MtPyre_2F/text.inc.MtPyre_2F_Text_1966E7: People don't come here often, so\nI thought there'd be rare POKéMON.

data/maps/MtPyre_3F/text.inc.MtPyre_3F_Text_19672B: The rich atmosphere of the mountain\nhas elevated my psychic power!\pA mere child like you...\nYou dream of winning?
data/maps/MtPyre_3F/text.inc.MtPyre_3F_Text_1967B5: My psychic powers have surely\ngrown several times, but...
data/maps/MtPyre_3F/text.inc.MtPyre_3F_Text_1967EF: Ahahahaha!\pThis is no place for children, least\nof all you!
data/maps/MtPyre_3F/text.inc.MtPyre_3F_Text_196842: This means my training is still not\nenough...\pI've got to keep working toward the\nsummit...\pGo, me!

data/maps/MtPyre_4F/text.inc.MtPyre_4F_Text_1968EE: Until I improve, my teacher, who rests\nhere, will never find true peace...

data/maps/MtPyre_5F/text.inc.MtPyre_5F_Text_196939: I love all things horrifying...\nIt's like a disease...\pWhen I'm here...\nI shiver with fear...
data/maps/MtPyre_5F/text.inc.MtPyre_5F_Text_1969AC: I want to see dreadful things...\nI can't leave...\pStay...\nWon't you stay with me?

data/maps/MtPyre_6F/text.inc.MtPyre_6F_Text_1969FE: When I'm here...\nA curious power flows into me...
data/maps/MtPyre_6F/text.inc.MtPyre_6F_Text_196A4C: Perhaps the power is from the spirits\nof POKéMON in fitful sleep here...
data/maps/MtPyre_6F/text.inc.MtPyre_6F_Text_196AC9: The POKéMON at rest here...\nSometimes, they play...

data/maps/NewMauville_Entrance/text.inc.NewMauville_Entrance_Text_1982EA: {PLAYER} used the BASEMENT KEY.\pThe door opened!

data/maps/NewMauville_Inside/text.inc.NewMauville_Inside_Text_198315: The generator is radiating heat that\ncan be felt even at a distance.\pIt looks like it should be turned off\nas soon as possible.
data/maps/NewMauville_Inside/text.inc.NewMauville_Inside_Text_1983B1: {PLAYER} stepped on the switch.\pClick...\p... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...\n... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...\pThe generator appears to have\nstopped...

data/maps/OldaleTown/text.inc.OldaleTown_Text_SavingMyProgress: I want to take a rest, so I'm saving my\nprogress.
data/maps/OldaleTown/text.inc.OldaleTown_Text_IWorkAtPokemonMart: Hi!\nI work at a POKéMON MART.\pCan I get you to come with me?
data/maps/OldaleTown/text.inc.OldaleTown_Text_ThisIsAPokemonMart:
This is a POKéMON MART.
Just look for our blue roof.\pWe sell a variety of goods including
POKé BALLS for catching POKéMON.\pHere, I'd like you to have this as a
promotional item.
data/maps/OldaleTown/text.inc.OldaleTown_Text_PotionExplanation: A POTION can be used anytime, so it's\neven more useful than a POKéMON CENTER\lin certain situations.
data/maps/OldaleTown/text.inc.OldaleTown_Text_WaitDontComeInHere:
Aaaaah! Wait!
Please don't come in here.\pI just discovered the footprints of
a rare POKéMON!\pWait until I finish sketching
them, okay?
data/maps/OldaleTown/text.inc.OldaleTown_Text_DiscoveredFootprints: I just discovered the footprints of\na rare POKéMON!\pWait until I finish sketching\nthem, okay?
data/maps/OldaleTown/text.inc.OldaleTown_Text_FinishedSketchingFootpri: I finished sketching the footprints of\na rare POKéMON.\pBut it turns out they were only my\nown footprints...
data/maps/OldaleTown/text.inc.OldaleTown_Text_BrendanLetsGoBack: BRENDAN: I'm heading back to my dad's\nLAB now.\l{PLAYER}, you should hustle back, too.
data/maps/OldaleTown/text.inc.OldaleTown_Text_TownSign: OLDALE TOWN\n“Where things start off scarce.”

data/maps/OldaleTown_House1/text.inc.OldaleTown_House1_Text_LeftPokemonGoesOu: When a POKéMON battle starts, the one\nat the left of the list goes out first.\pSo, when you get more POKéMON in your\nparty, try switching around the order\lof your POKéMON.\pIt could give you an advantage.

data/maps/OldaleTown_House2/text.inc.OldaleTown_House2_Text_PokemonLevelUp: When POKéMON battle, they eventually\nlevel up and become stronger.
data/maps/OldaleTown_House2/text.inc.OldaleTown_House2_Text_YoullGoFurtherWit: If the POKéMON with you become\nstronger, you'll be able to go farther\laway from here.

data/maps/OldaleTown_Mart/text.inc.OldaleTown_Mart_Text_PokeBallsAreSoldOut: The clerk says they're all sold out.\nI can't buy any POKé BALLS.
data/maps/OldaleTown_Mart/text.inc.OldaleTown_Mart_Text_ImGoingToBuyPokeBal: I'm going to buy a bunch of POKé BALLS\nand catch a bunch of POKéMON!
data/maps/OldaleTown_Mart/text.inc.OldaleTown_Mart_Text_RestoreHPWithPotion: If a POKéMON gets hurt and loses its HP\nand faints, it won't be able to battle.\pTo prevent your POKéMON from fainting,\nrestore its HP with a POTION.

data/maps/OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_1F/te.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Trainer: That PC in the corner there is\nfor any POKéMON TRAINER to use.\pNaturally, that means you're welcome\nto use it, too.
data/maps/OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_1F/te.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Pokemon: POKéMON CENTERS are great!\pYou can use their services as much\nas you like, and it's all for free.\lYou never have to worry!
data/maps/OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_1F/te.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_CableCl: The POKéMON CABLE CLUB on the second\nfloor was built recently.\pBut they say they're still making\nadjustments.
data/maps/OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_1F/te.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_TradedI: The POKéMON CABLE CLUB on the second\nfloor was built recently.\pI traded POKéMON right away.

data/maps/PacifidlogTown/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_Text_FastRunningCurrent: The sea between PACIFIDLOG and\nSLATEPORT has a fast-running tide.\pIf you decide to SURF, you could end\nup swept away somewhere else.
data/maps/PacifidlogTown/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_Text_NeatHousesOnWater: See, isn't it neat?\nThese houses are on water!\pI was born here!
data/maps/PacifidlogTown/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_Text_FishAndDiveLifestyle: The folks of PACIFIDLOG all fish and\ndive as part of the lifestyle.
data/maps/PacifidlogTown/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_Text_TownSign: PACIFIDLOG TOWN\p“Where the morning sun smiles upon\nthe waters.”

data/maps/PacifidlogTown_House1/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_House1_Text_RegiStory:
In the HOENN region, there are three
POKéMON that represent the power of\lrock, ice, and steel.\pEach of them is said to hide away deep
inside caves.\pThat's the story I heard when I was
just a little kid.
data/maps/PacifidlogTown_House1/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_House1_Text_SixDotsOpenTh: “Six dots open three doors.”\pGrandpa used to say that, but I don't\nknow what he meant.

data/maps/PacifidlogTown_House2/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_House2_Text_ChairmansYoun: Er-hem!\pI am the POKéMON FAN CLUB's most\nimportant person, the CHAIRMAN's\lyounger brother.\pI'm here enjoying my vacation with\nPOKéMON, yes, indeed.
data/maps/PacifidlogTown_House2/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_House2_Text_AdoringPokemo: It clearly likes you very much.\pA POKéMON that adoring and adorable\ndeserves a TM like this, no?
data/maps/PacifidlogTown_House2/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_House2_Text_PutInSomeMore: Hmm...\nIt's not bad, but it's also not good.\pYou, as the TRAINER, need to put in\nsome more effort.
data/maps/PacifidlogTown_House2/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_House2_Text_ViciousPokemo: It has a vicious look to it.\pA frightening POKéMON like that\ndeserves a TM like this.
data/maps/PacifidlogTown_House2/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_House2_Text_ExplainReturn: If a POKéMON likes you a lot, RETURN's\npower is enhanced.\pIf it doesn't like you, FRUSTRATION's\npower goes up.
data/maps/PacifidlogTown_House2/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_House2_Text_GetGoodTMInXD: Oh, yes. In about {STR_VAR_1} or so days,\nI should be getting a good TM or two.\pYou should come see me then.\nI'll give you a TM that's suitable for\lyour POKéMON.
data/maps/PacifidlogTown_House2/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_House2_Text_VeryFriendlyW: It appears to be very friendly with the\nTRAINER.
data/maps/PacifidlogTown_House2/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_House2_Text_DoesntLikeTra: It doesn't appear to like the TRAINER\nvery much.

data/maps/PacifidlogTown_House3/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_House3_Text_WillingToTrad:
Hello, TRAINER. Would you do me a favor
and trade POKéMON with me?\pLiving in PACIFIDLOG, I can only catch
certain kinds of POKéMON.\p{STR_VAR_1}? Do you have one?
I'll trade you my {STR_VAR_2} for it.
data/maps/PacifidlogTown_House3/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_House3_Text_NowWereFriend: Since we traded, you and me,\nwe're friends, aren't we?
data/maps/PacifidlogTown_House3/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_House3_Text_IsThatAPokede: Is that a POKéDEX?\pDid you get to meet a lot of different\nPOKéMON?\pI wish I was like you.

data/maps/PacifidlogTown_House4/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_House4_Text_PeopleSawHigh: People were saying they saw a POKéMON\nFLYING high above HOENN.\pIs it FLYING around all the time?\nDoesn't it need to rest somewhere?
data/maps/PacifidlogTown_House4/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_House4_Text_YesTown: Yes?\nYES TOWN?\pI've never heard of a place like that.
data/maps/PacifidlogTown_House4/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_House4_Text_YouHaveToCome: No? That doesn't make any sense.\nYou have to come from somewhere.\pOh! Wait! You're not going to say you\nwere born at the bottom of the sea?

data/maps/PacifidlogTown_House5/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_House5_Text_CantSeeMirage: I can't see MIRAGE ISLAND today...
data/maps/PacifidlogTown_House5/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_House5_Text_CanSeeMirageI: Oh! Oh my!\nI can see MIRAGE ISLAND today!
data/maps/PacifidlogTown_House5/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_House5_Text_MirageIslandA: MIRAGE ISLAND...\pIt must become visible and invisible\ndepending on the weather conditions\lthat make mirages appear.\pOr is it really appearing and\ndisappearing?

data/maps/PacifidlogTown_PokemonCenter_1.PacifidlogTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Wha: What color is your TRAINER'S CARD?\nMine's copper!
data/maps/PacifidlogTown_PokemonCenter_1.PacifidlogTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_OnC: PACIFIDLOG TOWN floats on top of\na colony of CORSOLA.\pIf I told you that, would you believe me?
data/maps/PacifidlogTown_PokemonCenter_1.PacifidlogTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Anc: The ancestors of the people in\nPACIFIDLOG were said to have been\lborn on boats and then lived and died \laboard them.\pI understand that they lived that way\nbecause they were searching for\lsomething.

data/maps/PetalburgCity/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Text_WhereIsWally: Where has our WALLY gone?\pWe have to leave for VERDANTURF TOWN\nvery soon...
data/maps/PetalburgCity/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Text_AreYouRookieTrainer:
Hiya! Are you maybe...
A rookie TRAINER?\pDo you know what POKéMON TRAINERS
do when they reach a new town?\pThey first check what kind of GYM
is in the town.
data/maps/PetalburgCity/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Text_ThisIsPetalburgGym: See? This is PETALBURG CITY's GYM.
data/maps/PetalburgCity/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Text_ThisIsGymSign: This is the GYM's sign. Look for it\nwhenever you're looking for a GYM.
data/maps/PetalburgCity/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Text_WaterReflection: My face is reflected in the water.\pIt's a shining grin full of hope...\pOr it could be a look of somber silence\nstruggling with fear...\pWhat do you see reflected in your face?
data/maps/PetalburgCity/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Text_FullPartyExplanation: Let's say you have six POKéMON.\nIf you catch another one...\pIt is automatically sent to a STORAGE\nBOX over a PC connection.
data/maps/PetalburgCity/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Text_GymSign: PETALBURG CITY POKéMON GYM\nLEADER: NORMAN\l“A man in pursuit of power!”
data/maps/PetalburgCity/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Text_CitySign: PETALBURG CITY\n“Where people mingle with nature.”

data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_DadYoureHereWithY:
DAD: Hm?\pWell, if it isn't {PLAYER}!
So you're all finished moving in?\pI'm surprised that you managed to
get here by yourself.\pOh, I see.
You're with your POKéMON.\pHm... Then I guess you're going to
become a TRAINER like me, {PLAYER}.\pThat's great news!
I'll be looking forward to it!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_WallyIdLikeAPokem: Um... I... I'd like to get a\nPOKéMON, please...
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_DadOhYoureWallyRi: DAD: Hm? You're... Uh... Oh, right.\nYou're WALLY, right?
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_WallyIveNeverCaug:
WALLY: I'm going to go stay with my
relatives in VERDANTURF TOWN.\pI thought I would be lonely by myself,
so I wanted to take a POKéMON along.\pBut I've never caught a POKéMON before.
I don't know how...
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_DadPlayerGoWithWa: DAD: {PLAYER}, you heard that,\nright?\pGo with WALLY and make sure that he\nsafely catches a POKéMON.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_IllLoanYouMyZigza: WALLY, here, I'll loan you my POKéMON.\pWALLY received a ZIGZAGOON!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_WallyThankYouAndD: WALLY: Oh, wow!\nA POKéMON!\pDAD: Hm. I'll give you a POKé BALL, too.\nGo for it!\pWALLY received a POKé BALL!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_DadSoDidItWorkOut: DAD: So, did it work out?
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_WallyThankYouBye:
WALLY: Thank you, yes, it did.
Here's your POKéMON back.\p{PLAYER}, thank you for coming along
with me.\pYou two are why I was able to catch
my POKéMON.\pI promise I'll take really good
care of it.\pOh! My mom's waiting for me, so I
have to go!\pBye, {PLAYER}!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_DadGoCollectBadge:
DAD: Now...\p{PLAYER}, if you want to become a
strong TRAINER, here's my advice.\pHead for RUSTBORO CITY beyond this
town.\pThere, you should challenge the GYM
LEADER, ROXANNE.\pAfter her, go on to other POKéMON
GYMS and defeat their LEADERS.\pCollect BADGES from them,
understood?\pOf course, I'm a GYM LEADER, too.
We'll battle one day, {PLAYER}.\pBut that's only after you become
stronger, {PLAYER}.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_NormanGoToRustbor:
DAD: Hm? Aren't you going to the
POKéMON GYM in RUSTBORO CITY?\pThere's no challenge for me to
battle a greenhorn TRAINER.\p{PLAYER}, I want you to challenge me
when you become a lot stronger.\pI'll battle you, {PLAYER}, when you
can show me four GYM BADGES, okay?
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_NormanGoToDewford:
DAD: I see... So, you've beaten the
GYM LEADER in RUSTBORO CITY.\pBut there are many more TRAINERS
who are stronger than you, {PLAYER}.\pAcross the sea in DEWFORD TOWN is a
GYM LEADER named BRAWLY.\pYou should go challenge him.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_YouHaveGottenStro: DAD: Hm... {PLAYER}, you have gotten\nstronger.\pI can tell by the number of BADGES\nthat you've earned.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_NormanIntro:
DAD: Hm...
So, you did get four GYM BADGES.\pFine, as I promised, we will have a
POKéMON battle.\p{PLAYER}...\pI'm so happy that I can have a 
real battle with my own child.\pBut, a battle is a battle!\pI will do everything in my power as
a GYM LEADER to win.\p{PLAYER}, you'd better give it your
best shot, too!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_NormanDefeat: ...\pI... I can't...\pI can't believe it. {PLAYER}...\pI lost to {PLAYER}?\pBut, rules are rules!\nHere, take this.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_ExplainBalanceBad:
DAD: With that BADGE, the DEFENSE
of all your POKéMON will increase.\pPOKéMON that know the HM move SURF
will be able to travel over water.\pThis is my gift to you. {PLAYER}, I'm
sure you can use it correctly.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_ExplainFacade: DAD: TM42 contains FACADE.\pIt doubles the power of moves if\nthe POKéMON is poisoned, paralyzed,\lor burned.\pIt might be able to turn a bad\nsituation into an advantage.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_DadHappyAndSad: DAD: As the GYM LEADER, I can't\nexpress how upset I am...\pBut as a father, it makes me both\nhappy and a little sad. It's odd...
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_WallysParentsHave: DAD: Oh, yes...\pWALLY's parents came calling\nearlier.\pThey said that they had something\nthey wanted to give you, {PLAYER}.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_DadGoingToKeepTra:
DAD: {PLAYER}, you should go visit
your mother every so often.\pI'm going to stay here and redouble
my training.\pIt would bother me as a TRAINER to
not avenge my loss to you, {PLAYER}!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_DadNoAmountOfTrai: DAD: {PLAYER}, how are things going?\pThe world of POKéMON is deep.\pI honestly think that no amount of\ntraining would ever be enough.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_GymGuideAdvice:
Hey, how's it going, CHAMPION-
bound {PLAYER}?\pThe doors in this GYM open when you
beat the awaiting TRAINERS.\pWhoops! The doors in this room are
already open, so don't attack me!\pThe TRAINERS of PETALBURG GYM use
all kinds of items.\pThe door at the left leads to the
SPEED ROOM.\pThe door at the right leads to the
ACCURACY ROOM.\pThe room's name will be on the
door, so choose carefully.\pOnce you've chosen the door...
Well, hey, go for it!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_GymGuidePostVicto: {PLAYER}! Whoa! You've overcome even\nyour own father!\pLike, whoa!\nWhat a stunning turn of events!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_RandallIntro: The ability to attack before the\nopponent...\pJust that alone puts me at a great\nadvantage, don't you agree?
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_RandallPostBattle:
Go on to the next room where a new
challenge awaits you.\pAt the left is the ZERO REDUCTION
ROOM.\pThe right door leads to the DEFENSE
ROOM.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_RandallPostBadge: Whomever you beat, and whomever you\nmay lose to, you never shirk from\ltraining yourself and your POKéMON.\pThat's what I think being a\nGYM LEADER is all about.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_ParkerIntro: Don't waste your time trying to\nlower my POKéMON's abilities!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_ParkerDefeat: My POKéMON's abilities weren't\nharmed, but I still lost...
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_ParkerPostBattle: The next room is the STRENGTH ROOM.\nCan you withstand brute force?
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_ParkerPostBadge: After you beat our LEADER, the\ntraining has become a lot tougher.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_GeorgeIntro:
Just when you think you're going to
win, your opponent restores HP...\pCan you just imagine how awful that
must feel?\pI'll show you exactly how awful it
feels!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_GeorgeDefeat: I couldn't restore HP enough...\nWhat ATTACK power...
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_GeorgePostBattle:
I should have expected no less from
our LEADER's kid.\pNo, wait! A TRAINER's abilities are
earned only through effort.\pI lost because my own efforts
weren't enough.\pGo on! The ONE-HIT KO ROOM is next.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_GeorgePostBadge: I'm going to keep training at GYMS.\nOne day, I'll become a LEADER.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_BerkeIntro: I'm not going to take it easy just\nbecause you're our LEADER's kid.\pI'll show you how horrid it is for\na POKéMON to take a critical hit!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_BerkePostBattle:
Your father really is strong. He's
a TRAINER worth my respect.\pAnd, I sense the same glow coming
from you as your father.\pI hope that you'll stage a terrific
battle with your father!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_BerkePostBadge: Since your dad became the LEADER,\nthe TRAINERS of PETALBURG CITY have\lbecome a lot tougher.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_MaryIntro: Giggle...\nThis is the ACCURACY ROOM.\pIt's pretty nasty when every attack\nlands without fail.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_MaryDefeat: You were a cut above me...
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_MaryPostBattle:
There are some even stronger
TRAINERS waiting for you.\pThe left is the DEFENSE ROOM, and
the right is the RECOVERY ROOM.\pYour POKéMON's ATTACK power will be
on trial either way.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_MaryPostBadge: Do you know what we're trying to\nachieve as TRAINERS?\pWe're striving to become soul mates\nwith our POKéMON.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_LoriIntro: The higher the DEFENSE, the more\nreckless I can be in attack.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_LoriPostBattle:
I think you've taught me a valuable
lesson here.\pNow, go on! The left door goes to
the STRENGTH ROOM.\pThe right door opens to the
ONE-HIT KO ROOM.\pBoth of them have TRAINERS who are
offensively skilled.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_LoriPostBadge: Hi! Have you tried using SURF?
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_JodyIntro: Our GYM LEADER told us to go all out\nand beat you.\pEven if you happen to be the\nLEADER's kid!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_JodiPostBattle: The way you use your POKéMON...\nIt's like your father's style.\pGo on through! The GYM LEADER, your\nfather, is waiting!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_JodiPostBadge: Sure, it's fine to make your POKéMON\nstronger.\pBut what decides the winner?\pWhy, it's the feelings TRAINERS have for\ntheir POKéMON.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_DoorAppearsLocked: This door appears to be locked\nright now...
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_EnterSpeedRoom: “SPEED ROOM,” the sign says.\pDo you want to go through?
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.UnknownString_817B8A8: This door appears to be locked\nright now...
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_EnterAccuracyRoom: “ACCURACY ROOM,” the sign says.\pDo you want to go through?
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_EnterZeroReductio: “ZERO REDUCTION ROOM,” the sign\nsays.\pDo you want to go through?
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_EnterDefenseRoom: “DEFENSE ROOM,” the sign says.\pDo you want to go through?
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_EnterRecoveryRoom: “RECOVERY ROOM,” the sign says.\pDo you want to go through?
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_EnterStrengthRoom: “STRENGTH ROOM,” the sign says.\pDo you want to go through?
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_EnterOHKORoom: “ONE-HIT KO ROOM,” the sign says.\pDo you want to go through?
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_EnterGymLeadersRo: “GYM LEADER'S ROOM\p“See for yourself what POKéMON await\nyou!” the sign says.\pDo you want to go through?
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_GymStatueCertifie: PETALBURG CITY POKéMON GYM\pNORMAN'S CERTIFIED TRAINERS:\n{PLAYER}

data/maps/PetalburgCity_House1/text.inc.PetalburgCity_House1_Text_TravelingIsWon: Traveling is wonderful!\pWhen I was young, I roamed the seas\nand the mountains!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_House1/text.inc.PetalburgCity_House1_Text_GoOnAdventure:
Sigh...\pI wish I could go on an adventure
with some POKéMON...\pCrawl through some damp grass...
Climb rocky, rugged mountains...\pCross the raging seas...
Wander about in dark caves...\pAnd, sometimes, even get a little
homesick...\pIt must be fabulous to travel!

data/maps/PetalburgCity_House2/text.inc.PetalburgCity_House2_Text_NormanBecameGy: NORMAN became our town's new GYM\nLEADER.\pI think he called his family over from\nthe JOHTO region.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_House2/text.inc.PetalburgCity_House2_Text_BattledNormanO: I battled NORMAN once, but, whew,\nhe was way too strong.\pHow would I put it?\pI just got the feeling that he\nlives for POKéMON.

data/maps/PetalburgCity_Mart/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Mart_Text_WeakWillGrowStro: Even if a POKéMON is weak now,\nit will grow stronger.\pThe most important thing is love!\nLove for your POKéMON!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Mart/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Mart_Text_RepelIsUseful: Do you use REPEL?\nIt keeps POKéMON away, so it's\luseful when you're in a hurry.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Mart/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Mart_Text_TakeSomeAntidote: Do you have any ANTIDOTES with\nyou?\pIf you walk around with a poisoned\nPOKéMON, it will lose HP until it faints.\lTake some ANTIDOTES with you.

data/maps/PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F.PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_PCSt: That PC-based POKéMON storage\nsystem...\pWhoever made it must be some kind\nof a scientific wizard!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F.PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Oran: When my POKéMON ate an\nORAN BERRY, it regained HP!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F.PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Many: There are many types of POKéMON.\pAll types have their strengths and\nweaknesses against other types.\pDepending on the types of POKéMON,\na battle could be easy or hard.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F.PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Tree:
For example, your TREECKO is a
GRASS type.\pIt's strong against the WATER and
GROUND types.\pBut, it's weak against FIRE-type
POKéMON.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F.PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Torc:
For example, your TORCHIC is a
FIRE type.\pIt's strong against the GRASS and
BUG types.\pBut, it's weak against WATER-type
POKéMON.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F.PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Mudk: For example, your MUDKIP is a\nWATER type.\pIt's strong against the FIRE type.\pBut, it's weak against GRASS-type\nand ELECTRIC-type POKéMON.

data/maps/PetalburgCity_WallysHouse/text.PetalburgCity_WallysHouse_Text_ThanksFor:
You're...
Ah, you must be {PLAYER}{KUN}, right?\pThank you for playing with WALLY a
little while ago.\pHe's been frail and sickly ever
since he was a baby.\pWe've sent him to stay with my relatives
in VERDANTURF TOWN for a while.\pThe air is a lot cleaner there
than it is here.\pWhat's that? Where's WALLY?
He's already left, our WALLY.\pI wonder where he could have
gotten by now?
data/maps/PetalburgCity_WallysHouse/text.PetalburgCity_WallysHouse_Text_WonderHow: I wonder how our WALLY is doing?
data/maps/PetalburgCity_WallysHouse/text.PetalburgCity_WallysHouse_Text_WallyHasB:
Hi there, {PLAYER}{KUN}!\pOur WALLY's become very healthy
since he went to VERDANTURF TOWN.\pWe owe it all to you!\pWhen WALLY left town, you helped
him catch a POKéMON, right?\pI think that made WALLY really
happy.\pActually, not just WALLY.
It made me, his father, happy too.\pHappy that he's got such a great
friend as you.\pThis isn't a bribe or anything, but
I'd really like you to have this.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_WallysHouse/text.PetalburgCity_WallysHouse_Text_SurfGoAll: If your POKéMON can SURF, you'll be\nable to go to all sorts of places.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_WallysHouse/text.PetalburgCity_WallysHouse_Text_WallyIsCo: WALLY's coming home soon.\nI'm looking forward to that.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_WallysHouse/text.PetalburgCity_WallysHouse_Text_YouMetWal: Oh? You met WALLY in EVER GRANDE\nCITY?\pOh, {PLAYER}{KUN}, don't be silly.\pHe may have gotten healthy, but he\ncan't go somewhere far away like\lthat all by himself.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_WallysHouse/text.PetalburgCity_WallysHouse_Text_WallyWasR: WALLY was really happy when he told\nus that he caught a POKéMON.\pIt's been ages since I've seen him\nsmile like that.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_WallysHouse/text.PetalburgCity_WallysHouse_Text_HusbandHa: Oh, hello, {PLAYER}! We've got\nsomething we want you to have.\pMy husband has it, so please have a\nword with him, dear.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_WallysHouse/text.PetalburgCity_WallysHouse_Text_WallyLeft:
I want you to keep this a secret
from my husband...\pBut our WALLY left VERDANTURF TOWN
without telling anyone.\pYou know, WALLY is frail, but
he's surprisingly strong-willed.\pI'm sure that he'll come back safe
and sound one day!

data/maps/PetalburgWoods/text.inc.PetalburgWoods_Text_194D71: Hmmm...\nNot a one to be found...
data/maps/PetalburgWoods/text.inc.PetalburgWoods_Text_194D92: Hello, have you seen any POKéMON\ncalled SHROOMISH around here?\pI really love that POKéMON.
data/maps/PetalburgWoods/text.inc.PetalburgWoods_Text_194DED: I was going to ambush you, but you\nhad to dawdle in PETALBURG WOODS\lforever, didn't you?\pI got sick of waiting, so here I am!
data/maps/PetalburgWoods/text.inc.PetalburgWoods_Text_194E6B: You! DEVON RESEARCHER!\pHand over those papers!
data/maps/PetalburgWoods/text.inc.PetalburgWoods_Text_194E9A: Aiyeeeh!\pYou're a POKéMON TRAINER, aren't you?\nYou've got to help me, please!
data/maps/PetalburgWoods/text.inc.PetalburgWoods_Text_194EE8: Hunh? What do you think you're doing?\nWhat, you're going to protect him?\pNo one who crosses TEAM {EVIL_TEAM}\ngets any mercy, not even a kid!\pCome on and battle me!
data/maps/PetalburgWoods/text.inc.PetalburgWoods_Text_194FA4:
Grrr... You've got some nerve
meddling with TEAM {EVIL_TEAM}!\lCome on and battle me again!\pI wish I could say that, but I'm out of
POKéMON...\pAnd, hey, we of TEAM {EVIL_TEAM} are also
after something in RUSTBORO.\pI'll let you go today!
data/maps/PetalburgWoods/text.inc.PetalburgWoods_Text_19507E:
Whew...
That was awfully close!\pThanks to you, he didn't rob me of
these important papers.\pI know, I'll give you a GREAT BALL as
my thanks!
data/maps/PetalburgWoods/text.inc.PetalburgWoods_Text_19510A: Didn't that TEAM {EVIL_TEAM} thug say\nthey were after something in\lRUSTBORO, too?
data/maps/PetalburgWoods/text.inc.PetalburgWoods_Text_195153: Uh-oh! It's a crisis!\nI can't be wasting time!
data/maps/PetalburgWoods/text.inc.PetalburgWoods_Text_195182: You're loaded with items.\nI can't give you this GREAT BALL.
data/maps/PetalburgWoods/text.inc.PetalburgWoods_Text_1951BE: I caught a whole bunch of POKéMON!\pGo, go, go!\nMy BUG POKéMON team!
data/maps/PetalburgWoods/text.inc.PetalburgWoods_Text_195202: I have all these POKéMON, but I\ncouldn't win...
data/maps/PetalburgWoods/text.inc.PetalburgWoods_Text_195232: I caught a bunch of POKéMON.\nNow I'm out of POKé BALLS.
data/maps/PetalburgWoods/text.inc.PetalburgWoods_Text_19526A: If you take BUG POKéMON to school,\nyou get to be instantly popular!
data/maps/PetalburgWoods/text.inc.PetalburgWoods_Text_1952AE: I can't be popular if I lose.
data/maps/PetalburgWoods/text.inc.PetalburgWoods_Text_1952CC: If you have a big BUG POKéMON, people\nrespect you for it.
data/maps/PetalburgWoods/text.inc.PetalburgWoods_Text_195306: My BUG POKéMON have grown.\nI'll be popular again.
data/maps/PetalburgWoods/text.inc.PetalburgWoods_Text_195338: I can't be popular if I lose.
data/maps/PetalburgWoods/text.inc.PetalburgWoods_Text_195356: You get to be popular if you have\nstrong POKéMON, right?\lSo, I've been training hard.
data/maps/PetalburgWoods/text.inc.PetalburgWoods_Text_1953AC: Yo, there!\nYour POKéMON doing okay?\pIf your POKéMON are weak and you want\nto avoid battles, you should stay out\lof tall grass.
data/maps/PetalburgWoods/text.inc.PetalburgWoods_Text_19542B: Sometimes, there are things on the\nground even if you can't see them.\pThat's why I always check where I'm\nwalking.
data/maps/PetalburgWoods/text.inc.PetalburgWoods_Text_19549E: Oh, neat!\nThat's the BADGE from RUSTBORO GYM!\pYou must be a TRAINER.\nYou should try using this item.
data/maps/PetalburgWoods/text.inc.PetalburgWoods_Text_195503: It's a MIRACLE SEED.\nIf a POKéMON holds that item, its\lGRASS-type moves become stronger.\pBesides MIRACLE SEED, I think there are\nother convenient items for POKéMON\lto hold.
data/maps/PetalburgWoods/text.inc.PetalburgWoods_Text_1955B0:
TRAINER TIPS\pAny POKéMON that appears even once
in a battle is awarded EXP Points.\pTo raise a weak POKéMON, put it at the
top of the team list.\pAs soon as a battle starts, switch it
out. It will earn EXP Points without\lbeing exposed to any harm.
data/maps/PetalburgWoods/text.inc.PetalburgWoods_Text_1956A6: TRAINER TIPS\pIn addition to Hit Points (HP), POKéMON\nhave Power Points (PP) that are used to\lmake moves during battle.\pIf a POKéMON runs out of PP, it must be\ntaken to a POKéMON CENTER.

data/maps/Route101/text.inc.Route101_Text_16D119: Hello! You over there!\nPlease! Help!\pIn my BAG!\nThere's a POKé BALL!
data/maps/Route101/text.inc.Route101_Text_16D15E: Wh-Where are you going?!\nDon't leave me like this!
data/maps/Route101/text.inc.Route101_Text_16D191:
PROF. BIRCH: Whew...\pI was in the tall grass studying wild
POKéMON when I was jumped.\pYou saved me.
Thanks a lot!\pOh?\pHi, you're {PLAYER}{KUN}!\pThis is not the place to chat, so come
by my POKéMON LAB later, okay?
data/maps/Route101/text.inc.Route101_Text_16D25E: If POKéMON get tired, take them to\na POKéMON CENTER.\pThere's a POKéMON CENTER in OLDALE\nTOWN right close by.
data/maps/Route101/text.inc.Route101_Text_16D2CB: Wild POKéMON will jump out at you in\ntall grass.\pIf you want to catch POKéMON, you have\nto go into the tall grass and search.

data/maps/Route102/text.inc.Route102_Text_WatchMeCatchPokemon: WALLY: {PLAYER}...\nPOKéMON hide in tall grass like this,\ldon't they?\pPlease watch me and see if I can\ncatch one properly.\p...Whoa!
data/maps/Route102/text.inc.Route102_Text_WallyIDidIt: WALLY: I did it... It's my...\nMy POKéMON!
data/maps/Route102/text.inc.Route102_Text_LetsGoBack: {PLAYER}, thank you!\nLet's go back to the GYM!
data/maps/Route102/text.inc.Route102_Text_16D431: I'm...not very tall, so I sink right\ninto tall grass.\pThe grass goes up my nose and...\nFwafwafwafwafwa...\pFwatchoo!
data/maps/Route102/text.inc.UnknownString_816D4BB: Ta-daaaah! Awesome, huh?\pThere are some ledges that you can't\nclimb up, but you can jump down.
data/maps/Route102/text.inc.Route102_Text_16D51A: I'm going to catch a whole bunch of\nPOKéMON!

data/maps/Route103/text.inc.Route103_Text_16D57A: MAY: Let's see... The POKéMON found\non ROUTE 103 include...
data/maps/Route103/text.inc.Route103_Text_16D5B6:
Oh, hi, {PLAYER}{KUN}!\p...Oh, I see, my dad gave you a
POKéMON as a gift.\pSince we're here, let's have a quick
battle!\pI'll give you a taste of what being a
TRAINER is like.
data/maps/Route103/text.inc.Route103_Text_16D65B: Wow! That's great!\n{PLAYER}{KUN}, you're pretty good!
data/maps/Route103/text.inc.Route103_Text_16D688:
MAY: I think I know why my dad has an
eye out for you now.\pI mean, you just got that POKéMON but
it already likes you.\pYou might be able to befriend any
kind of POKéMON easily.\pWell, it's time to head back to the
LAB.
data/maps/Route103/text.inc.Route103_Text_16D762: BRENDAN: Okay, so it's this one and\nthat one that live on ROUTE 103...
data/maps/Route103/text.inc.Route103_Text_16D7A9: Hey, it's {PLAYER}!\p...Oh, yeah, Dad gave you a POKéMON.\pSince we're here, how about a little\nbattle?\pI'll teach you what being a TRAINER's\nabout!
data/maps/Route103/text.inc.Route103_Text_16D856:
BRENDAN: I think I get it.
I think I know why my dad has his eye\lout for you now.\pLook, your POKéMON already likes you,
even though you just got it.\p{PLAYER}, I get the feeling that you
could befriend any POKéMON with ease.\pWe should head back to the LAB.
data/maps/Route103/text.inc.Route103_Text_16D950: My POKéMON is staggeringly tired...\nI should have brought a POTION...
data/maps/Route103/text.inc.Route103_Text_16D996: If you cross the sea from here,\nit'll be a shortcut to OLDALE TOWN.\pFufufu, that's useful, isn't it?

data/maps/Route104/text.inc.Route104_Text_16DA13: That seaside cottage is where\nMR. BRINEY lives.\pHe was once a mighty sailor who never\nfeared the sea, however stormy.
data/maps/Route104/text.inc.Route104_Text_16DA89: The sea, huh?\pI wonder what it's like at the bottom\nof the sea?
data/maps/Route104/text.inc.Route104_Text_16DAC9: If you're going to throw a POKé BALL,\nweaken the wild POKéMON first.\pIt will be easier to catch if it's been\npoisoned, burned, or lulled to sleep.
data/maps/Route104/text.inc.Route104_Text_16DB5C: You're a thief if you try to steal\nsomeone else's POKéMON.\pYou should throw POKé BALLS only at\nwild POKéMON.
data/maps/Route104/text.inc.Route104_Text_16DBC9: Oh, no, I'm not a TRAINER.\pBut that's right, if TRAINERS lock eyes,\nit's a challenge to battle.\pIf you don't want to battle, stay out\nof their sight.
data/maps/Route104/text.inc.Route104_Text_16DC5F: I like filling my mouth with seeds,\nthen spitting them out fast!\pYou can have this, so you try it out!\pUse it on a POKéMON, and it will learn\na move for firing seeds rapidly.
data/maps/Route104/text.inc.Route104_Text_16DD0E: A word of advice!\pA TM, TECHNICAL MACHINE, is good only\nfor one-time use.\pOnce you use it, it's gone.\nThink twice before using it!
data/maps/Route104/text.inc.Route104_Text_16DD91: This FLOWER SHOP started selling\nsaplings recently.\pIt made me so happy, I went overboard\nshopping. I don't need this WHITE HERB\lanymore. Would you take it, please?
data/maps/Route104/text.inc.Route104_Text_16DE36: This FLOWER SHOP started selling\nsaplings recently.\pIt made me so happy, I went overboard\nshopping. Where should I put them?
data/maps/Route104/text.inc.Route104_Text_16DF16: TRAINER TIPS\pIn the HOENN region there are pairs\nof TRAINERS who challenge others\lfor 2-on-2 POKéMON battles called\lDOUBLE BATTLES.\pIn a DOUBLE BATTLE, the TRAINER must\nsend out two POKéMON, the one at the\lleft of the list and the top one.\lWatch how POKéMON are lined up.

data/maps/Route104_MrBrineysHouse/text.i.Route104_MrBrineysHouse_Text_191A82: MR. BRINEY: Hold on, lass!\nWait up, PEEKO!
data/maps/Route104_MrBrineysHouse/text.i.Route104_MrBrineysHouse_Text_191AAD:
Hm? You're {PLAYER}{KUN}!
You saved my darling PEEKO!\lWe owe so much to you!\pWhat's that?
You want to sail with me?\pHmhm...\pYou have a LETTER bound for DEWFORD
and a package for SLATEPORT, then?\pQuite the busy life you must lead!\pBut, certainly, what you're asking is
no problem at all.\pYou've come to the right man!
We'll set sail for DEWFORD.
data/maps/Route104_MrBrineysHouse/text.i.Route104_MrBrineysHouse_Text_191BFD: MR. BRINEY: DEWFORD, here we come!\pAnchors aweigh!\nPEEKO, we're setting sail, my darling!
data/maps/Route104_MrBrineysHouse/text.i.Route104_MrBrineysHouse_Text_191C57: MR. BRINEY: Is that so?\nYour deliveries can wait?\pYou just go on and tell me whenever\nyou want to set sail!
data/maps/Route104_MrBrineysHouse/text.i.Route104_MrBrineysHouse_Text_191CC3:
MR. BRINEY: Ahoy!
I know exactly what you want to say!\pYou're to deliver a LETTER to DEWFORD
and a package to SLATEPORT.\pWhat you need me to do is no problem
at all - I'm the man for the job!\pFirst, we'll set sail for DEWFORD.
data/maps/Route104_MrBrineysHouse/text.i.Route104_MrBrineysHouse_Text_191DA6:
MR. BRINEY: Ahoy!
I know exactly what you want to say!\pYou're to deliver a package to
CAPT. STERN in SLATEPORT.\pWhat you need me to do is no problem
at all - I'm the man for the job!\pFirst, we'll set sail for DEWFORD.
data/maps/Route104_MrBrineysHouse/text.i.Route104_MrBrineysHouse_Text_191E80: MR. BRINEY: Ahoy!\nFor you, I'll go out to sea anytime!\pNow, my friend, where are we bound?
data/maps/Route104_MrBrineysHouse/text.i.Route104_MrBrineysHouse_Text_191EDB: MR. BRINEY: Is that so?\nWell, PEEKO owes her life to you.\pYou just go on and tell me whenever\nyou want to set sail!
data/maps/Route104_MrBrineysHouse/text.i.UnknownString_8191F4F: MR. BRINEY: Ahoy!\nWe've made land in PETALBURG!\pYou just go on and tell me whenever\nyou want to set sail!

data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19AD9B: Oh? You look like a good TRAINER.\nWill you look at my POKéMON?
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19ADDA: I'm not good enough for you.
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19ADF7: I enjoyed our battle very much.\nPlease battle with me some other time.
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19AE6A: Did it surprise you that two POKéMON\nbattled at the same time?
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19AEA9: You can't battle with us if you have\nonly one POKéMON.\lWhy? Because we're strong!
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19AEFB: Hey, hey! This is my first battle in\na while. I'll give it my all!
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19AF3E: But I gave it my all...
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19AF56: You're far too strong!\nYou must be a great TRAINER!
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19AF8A: My POKéMON are extremely cute and\nextremely strong.\lPlease allow me to show you.
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19AFDB: I must concede defeat.\nAfter all, you are strong.
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19B00D: The next time we meet, I will have raised\nmy POKéMON much more.\pDon't expect mercy then!
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19B066: We HIKERS are always full of energy!\nMy POKéMON are also full of energy, too.\lWe're always itching for a battle!
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19B0EF: Wahahah! Sure, we lost!\nBut we had a great battle, didn't we?\lWe're satisfied with that!
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19B148: You look like a strong TRAINER,\nbut can you beat us?
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19B18D: If two POKéMON can battle at the same\ntime, all sorts of new things can happen.
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19B1DD: Do you only have one POKéMON that can\nbattle?\pThen we can't battle with you yet.
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19B22E: Have you tried beating all the other\nTRAINERS in battle?
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19B267: Thanks for coming today!\pI hope you're looking forward to this\ngame's release!
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19B2B6: Huh? Did you battle with all the\nTRAINERS already?
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19B2E9: Thank you for coming today!\pI hope you're looking forward to this\ngame's release!
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19B33B: I've never seen the POKéMON you have.\nIt makes me envious a little.
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19B37F: Look at all those TRAINERS!\nThey have different POKéMON, too.\lAnd they're all waiting for you!
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19B3DE: Welcome to the World of POKéMON!
data/maps/Route104_Prototype/text.inc.Route104_Prototype_Text_19B3FF: May all POKéMON battles be bright,\nfun, and ferocious!

data/maps/Route104_PrototypePrettyPetalF.Route104_PrototypePrettyPetalFlowerShop_: I have to stay home today.\pMy big sisters had to go out.\nThey said it was for preparations.\pIn the autumn, we're going to start\na flower shop. Please wait for it!

data/maps/Route106/text.inc.Route106_Text_16E026: TRAINER TIPS\pAdvice on catching POKéMON with a ROD:\nPress the A Button if you get a bite.

data/maps/Route109/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_BrineyLandedInSlateport: MR. BRINEY: Ahoy!\nWe've made land in SLATEPORT!\pI suppose you're going to visit CAPT.\nSTERN and deliver the DEVON GOODS?
data/maps/Route109/text.inc.Route109_Text_16E0F9: MR. BRINEY: Aren't you delivering the\nDEVON GOODS?\pOr were you meaning to sail back to\nDEWFORD?
data/maps/Route109/text.inc.Route109_Text_16E159: MR. BRINEY: DEWFORD it is, then!\pAnchors aweigh!\nPEEKO, we're setting sail, my darling!
data/maps/Route109/text.inc.Route109_Text_16E1B1: MR. BRINEY: Then you go on and deliver\nthe DEVON GOODS. I'll be waiting.
data/maps/Route109/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_BrineyLandedInSlateport: MR. BRINEY: Ahoy! We've made land in\nSLATEPORT!\pYou just go on and tell me whenever\nyou want to set sail again!
data/maps/Route109/text.inc.Route109_Text_16E26A: MR. BRINEY: Ahoy!\nFor you, I'll go out to sea anytime!\pNow, my friend, where are we bound?
data/maps/Route109/text.inc.Route109_Text_16E2C5: MR. BRINEY: You just tell me whenever\nyou need to set sail again!
data/maps/Route109/text.inc.Route109_Text_16E307: Yo, TRAINERS!\nWhether you're hot to trot,\lor cool cat not,\lchill at my papa's spot!
data/maps/Route109/text.inc.Route109_Text_16E35B: Little kids can dart around so quickly...\pYou don't dare take your eyes off them\nfor an instant. It's very taxing.\pMine's with my POKéMON, so they should\nbe okay, but...
data/maps/Route109/text.inc.Route109_Text_16E405: Our sand castle's taking a long time\nto make.
data/maps/Route109/text.inc.Route109_Text_16E446: We're going to get all the sand from\nthe beach and make a big castle!\pAnd then we're going to be a king and\nqueen.\pWe'll let you be a servant.
data/maps/Route109/text.inc.Route109_Text_16E4D5:
The water around these parts is clean.\pBut, I get my ZIGZAGOON to pick up
litter from the shoreline at times.\pDirty water becomes rain and joins our
rivers, which we drink from...\pIf we pollute the sea, it all comes
back to haunt us eventually.
data/maps/Route109/text.inc.Route109_Text_16E5DC: SEASHORE HOUSE\p“May hot battles rage on hot sands!\nThe place for hot TRAINERS!”
data/maps/Route109/text.inc.Route109_Text_16E62C: TRAINER TIPS\pPOKéMON at the same level may not\nalways have identical stats.\pPOKéMON raised by TRAINERS are said\nto grow stronger than wild POKéMON.

data/maps/Route109_SeashoreHouse/text.in.Route109_SeashoreHouse_Text_19B4D9:
I'm the owner of the SEASHORE HOUSE.
But you can call me MR. SEA!\pWhat I love above all is to see hot
POKéMON battles.\pLet me see that your heart burns hot!\pIf you can defeat all the TRAINERS
here, I'll reward your efforts.
data/maps/Route109_SeashoreHouse/text.in.Route109_SeashoreHouse_Text_19B5B9: Show me some hot matches!\pI run this SEASHORE HOUSE just for\nthat reason alone!
data/maps/Route109_SeashoreHouse/text.in.Route109_SeashoreHouse_Text_19B609: You're scorching hot!\nThose battles blazed!\lI'm more than just satisfied!\pAs thanks for showing me your hot\nstreak, I want you to take these.\pIt's half a dozen bottles of SODA POP!
data/maps/Route109_SeashoreHouse/text.in.Route109_SeashoreHouse_Text_19B6BE: Oh, but hey, your BAG's jammed full.\nI'll hang on to these for you.
data/maps/Route109_SeashoreHouse/text.in.Route109_SeashoreHouse_Text_19B702: Want to buy some SODA POP?\nPOKéMON love it!\pJust ¥300 a bottle!\nBuy some!
data/maps/Route109_SeashoreHouse/text.in.UnknownString_819B787: SODA POP! The POKéMON favorite!\nJust ¥300 a bottle! Want one?
data/maps/Route109_SeashoreHouse/text.in.UnknownString_819B7D2: Oh, dear!\nYou don't have enough money.
data/maps/Route109_SeashoreHouse/text.in.Route109_SeashoreHouse_Text_19B809: If you're looking for a battle on the\nhigh seas, you'll find no hotter \lTRAINER than me, matey!
data/maps/Route109_SeashoreHouse/text.in.Route109_SeashoreHouse_Text_19B869: That was a hot battle!\nI can accept that loss, matey!
data/maps/Route109_SeashoreHouse/text.in.Route109_SeashoreHouse_Text_19B89F: Whenever I'm in SLATEPORT, I enjoy\nhot battles and ice-cold SODA POP!
data/maps/Route109_SeashoreHouse/text.in.Route109_SeashoreHouse_Text_19B8E5: Boring battles aren't worth the effort.\pFiery hot battles are what toughen up\nTRAINERS and POKéMON!
data/maps/Route109_SeashoreHouse/text.in.Route109_SeashoreHouse_Text_19B955: Whew, I'm all thirsty.\nMaybe I'll have a SODA POP.
data/maps/Route109_SeashoreHouse/text.in.Route109_SeashoreHouse_Text_19B988: I'm going to show you how great my\nPOKéMON are, but don't cry!
data/maps/Route109_SeashoreHouse/text.in.Route109_SeashoreHouse_Text_19B9E5: If one of my POKéMON knew the move\nfor carrying me across water on its\lback, I could get rid of this inner tube.

data/maps/Route110/text.inc.Route110_Text_16E6C0: TEAM {EVIL_TEAM}'s activities must be kept\nsecret for now.
data/maps/Route110/text.inc.Route110_Text_16E6F2: I want to get going to SLATEPORT and\nkick up a ruckus!
data/maps/Route110/text.inc.Route110_Text_16E729: This is my first job after joining\nTEAM {EVIL_TEAM}. I've got the shakes!
data/maps/Route110/text.inc.Route110_Text_16E76A: TEAM {EVIL_TEAM}'s actions will put a smile\non everyone's face!
data/maps/Route110/text.inc.Route110_Text_16E7A1: MAY: Hi, {PLAYER}{KUN}, long time no see!\pWhile I was searching for other\nPOKéMON, my POKéMON grew stronger.\pSo...\nHow about a little battle?
data/maps/Route110/text.inc.Route110_Text_16E84C: MAY: {PLAYER}{KUN}, you've been busy\ntraining, too, haven't you?\pI think you deserve a reward!\nThis is from me!
data/maps/Route110/text.inc.Route110_Text_16E8B3: MAY: That's an ITEMFINDER.\pTry it out. If there is an item that's\nnot visible, it emits a sound.\pOkay, {PLAYER}{KUN}, let's meet again!\pI know it's a little silly coming from\nme, but I think you should train a lot\lharder for the next time.
data/maps/Route110/text.inc.Route110_Text_16E99A: BRENDAN: Hey, {PLAYER}.\nSo this is where you were.\lHow's it going?\pHave you been raising your POKéMON?\nI'll check for you.
data/maps/Route110/text.inc.Route110_Text_16EA2A: BRENDAN: {PLAYER}, you've trained\nwithout me noticing...\pGood enough!\nHere, take this.
data/maps/Route110/text.inc.Route110_Text_16EA7B:
BRENDAN: That's an ITEMFINDER.\pUse it to root around for items that
aren't visible.\pIf it senses something, it emits a
sound.\pAnyway, I'm off to look for new
POKéMON.
data/maps/Route110/text.inc.Route110_Text_16EB22: Wouldn't it be great to ride a BIKE\nat full speed on CYCLING ROAD?
data/maps/Route110/text.inc.Route110_Text_16EB65: How do you like the way my raven-\ncolored hair streams behind me?\pI grew my hair out just for that.
data/maps/Route110/text.inc.Route110_Text_16EBC9:
Oh, hey, you got that BIKE from RYDEL!\pOh, it's glaringly obvious.
It says right on your bike...\pRYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL,
RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL,\pRYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL,
RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL,\pRYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL,
RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL,\pRYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL,
RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL,\pRYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL...
That name's everywhere.\pYou should ride it around all over
the place - it's good advertising!
data/maps/Route110/text.inc.Route110_Text_16EDC5: The two roads, one above, one below...\pA road each for people and POKéMON.\nPerhaps that is right and fair.
data/maps/Route110/text.inc.Route110_Text_16EE30: I don't have a BIKE, so I'll take a\nleisurely walk on the low road.
data/maps/Route110/text.inc.Route110_Text_16EE74: Learning techniques will make BIKE\nriding even more fun.\pThere are some places that you can\nreach only by using a BIKE technique.
data/maps/Route110/text.inc.Route110_Text_16EEF6: Which should I choose?\pMake a beeline for MAUVILLE on\nCYCLING ROAD, or take the low road\land look for POKéMON?
data/maps/Route110/text.inc.Route110_Text_16EF9F: Bravo! Splendid showing!\pYour love of cycling comes from deep\nwithin your heart.\lYou've shaken me to my very soul!
data/maps/Route110/text.inc.Route110_Text_16F012: Your technique is remarkable.\pI suggest you slow down just enough\nto avoid collisions.
data/maps/Route110/text.inc.Route110_Text_16F069: I would consider you a work in\nprogress.\pStill, I hope you don't forget the\nsheer pleasure of cycling.
data/maps/Route110/text.inc.Route110_Text_16F0D0: My word... Your cycling skills border\non terrifying.\pMost certainly, you need much more\npractice riding.
data/maps/Route110/text.inc.Route110_Text_16F139: ...I am aghast...\pYou're perhaps not cut out for this\nunfortunate cycling business.\pYou ought to give serious thought to\nreturning that BIKE to RYDEL.
data/maps/Route110/text.inc.Route110_Text_16F1D0: This is CYCLING ROAD.\pIf you were to ride from MAUVILLE to\nSLATEPORT on a MACH BIKE, you would\lbe rated for the number of collisions\land your total time.
data/maps/Route110/text.inc.Route110_Text_16F26A: Regardless of the results, I count on\nseeing more challenges from you.\lAlways aim higher!
data/maps/Route110/text.inc.Route110_Text_16F2C4: On this CYCLING ROAD, those riding\nMACH BIKES are rated for their number\lof collisions and their total times.\pACRO BIKES do not qualify for rating.\nThey are easy to turn, so it's not fair.
data/maps/Route110/text.inc.Route110_Text_16F3B1: “TEAM {EVIL_TEAM} RULEZ!”\pSomebody scribbled that on the sign...
data/maps/Route110/text.inc.Route110_Text_16F429: TRAINER TIPS\pThe foe can be made helpless by\nparalyzing it or causing it to sleep.\pIt is an important technique for\nPOKéMON battles.
data/maps/Route110/text.inc.Route110_Text_16F4AE: TRAINER TIPS\pThe items in the BAG can be reorganized\nby pressing SELECT.
data/maps/Route110/text.inc.Route110_Text_16F4F7: “Three steps {0x7C} and two steps {0x79}\nto reach the wondrous TRICK HOUSE.”
data/maps/Route110/text.inc.Route110_Text_16F53A: THE BEST RECORD TO DATE...\pNo. of collisions: {STR_VAR_1}\pElapsed time: {STR_VAR_2}
data/maps/Route110/text.inc.Route110_Text_16F57C: THE BEST RECORD TO DATE...\pNo one seems to have taken the\nchallenge. There is no record...
data/maps/Route110/text.inc.UnknownString_816F5D7: I watered the plants every day.\nThey grew lots of flowers.\pAnd they gave me lots of BERRIES, too.\pHere you go!\nYou can have it!
data/maps/Route110/text.inc.UnknownString_816F657: I'm trying to make RED {POKEBLOCK}S!\nI hope you do, too!
data/maps/Route110/text.inc.UnknownString_816F68A: Your BAG's BERRIES POCKET is full.\pI'll give it to you another time.
data/maps/Route110/text.inc.UnknownString_816F6CF: I'm going to look for red BERRIES to\nmake RED {POKEBLOCK}S.

data/maps/Route110_SeasideCyclingRoadNor.Route110_SeasideCyclingRoadNorthEntrance: On CYCLING ROAD, you can go all out\nand cycle as fast as you'd like.\pIt feels great to go that fast, but try\nnot to crash into anyone!
data/maps/Route110_SeasideCyclingRoadNor.UnknownString_819E48D: Sorry, you can't walk on CYCLING\nROAD. It's too dangerous.\pPlease come back with a BIKE.

data/maps/Route110_SeasideCyclingRoadSou.Route110_SeasideCyclingRoadSouthEntrance: On CYCLING ROAD, you can go all out\nand cycle as fast as you'd like.\pIt feels great to go that fast, but try\nnot to crash into anyone!
Sorry, you can't walk on CYCLING\nROAD. It's too dangerous.\pPlease come back with a BIKE.

data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEnd/text.in.Route110_TrickHouseEnd_Text_YouveMadeItT: Aak!\nYou've made it to me?\lHmmm... You're sharp!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEnd/text.in.Route110_TrickHouseEnd_Text_AllNightToPl: It took me all night to plant all those\ntrees...\pYou're almost my equal in greatness by\none, two, three, four, five, six places!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEnd/text.in.Route110_TrickHouseEnd_Text_AllNightToMa: It took me all night to make the maze...\pYou're almost my equal in greatness by\none, two, three, four, five places!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEnd/text.in.Route110_TrickHouseEnd_Text_19C3A7: It took me all night to bring in those\nboulders...\pYou're almost my equal in greatness by\none, two, three, four places!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEnd/text.in.Route110_TrickHouseEnd_Text_AllNightToSh: It took me all night to shove in those\nboulders...\pYou're almost my equal in greatness by\none, two, three places!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEnd/text.in.Route110_TrickHouseEnd_Text_AllNightToMa: It took me all night to make MECHADOLLS\nand another to think up the quiz...\pYou're almost my equal in greatness by\none, two places!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEnd/text.in.Route110_TrickHouseEnd_Text_AllNightToIn: It took me all night to install\nthe doors...\pYou're almost my equal in greatness!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEnd/text.in.Route110_TrickHouseEnd_Text_AllNightSett: It took me all night setting up arrows...\pYou're my equal in greatness!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEnd/text.in.Route110_TrickHouseEnd_Text_AllNightPoli: It took me all night polishing floors...\pYou're above me in greatness!\nPossibly...
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEnd/text.in.Route110_TrickHouseEnd_Text_FountainOfId: Wh-what should I do?\nMy fountain of ideas for tricks has\lrun dry...\pPerhaps it is time I toured the country\non a quest to devise new tricks...
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEnd/text.in.Route110_TrickHouseEnd_Text_DefeatedMeTa:
I hate to admit defeat, but you have
bested me!\pStill, you must have been reeled in by
my charisma for you to visit me again\land again. Yes, you must have!\pBut that has nothing to do with my
losing!\pIn recognition of the friendship
between you, the driven, and the genius\lthat is myself, I demand that you take\lthis keepsake!
