data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEnd/text.in.Route110_TrickHouseEnd_Text_NoRoomInPC: What? No room in your PC?\nWhat am I to make of that?\pI wish I could say that, but I am much\ntoo kind and caring, so come back later!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEnd/text.in.Route110_TrickHouseEnd_Text_LeavingOnJou: ... ... ... ... ... ...\pI am leaving on a journey of discovery.\nA quest in search of new tricks.\pI wish that you will one day visit and\nentertain me again.\pAnd now, farewell!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEnd/text.in.Route110_TrickHouseEnd_Text_NoRoomForThi: What? Have you no room for this?\nWhat manner of items do you carry?\pBut fine, since you've reached me,\nyour reward will be with me till later.
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEnd/text.in.Route110_TrickHouseEnd_Text_MakeNewTrick:
Scrub that smug smirk from your face!
It's much too early to think you've won!\pI'll make new tricks to stump you, I will.
You may mock me only when you're done.\pCome back for the next exciting
installment!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEnd/text.in.Route110_TrickHouseEnd_Text_YoureIgnorin: Now, now! You're ignoring me now?\nNow that, I consider heartbreaking!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEnd/text.in.UnknownString_819CAD1: {PLAYER} wrote down the secret code\non the door.\p“TRICK MASTER is fabulous.”\n... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...\pThe lock clicked open!

data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEntrance/te.Route110_TrickHouseEntrance_Text_Conceal: Hah? Grrr...\pHow did you know I concealed myself\nbeneath this desk? You're sharp!
Hah? Grrr...\pHow did you know I concealed myself\nbehind this tree? You're sharp!
Hah? Grrr...\pHow did you know I concealed myself\nin this dresser? You're sharp!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEntrance/te.Route110_TrickHouseEntrance_Text_Coneale: Hah? Grrr...\pHow did you know I concealed myself\nbeyond this window? You're sharp!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEntrance/te.Route110_TrickHouseEntrance_Text_Conceal: Hah? Grrr...\pHow did you know I concealed myself\nin this planter? You're sharp!
Hah? Grrr...\pHow did you know I concealed myself\nin this cupboard? You're sharp!
Hah? Grrr...\pHow did you know I concealed myself\nbehind this window? You're sharp!
Hah? Grrr...\pHow did you know I concealed myself\nbeneath this cushion? You're sharp!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEntrance/te.Route110_TrickHouseEntrance_Text_TheyCal: Behold!\pFor I am the greatest living mystery\nof a man in all of HOENN!\lThey call me...\pThe TRICK MASTER!\nWahahaha! Glad to meet you!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEntrance/te.Route110_TrickHouseEntrance_Text_ComeToC:
You, you've come to challenge my
TRICK HOUSE, haven't you?\pThat's why you're here, isn't it?
Yes, it is!\pConsider your challenge accepted!\pEnter through the scroll there,
and let your challenge commence!\pI shall be waiting in the back!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEntrance/te.Route110_TrickHouseEntrance_Text_GoInHol: There is a big hole behind the scroll!\pWant to go in?
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEntrance/te.Route110_TrickHouseEntrance_Text_Leaving: There is a note affixed to the scroll...\p“I am leaving on a journey.\nDon't look for me. TRICK MASTER”
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEntrance/te.Route110_TrickHouseEntrance_Text_NextTim: For the next time, I'll use this trick,\nand that scheme, and those ruses...\pMufufufu... If I may say so, it's\nbrilliantly difficult, even for me!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEntrance/te.Route110_TrickHouseEntrance_Text_InMidst:
Hah? What?!
Oh, it's you!\pI'm in the midst of devising new tricky
challenges!\pIt's not too much to ask for a bit more
time for me to think, is it now?\lYou wouldn't begrudge me that?\lCome back in a little while!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEntrance/te.Route110_TrickHouseEntrance_Text_YoureHe: Ah, it's you! You're here to accept the\nreward from before, isn't that right?\lYes, right I am!\pHere!\nI'll give it to you now!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEntrance/te.Route110_TrickHouseEntrance_Text_DidYouN: Hah?\nDid you not come to claim your reward?
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEntrance/te.Route110_TrickHouseEntrance_Text_Mechado: MECHADOLL 5 I AM!\nIF REWARD IS NOT TAKEN BY YOU,\lTHEN TRICK MASTER YOU CANNOT FOLLOW.
data/maps/Route110_TrickHouseEntrance/te.Route110_TrickHouseEntrance_Text_PCFullA: YOUR PC STATUS: FULL AGAIN.\nMEAN, YOU ARE.

data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle1/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle1_Text_SallyInt: I'll hack and slash my way to victory\nwith the CUT we just learned!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle1/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle1_Text_SallyPos: I never get tired of hacking\nand slashing!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle1/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle1_Text_EddieInt: I wandered into this weird house\nby accident...
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle1/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle1_Text_EddiePos: I lost my way, I lost a battle, and I'm\neven more lost... I can't get out...
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle1/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle1_Text_RobinInt: Just who is the TRICK MASTER?
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle1/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle1_Text_RobinDef: I lost while I was lost in thought!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle1/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle1_Text_WroteSec: {PLAYER} wrote down the secret code\non the door.\p“TRICK MASTER is smart.”\n... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...\pThe lock clicked open!

data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_TedDefea: After that battle, I'm even more\nconfused!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_TedPostB: Can I get you to push all the buttons\nfor me?
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_PaulIntr: Oh! You're on your second TRICK HOUSE\nchallenge!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_PaulPost: The TRICK MASTER rigged all the tricks\nin this house all by himself.
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_GeorgiaI: I want to make my own GYM one day.\nSo, I'm studying how to set traps.
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_GeorgiaP: You're strong, aren't you?\nMaybe even enough to be a GYM LEADER!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_WroteSec: {PLAYER} wrote down the secret code\non the door.\p“TRICK MASTER is coveted.”\n... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...\pThe lock clicked open!

data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_JustinIn: I keep coming back to this same place!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_JustinDe: I'm already having trouble, and then\nyou have to beat me? It's not fair!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_JustinPo: It's full of doors here!\nIt's too small and dark in here! Help!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_MarthaIn: I don't know what's going on here.\nI'm starting to feel sad...
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_MarthaPo: I know I'm weak!\nAnd, I have no sense of direction!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_AlanIntr: I don't get it. What would anyone want\nwith a house this bizarre?
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_AlanDefe: I don't get it.\nHow did I lose?
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_AlanPost: I don't get it.\nHow many traps are in this house?\pYou may be the one to solve that.
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_WroteSec: {PLAYER} wrote down the secret code\non the door.\p“TRICK MASTER is cool.”\n... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...\pThe lock clicked open!

data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle4/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle4_Text_CoraIntr: It's too much bother to think this out.\nI only wanted to battle!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle4/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle4_Text_CoraDefe: Even though I lost, I still like battling\nthe best!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle4/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle4_Text_CoraPost: Wouldn't you agree? You would go\nanywhere if TRAINERS were there.
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle4/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle4_Text_YujiIntr: Heh! Boulders like this, I can brush\naside with one finger!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle4/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle4_Text_YujiDefe: I can push boulders, but I can't solve\nthe puzzle...
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle4/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle4_Text_YujiPost: It's not good enough to be brawny...\nYou have to use your head. Be brainy!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle4/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle4_Text_JillIntr: The TRICK HOUSE is getting trickier,\nisn't it?
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle4/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle4_Text_JillPost: Has anyone made it to the end?
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle4/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle4_Text_WroteSec: {PLAYER} wrote down the secret code\non the door.\p“TRICK MASTER is a genius.”\n... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...\pThe lock clicked open!

data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle5/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle5_Text_Mechadol: CLICKETY-CLACK...\nMECHADOLL 1 AM I!\pIF YOU ANSWER QUIZZES CORRECTLY,\nTHEN YOU WILL GO TO MECHADOLL 5.\lTHEN YOU CAN OBTAIN THE SECRET CODE.
MECHADOLL 1 QUIZ.\pOne of these POKéMON is not found\non ROUTE 103. Which one is it?
MECHADOLL 1 QUIZ.\pOne of these POKéMON is not of the\nGRASS type. Which one is it?
MECHADOLL 1 QUIZ.\pOne of these POKéMON uses SCRATCH.\nWhich one is it?
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle5/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle5_Text_CorrectG: CONGRATULATIONS. CORRECT YOU ARE.\nGO THROUGH. PLEASE.
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle5/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle5_Text_WaitForN: YOUR NEXT CHALLENGE WE WAIT FOR.
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle5/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle5_Text_Mechadol: CLICKETY-CLACK...\nMECHADOLL 2 AM I!\pMECHADOLL 1'S QUIZ DIFFICULTY LEVEL\nIS SET TOO LOW.
MECHADOLL 2 QUIZ.\pIn PROF. BIRCH's bag, there were three\nPOKéMON. Which one was at the right?
MECHADOLL 2 QUIZ.\pWhich POKéMON was offered for a trade\nat the POKéMON TRAINER'S SCHOOL?
MECHADOLL 2 QUIZ.\pThe DEVON RESEARCHER was looking for\nwhat POKéMON in PETALBURG WOODS?
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle5/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle5_Text_CorrectG: CONGRATULATIONS. CORRECT YOU ARE.\nGO THROUGH. PLEASE.
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle5/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle5_Text_Mechadol: CLICKETY-CLACK...\nMECHADOLL 3 AM I!\pMATTERS OF MONEY ARE MY SOLE FOCUS.
MECHADOLL 3 QUIZ.\pWhich costs more?\nThree POKé BALLS or one SUPER POTION?
MECHADOLL 3 QUIZ.\pSell one ESCAPE ROPE and buy\none ANTIDOTE. How much money remains?
MECHADOLL 3 QUIZ.\pDo one FULL HEAL and GREAT BALL\ncost more than one REVIVE?
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle5/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle5_Text_CorrectG: CONGRATULATIONS. CORRECT YOU ARE.\nGO THROUGH. PLEASE.
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle5/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle5_Text_Mechadol: CLICKETY-CLACK...\nMECHADOLL 4 THAT IS ME!\pMY QUIZ IS AN OBJECT OF BEAUTY.
MECHADOLL 4 QUIZ.\pRUSTBORO GYM LEADER ROXANNE used a\nGEODUDE. Was it male or female?
MECHADOLL 4 QUIZ.\pIn DEWFORD HALL, were there more men\nor women?
MECHADOLL 4 QUIZ.\pThe first TRAINER in DEWFORD GYM was\nmale or female?
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle5/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle5_Text_CorrectG: CONGRATULATIONS. CORRECT YOU ARE.\nGO THROUGH. PLEASE.
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle5/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle5_Text_Mechadol: CLICKETY-CLACK...\nMECHADOLL 5 AM I!\pTHE MASTER'S BEST AND PROUDEST\nACHIEVEMENT AM I.
MECHADOLL 5 QUIZ.\pHow many BIKES does RYDEL have on\ndisplay outside his cycle shop?
MECHADOLL 5 QUIZ.\pHow many people give you BERRIES at the\nPRETTY PETAL flower shop?
MECHADOLL 5 QUIZ.\pHow many signs are there in\nLILYCOVE CITY?
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle5/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle5_Text_CorrectG: CONGRATULATIONS. CORRECT YOU ARE.\nGO THROUGH. PLEASE.
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle5/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle5_Text_WroteSec: {PLAYER} wrote down the secret code\non the door.\p“TRICK MASTER is my life.”\n... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...\pThe lock clicked open!

data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle6/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle6_Text_SophiaIn: When I heard there was a strange\nhouse, I had to check it out.
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle6/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle6_Text_SophiaPo: I'm sure having a good time checking\nthis place out.\pIt's a challenge I've found worth\nrepeating!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle6/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle6_Text_BennyInt: Maybe I could get my BIRD POKéMON\nto fly over the wall...
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle6/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle6_Text_BennyPos: Ehehehe... I guess I lost because I\nwas trying to cheat.
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle6/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle6_Text_Sebastia: I'm getting dizzy from these rotating\ndoors...
Everything's spinning around and\naround. I can't take this anymore...
You don't seem to be affected at all.\nOr do you have your poker face on?
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle6/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle6_Text_WroteSec: {PLAYER} wrote down the secret code\non the door.\p“TRICK MASTER is huggable.”\n... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...\pThe lock clicked open!

data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_JoshuaIn: The TRICK MASTER always vanishes\nlike smoke. How does he do it?
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_JoshuaDe: Aiyeeeh! You're much too strong!\nHow do you do it?
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_JoshuaPo: I wish I could appear and disappear as\nif I were smoke, too.
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_Patricia: Going around the same spot...\nIt begets ill fortune...
I've circled the same spot over ten\ntimes now... It's ill fortune...
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_AlexisIn: Whoever wins will get through here\nfirst. That's the feeling I get.
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_AlexisPo: You're solving all the puzzles in the\nTRICK HOUSE. That's the feeling I get.
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_WroteSec: {PLAYER} wrote down the secret code\non the door.\p“TRICK MASTER I love.”\n... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...\pThe lock clicked open!

data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle8/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle8_Text_VincentI: Not many TRAINERS have made it\nthis far.
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle8/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle8_Text_VincentD: That must mean you're tough, too...
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle8/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle8_Text_VincentP: You've beaten the POKéMON LEAGUE\nCHAMPION? That's too much!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle8/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle8_Text_ElaineIn: Consider yourself lucky to be\nbattling me!
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle8/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle8_Text_ElainePo: It's a miracle that you beat me.\nYou can brag about it.
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle8/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle8_Text_LeroyInt: You've been slugging through the TRICK\nHOUSE challenge, too.
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle8/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle8_Text_LeroyDef: I see...\nYou possess an extraordinary style.
data/maps/Route110_TrickHousePuzzle8/tex.Route110_TrickHousePuzzle8_Text_LeroyPos: Seeing someone like you should please\nthe TRICK MASTER.

data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16F705: Hello! I take it you're a traveler.\pHow's this? What do you say to taking\non our family of four in a series of\lPOKéMON battles?
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16F785: Is that so?\nDrop in, if you change your mind!
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16F7B3: That's the spirit! I like you!
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16F7D2: Aiyah!\nYou're a lot tougher than I expected!
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16F7FF: Hey, all!\nI've found a pretty strong TRAINER!
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16F82D: Oh, my goodness! Aren't you young?\pYou must be quite the TRAINER to beat\nmy husband, though.\pIt's my turn to battle now!
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16F8A6: Oh, gosh!\nI can't get over how strong you are!
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16F8D5: There's a strong TRAINER here!\nThis one's really strong!
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16F90E: You're stronger than Mommy? Wow!\pBut I'm strong, too!\nReally! Honestly!
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16F991: How dare you make my granddaughter\ncry!\pFor that, I'm going to smack you!\nPrepare to lose!
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16F9EC: Kwah! You are strong...\nMy granddaughter was right...
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16FA22: If you're not in any hurry, visit with\nus awhile.
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16FA54: You found the ROOT FOSSIL.\pIf this FOSSIL is taken, the other\none will sink into the sand...\pTake the ROOT FOSSIL anyway?
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16FAED: You found the CLAW FOSSIL.\pIf this FOSSIL is taken, the other\none will sink into the sand...\pTake the CLAW FOSSIL anyway?
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16FB86: If you don't raise your POKéMON some\nmore, it could be tough to keep winning\lup through the ranks.\pI've heard the POKéMON LEAGUE's\nELITE FOUR are far stronger than\lany GYM LEADER.
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16FC3A: I challenged the WINSTRATE family,\nbut four matches in a row is tough\lgoing... They destroyed me.
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16FCB6: “Our family's hearts beat as one!”\nTHE WINSTRATE'S HOUSE
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16FD1B: OLD LADY'S REST STOP\n“Come in and rest your tired bones.”
data/maps/Route111/text.inc.Route111_Text_16FD55: TRAINER TIPS\pOne of the indicators of a POKéMON's\npowerfulness is SP. ATK. It stands for\l“SPECIAL ATTACK.”\pLikewise, SP. DEF stands for “SPECIAL\nDEFENSE.”

data/maps/Route111_OldLadysRestStop/text.Route111_OldLadysRestStop_Text_1923AF: Oh, dear, dear.\nAren't your POKéMON exhausted?\pIf you'd like, rest up here.\nThat's a fine idea! You should do that.
data/maps/Route111_OldLadysRestStop/text.Route111_OldLadysRestStop_Text_192423: That's right.\nTake your time and rest up!
data/maps/Route111_OldLadysRestStop/text.Route111_OldLadysRestStop_Text_19244D: Oh, dear, dear.\nAre your POKéMON still tired?\pYou should take another rest here.\nThat's a fine idea. You should do that.
data/maps/Route111_OldLadysRestStop/text.Route111_OldLadysRestStop_Text_1924C6: Is that so?\nYou don't need to be shy about it.

data/maps/Route111_WinstrateFamilysHouse.Route111_WinstrateFamilysHouse_Text_191F:
You're the first TRAINER I've seen who
deploys POKéMON so masterfully.\pBut, I should tell you - my son is
stronger than you.\pHe even took the POKéMON LEAGUE
challenge, I'll have you know.
data/maps/Route111_WinstrateFamilysHouse.Route111_WinstrateFamilysHouse_Text_1920: We use this MACHO BRACE to more\neffectively strengthen our POKéMON\lin training.\pSince you've beaten our entire family,\nI don't know if you need it, but we\lwould like you to have our MACHO BRACE.
data/maps/Route111_WinstrateFamilysHouse.Route111_WinstrateFamilysHouse_Text_1921: When it comes to POKéMON battles,\nwe tend to be pretty passionate.
Mommy is stronger than Daddy.\pI'm stronger than Mommy.\pAnd Grandma's stronger than me!\pBut my big brother is even stronger\nthan Grandma.
data/maps/Route111_WinstrateFamilysHouse.Route111_WinstrateFamilysHouse_Text_1922:
There's no question that you're strong.\pBut if you were to battle my grandson,
you'd end up crying in frustration.\pHe's much stronger than any TRAINER
our family knows.\pHe must be challenging the POKéMON
LEAGUE CHAMPION by now.\pKnowing my grandson, he could be the
CHAMPION already!
data/maps/Route111_WinstrateFamilysHouse.Route111_WinstrateFamilysHouse_Text_1923: My grandson must be challenging the\nPOKéMON LEAGUE CHAMPION by now.\pKnowing my grandson, he could be the\nCHAMPION already!

data/maps/Route112/text.inc.Route112_Text_16FDF0: Grumble...\pWhat happened to the others who went\nto FALLARBOR? They're late...
data/maps/Route112/text.inc.Route112_Text_16FE3E: Grumble...\pI'd like to ride the CABLE CAR to the\ntop, too..
data/maps/Route112/text.inc.Route112_Text_16FE7A: Eh, I'd like to get to MAUVILLE, but if\nI went down these ledges, it'd be no\leasy matter to get back to LAVARIDGE.
data/maps/Route112/text.inc.Route112_Text_16FEED: MT. CHIMNEY CABLE CAR\n“A short walk {0x79} way!”
data/maps/Route112/text.inc.Route112_Text_16FF19: MT. CHIMNEY\p“For LAVARIDGE TOWN or the summit,\nplease take the CABLE CAR.”

data/maps/Route112_CableCarStation/text..Route112_CableCarStation_Text_1924F5: The CABLE CAR is ready to go up.\nWould you like to be on it?
data/maps/Route112_CableCarStation/text..Route112_CableCarStation_Text_192548: Please ride with us another time.

data/maps/Route113/text.inc.Route113_Text_16FF7F: Wahahaha! Today's technology is a\nwondrous thing!\pTake this volcanic ash here.\nIt can be fashioned into glass.
data/maps/Route113/text.inc.Route113_Text_16FFEE: It's fun walking through the volcano's\nashes on the ground and grass.\pYou can see where you walked - it's\nreally neat!
data/maps/Route113/text.inc.Route113_Text_170096: TRAINER TIPS\pYou may register one of the KEY ITEMS\nin your BAG as SELECT.\pSimply press SELECT to use the\nregistered item conveniently.
data/maps/Route113/text.inc.Route113_Text_17011D: GLASS WORKSHOP\n“Turning Volcanic Ash into Glass Items”

data/maps/Route113_GlassWorkshop/text.in.Route113_GlassWorkshop_Text_19E4E6: This area is covered in volcanic ash,\nhuff-puff!\pI'm specially gifted, huff-puff.\pI make glass out of volcanic ash\nand make items, huff-puff.\pGo collect ashes with this, huff-puff.
data/maps/Route113_GlassWorkshop/text.in.Route113_GlassWorkshop_Text_19E59B:
Just take that SOOT SACK and walk
through piles of ash, huff-puff.\pAnd it will fill up with the volcanic ash,
huff-puff.\pOnce you think you've collected a good
amount, come see me, huff-puff.
data/maps/Route113_GlassWorkshop/text.in.Route113_GlassWorkshop_Text_19E65B: Have you collected ashes, huff-puff?\nLet me see, huff-puff.
data/maps/Route113_GlassWorkshop/text.in.Route113_GlassWorkshop_Text_19E697: Hmmm...\nThere's not enough ash here, huff-puff.\lI can't make glass with this, huff-puff.\pLet's see... {STR_VAR_1} is the number of steps\nyou'll need to walk for me to make you\la BLUE FLUTE, huff-puff.
data/maps/Route113_GlassWorkshop/text.in.Route113_GlassWorkshop_Text_19E757: Oh!\nYou've got a lot of ashes, huff-puff!\pI'll make you a glass item, huff-puff!\nWhich one would you like, huff-puff?
data/maps/Route113_GlassWorkshop/text.in.Route113_GlassWorkshop_Text_19E7CD: A {STR_VAR_1}, huff-puff?\nIs that the one for you, huff-puff?
data/maps/Route113_GlassWorkshop/text.in.Route113_GlassWorkshop_Text_19E802: Which one would you like, huff-puff?
data/maps/Route113_GlassWorkshop/text.in.Route113_GlassWorkshop_Text_19E827: A {STR_VAR_1} it is, then, huff-puff!\pOkay! I'll make it for you, huff-puff.\nJust wait a little while, huff-puff.
data/maps/Route113_GlassWorkshop/text.in.Route113_GlassWorkshop_Text_19E890:
A {STR_VAR_1}, huff-puff?\pThere's not enough ash here to make
that, though, huff-puff.\pLet's see... {STR_VAR_2} is the number of steps
you'll need to walk through volcanic ash\lfor me to make that item, huff-puff.\pWhich item would you rather have me
make instead, huff-puff?
data/maps/Route113_GlassWorkshop/text.in.Route113_GlassWorkshop_Text_19E990: You've collected all that ash, but you\ndon't want anything, huff-puff?
data/maps/Route113_GlassWorkshop/text.in.Route113_GlassWorkshop_Text_19E9D7: Ah, I've finished your {STR_VAR_1}.\nTake it, huff-puff.
data/maps/Route113_GlassWorkshop/text.in.Route113_GlassWorkshop_Text_19EA06: Oh?\nYou've no room in your BAG, huff-puff.\pI'll hold on to it, so come back later,\nhuff-puff.
data/maps/Route113_GlassWorkshop/text.in.Route113_GlassWorkshop_Text_19EA64: Oh?\nYou've no room in your PC, huff-puff?\pI'll hold on to it, so come back later,\nhuff-puff.
data/maps/Route113_GlassWorkshop/text.in.Route113_GlassWorkshop_Text_19EAC1: Hah? You haven't got your SOOT SACK\nwith you, huff-puff.\pYou have to keep it with you to collect\nvolcanic ash, huff-puff.
data/maps/Route113_GlassWorkshop/text.in.Route113_GlassWorkshop_Text_19EB3B: It's fun to blow a glass flute while my\nboss is talking.\pHuff-huff! Puff-puff!

data/maps/Route114/text.inc.Route114_Text_170154: All my POKéMON does is ROAR...\nNo one dares to come near me...\pSigh... If you would, please take\nthis TM away...
data/maps/Route114/text.inc.Route114_Text_1701C5: TM05 contains ROAR.\nA ROAR sends POKéMON scurrying.

data/maps/Route114_FossilManiacsHouse/te.Route114_FossilManiacsHouse_Text_1925E1:
My big brother's the FOSSIL MANIAC...
He's a nice guy who loves fossils...\pHe loves digging holes, too...
He dug this hole by himself...\pYou can have this, so you can DIG
holes just like my big brother...
data/maps/Route114_FossilManiacsHouse/te.Route114_FossilManiacsHouse_Text_1926AE: If you make a POKéMON DIG inside a\ncave, you're returned to the entrance...
data/maps/Route114_FossilManiacsHouse/te.Route114_FossilManiacsHouse_Text_1926FA: Rocks in peculiar shapes fill the\ndisplay case
data/maps/Route114_FossilManiacsHouse/te.Route114_FossilManiacsHouse_Text_192729: THE COMPOSITION OF STRATA...\nHOW RAIN SHAPES THE LAND...\lSTONES, SOIL, AND ROCK...\pIt's crammed with books.

data/maps/Route114_FossilManiacsTunnel/t.Route114_FossilManiacsTunnel_Text_192795:
I'm the FOSSIL MANIAC...
I'm a nice guy who loves fossils...\pDo you want a fossil?\pBut the fossils around these parts all
belong to me... None for you...\pIf you can't go without a fossil, go to
the desert on ROUTE 111...\pFrom what I've heard, fossils that were
buried in the sand sometimes rise to\lthe surface from sandstorms...
data/maps/Route114_FossilManiacsTunnel/t.Route114_FossilManiacsTunnel_Text_1928DE:
You found a FOSSIL, didn't you?
That's so nice... It's so dreamy...\pWhat are you going to do with that
FOSSIL?\pFrom what I've heard, DEVON is doing
research on reviving POKéMON from\lFOSSILS...\pI love my FOSSILS, so I would never
do anything like that...
data/maps/Route114_FossilManiacsTunnel/t.Route114_FossilManiacsTunnel_Text_1929DC: FOSSILS are so... Wonderful...\nIt's so dreamy...

data/maps/Route114_LanettesHouse/text.in.Route114_LanettesHouse_Text_192A0D: LANETTE: Oh! {PLAYER}{KUN}!\pI'm sorry everything is so cluttered...\nWhen I get engrossed in research,\lthings end up this way...\pThis is embarrassing... Please keep\nthis a secret in exchange for this.
data/maps/Route114_LanettesHouse/text.in.Route114_LanettesHouse_Text_192ACC: May I offer advice about my POKéMON\nStorage System?\pYou should organize your BOXES so you\ncan tell which POKéMON are in them.
data/maps/Route114_LanettesHouse/text.in.Route114_LanettesHouse_Text_192B4A: It's LANETTE's research notes.\nThere's information about BOXES.\pDesign BOXES to hold 30 POKéMON each.\pEach TRAINER should be able to store\n420 POKéMON on the PC system.\pKeep reading?
data/maps/Route114_LanettesHouse/text.in.Route114_LanettesHouse_Text_192C01: A marking system should be added to\nmake POKéMON easier to organize.\pThe name and wallpaper design of each\nBOX will be made changeable to please\lthe stored POKéMON.\pKeep reading?
data/maps/Route114_LanettesHouse/text.in.Route114_LanettesHouse_Text_192CB4:
When storing a POKéMON, it should be
sent to the BOX inspected last.\pIf that BOX is full, the received
POKéMON is stored in the next BOX.\pIn other words, when a BOX is examined,
it is automatically selected as the BOX\lto which POKéMON are sent.
data/maps/Route114_LanettesHouse/text.in.Route114_LanettesHouse_Text_192DC1:
There's an e-mail from someone on
the PC.\p“... ... ... ... ... ... ...\p“Your Storage System offers more
convenience than mine.\p“It has a lot of user-friendly features
that make it fun and useful, too.\p“It makes me proud that I played
a part in its development.\p“Here's hoping that you'll continue
research in Storage Systems.\p“From BILL
... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...”

data/maps/Route115/text.inc.Route115_Text_170273: Exploring a cave isn't like walking\non a road.\pYou never know when wild POKéMON will\nappear. It's full of suspense.

data/maps/Route116/text.inc.Route116_Text_17032A: Ohhh, what am I to do?\pWe were on our walk, PEEKO and I, when\nwe were jumped by an odd thug...\pThe scoundrel made off with my\ndarling PEEKO!\pWrrrooooooaaaar! PEEKO!
data/maps/Route116/text.inc.Route116_Text_1703CF: Nnn... Roar!\pI want to dig that tunnel!
data/maps/Route116/text.inc.Route116_Text_1703F7:
Nnn... Roar!
What's going on?\pI was digging the tunnel without any
tools when some goon ordered me out!\pThat tunnel's filled with POKéMON
that react badly to loud noises.\lThey could cause an uproar.\pThat's why we stopped using heavy
equipment for tunneling...\pI'm worried that the goon will do
something stupid and startle the\lPOKéMON into an uproar.
data/maps/Route116/text.inc.Route116_Text_170556: Nnn... Roar!\pThat goofy goon hightailed it out of\nthe tunnel! I can go back to digging!
data/maps/Route116/text.inc.Route116_Text_1705AE:
Oh! It's you!\pYou're that person who not only helped
me in PETALBURG WOODS, but also got\lback my stolen package and then even\lgraciously delivered it to SLATEPORT!\pCAPT. STERN informed us that the
package arrived, too!\pI thank you very, very much!\pWhy, if I were a rain cloud, I would
shower you with gratitude and hail\lyou as a hero!\pFor you, the most wonderful TRAINER,
I bear good news!\pRecently, our company developed a new
kind of POKé BALL.\pAs a token of our appreciation, this
is our gift to our wonderful TRAINER!
data/maps/Route116/text.inc.Route116_Text_1707B8: Our new POKé BALL will be available\nat the POKéMON MART in RUSTBORO.\pPlease do try it out!\nThank you and bye-bye!
data/maps/Route116/text.inc.Route116_Text_17082A: Your BAG is jam-packed.\nI can't give you this REPEAT BALL.
data/maps/Route116/text.inc.Route116_Text_170865: As a token of our appreciation for\nyour delivering our package, I have a\lgift of a new kind of POKé BALL for our\lmost wonderful TRAINER!
data/maps/Route116/text.inc.Route116_Text_1708EE: I dropped my glasses...\nCan you help me find them?
data/maps/Route116/text.inc.Route116_Text_170921: Those glasses!\nMay I see them for a second?
data/maps/Route116/text.inc.Route116_Text_17094D: Hmm...\nThese are BLACKGLASSES.\lThey're not what I'm looking for...\pMaybe my glasses aren't around\nhere...
data/maps/Route116/text.inc.Route116_Text_1709B7: Hmm...\nI can't find my glasses anywhere...\lMaybe they're not around here...
data/maps/Route116/text.inc.Route116_Text_170A03: Hmm...\nThese are BLACKGLASSES.\lThey're not what I'm looking for...
data/maps/Route116/text.inc.Route116_Text_170A60: RUSTURF TUNNEL\n“Linking RUSTBORO and VERDANTURF\p“The tunnel project has been\ncanceled.”
data/maps/Route116/text.inc.Route116_Text_170ACE: TRAINER TIPS\pIf you want to stop a POKéMON from\nevolving, press the B Button while it\lis trying to evolve.\lThe startled POKéMON will stop.\pThis is called an evolution cancel.
data/maps/Route116/text.inc.Route116_Text_170B7D: TRAINER TIPS\pYour BAG has several POCKETS.\pItems you obtain are automatically\nplaced in the appropriate POCKETS.\pNo TRAINER can afford to be without\na BAG of their own.

data/maps/Route116_TunnelersRestHouse/te.Route116_TunnelersRestHouse_Text_192F33:
That RUSTURF TUNNEL there...\pAt first, we had a huge work crew boring
through rock with the latest machinery.\lBut, we had to stop.\pIt turns out that we would have had
a negative effect on wild POKéMON in\lthe area.\pSo, we've got nothing to do but loll
around here doing nothing.
data/maps/Route116_TunnelersRestHouse/te.Route116_TunnelersRestHouse_Text_193049: There's a man digging his way to\nVERDANTURF all by his lonesome.\lHe's desperate to get through.\pHe says that if he digs little by little\nwithout using machines, he won't\ldisturb POKéMON, and he'll avoid harming\lthe natural environment.
data/maps/Route116_TunnelersRestHouse/te.Route116_TunnelersRestHouse_Text_193135: To get to VERDANTURF without using\nthis TUNNEL, you'd have to cross the\lsea to DEWFORD, sail on to SLATEPORT,\lthen travel through MAUVILLE.
data/maps/Route116_TunnelersRestHouse/te.Route116_TunnelersRestHouse_Text_1931C1: Did you hear? The TUNNEL to VERDANTURF\nhas gone through!\pSometimes, if you hope strongly enough,\ndreams do come true.

data/maps/Route117/text.inc.Route117_Text_170C26: I left my POKéMON at the DAY CARE.\pWhen I got it back, it had a new move\nthat I didn't teach it.\lI was really, really surprised.
data/maps/Route117/text.inc.Route117_Text_170CA7: What do you think?\nAren't these flowers pretty?\pI planted them all!
data/maps/Route117/text.inc.Route117_Text_170D38: POKéMON DAY CARE\n“Let us raise your POKéMON.”

data/maps/Route118/text.inc.Route118_Text_170D66:
STEVEN: Hi!\pYou're that TRAINER I met in DEWFORD!\p... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...
... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...\pOh, okay, you're {PLAYER}{KUN}.
I'll remember it.\p{PLAYER}{KUN}.\pIn this vast world, there are many
kinds of POKéMON.\lThey come in many types.\pDo you raise different types?
Or do you raise only POKéMON of a\lcertain type?\pWhat do you think as a TRAINER?\pSorry, it's not my place to ask, is it?\pWell, anyway, I hope to see you
again.
data/maps/Route118/text.inc.Route118_Text_170F12: Hmm!\nA GOOD ROD is really good!\pWouldn't you agree?
data/maps/Route118/text.inc.Route118_Text_170F46: Hmm!\nWe're of identical minds!\pHmm!\nTake this GOOD ROD!
data/maps/Route118/text.inc.Route118_Text_170F7E: Wherever there's water, try your luck\nat fishing.
data/maps/Route118/text.inc.Route118_Text_170FC8: Try catching all sorts of POKéMON\nwith your GOOD ROD.
data/maps/Route118/text.inc.Route118_Text_170FFE: Even if there isn't a boat, you can\ncross rivers and the sea if you have\la POKéMON that knows SURF.\pPOKéMON can be counted on to do so\nmuch!

data/maps/Route119/text.inc.Route119_Text_1710BB:
MAY: {PLAYER}{KUN}!
Where were you? I was looking for you!\pHow much stronger have you gotten?
Let me check for you!\pReady with your POKéMON?
Of course you are! Go!
data/maps/Route119/text.inc.Route119_Text_171156: Achah!\n{PLAYER}{KUN}, you're strong!\pI was worried that you might be\nstruggling with your training.
data/maps/Route119/text.inc.Route119_Text_1711B1: MAY: But I had absolutely nothing to\nworry about! Keep it up!\pAnd, here! I have a present for you.
data/maps/Route119/text.inc.Route119_Text_171214:
MAY: Use FLY, and your POKéMON will
instantly carry you to any town you've\lalready visited.\pBut, to use FLY, you have to get the
GYM BADGE from FORTREE CITY.\lThat's important, so don't forget.\pYou should FLY home and visit
LITTLEROOT for a change.\pI bet your mom's worried about you,
{PLAYER}{KUN}.\pWell, let's meet again somewhere!
data/maps/Route119/text.inc.Route119_Text_171358:
BRENDAN: {PLAYER}! So this is where
you've been looking for POKéMON?\pLet me see how good you got.
I'll test you!\pNow!
It's a battle, so battle!
data/maps/Route119/text.inc.Route119_Text_17140B: BRENDAN: I'd say you're good enough\nto search for POKéMON anywhere.\pHere, I'll give you this.\nTry it out.
data/maps/Route119/text.inc.Route119_Text_171475: BRENDAN: Use FLY, and your POKéMON\ninstantly carries you to any town\lyou've already visited.\pBut you need the FORTREE GYM BADGE \nto do that.\pAnyway, I have to move along.
data/maps/Route119/text.inc.Route119_Text_171520: We're standing lookout here.\pHey, you! Stay away from the WEATHER\nINSTITUTE. It's not safe.
data/maps/Route119/text.inc.Route119_Text_17157C: Lookout duty is surprisingly boring.\pHey, you! Please don't go near the\nWEATHER INSTITUTE.
data/maps/Route119/text.inc.Route119_Text_1715D7:
I thought you FLY by catching a whole
flock of BIRD POKéMON, and then\lhanging on to them somehow.\pBut it turns out there's an HM move
called FLY!\pI wish I'd known about that a long
time ago...
data/maps/Route119/text.inc.Route119_Text_171698: Tch... It's a no-go...\pThe tall grass snares BIKE tires.\nThere's no way you can cycle here.
data/maps/Route119/text.inc.Route119_Text_1716F4: Can your POKéMON use its SECRET POWER\non a big pile of grass and make a\lSECRET BASE?
data/maps/Route119/text.inc.Route119_Text_171774: TRAINER TIPS\pUp to sixteen decorations and\nfurniture items can be placed in\la SECRET BASE.\pPick your favorite items and create\nyour very own SECRET BASE exactly the\lway you want.

data/maps/Route119_House/text.inc.Route119_House_Text_19F371: I heard about a cave called the CAVE\nOF ORIGIN.\pPeople rumor that the spirits of\nPOKéMON are revived there.\lCould something like that really happen?

data/maps/Route119_WeatherInstitute_1F/t.Route119_WeatherInstitute_1F_Text_19EB8A: The BOSS got interested in the\nresearch they have going here, so he\lsent us out.\pYou quit meddling!
data/maps/Route119_WeatherInstitute_1F/t.Route119_WeatherInstitute_1F_Text_19EC0E: Our BOSS knows everything.\pBut I'm just a GRUNT. What would I know\nabout what he's thinking?
data/maps/Route119_WeatherInstitute_1F/t.Route119_WeatherInstitute_1F_Text_19EC97: Oh, no...\nI'll catch an earful for losing to a kid...\pI should just take a nap in the bed...
data/maps/Route119_WeatherInstitute_1F/t.Route119_WeatherInstitute_1F_Text_19ECF4: While I was sleeping, everyone went\nupstairs!
data/maps/Route119_WeatherInstitute_1F/t.Route119_WeatherInstitute_1F_Text_19ED22: Wow, you're really strong!\pI wish I could be a POKéMON TRAINER\nlike you!
data/maps/Route119_WeatherInstitute_1F/t.Route119_WeatherInstitute_1F_Text_19ED6B:
The PROFESSOR loves rain.
That's a fact.\pBut if it keeps raining, people will be in
trouble. That's another fact.\pAnd thus, the PROFESSOR is studying
if the rain can be put to good use.
data/maps/Route119_WeatherInstitute_1F/t.Route119_WeatherInstitute_1F_Text_19EE25: Hello!\nWe've been saved by your actions!\pWhat I don't understand is what on\nearth the {EVIL_TEAM}S were up to.
data/maps/Route119_WeatherInstitute_1F/t.Route119_WeatherInstitute_1F_Text_19EE8B: There's a bed...\nLet's take a rest.

data/maps/Route119_WeatherInstitute_2F/t.Route119_WeatherInstitute_2F_Text_19EEAF: The INSTITUTE created a type of\nPOKéMON that has something to do with\lthe weather. We're here to take them!
data/maps/Route119_WeatherInstitute_2F/t.Route119_WeatherInstitute_2F_Text_19EF1B: Our plan's being spoiled by a kid?
data/maps/Route119_WeatherInstitute_2F/t.Route119_WeatherInstitute_2F_Text_19EF3E: If the POKéMON they made here can\ncontrol the weather freely, then we of\lTEAM {EVIL_TEAM} definitely need it!
data/maps/Route119_WeatherInstitute_2F/t.Route119_WeatherInstitute_2F_Text_19EFA3: We're TEAM {EVIL_TEAM}!\nWe appear wherever anything rare is\lfound!
data/maps/Route119_WeatherInstitute_2F/t.Route119_WeatherInstitute_2F_Text_19EFE9: You don't have any idea what we of\nTEAM {EVIL_TEAM} are working towards!\lYou stay out of our way!
data/maps/Route119_WeatherInstitute_2F/t.Route119_WeatherInstitute_2F_Text_19F042:
Ahahahaha!\pYou're going to meddle in TEAM {EVIL_TEAM}'s
affairs?\pYou're either absolutely fearless,
simply ignorant, or both!\pYou're so cute, you're disgusting!
I'll put you down, kiddy!
data/maps/Route119_WeatherInstitute_2F/t.Route119_WeatherInstitute_2F_Text_19F11B:
Ahahahaha!
We got meddled with unexpectedly!\pWe're out of options.
We'll have to pull out.\pBut this isn't the last you'll see of
TEAM {EVIL_TEAM}! We have other plans!\lDon't you forget it!
data/maps/Route119_WeatherInstitute_2F/t.Route119_WeatherInstitute_2F_Text_19F1CF: Thanks!\nThanks to you, we're safe!\pIt might be an odd way of thanking you,\nbut take this POKéMON.
data/maps/Route119_WeatherInstitute_2F/t.Route119_WeatherInstitute_2F_Text_19F231: Hm? You don't seem to have any room\nfor this POKéMON.
data/maps/Route119_WeatherInstitute_2F/t.Route119_WeatherInstitute_2F_Text_19F27D: That POKéMON changes shape according\nto the weather conditions.\pThere're plenty of them in the\nINSTITUTE - go ahead and take it.
data/maps/Route119_WeatherInstitute_2F/t.Route119_WeatherInstitute_2F_Text_19F2FE: I've been researching rain for many\nyears, but it's ridiculous to think that\lhumans can freely change the weather.

data/maps/Route120/text.inc.Route120_Text_171827:
STEVEN: Hm? {PLAYER}{KUN}, hi.
It's been a while.\pThere's something here that you can't
see, right?\pNow, if I were to use this device on
the invisible obstacle...\pNo, no. Rather than describing it,
I should just show you.\lThat would be more fun.\p{PLAYER}{KUN}, are your POKéMON ready for
battle?
data/maps/Route120/text.inc.Route120_Text_17193D: STEVEN: No?\pI'll wait here, so you can get ready.
data/maps/Route120/text.inc.Route120_Text_17196F: STEVEN: {PLAYER}{KUN}, are your POKéMON\nready for battle?
data/maps/Route120/text.inc.Route120_Text_1719A0: STEVEN: {PLAYER}{KUN}, show me your true\npower as a TRAINER!
data/maps/Route120/text.inc.Route120_Text_1719D4: STEVEN used the DEVON SCOPE.\pAn invisible POKéMON became completely\nvisible!\pThe startled POKéMON attacked!
data/maps/Route120/text.inc.Route120_Text_171A40:
STEVEN: I see...
Your battle style is intriguing.\pYour POKéMON have obviously grown
since I first met you in DEWFORD.\pI'd like you to have this
DEVON SCOPE.\pWho knows, there may be other
concealed POKéMON.
data/maps/Route120/text.inc.Route120_Text_171B0E: STEVEN: {PLAYER}{KUN}.\pI enjoy seeing POKéMON and TRAINERS\nwho strive together.\pI think you're doing great.\pWell, let's meet again somewhere.
data/maps/Route120/text.inc.Text_SomethingUnseeable: Something unseeable is in the way.
data/maps/Route120/text.inc.Text_WantToUseDevonScope: Something unseeable is in the way.\pWant to use the DEVON SCOPE?
data/maps/Route120/text.inc.Text_UseDevonScopeMonAttacked: {PLAYER} used the DEVON SCOPE.\pAn invisible POKéMON became completely\nvisible!\pThe startled POKéMON attacked!

data/maps/Route121/text.inc.Route121_Text_171C8F: Okay!\nWe're to move out to MT. PYRE!
data/maps/Route121/text.inc.Route121_Text_171CB4: Ahead looms MT. PYRE...\pIt is a natural monument to the spirits \nof departed POKéMON...
data/maps/Route121/text.inc.Route121_Text_171D0C: MT. PYRE PIER\p...The sign is old and worn out.\nThe words are barely legible...

data/maps/Route123/text.inc.Route123_Text_171D83: I love GRASS-type POKéMON!\pDo you have any GRASS-type POKéMON?
data/maps/Route123/text.inc.Route123_Text_171DC2: Oh?\pYou like GRASS-type POKéMON, too,\ndon't you?\pI'm so happy, you can have this!\nIt's a token of our friendship.
data/maps/Route123/text.inc.Route123_Text_171E34: I check trees with my GRASS-type\nPOKéMON. I'm like a tree doctor.
data/maps/Route123/text.inc.Route123_Text_171E8E: {0x79} MT. PYRE\n“Forbidden to the faint of heart.”

data/maps/Route124_DivingTreasureHunters.Route124_DivingTreasureHuntersHouse_Text: I'm the DIVING TREASURE HUNTER!\pI'm the awesome dude who makes\ndeep-sea dives to gather treasures\lresting at the bottom.
Tell me, have you seen any SHARDS of\ntools made in ancient times?
You haven't got any treasures\nfor me...\pIf you see any SHARDS, like the RED\nSHARD, you've got to trade it with me!
Oh, hey! That...\nThat's a SHARD! I'm looking for those!\pOh, man, you've got to trade that\nwith me! I'll give you something good!
What do you want to trade?
It's a done deal!\nUse that wisely!
Do you want to trade something else?
Whoops, your BAG's full.\nGet rid of some items, friend!
No? That's a downer.\nWell, if you change your mind, come back.

Wanted item              Trade item
 RED SHARD           {0x7B}{0x7C} FIRE STONE\pWanted item              Trade item
 YELLOW SHARD     {0x7B}{0x7C} THUNDERSTONE\pWanted item              Trade item
 BLUE SHARD         {0x7B}{0x7C} WATER STONE\pWanted item              Trade item
 GREEN SHARD       {0x7B}{0x7C} LEAF STONE

data/maps/Route128/text.inc.Route128_Text_171EE0: {EVIL_LEADER}: What happened...\nWhat is this wretched scene...\pDid I...make a horrible mistake?
data/maps/Route128/text.inc.Route128_Text_171F4B:
{GOOD_LEADER}: Do you understand now,
{EVIL_LEADER}?\pDo you finally see how disastrous
your dream turned out to be?\pWe have to hurry! We have to do
something before the situation goes\lcompletely out of control!
data/maps/Route128/text.inc.Route128_Text_172008:
{GOOD_LEADER}: {PLAYER}{KUN}...\pWe, TEAM {GOOD_TEAM}, had been pursuing TEAM
{EVIL_TEAM} to prevent this from happening.\pYou've been very helpful, but I fear
the worst has happened...\pIt's gone too far for a child like you
to manage...\pLeave things to us, and get out of
here while you still can!
data/maps/Route128/text.inc.Route128_Text_17210B: {GOOD_LEADER}: This defies belief...\pA super-ancient POKéMON...\pIts power is unbelievable.\nIt has upset the balance of nature...
data/maps/Route128/text.inc.Route128_Text_1721A2:
This is terrible...\pIf this doesn't stop, all HOENN...
No, the whole world will drown.\pThis huge rain cloud is spreading
from above SOOTOPOLIS?\pWhat in the world is taking place there?\pThere's no point arguing here...
SOOTOPOLIS should provide answers...
data/maps/Route128/text.inc.Route128_Text_1722A1:
This is terrible...\pIf this doesn't stop, all of HOENN...
No, the whole world will be parched.\pThe cause of this calamity, the blazing
sun, is in the sky above SOOTOPOLIS...\pWhat in the world is taking place there?\pThere's no point arguing here...
SOOTOPOLIS should provide answers...
data/maps/Route128/text.inc.Route128_Text_1723BE: {PLAYER}{KUN}...\nI don't know what you intend to do,\lbut don't do anything reckless.\pOkay.\nI'm going to SOOTOPOLIS.

data/maps/RustboroCity/text.inc.RustboroCity_Text_WeShortenItToDevon: The DEVON CORPORATION...\nWe all just shorten it to DEVON.\pThat company makes all sorts of\nconvenient products.
data/maps/RustboroCity/text.inc.RustboroCity_Text_SneakyLookingManWentAr: Hm? A sneaky-looking man?\pCome to think of it, yes, a shady-\nlooking guy went around the corner.
data/maps/RustboroCity/text.inc.RustboroCity_Text_HaveYouChallengedGym: Have you taken the POKéMON GYM\nchallenge?\pWhen you get that shiny GYM BADGE\nin hand, I guess TRAINERS begin to\lrealize what is required of them.
data/maps/RustboroCity/text.inc.RustboroCity_Text_HeyThatsRustborosGymBa: Hey, that's RUSTBORO's GYM BADGE!\pOut of all the POKéMON GYM BADGES,\nRUSTBORO's is the coolest, I'd say.
data/maps/RustboroCity/text.inc.RustboroCity_Text_YoureNewAroundHere: Oh? Who might you be?\nYou're a new face around these parts.\pHave you just transferred into the\nPOKéMON TRAINER'S SCHOOL?
data/maps/RustboroCity/text.inc.RustboroCity_Text_GymLeaderIsntEasyWithF: I challenged the GYM LEADER, but...\pIt's not going to be easy winning with\nmy FIRE-type POKéMON...\pFIRE-type POKéMON don't match up\nwell against ROCK-type POKéMON...
data/maps/RustboroCity/text.inc.RustboroCity_Text_MrBrineyWalksInTheTunn: The old sailor MR. BRINEY lives in a\ncottage by the sea.\pHe goes for walks in the tunnel every\nso often.
data/maps/RustboroCity/text.inc.RustboroCity_Text_MrBrineyLovesPeeko:
The old sailor MR. BRINEY lives in a
cottage by the sea.\pHe said he was going shopping in
SLATEPORT for his pet, PEEKO.\pThat old seadog, he must really love
that PEEKO.
data/maps/RustboroCity/text.inc.RustboroCity_Text_WowYouHavePokemon: Wow, you have POKéMON with you, too.\pWhen I get bigger, I'm going to go\nplaces with POKéMON, too.
data/maps/RustboroCity/text.inc.RustboroCity_Text_CatchRarePokemonIfIGoT: POKéMON TRAINER'S SCHOOL!\pIf I go to this school, will I be able\nto catch rare POKéMON easily?
data/maps/RustboroCity/text.inc.RustboroCity_Text_PokemonCanChangeLookFr: If a POKéMON gains experience in\nbattles, it can sometimes change in\lthe way it looks.
data/maps/RustboroCity/text.inc.RustboroCity_Text_PokemonChangeShape: A POKéMON changes shape?\nIf one did that, I would be shocked!
data/maps/RustboroCity/text.inc.RustboroCity_Text_TradePokemonGrowFast: A POKéMON you get in a trade from\nsomeone grows fast.\pBut if you don't have certain GYM\nBADGES, it may not obey you...
data/maps/RustboroCity/text.inc.RustboroCity_Text_OutOfTheWay: Get out! Out of the way!
data/maps/RustboroCity/text.inc.RustboroCity_Text_HelpMeIWasRobbed:
Oh, it's you!\pYou're that fantastic TRAINER who
helped me in PETALBURG WOODS!\pHelp me! I was robbed by TEAM {EVIL_TEAM}!
I have to get the DEVON GOODS back!\pIf I don't...
I'm going to be in serious trouble.
data/maps/RustboroCity/text.inc.RustboroCity_Text_ShadyCharacterTookOffT: That shady character, I think he took\noff towards the tunnel over there.
data/maps/RustboroCity/text.inc.RustboroCity_Text_YouGotItThankYou:
Oh! How did it go?
The DEVON GOODS?\pYou did!
You got them back!\pYou really are a great TRAINER!\pI know! As my thanks, I'll give you
another GREAT BALL!
data/maps/RustboroCity/text.inc.RustboroCity_Text_YoureLoadedWithItems: Your BAG's full.\nI can't give you this GREAT BALL.
data/maps/RustboroCity/text.inc.RustboroCity_Text_PleaseComeWithMe: Excuse me, please!\nPlease come with me!
data/maps/RustboroCity/text.inc.RustboroCity_Text_MayHiHowsPokedexComing: MAY: Oh, hi, {PLAYER}{KUN}!\nHow's your POKéDEX coming along?\pMine's looking pretty decent.\pI caught POKéMON in PETALBURG WOODS\nuntil I ran out of POKé BALLS.
data/maps/RustboroCity/text.inc.RustboroCity_Text_MayMrBrineyHint:
MAY: Oh, by the way, I passed MR. BRINEY
in PETALBURG WOODS.\pI guess he's on his way home to his
cottage by the sea.\p{PLAYER}{KUN}, you just moved here so you
might not know this, but MR. BRINEY\lwas once a revered seafarer.
data/maps/RustboroCity/text.inc.RustboroCity_Text_BrendanHiHowsPokedexCo: BRENDAN: {PLAYER}, how's your POKéDEX?\nHave you filled in any pages yet?\pMine rules.\pI went on a POKéMON-catching frenzy\nin PETALBURG WOODS until I ran out\lof POKé BALLS.
data/maps/RustboroCity/text.inc.RustboroCity_Text_BrendanMrBrineyHint:
BRENDAN: By the way, I walked by MR.
BRINEY in PETALBURG WOODS.\pI bet he was on his way home to his
cottage by the sea.\pI bet you didn't know this, but he's
always got a POKéMON with him.
data/maps/RustboroCity/text.inc.RustboroCity_Text_TunnelNearingCompletio: “Timesaving tunnel nearing\ncompletion!”\p...Is what it says on the sign, but\nthere's also a big “X” splashed\lacross it in red paint...
data/maps/RustboroCity/text.inc.RustboroCity_Text_DevonCorpSign: DEVON CORPORATION\p“For all your living needs, we make\nit all.”
data/maps/RustboroCity/text.inc.RustboroCity_Text_GymSign: RUSTBORO CITY POKéMON GYM\nLEADER: ROXANNE\p“The ROCK-loving honors student!”
data/maps/RustboroCity/text.inc.RustboroCity_Text_DevonCorpBranchOfficeS: DEVON CORP. BRANCH OFFICE\p“Access limited to DEVON employees\nand authorized personnel.”
data/maps/RustboroCity/text.inc.RustboroCity_Text_CitySign: RUSTBORO CITY\p“The city probing the integration of\nnature and science.”
data/maps/RustboroCity/text.inc.RustboroCity_Text_TrainersSchoolSign: POKéMON TRAINER'S SCHOOL\p“We'll teach you anything about\nPOKéMON!”

data/maps/RustboroCity_CuttersHouse/text.RustboroCity_CuttersHouse_Text_YouCanPut:
That determined expression...
That limber way you move...\lAnd your well-trained POKéMON...\pYou're obviously a skilled TRAINER!\pNo, wait, don't say a word.
I can tell just by looking at you.\pI'm sure that you will be capable
of putting this HM to good use.\pNo need to be modest or shy.
Go on, take it!
data/maps/RustboroCity_CuttersHouse/text.RustboroCity_CuttersHouse_Text_ExplainCu:
That HM, it's CUT.\pAn HM move is one that can be used
by POKéMON out of a battle.\pAny POKéMON that's learned CUT can
chop down thin trees if the TRAINER\lhas earned the STONE BADGE.\pAnd, unlike a TM, an HM doesn't break
after one use.
data/maps/RustboroCity_CuttersHouse/text.RustboroCity_CuttersHouse_Text_DadHelped: When they were expanding the city of\nRUSTBORO, my dad helped out.\pHe made his POKéMON use CUT to clear\nthe land of trees.

data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F_Text_WelcomeTo: Hello and welcome to the DEVON\nCORPORATION.\pWe're proud producers of items and\nmedicine that enhance your life.
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F_Text_StaffGotR: One of our research staff stupidly\ngot robbed of an important parcel.
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F_Text_ThoseShoe: Hey, those RUNNING SHOES!\nThey're one of our products!\pIt makes me happy when I see someone\nusing something we made.
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F_Text_RobberWas: That stolen parcel...\pWell, sure it's important, but it's not\nanything that anyone can use.\pIn my estimation, that robber must not\nhave been very bright.
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F_Text_SoundsLik: It sounds like they've recovered\nthe ripped-off DEVON GOODS.
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F_Text_OnlyAutho: I'm sorry, only authorized people\nare allowed to enter here.
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F_Text_HowCouldW: It's beyond stupid.\nHow could we get robbed?

data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_2F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_2F_Text_DeviceFor: We're developing a device for talking\nwith POKéMON.\pBut we haven't had much success...
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_2F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_2F_Text_Developin: I'm developing new kinds of\nPOKé BALLS...\pBut I haven't made much headway...
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_2F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_2F_Text_WeFinally:
We finally made new kinds of POKé BALLS!\pThe REPEAT BALL makes it easier to
catch POKéMON you'd caught before.\pThe TIMER BALL gets better at catching
POKéMON the longer a battle runs.\pBoth are proudly developed by the
DEVON CORPORATION.\pPlease give them a try!
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_2F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_2F_Text_IMadePoke: I made the POKéNAV!\pAs an engineer, I feel blessed to have\nmade something so great!
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_2F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_2F_Text_WowThatsA:
Oh, wow!
That's a POKéNAV!\pIt came about as a result of our
PRESIDENT's desire to learn about\lthe feelings of POKéMON.\pWould you like me to describe its
features in detail?\pNo, no. I think you'll find out just by
trying the POKéNAV out.
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_2F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_2F_Text_DeviceToV: I'm trying to develop a device that\nvisually reproduces the dreams of\lPOKéMON...\pBut it's not going well.
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_2F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_2F_Text_DevelopDe: I've been trying to develop a device\nthat resurrects POKéMON from fossils...\pAnd, it's working!
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_2F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_2F_Text_WantToBri:
Wait! That thing you have there...
Is that a POKéMON fossil?\pWould you like to bring that POKéMON
back to life?\pI can with my newly developed
FOSSIL REGENERATOR.
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_2F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_2F_Text_OhIsThatS: Oh, is that so?\pDEVON's technological expertise\nis outstanding, I tell you.
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_2F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_2F_Text_HandedFos: Excellent!\nLet's do this right away.\p{PLAYER} handed the {STR_VAR_1} to\nthe DEVON RESEARCHER.
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_2F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_2F_Text_FossilReg:
The FOSSIL REGENERATOR, which I made,
is incredible.\pBut it has one drawback - it takes
a long time to work.\pSo, uh... How about you go for a stroll
and look around for a while?
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_2F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_2F_Text_Fossilize: Thanks for waiting!\pYour fossilized POKéMON has been\nbrought back to life!\pThe fossil was an ancient POKéMON.\n{STR_VAR_2}, it was!
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_2F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_2F_Text_TooManyPo: Uh-oh, you've got too many POKéMON.\nYou have no room for this one.

data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_3F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_3F_Text_MrStoneIH:
I'm MR. STONE, the PRESIDENT of
the DEVON CORPORATION.\pI'd just got word about you!\pYou saved our staff not just once,
but twice!\pI have a favor to ask of an amazing
person like you.\pI understand that you're delivering
a package to SLATEPORT's SHIPYARD.\pWell, on the way, could you stop off in
DEWFORD TOWN?\pI was hoping that you'd deliver a LETTER
to STEVEN in DEWFORD.
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_3F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_3F_Text_MrStoneWa: MR. STONE: Now, you should know that\nI am a great PRESIDENT.\pSo, I'd never be so cheap as to ask\na favor for nothing in return.\pThat's why I want you to have this!
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_3F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_3F_Text_MrStoneEx:
MR. STONE: That device...\pIt's a POKéMON NAVIGATOR, or POKéNAV
for short.\pIt's an indispensable tool for any
TRAINER on an adventure.\pIt has a map of the HOENN region.\pYou can check the locations of
DEWFORD and SLATEPORT easily!
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_3F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_3F_Text_CountingO: MR. STONE: I'm counting on you!
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_3F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_3F_Text_ThankYouF: MR. STONE: You delivered my LETTER?\nThank you kindly!\pThis is my way of thanking you.\nIt should help you, a TRAINER.
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_3F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_3F_Text_ExplainEx:
MR. STONE: A POKéMON holding that
EXP. SHARE will be given some of the\lEXP Points from battle.\pIt will get EXP Points even if it didn't
actually battle.\pI would say EXP. SHARE is quite useful
for raising weak POKéMON.
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_3F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_3F_Text_NotFamili:
MR. STONE: Since my youth, I've immersed
myself in work.\pConsequently, I'm not familiar with
trends and that sort of thing.\pBut do young people all want to be
TRAINERS in the POKéMON LEAGUE?
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_3F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_3F_Text_ThisIs3rd:
This is the DEVON CORPORATION's
third floor.\pOur PRESIDENT's OFFICE is on this floor.\pAnyway, I can't tell you how much I'm
grateful for what you've done.\pUm... By the way, that parcel you got
back for us...\pCould I get you to deliver that to the
SHIPYARD in SLATEPORT?\pIt would be awful if those robbers
tried to take it again.\pUh... Hehehe, so, uh, could I count
on you to do that for me?\pOh, that's right.
Could you wait here a second?
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_3F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_3F_Text_WordWithP: Our PRESIDENT would like to have\na word with you.\pPlease come with me.
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_3F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_3F_Text_VisitCapt: If you visit the SHIPYARD in SLATEPORT,\nyou should go see CAPT. STERN.
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_3F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_3F_Text_RepeatAnd: DEVON's new products, the REPEAT BALL\nand TIMER BALL, have become hugely\lpopular among TRAINERS.
data/maps/RustboroCity_DevonCorp_3F/text.RustboroCity_DevonCorp_3F_Text_RareRocks: It's a collection of rare rocks and\nstones assembled by the PRESIDENT.

data/maps/RustboroCity_Flat1_1F/text.inc.RustboroCity_Flat1_1F_Text_EveryPokemonH: Every POKéMON has a special ability\nthat it can use.

data/maps/RustboroCity_Flat1_2F/text.inc.RustboroCity_Flat1_2F_Text_ComingUpWithM:
Oh, it's so hard every day...\pWhat's hard?
You need to ask?\pIt's trying to figure out what to
make for meals every day.\pIt really isn't easy coming up with
meals every day.

data/maps/RustboroCity_Flat2_1F/text.inc.RustboroCity_Flat2_1F_Text_DevonWorkersL: DEVON CORPORATION's workers live in\nthis building.

data/maps/RustboroCity_Flat2_2F/text.inc.RustboroCity_Flat2_2F_Text_DevonWasTinyI: Way back in the old days, DEVON was just\na teeny, tiny company.
data/maps/RustboroCity_Flat2_2F/text.inc.RustboroCity_Flat2_2F_Text_MyDaddyMadeTh: My daddy's working at the CORPORATION.\pMy daddy made this!\nBut I can't use it, so you can have it.
data/maps/RustboroCity_Flat2_2F/text.inc.RustboroCity_Flat2_2F_Text_GoingToWorkAt: My daddy's working at the CORPORATION.\pWhen I grow up, I'm going to work for\nDEVON, too.

data/maps/RustboroCity_Flat2_3F/text.inc.RustboroCity_Flat2_3F_Text_PresidentColl: DEVON's PRESIDENT likes to collect\nrare stones.
data/maps/RustboroCity_Flat2_3F/text.inc.RustboroCity_Flat2_3F_Text_PresidentsSon: I think the PRESIDENT's son also\ncollects rare stones.

data/maps/RustboroCity_Gym/text.inc.RustboroCity_Gym_Text_GymGuideAdvice:
Yo, how's it going?\pListen, my friend!
Would you like to become the CHAMPION?\pI'm no TRAINER, not me, but I can
sure give you winning advice.\pThat's settled, then! We'll aim for the
POKéMON CHAMPIONSHIP together!\pIt's your job as a TRAINER to collect
GYM BADGES, am I right?\pBut GYM LEADERS aren't pushovers!\pAnd that's where I come in!
I'm here to provide expert advice!\pROXANNE, the GYM LEADER, is a user
of ROCK-type POKéMON.\pThe ROCK type is very durable, but
it can't stand WATER-type and\lGRASS-type moves.\pCome see me afterwards, if you beat
the GYM LEADER.\pWell, go for it!
data/maps/RustboroCity_Gym/text.inc.RustboroCity_Gym_Text_GymGuidePostVictor:
Whoa! What a breathtaking victory!
My cheering must've worked!\pGreat!
Check your TRAINER CARD.\pThe STONE BADGE you got should be
properly recorded on it.\pIn other words...\pYou've climbed the first step on
the stairs to the CHAMPIONSHIP!\pThat's got to feel awesome!
data/maps/RustboroCity_Gym/text.inc.RustboroCity_Gym_Text_JoshIntro: Don't take us GYM TRAINERS lightly!\nI'll show you why we're better!
data/maps/RustboroCity_Gym/text.inc.RustboroCity_Gym_Text_JoshDefeat: You were too good for me...
data/maps/RustboroCity_Gym/text.inc.RustboroCity_Gym_Text_JoshPostBattle: You haven't seen anything of the ROCK\ntype's terrifying power!
data/maps/RustboroCity_Gym/text.inc.RustboroCity_Gym_Text_TommyIntro: If you can't beat me, you won't stand\na chance against ROXANNE!
data/maps/RustboroCity_Gym/text.inc.RustboroCity_Gym_Text_TommyPostBattle: ROXANNE is stronger than me by\nseveral times.\pYou'd better be on your guard!
data/maps/RustboroCity_Gym/text.inc.RustboroCity_Gym_Text_RoxanneIntro:
Hello, I am ROXANNE, the RUSTBORO
POKéMON GYM LEADER.\pI became a GYM LEADER so that I may
apply what I learned at the POKéMON\lTRAINER'S SCHOOL in battle.\pWould you kindly demonstrate how you
battle, and with which POKéMON?
data/maps/RustboroCity_Gym/text.inc.RustboroCity_Gym_Text_RoxanneDefeat:
So...
I lost...\pIt seems that I still have much more
to learn...\pI understand.\pThe POKéMON LEAGUE's rules state
that TRAINERS are to be given this\lif they defeat a GYM LEADER.\pPlease accept the official POKéMON
LEAGUE STONE BADGE.
data/maps/RustboroCity_Gym/text.inc.RustboroCity_Gym_Text_StoneBadgeInfoTake: The STONE BADGE heightens the ATTACK\npower of your POKéMON.\pIt also enables them to use the HM move\nCUT outside of battle.\pPlease take this with you, too.
data/maps/RustboroCity_Gym/text.inc.RustboroCity_Gym_Text_ExplainRockTomb:
That TM39 contains ROCK TOMB.\pIt not only inflicts damage by dropping
rocks, it also lowers SPEED.\pIf you use a TM, it instantly teaches
the move to a POKéMON.\pRemember, a TM can be used only once,
so think before you use it.
data/maps/RustboroCity_Gym/text.inc.RustboroCity_Gym_Text_RoxannePostBattle: Since you are so strong, you should\nchallenge other GYM LEADERS.\pBy battling many TRAINERS, you should\nlearn many things.
data/maps/RustboroCity_Gym/text.inc.RustboroCity_Gym_Text_GymStatueCertified: RUSTBORO CITY POKéMON GYM\pROXANNE'S CERTIFIED TRAINERS:\n{PLAYER}

data/maps/RustboroCity_House1/text.inc.RustboroCity_House1_Text_IllTradeIfYouWa:
Do you nickname your POKéMON?
I gave a cool name to mine.\pBut when I call my POKéMON by that
name, people laugh at me...\pIf it's okay with you, want to trade
your {STR_VAR_1} for my {STR_VAR_2}?
data/maps/RustboroCity_House1/text.inc.RustboroCity_House1_Text_PleaseBeGoodToM: Eheheheh, ooh, this is so exciting!
data/maps/RustboroCity_House1/text.inc.RustboroCity_House1_Text_ThatIsNoMon: But that's no {STR_VAR_1}.\nTch, that's so disappointing...
data/maps/RustboroCity_House1/text.inc.RustboroCity_House1_Text_WontYouGetCurio: Don't you get curious about what other\npeople named their POKéMON?
data/maps/RustboroCity_House1/text.inc.RustboroCity_House1_Text_AllSortsOfPlace: In all sorts of places, there are all\nsorts of POKéMON and people.\pI find that fascinating, so I go to all\nsorts of places.

data/maps/RustboroCity_House2/text.inc.RustboroCity_House2_Text_TrainerSchoolEx: The TRAINER'S SCHOOL is excellent.\pIf you study there, you could even\nbecome a GYM LEADER.
data/maps/RustboroCity_House2/text.inc.RustboroCity_House2_Text_RoxanneKnowsALo: ROXANNE, the GYM LEADER, really knows\na lot about POKéMON.\pShe's really strong, too!

data/maps/RustboroCity_House3/text.inc.RustboroCity_House3_Text_IGivePerfectlyS: For my own POKéMON, I give them\nperfectly suited nicknames!\pIt's my expression of, uh...\noriginality, yes, that's it!
data/maps/RustboroCity_House3/text.inc.RustboroCity_House3_Text_NamingPikachuPe: But giving the name PEKACHU to a\nPIKACHU? It seems pointless.\pI suppose it is good to use a name\nthat's easy to understand, but...

data/maps/RustboroCity_Mart/text.inc.RustboroCity_Mart_Text_BuyingHealsInCase: I'm buying some PARLYZ HEALS and\nANTIDOTES.\pJust in case I run into SHROOMISH\nin PETALBURG WOODS.
data/maps/RustboroCity_Mart/text.inc.RustboroCity_Mart_Text_ShouldBuySuperPot: My POKéMON evolved.\nIt has a lot of HP now.\pI should buy SUPER POTIONS for it\ninstead of ordinary POTIONS.
data/maps/RustboroCity_Mart/text.inc.RustboroCity_Mart_Text_GettingEscapeRope: I'm getting an ESCAPE ROPE just in\ncase I get lost in a cave.\pI just need to use it to get back to the\nentrance.

data/maps/RustboroCity_PokemonCenter_1F/.RustboroCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Pokem: My POKéMON has a NAIVE nature, and my\nfriend's has a JOLLY nature.\pIt's fascinating how POKéMON have\npersonalities!
data/maps/RustboroCity_PokemonCenter_1F/.RustboroCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_MaleA: Just like people, there are male and\nfemale POKéMON.\pBut no one seems to have any idea how\nthey're different.
data/maps/RustboroCity_PokemonCenter_1F/.RustboroCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_HMCut: The man next door gave me an HM!\pI used it to teach my POKéMON how to\nCUT down skinny trees.

data/maps/RustboroCity_PokemonSchool/tex.RustboroCity_PokemonSchool_Text_Blackboa: The blackboard lists status changes\nthat may affect POKéMON in battle.
data/maps/RustboroCity_PokemonSchool/tex.RustboroCity_PokemonSchool_Text_ReadWhic: Which topic do you want to read?
data/maps/RustboroCity_PokemonSchool/tex.RustboroCity_PokemonSchool_Text_ExplainP:
If a POKéMON is poisoned, it will
steadily lose HP.\pThe effects of poison remain after
a battle.\pA poisoned POKéMON's HP will drop
while it is traveling.\pHeal a poisoning using an ANTIDOTE.

If a POKéMON becomes paralyzed,
its SPEED drops.\pIt may also not be able to move while
it is in battle.\pParalysis remains after battle.
Cure it using a PARLYZ HEAL.
data/maps/RustboroCity_PokemonSchool/tex.RustboroCity_PokemonSchool_Text_ExplainS: If a POKéMON falls asleep, it will be\nunable to attack.\pA POKéMON may wake up on its own,\nbut if a battle ends while it is sleeping,\lit will stay asleep.\pWake it up using an AWAKENING.
data/maps/RustboroCity_PokemonSchool/tex.RustboroCity_PokemonSchool_Text_ExplainB: A burn reduces ATTACK power, and it\nsteadily reduces the victim's HP.\pA burn lingers after battle.\nCure a burn using a BURN HEAL.
data/maps/RustboroCity_PokemonSchool/tex.RustboroCity_PokemonSchool_Text_ExplainF: If a POKéMON is frozen, it becomes\ncompletely helpless.\pIt will remain frozen after battle.\nThaw it out using an ICE HEAL.
data/maps/RustboroCity_PokemonSchool/tex.RustboroCity_PokemonSchool_Text_Students: Students who don't study get a little\ntaste of my QUICK CLAW.\pWhether or not you are a good student \nwill be evident from the way you use\lthis item.
data/maps/RustboroCity_PokemonSchool/tex.RustboroCity_PokemonSchool_Text_ExplainQ:
A POKéMON holding the QUICK CLAW will
occasionally speed up and get to move\lbefore its opponent.\pThere are many other items that are
meant to be held by POKéMON.\pJust those alone will give you many
topics to study!
data/maps/RustboroCity_PokemonSchool/tex.RustboroCity_PokemonSchool_Text_TradingR: I'm trading POKéMON with my friend\nright now.
data/maps/RustboroCity_PokemonSchool/tex.RustboroCity_PokemonSchool_Text_AlwaysWa: I always wanted a SEEDOT, and\nI'm finally getting one!
data/maps/RustboroCity_PokemonSchool/tex.RustboroCity_PokemonSchool_Text_Pokemont: POKéMON can hold items, but they\ndon't know what to do with man-made\litems like POTION and ANTIDOTE.
data/maps/RustboroCity_PokemonSchool/tex.RustboroCity_PokemonSchool_Text_Confused:
You know how some POKéMON moves can
confuse a POKéMON?\pA confused POKéMON will sometimes
attack itself without meaning to.\pBut once it leaves battle, it will
return to normal.
data/maps/RustboroCity_PokemonSchool/tex.RustboroCity_PokemonSchool_Text_PokemonH:
A POKéMON holding a BERRY will heal
itself...\pThere are many kinds of items that
POKéMON can hold...\pBoy, it sure is hard taking notes
down...
data/maps/RustboroCity_PokemonSchool/tex.RustboroCity_PokemonSchool_Text_Students:
It's this student's notebook...\pPOKéMON are to be caught using
POKé BALLS.\pUp to six POKéMON can accompany
a TRAINER.\pA TRAINER is someone who catches
POKéMON, raises them, and battles\lwith them.\pA TRAINER's mission is to defeat the
strong TRAINERS who await challengers\lin POKéMON GYMS.

data/maps/RusturfTunnel/text.inc.RusturfTunnel_Text_194159: What, are you coming?\nCome and get some, then!
data/maps/RusturfTunnel/text.inc.RusturfTunnel_Text_19419B:
Grah, keelhaul it all!\pThat hostage POKéMON turned out to
be worthless!\pAnd to think I made a getaway...
In this tunnel to nowhere!\pHey! You!
So you want to battle me?
data/maps/RusturfTunnel/text.inc.RusturfTunnel_Text_194243: Urrrggh! My career in crime comes to\na dead end!
data/maps/RusturfTunnel/text.inc.RusturfTunnel_Text_194274:
This is plain not right...\pThe BOSS told me this would be a
slick-and-easy job to pull.\pAll I had to do was steal some package
from DEVON.\pTch!
You want it back that badly, take it!
data/maps/RusturfTunnel/text.inc.RusturfTunnel_Text_19432A: PEEKO! Am I glad to see you're safe!
data/maps/RusturfTunnel/text.inc.RusturfTunnel_Text_19434F:
PEEKO owes her life to you!\pThey call me MR. BRINEY.
And, you are?\p... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...
... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...\pAh, so you are {PLAYER}{KUN}!
I sincerely thank you!\pNow, if there's anything that troubles
you, don't hesitate to tell me!\pYou can usually find me in my cottage
by the sea near PETALBURG WOODS.\pCome, PEEKO, we should make our way
home.\pPEEKO: Pihyoh!
data/maps/RusturfTunnel/text.inc.RusturfTunnel_Text_1944C5:
... ...\pWhy can't they keep digging?
Is the bedrock too hard?\pMy beloved awaits me in VERDANTURF
TOWN just beyond here...\pIf RUSTBORO and VERDANTURF were
joined by this tunnel, I could visit\lher every day...\pBut this...
What am I to do?
data/maps/RusturfTunnel/text.inc.RusturfTunnel_Text_1945B2: To get from RUSTBORO to VERDANTURF,\nyou need to go to DEWFORD, then pass\lthrough SLATEPORT and MAUVILLE...
data/maps/RusturfTunnel/text.inc.RusturfTunnel_Text_19461D: Wow! You shattered that boulder\nblocking the way.\pTo show you how much I appreciate it,\nI'd like you to have this HM.
data/maps/RusturfTunnel/text.inc.RusturfTunnel_Text_194693: That HM contains STRENGTH.\pIf a muscular POKéMON were to learn\nthat, it would be able to move even\llarge boulders.
data/maps/RusturfTunnel/text.inc.RusturfTunnel_Text_194706: WANDA!\nNow I can see you anytime!\pWANDA: That's...wonderful.\pPlease, take some rest at my home.
data/maps/RusturfTunnel/text.inc.RusturfTunnel_Text_194766:
On the other side of this rock...
My boyfriend is there.\pHe... He's not just digging the tunnel
to come see me.\pHe works his hands raw and rough
for the benefit of everyone.
data/maps/RusturfTunnel/text.inc.RusturfTunnel_Text_194814: What do you call a wild man up in the\nmountains? A mountain man, right?\pSo why don't they call a POKéMON in the\nmountains a mountain POKéMON?
data/maps/RusturfTunnel/text.inc.RusturfTunnel_Text_1948C4: They halted development here to\nprotect POKéMON, right?\lThere's a feel-good story!

data/maps/SSTidalCorridor/text.inc.SSTidalRooms_Text_199007: This ferry is built to plow through\nfast-running currents.\pWe hope you enjoy your voyage with us.\nFeel free to explore the ship.
data/maps/SSTidalCorridor/text.inc.SSTidalCorridor_Text_199088: We hope you enjoy your voyage on\nour ferry.
data/maps/SSTidalCorridor/text.inc.SSTidalRooms_Text_1990B4: We have made land in SLATEPORT CITY.\nThank you for sailing with us.
data/maps/SSTidalCorridor/text.inc.SSTidalRooms_Text_1990F8: We have made land in LILYCOVE CITY.\nThank you for sailing with us.
data/maps/SSTidalCorridor/text.inc.SSTidalCorridor_Text_19913B:
It'll be some time before we make land,
I reckon.\pYou can rest up in your cabin if you'd
like. Your cabin's No. 2.\pThe bed in there is soft and plushy.
I can attest to how comfy it is!
data/maps/SSTidalCorridor/text.inc.SSTidalCorridor_Text_199203: Go visit other cabins.\nTRAINERS bored of the boat trip will\lbe itching to battle.
data/maps/SSTidalCorridor/text.inc.SSTidalCorridor_Text_199291:
MR. BRINEY: Welcome aboard, {PLAYER}{KUN}!\pThey made me honorary captain of the
S.S. TIDAL!\pYou can call me CAPTAIN BRINEY now!\pYou know, I retired once before, but
when I saw this majestic ship...\pLet me just say, it stirred my sleeping
soul as a sailor!

data/maps/SSTidalLowerDeck/text.inc.SSTidalLowerDeck_Text_1993C1: Arrrgh! I'm fed up and dog-tired of\ncleaning this huge place!\pLet's have a quick battle!
data/maps/SSTidalLowerDeck/text.inc.SSTidalLowerDeck_Text_19942E: We're the CLEANUP BROTHERS!\pThe old one dumps the detergent,\nand the young one does the scrubbing!
data/maps/SSTidalLowerDeck/text.inc.SSTidalLowerDeck_Text_199491: This is the bottom of the ship's hull.\nThere's plenty of room.\lIt'll be alright for a POKéMON battle.
data/maps/SSTidalLowerDeck/text.inc.SSTidalLowerDeck_Text_199508: We're the CLEANUP BROTHERS!\pThe old one dumps the detergent,\nand the young one does the scrubbing!

data/maps/SSTidalRooms/text.inc.SSTidalRooms_Text_19956B: It's a bed.\nLet's take a rest.
data/maps/SSTidalRooms/text.inc.SSTidalRooms_Text_19958A: Go back and forth between LILYCOVE\nand SLATEPORT, that's what I do.\pIt's my hobby - going from port to port\nto take in POKéMON CONTESTS.
data/maps/SSTidalRooms/text.inc.SSTidalRooms_Text_199630: I get so excited imagining what kinds\nof POKéMON I'll get to see in the next\lCONTEST. The anticipation of it thrills!
data/maps/SSTidalRooms/text.inc.SSTidalRooms_Text_1996E1: Friends need not be human.\nFor me, POKéMON are treasured friends!
data/maps/SSTidalRooms/text.inc.SSTidalRooms_Text_199723: Child...\nDid you knock on the door?
data/maps/SSTidalRooms/text.inc.SSTidalRooms_Text_199747: A loss is to be accepted without haste\nor panic.
data/maps/SSTidalRooms/text.inc.SSTidalRooms_Text_199778: To be never ruffled in any situation is\nthe GENTLEMAN's code of conduct.
data/maps/SSTidalRooms/text.inc.SSTidalRooms_Text_1997C1: JED: I feel a little shy about this, but...\nWe'll show you our lovey-dovey power!
data/maps/SSTidalRooms/text.inc.SSTidalRooms_Text_199820: JED: It's the first time that our lovey-\ndovey power couldn't prevail!\lYou must be an awesome TRAINER!
data/maps/SSTidalRooms/text.inc.SSTidalRooms_Text_199887: JED: You only have one POKéMON?\nIsn't that just too lonesome?
data/maps/SSTidalRooms/text.inc.SSTidalRooms_Text_1998C5: LEA: I feel a little silly, but...\nWe'll show you our lovey-dovey power!
data/maps/SSTidalRooms/text.inc.SSTidalRooms_Text_19991C: LEA: I can't believe it!\nOur lovey-dovey power failed...\lYou must be an awesome TRAINER!
data/maps/SSTidalRooms/text.inc.SSTidalRooms_Text_199975: LEA: I wanted to battle...\nBut you don't even have two POKéMON...
data/maps/SSTidalRooms/text.inc.SSTidalRooms_Text_1999B7: Ah, you've come just in time.\pI'm bored, you see.\nYou may entertain me.
data/maps/SSTidalRooms/text.inc.SSTidalRooms_Text_199A10: Perhaps I shall get Father to acquire\na yacht for me.\lA yacht for me and POKéMON!
data/maps/SSTidalRooms/text.inc.SSTidalRooms_Text_199A62: Oh, you're such an adorable TRAINER.\nWould you like to have tea?\lOr would you rather battle?
data/maps/SSTidalRooms/text.inc.SSTidalRooms_Text_199ADE: A world cruise on a luxury liner has its\ncharms, I must say...\pBut, I will admit there is an appealing\nside to touring HOENN by ferry.
data/maps/SSTidalRooms/text.inc.SSTidalRooms_Text_199B65: Uh... Hi! I... I'm not acting suspicious!\nUh... You can have this! For free!\pIt... Honestly, I didn't SNATCH it from\nsomeone! I'd never do such a thing!\lIt's clean! You can use it!
data/maps/SSTidalRooms/text.inc.SSTidalRooms_Text_199C1A: SNATCH steals the foe's move in\nadvance, and then uses the snatched\lmove on the foe.

data/maps/SeafloorCavern_Room1/text.inc.SeafloorCavern_Room1_Text_1974BA: We don't need a kid around!\nGo on home already!
data/maps/SeafloorCavern_Room1/text.inc.SeafloorCavern_Room1_Text_1974FF: I want to get a promotion so I can\nboss around the GRUNTS...
data/maps/SeafloorCavern_Room1/text.inc.SeafloorCavern_Room1_Text_19753C: That submarine... It's tiny inside.\nI'm sore all over!
data/maps/SeafloorCavern_Room1/text.inc.SeafloorCavern_Room1_Text_197589: That submarine we jacked, man, it's\nbrutal as a ride.\lIt's way too tight in there!

data/maps/SeafloorCavern_Room3/text.inc.SeafloorCavern_Room3_Text_1975DC:
Ahahahaha!\pHow did you manage to get here without
a submarine?\lWhat an impressive child!\pBut... It won't do to have you
meddling about here.\pAnd, I do want payback for what
happened at the WEATHER INSTITUTE...\pI'm going to give you a little taste
of pain! Resign yourself to it!
data/maps/SeafloorCavern_Room3/text.inc.SeafloorCavern_Room3_Text_197704:
Ahahahaha!
You're so darn strong.\pIt's terribly disappointing that you're
not a TEAM {EVIL_TEAM} member.\pYou could have enjoyed the fabulous
world our BOSS has promised to one\lof our own...

data/maps/SeafloorCavern_Room4/text.inc.SeafloorCavern_Room4_Text_1977B9: Who are you?\nWhere did you come in from?
data/maps/SeafloorCavern_Room4/text.inc.SeafloorCavern_Room4_Text_1977ED: I can't find the way out!\pI'm not afraid. Don't get me wrong!

data/maps/SecretBase_RedCave1/text.inc.SecretBase_Text_SmallIndentInWall: There's a small indent in the wall.
data/maps/SecretBase_RedCave1/text.inc.SecretBase_Text_IndentUseSecretPower: There's a small indent in the wall.\pUse the SECRET POWER?
data/maps/SecretBase_RedCave1/text.inc.SecretBase_Text_WantToMakeYourSecretBase: Want to make your SECRET BASE here?

data/maps/ShoalCave_LowTideLowerRoom/tex.ShoalCave_LowTideLowerRoom_Text_198200: The penetrating cold around these\nparts is an impediment to training.\pBut with focus, one can overcome!\pWith this FOCUS BAND, buckle down and\nwithstand the cold!

data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_EnergyGuruSellWhatYou: I'm the ENERGY GURU!\nI'll go for it and sell you what you need!
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_PleaseGiveItThisEffor: Went for it stupendously!\pAs its reward, please give it this\nEFFORT RIBBON.
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_GoForItLittleHarder: You have to go for it a little harder.\pIf you do, I'll give your POKéMON\nsomething nice.
