data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_EffortRibbonLooksGood: Oh! Your {STR_VAR_1}, that EFFORT\nRIBBON looks good on it!
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_WonderIfLighthouseSta: The light of the lighthouse reaches\ndozens of miles away.\pI wonder if it doesn't startle POKéMON\nin the sea.
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_SeaweedFullOfLife: Ooh, look at this!\pThe seaweed you can get around these\nparts is fresh and full of life.\pWhy, it looks like it can even rear up\nand attack!
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_HowTownIsBornAndGrows: Where the water is clean, the fruits\nof bountiful harvest gather.\pAnd where people gather, a market\nsoon starts.\pThat is how a town is born and grows.
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_SlateportWonderfulPla: Shopping where you can breathe the\nscent of the ocean...\pSLATEPORT is such a wonderful place!
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_BuyBricksSoDecorWontG: If you put DOLLS or CUSHIONS on the\nfloor, they'll get dirty.\pI'm going to buy some BRICKS so my\nDOLLS and CUSHIONS won't get dirty\lwhen I leave them out.
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_GoingToCompeteInPokem: Yeah! I've waited so long for this!\nPOKéMON CONTESTS!\lI'm going to enter!\pBut before I do, I have to catch some\nPOKéMON!
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_BushedHikingFromMauvi: Whew... I'm just bushed...\pI hiked over from MAUVILLE CITY.\nBut, boy, this city's huge.\pIf I'd known this, I would've ridden\nmy BIKE here.
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_EveryoneCallsHimCaptS: STERN, the fellow who built the\nMUSEUM, also happens to be the leader\lof an undersea exploration team.\pSo, everyone calls him CAPT. STERN.
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_WhatsLongLineOverTher: What is that over there?\nThat long line...
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_VisitedMuseumOften: When I was a child, I visited the\nMUSEUM often.\pI used to dream about the mysteries of\nthe sea after seeing the exhibits.
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_QuitPushing: Hey, there! Quit pushing!\nThis is the line, can't you see?
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_EvilTeamHasPolicy: TEAM {EVIL_TEAM} has a policy of\nassembling and dispersing at the\loperation site.
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_BossIsBrilliant: Our BOSS is brilliant.\pWhat would he want to do with a\nMUSEUM now?
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_WhatsNewSchemeIWonder: What's the new scheme, I wonder?\pOur BOSS is scary when he's mad, so\nI'd better not screw things up...
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_ShouldTakeItAll: If there's something we need in the\nMUSEUM, we should take it all!
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_RemindsMeOfLongLineFo: A long line, huh?\pIt reminds me of the times I lined up to\nbuy smash-hit games...
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_WhyAreWeLiningUp: Why are we even lining up and paying?\nWe should just march in!
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_SeaIsSoWet: The sea is just so vast...\pCould the sea have been made by the\ntears shed by POKéMON?
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_SinkOldBoats: Do you know what they do with old\nships that become too creaky to sail?\pThey sink them in the sea so they\nbecome habitats for POKéMON.
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_BuyTooMuch: Whenever I visit here, I get carried\naway and buy too much.
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_GetNameRaterToHelpYou: If you want to change your POKéMON's\nnickname, you'll have to get the NAME\lRATER to help you.
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_CantChangeTradeMonNam: Any POKéMON you get in a trade, you\ncan't change its nickname.\pThe original TRAINER's love for that\nPOKéMON is in the nickname.
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_ContestHallBuiltRecen: A POKéMON CONTEST HALL opened in\nSLATEPORT recently.\pI plan on entering after I improve the\ncondition of my POKéMON.
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_DoYouKnowAboutBerryBl: Do you know about the machine\nBERRY BLENDER?
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_FasterSpinBetterPokeb: People have to work together to get it\nto spin faster.\pThe faster you can make it spin, the\nbetter {POKEBLOCK}S you can get, I've heard.
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_ExplainBerryBlender: It's used for making a kind of candy\ncalled a {POKEBLOCK}.\pIf you give a good {POKEBLOCK} to a POKéMON,\nits condition will improve by a lot.
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_CaptSternBeingIntervi: I was hoping that it was a famous star\nso I could get an autograph.\pBut who's that being interviewed?\nIsn't that CAPT. STERN?
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_InterviewerSoCool: That lady interviewer is so cool and\npretty.\pWhen I grow up, I'm going to be an\ninternational journalist!
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_SternSaysDiscoveredSo: CAPT. STERN says they discovered\nsomething at the bottom of the sea.\pI wonder what it is?\nWhat could it be?
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_CaptainComeBackWithBi: What's going on here?\pDid the good CAPTAIN come back with\na big fish from the ocean floor?
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_AmIOnTV: Hey! Are you watching?\nAm I on TV?
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_CaptainsACelebrity: A TV interview! Here!\nThe CAPTAIN's a celebrity!
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_BigSmileForCamera: TY: Okay, CAPT. STERN, a big smile\nfor the camera!
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_MostInvaluableExperie: GABBY: I see, I see. You've had a most\ninvaluable experience...
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_SternMoveAheadWithExp: CAPT. STERN: Yes, indeed. We intend to\nmove ahead with our exploration.
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_GabbyWonderfulThanksF: GABBY: That's wonderful, CAPT. STERN!\nThank you for taking the time from\lyour busy schedule to talk to us.\pWe hope we can interview you again\nwith news of more discoveries!
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_SternWhewFirstIntervi: CAPT. STERN: Whew...\pThat was my first time to be filmed for\nTV. That was nerve wracking.
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_OhPlayerWeMadeDiscove:
Oh! {PLAYER}{KUN}!
You're looking great!\pWe made a huge discovery on our last
seafloor exploration.\pWe found an underwater cavern on
ROUTE 128.\pWe think it's the habitat of a POKéMON
that's said to have been long extinct.
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_EvilTeamWillAssumeCon:
Fufufu...
CAPT. STERN, I presume.\pWe of TEAM {EVIL_TEAM} will assume
control of your submarine!\pYour objections are meaningless!
We expect your total cooperation!\pFufufu...
Just watch and learn what TEAM\l{EVIL_TEAM} has planned!
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_SternWhatWasAllThat: CAPT. STERN: What was that all about?\pIt sounded like someone using a\nmegaphone...\pWhere did it come from?
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_FromHarborTryingToTak: It's from the HARBOR!\pThe submarine!\nThey're trying to take it!
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_ContestHallSign: POKéMON CONTESTS\nHYPER RANK REGISTRATION\l“Let it burn! POKéMON TRAINERS!”
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_SternsShipyardWantedS: STERN'S SHIPYARD\p“Wanted: A sailor capable of sailing\nin all currents.”
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_SternsShipyardNearsCo: STERN'S SHIPYARD\p“The ferry S.S. TIDAL nears\ncompletion for serving the ports of\lSLATEPORT and LILYCOVE.”
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_SternsShipyardFerryCo: STERN'S SHIPYARD\p“Boarding of the SLATEPORT-LILYCOVE\nferry S.S. TIDAL is handled at the\lHARBOR.”
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_PokemonFanClubSign: POKéMON FAN CLUB\n“Calling all fans of POKéMON!”
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_CitySign: SLATEPORT CITY\p“The port where people and POKéMON\ncross paths.”
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_MarketSign: SLATEPORT MARKET\n“Unique items found nowhere else!”
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_HarborFerryUnderConst: SLATEPORT HARBOR\p“The ferry S.S. TIDAL is under\nconstruction in the SHIPYARD.\p“Service is scheduled to begin\nshortly.”
data/maps/SlateportCity/text.inc.SlateportCity_Text_HarborSign: SLATEPORT HARBOR\p“Enjoy a delightful cruise on the\nferry S.S. TIDAL.”

data/maps/SlateportCity_ContestHall/text.SlateportCity_ContestHall_Text_17CB71:
Want a tasty little bit of advice
for CONTESTS?\pUsing a certain move after another
certain kind of move sometimes gets\lyou extra attention.\pIf you know what you're doing, you
can score big in appeal.\pOf course, your opponents might try
disrupting your POKéMON's showing.
data/maps/SlateportCity_ContestHall/text.SlateportCity_ContestHall_Text_17CC80: My papa, he's a CONTEST JUDGE.\pI wonder what I should be when I\ngrow up, a JUDGE or a GYM LEADER?
data/maps/SlateportCity_ContestHall/text.SlateportCity_ContestHall_Text_17CCE2:
Hey, man, I'm like majorly cheesed,
you know. Like, you know, I just\lwanted to know why my POKéMON\lnever won, you know, like, hey?\pSo, like, I gave the JUDGE my two
cents, you know, they're free.\pAnd he wouldn't hear me out, like, hey!
So, like, total bummer, man!\pHey, like, you! Zip it, you know?
Just, you know, take this!
data/maps/SlateportCity_ContestHall/text.SlateportCity_ContestHall_Text_17CE28:
That's, like, TM41, you know?
Hey, it's TORMENT, you hearing me?\pLike, it won't let the other guy
use the same move twice in a row, see?\pHey, now, you listen here, like,
I'm not laying a torment on you!
data/maps/SlateportCity_ContestHall/text.SlateportCity_ContestHall_Text_17CEF3:
MC: Oh, my, my!
Now isn't that a dandy of a POKéMON?\pPlease! Do step right up and take
part in our splendid CONTESTS!\pYou'll do well! I'm sure of it!
My eyes have never failed me!
data/maps/SlateportCity_ContestHall/text.SlateportCity_ContestHall_Text_17CFA7:
JUDGE: Well, hello there!
I see that you're a TRAINER!\pThen, it just wouldn't do for you
to miss a POKéMON CONTEST!\pGet a CONTEST PASS in VERDANTURF
CITY and enter anytime!
data/maps/SlateportCity_ContestHall/text.SlateportCity_ContestHall_Text_17D054: It's appeal time!\nWhat should I lead with?
data/maps/SlateportCity_ContestHall/text.SlateportCity_ContestHall_Text_17D07F: They didn't pay much attention to\nmy POKéMON's appeal...\pHumph, that JUDGE, he doesn't know\na good thing when he sees it.
data/maps/SlateportCity_ContestHall/text.SlateportCity_ContestHall_Text_17D0F9:
Oh, hi! You must be a serious fan to get
this close to the action.\pI'll reward your enthusiasm with this
sage advice.\pIf a move goes over really well,
the audience will get excited.\pThe POKéMON that makes its appeal
right when everyone's excited...\pWell, you'd think something good has
to happen!
data/maps/SlateportCity_ContestHall/text.SlateportCity_ContestHall_Text_17D222: I can't do this! I'm more freaked out\nthan my POKéMON.\pI'm shivering and my heart is racing!
data/maps/SlateportCity_ContestHall/text.SlateportCity_ContestHall_Text_17D27F: A battle and a CONTEST aren't the\nsame, but they are alike, too.\pYou need to work hard and believe\nin the POKéMON you've raised.
data/maps/SlateportCity_ContestHall/text.SlateportCity_ContestHall_Text_17D300: That POKéMON looks like it's on top\nof its game, huh?\pA POKéMON that does good in the\nsecondary judging seems to be more\lrelaxed when it's doing appeals.
data/maps/SlateportCity_ContestHall/text.SlateportCity_ContestHall_Text_17D39A: Will you look at that sorry sight?\pHeh, my POKéMON's absolutely better\nthan that lot!
data/maps/SlateportCity_ContestHall/text.SlateportCity_ContestHall_Text_17D3F0: Don't you get the urge to move with\nPOKéMON if they're putting on an\lenergetic appeal?

data/maps/SlateportCity_ContestLobby/tex.SlateportCity_ContestLobby_Text_WantToRa: I want to raise a POKéMON that's\nthe ultimate in “great” for both\lbattles and CONTESTS.\pIt's vexing, trying to figure out\nwhich moves I should make it learn.
data/maps/SlateportCity_ContestLobby/tex.SlateportCity_ContestLobby_Text_DoYourFr: Do any of your friends have any\nBERRIES?\pYou can use that BERRY BLENDER and\nmake {POKEBLOCK}S with your friends!\pYou should try it - it's a lot of fun!
data/maps/SlateportCity_ContestLobby/tex.SlateportCity_ContestLobby_Text_YouCanHa: I have two, so you can have one!
data/maps/SlateportCity_ContestLobby/tex.SlateportCity_ContestLobby_Text_PutPokeb: Make {POKEBLOCK}S and put them in there.\pWhen you make a {POKEBLOCK}, everyone\nhas to put in a different BERRY.
data/maps/SlateportCity_ContestLobby/tex.SlateportCity_ContestLobby_Text_ContestW: If you win a CONTEST, they put up a\nposter of your POKéMON on the wall.\pIt will have a portrait of your\nPOKéMON and both your names.

data/maps/SlateportCity_Harbor/text.inc.SlateportCity_Harbor_Text_FerryServiceUn: I beg your pardon?\nYou're looking for a ship?\pI'm sorry, the ferry service isn't\navailable at present...
data/maps/SlateportCity_Harbor/text.inc.SlateportCity_Harbor_Text_MayISeeYourTic: Hello, are you here for the ferry?\nMay I see your TICKET?
data/maps/SlateportCity_Harbor/text.inc.SlateportCity_Harbor_Text_YouMustHaveTic: {PLAYER} doesn't have the TICKET...\pI'm terribly sorry.\pYou must have a TICKET to board\nthe ferry.
data/maps/SlateportCity_Harbor/text.inc.SlateportCity_Harbor_Text_FlashedTicketW: {PLAYER} flashed the TICKET.\pPerfect! That's all you need!\pAnd where would you like to go?
data/maps/SlateportCity_Harbor/text.inc.SlateportCity_Harbor_Text_SailAnotherTim: Please sail with us another time!
data/maps/SlateportCity_Harbor/text.inc.SlateportCity_Harbor_Text_PleaseBoardFer: Please board the ferry and wait for\ndeparture.
data/maps/SlateportCity_Harbor/text.inc.SlateportCity_Harbor_Text_WhereWouldYouL: Then, where would you like to go?
data/maps/SlateportCity_Harbor/text.inc.SlateportCity_Harbor_Text_LoveToGoDeepUn: A journey to the bottom of the sea...\nI wonder what it'd be like?\pI'd love to go deep underwater like\nthat some day.
data/maps/SlateportCity_Harbor/text.inc.SlateportCity_Harbor_Text_SubTooSmallFor: I wanted to go with CAPT. STERN on\nthe ocean floor exploration.\pBut the sub's too small for me.\pIf I squeezed in, there wouldn't be\nany room for the CAPTAIN...
data/maps/SlateportCity_Harbor/text.inc.SlateportCity_Harbor_Text_SameThugsTried: CAPT. STERN: Those thugs...\pThey're the same lot who tried to rob\nthe DEVON GOODS at the MUSEUM.
data/maps/SlateportCity_Harbor/text.inc.SlateportCity_Harbor_Text_YouAgainHideou:
{EVIL_LEADER}: Fwahahaha...
I commiserate with you!\pAll that effort you spent following
me here all the way from MT. PYRE.\pBut now...
No one can stop us! No one!\pOr, will you follow us back to our
HIDEOUT in LILYCOVE CITY?\pFwahahahaha...
data/maps/SlateportCity_Harbor/text.inc.SlateportCity_Harbor_Text_CaptSternWhySt:
CAPT. STERN: Why...\pWhy would TEAM {EVIL_TEAM} steal my
SUBMARINE EXPLORER 1?\pThey can't be after the slumbering
POKéMON at the bottom of the sea...\pBut even if I were to chase them,
I don't stand a chance against them...
data/maps/SlateportCity_Harbor/text.inc.SlateportCity_Harbor_Text_EvilTeamLeftNe:
CAPT. STERN: Oh, {PLAYER}{KUN}...\pOkay... So TEAM {EVIL_TEAM} left before you
could stop them...\pOh, no, don't blame yourself.
You're not responsible for this.\pTrying to catch a submarine...
It's impossible for most people.\pYou would need a POKéMON that knows
how to DIVE...\pPerhaps if you went out to
MOSSDEEP CITY...\pA lot of divers live out there, so
someone might teach you...
data/maps/SlateportCity_Harbor/text.inc.SlateportCity_Harbor_Text_NeedDiveToCatc:
CAPT. STERN: Trying to catch a
submarine...  It's impossible.\pYou would need a POKéMON that knows
how to DIVE...\pPerhaps if you went out to
MOSSDEEP CITY...\pA lot of divers live out there, so
someone might teach you...
data/maps/SlateportCity_Harbor/text.inc.SlateportCity_Harbor_Text_WontBeLongBefo: CAPT. STERN: Oh, yes.\nMR. BRINEY came to our SHIPYARD.\pIt won't be long now before we finish\nmaking the ferry!
data/maps/SlateportCity_Harbor/text.inc.SlateportCity_Harbor_Text_FinishedMaking: CAPT. STERN: {PLAYER}{KUN}!\pWe finally finished making the ferry\nS.S. TIDAL!\pWe couldn't have done it without your\nfriend MR. BRINEY.\pPlease go for a short cruise on it!
data/maps/SlateportCity_Harbor/text.inc.SlateportCity_Harbor_Text_WouldYouTradeS:
CAPT. STERN: Oh?
{PLAYER}{KUN}, that item you have...\pThat's a SCANNER! That would sure
help us on our explorations.\p{PLAYER}{KUN}, would you trade your
SCANNER for something?\pLike say a DEEPSEATOOTH or a
DEEPSEASCALE that I have?
data/maps/SlateportCity_Harbor/text.inc.SlateportCity_Harbor_Text_IfYouWantToTra: CAPT. STERN: Are you certain?\nIt's useless to you, {PLAYER}{KUN}...\pWell, okay, then. If you want to trade\nyour SCANNER, let me know.
data/maps/SlateportCity_Harbor/text.inc.SlateportCity_Harbor_Text_TradeForDeepSe: CAPT. STERN: So you'll trade it for\nmy DEEPSEATOOTH?
CAPT. STERN: So you'll trade it for\nmy DEEPSEASCALE?
data/maps/SlateportCity_Harbor/text.inc.SlateportCity_Harbor_Text_WhichOneDoYouW: CAPT. STERN: Which one do you want?
data/maps/SlateportCity_Harbor/text.inc.SlateportCity_Harbor_Text_ThisWillHelpRe: CAPT. STERN: Thanks, {PLAYER}{KUN}!\nThis will help our research a lot!

data/maps/SlateportCity_House1/text.inc.SlateportCity_NameRatersHouse_Text_Pleas: Hi, hi! I'm the NAME RATER!\nI'm the fortune-teller of names!\pI shall be pleased to rate your\nPOKéMON's nickname.
data/maps/SlateportCity_House1/text.inc.SlateportCity_NameRatersHouse_Text_FineN: Hmmm... {STR_VAR_1}, is it? That is\nquite a fine name you bestowed.\pBut! What say you, if I were to\nsuggest a slightly better name?
data/maps/SlateportCity_House1/text.inc.SlateportCity_NameRatersHouse_Text_WhatS: Ah, good. Then, what shall the new\nnickname be?
data/maps/SlateportCity_House1/text.inc.SlateportCity_NameRatersHouse_Text_MonSh: Done! From now on, this POKéMON\nshall be known as {STR_VAR_1}!\pIt is a better name than before!\nHow fortunate for you!
data/maps/SlateportCity_House1/text.inc.SlateportCity_NameRatersHouse_Text_NameN: Done! From now on, this POKéMON\nshall be known as {STR_VAR_1}!\pIt looks no different from before,\nand yet, this is vastly superior!\lHow fortunate for you!
data/maps/SlateportCity_House1/text.inc.SlateportCity_NameRatersHouse_Text_Magni: Hmmm... {STR_VAR_1} it is!\pThis is a magnificent nickname!\nIt is impeccably beyond reproach!\pYou'll do well to cherish your\n{STR_VAR_1} now and beyond.
data/maps/SlateportCity_House1/text.inc.SlateportCity_NameRatersHouse_Text_ThatI: Now, now.\nThat is merely an EGG!

data/maps/SlateportCity_House2/text.inc.SlateportCity_House_Text_NatureToDoWithS: My POKéMON has a HASTY nature.\pIt has higher SPEED compared to my\nother POKéMON.\pMaybe their nature has something to\ndo with the stat gains of POKéMON.
data/maps/SlateportCity_House2/text.inc.SlateportCity_House_Text_NeedContestPass: You need a CONTEST PASS to enter a\nCONTEST.\pIt's easy to get. They give it to\nanyone who has POKéMON.
data/maps/SlateportCity_House2/text.inc.SlateportCity_House_Text_HaveContestPass: Oh, a CONTEST PASS!\nYou're going to be a contestant?

data/maps/SlateportCity_Mart/text.inc.SlateportCity_Mart_Text_SomeItemsOnlyAtM: The MARKET does have some interesting\nmerchandise.\pBut there are some items you can only\nget at a POKé MART.
data/maps/SlateportCity_Mart/text.inc.SlateportCity_Mart_Text_GreatBallIsBette: A GREAT BALL is better than a POKé BALL\nat catching POKéMON.\pWith this, I should be able to get that\nelusive POKéMON...

data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_Woul: Welcome to the OCEANIC MUSEUM.\pThe entrance fee is ¥50.\nWould you like to enter?
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_NotE: Oh? I'm sorry, but you don't seem to\nhave enough money.
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_Catc: Oh? You're with that group that\nwent in earlier?\pYou're the only one who's late.\nYou'd better go catch up to them!
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_Evil: We, TEAM {EVIL_TEAM}, exist for the good\nof all!
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_OurB: We were told to assemble here, so\nwe did, but...\pOur BOSS, the lynchpin, isn't here.
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_Woul: If I ripped off the stuff here,\nwould it make me rich?
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_CanL: What I learn here, I can put to use on\nnefarious deeds...
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_Rust: If our goons didn't bungle things\nin RUSTBORO, we wouldn't be here!
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_Didn: I didn't have ¥50, so it took a long\ntime getting by the receptionist.
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_Lear: I want to learn about the sea and\nuse that knowledge for battling.
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_Ster: I get all giddy and gooey when I\nsee the sea!\pFor me, CAPT. STERN is the number\none role model!
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_Must: The sea is vast without end, and\ninfinitely deep...\pThere must be many POKéMON that we\ndon't know about.
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_Want: I want a sea POKéMON.\pI think it would feel cool and nice\nto hug.
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_Reme:
Aiyeeeh!
What are you doing here?\pMe? I'm the TEAM {EVIL_TEAM} member you
thumped before, remember?\pHere, take this!
You have to forgive me!
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_YouS:
Aww, darn it!
You so screwed up our plans!\pI was going to rip off something
to make up for it, but...\pJust you wait!
You'll get yours one day!
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_YouH: Awww, come on!\nYou have to take this and let me go!
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_Whir: A blue fluid is spiraling inside a\nglass vessel.\p“This is an experiment to create a\nWHIRLPOOL artificially using wind.”
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_Wate: A red ball is bobbing up and down\ninside a glass vessel.\p“This is an experiment simulating a\nWATERFALL using the ball's buoyancy.”
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_Ocea:
It's a sample of soil from the ocean
floor.\p“Over many years, the remains of
life-forms settle at the bottom of\lthe sea making sedimentary layers.\p“By analyzing these layers, the
ancient past is revealed.”
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_Beac: It's a sample of beach sand.\p“Stones from mountains are washed\ndown by rivers where they are\lchipped and ground down.\p“They are reduced to grains and end\nup as sand on beaches.”
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_Ocea:
“OCEANIC MINI FACT 1
Why is seawater blue?\p“Light is composed of many colors.\p“When light passes through water,
most kinds of light lose color.\p“However, blue light retains its
color, making the sea appear blue.”

“OCEANIC MINI FACT 2
Why is the sea salty?\p“Seawater contains dissolved salt in
the form of sodium and chlorine ions.\p“These ions leach out of rocks and are
carried out to sea by rain.\p“The concentration of dissolved salt
makes the sea salty.”

“OCEANIC MINI FACT 3
Which is bigger? The sea or land?\p“The sea covers about 70% of the
planet, and the rest is land.\p“The sea is therefore more than twice
the size of land.”
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_Foss:
It's a fossil with wavy ridges on it.\p“Soil on the ocean floor gets scoured
by the tide.\p“The flowing seawater marks the soil
with small ridges and valleys.\p“If this soil becomes fossilized, it is
called a ripple mark.”
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_Dept: A strange machine is rotating under\na glass dome.\pMaybe it's for measuring the depth\nof something...

data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_Than:
Yes? If you're looking for STERN,
that would be me.\pAh! That must be the part I
ordered from MR. STONE of DEVON.\pThank you! That's great!
We can prepare for our expedition now.
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_Well: Hehehe, hold it!\nWe'll take those parts!
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_Ster: CAPT. STERN: Wh-what?\nWho are you people?
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_Were: We're TEAM {EVIL_TEAM}!\pOur BOSS wants those parts!\nShut your yap and fork them over!
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_Boss: Oh, man, what a disaster...\nThe BOSS is going to be furious...
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_LetM: Humph, sniveling wimp!\nLet me take care of this!
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_Medd: Now what? If we don't get the parts,\nwe're in for it!\pArrgh, I didn't count on being meddled\nwith by some meddling kid!
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_Came: I came to see what was taking so\nlong to snatch some parts, and you\lsimps are held up by a mere child?
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_Arch:
I am TEAM AQUA's ARCHIE.\pTell me, why do you meddle in the
noble affairs of TEAM AQUA?\pPOKéMON, people, all life depends on
the sea.\pSo, TEAM AQUA is dedicated to the
expansion of the sea.\pDon't you agree? What we are doing
is a magnificent undertaking.\pAh, fine...
You're still too young.\pIt can't be helped that you do not
understand our ideals.\pBut, if you ever oppose us again,
there will be consequences!\pHeed my warning!
Farewell!
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_Maxi:
I am TEAM MAGMA's MAXIE.\pWhy on earth do you feel compelled
to mess up TEAM MAGMA's plans?\pPOKéMON, people, all life exists on land...\pThat's why TEAM MAGMA is trying to
expand the world's landmass.\pDon't you agree? What we are doing
is a magnificent undertaking.\pWell, no matter...
You're young.\pYour inability to understand our
noble cause can't be helped...\pBut, if you were to impede us ever
again, you'll see no mercy from us!\pKeep that firmly in mind!
Farewell!
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_Ster:
CAPT. STERN: You're...
Ah, okay, you're {PLAYER}{KUN}...\pAnyway, that was a tense situation!
Thank you for saving us!\pOh, yes, I almost forgot that you
even brought the parts from DEVON!
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F.UnknownString_817F404: {PLAYER} handed over the DEVON GOODS\nto CAPT. STERN.
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_Ster: CAPT. STERN: Whoops!\nThere's no time to lose!\pWe have to set out on our ocean floor\nexpedition really soon.\pThanks, and excuse me!
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_Remi: I saw a model of a ship here.\pIt reminded me of the ABANDONED SHIP\nnear DEWFORD TOWN...
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_Dont: Don't you dare run around inside\nthe MUSEUM!
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_Want: Wow, the submarine's awesome!\nI want to go for a ride!
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_Wate: “KANTO WATER QUALITY SAMPLE,” the\nlabel says.\pThe sea is all connected, but the\nwater seems to differ by region.
“JOHTO WATER QUALITY SAMPLE,” the\nlabel says.\pMaybe the water's saltiness differs\nfrom one region to another...
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_Pres:
A rubber ball is expanding and shrinking.\p“In the sea, the weight of water itself
exerts pressure.\p“In shallow water, the pressure is not
very heavy.\p“However, in extremely deep water,
the pressure can reach even tens of\lthousands of tons on a small area.”
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_Hoen: “MODEL OF HOENN REGION”\pIt's a miniature diorama of the\nHOENN region.\pWhere is LITTLEROOT TOWN on this?
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_Deep: It's a display on the flow of seawater.\p“Near the bottom of the sea, water\nflows due to differences in such\lfactors as temperature and salinity.”
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_Surf: It's a display on the flow of\nseawater.\p“Toward the surface, seawater flows\nas currents driven by the winds.”
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_SSTi: “THE FERRY S.S. TIDAL\p“A scale replica of the ship under\nconstruction at STERN'S SHIPYARD.”
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_Subm: “SUBMARINE EXPLORER 1\p“A replica of the high-performance\nocean floor exploration submarine.”
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_Sumb: “SUBMERSIBLE POD\p“A replica of a compact, unmanned\npod for seafloor exploration.”
data/maps/SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F.SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_SSAn: “S.S. ANNE\p“A replica of the luxury liner that\ncircles the globe.”

data/maps/SlateportCity_PokemonCenter_1F.SlateportCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Rais:
Want a tip for battling?\pI'd say it's raising different kinds
of POKéMON in a balanced manner.\pIt's no good to make just one
POKéMON strong.\pIf it has a type disadvantage, it
might not stand a chance.
data/maps/SlateportCity_PokemonCenter_1F.SlateportCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Trad: I trade POKéMON with my friends.\pIf a traded POKéMON is holding an\nitem, it makes me twice as happy!

data/maps/SlateportCity_PokemonFanClub/t.SlateportCity_PokemonFanClub_Text_MeetCh:
Er-hem! I am the CHAIRMAN of the
POKéMON FAN CLUB!\pBeing the CHAIRMAN, I am naturally
the most important!\pNo one could best me when it comes
to raising POKéMON. No one!\pIn any CONTEST, my victory is a
foregone conclusion!\pBut, that would deprive others of
their enjoyment.\pSo, I now while away my time
examining the POKéMON of others.\pIt is marvelous to witness how
others have raised POKéMON.\pThe contented faces of properly
raised POKéMON...\pThe kind and loving gazes of their
TRAINERS...\pMy heart is overwhelmed - there is
so much happiness.\pOh, my! Excuse me! I seem to have
nattered on far too long!\pPlease, do allow me to examine your
POKéMON and see how it's grown.
data/maps/SlateportCity_PokemonFanClub/t.SlateportCity_PokemonFanClub_Text_HowIsY: How is your POKéMON growing?\nAllow me to examine it.
data/maps/SlateportCity_PokemonFanClub/t.SlateportCity_PokemonFanClub_Text_GiveMo:
Hmmm... It's not bad, but it's not
good, either...\pYou, the TRAINER, must put more
effort into raising this POKéMON!\pFor instance, may I suggest that
you give it more {POKEBLOCK}S?
data/maps/SlateportCity_PokemonFanClub/t.SlateportCity_PokemonFanClub_Text_NoSpac: Oh, my...\pYour POKéMON is growing quite well,\nso you deserve a reward.\pUnfortunately, you have no space for\nthis in your BAG.
data/maps/SlateportCity_PokemonFanClub/t.SlateportCity_PokemonFanClub_Text_MonMos: Your {STR_VAR_1}, it is growing in\na most impressive manner!\lIt is one fine specimen!\pBut! If you were to give it this,\nit would grow even better! Indeed!
data/maps/SlateportCity_PokemonFanClub/t.SlateportCity_PokemonFanClub_Text_Explai: Let a POKéMON hold that RED SCARF.\pEveryone will recognize the coolness\nof that POKéMON!
Let a POKéMON hold that BLUE SCARF.\pIts beauty will be accentuated much\nmore than now!
Let a POKéMON hold that PINK SCARF.\pIt will draw out the cuteness of\nthe POKéMON some more!
Let a POKéMON hold that GREEN SCARF.\pThat will enhance the\nsmartness of POKéMON!
Let a POKéMON hold that YELLOW SCARF.\pIt will bolster your POKéMON's\ntoughness so much more!
data/maps/SlateportCity_PokemonFanClub/t.SlateportCity_PokemonFanClub_Text_Nothin: I'm sorry, but I've nothing else to\ngive you! None at all!\pAfter all, you're blessed with the gift\nof raising POKéMON without resorting\lto any items!
data/maps/SlateportCity_PokemonFanClub/t.SlateportCity_PokemonFanClub_Text_ShowMe:
I love seeing POKéMON that love
their TRAINERS.\pPOKéMON are very sensitive to the
feelings of their TRAINERS.\pIf you treat your POKéMON with love
and care, they'll love you back.\pWhen your POKéMON grow to love you,
please come show me.
data/maps/SlateportCity_PokemonFanClub/t.SlateportCity_PokemonFanClub_Text_Pokemo: Your POKéMON really adores you.\pFor you, a most compassionate\nTRAINER, a gift from the FAN CLUB!
data/maps/SlateportCity_PokemonFanClub/t.SlateportCity_PokemonFanClub_Text_TreatP: POKéMON are very sensitive to the\nfeelings of their TRAINERS.\pIf you treat your POKéMON with love\nand care, they'll love you back.
data/maps/SlateportCity_PokemonFanClub/t.SlateportCity_PokemonFanClub_Text_Pokemo:
If you keep letting a POKéMON faint
in battle, it'll come to resent it.\pSoon, it will become less trusting
of the TRAINER.\pIn other words, it certainly won't
like you very much.
data/maps/SlateportCity_PokemonFanClub/t.SlateportCity_PokemonFanClub_Text_MonEnj: Do POKéMON enjoy having items used\non them?\pMine acted really happy when I gave\nit some PROTEIN.

data/maps/SlateportCity_SternsShipyard_1.SlateportCity_SternsShipyard_1F_Text_Can:
Umm... If this goes here, and that
goes over there...\pThen where does this thing go?
And what about that doohickey?\pAaargh! I can't make heads or tails
of this!
data/maps/SlateportCity_SternsShipyard_1.SlateportCity_SternsShipyard_1F_Text_Mee:
Hm?
Hi, I'm DOCK.\pCAPT. STERN commissioned me to
design a ferry.\pOh! That there...
Are they DEVON GOODS?\pBut, hmm...
This won't do...\pCAPT. STERN went off somewhere.
He said he had some work to do.\pCould I get you to go find CAPT.
STERN and deliver that to him?
data/maps/SlateportCity_SternsShipyard_1.SlateportCity_SternsShipyard_1F_Text_Cou: DOCK: Where could CAPT. STERN have\ngone off to?\pCould you go find CAPT. STERN and\ndeliver that parcel to him?
DOCK: Shipbuilding is an art.\pA lot of things can't be figured out\njust by calculating.\pI really could use advice from a veteran\nwho knows the seas...
data/maps/SlateportCity_SternsShipyard_1.SlateportCity_SternsShipyard_1F_Text_Bri: DOCK: Hi! MR. BRINEY's joined us to\nlend us his help.\pThanks to the veteran sailor, the\nferry is steadily coming together.
data/maps/SlateportCity_SternsShipyard_1.SlateportCity_SternsShipyard_1F_Text_Fer:
DOCK: The ferry is finally ready!\pThe new S.S. TIDAL is truly a marvel
of technology!\pBut, I get the feeling that we can
make something even better.\pYou know, there's never an end to
technology's march.
data/maps/SlateportCity_SternsShipyard_1.SlateportCity_SternsShipyard_1F_Text_Dec:
MR. BRINEY: Ah, {PLAYER}{KUN}!
It's been too long!\pAye, since I met you, this old seadog's
been feeling frisky!\pSo I've decided to help DOCK make a
ferry.\pAye, after all, a ferry would be able
to carry a lot of people.\pBut, you know, that DOCK is really
something special.\pWith his knack for technology and
my experience, I'm sure that we can\lbuild one great ship, aye!
data/maps/SlateportCity_SternsShipyard_1.SlateportCity_SternsShipyard_1F_Text_Sea:
The seasons, the weather, where the
moon sits in the sky...\pThese and other conditions make the
sea change its expression.\pThat's right!
The sea is like a living thing!
data/maps/SlateportCity_SternsShipyard_1.SlateportCity_SternsShipyard_1F_Text_Get: I get seasick real easily.\nSo I get to help out here instead.

data/maps/SlateportCity_SternsShipyard_2.SlateportCity_SternsShipyard_2F_Text_Shi: Designing a large ship is more like\nmaking a big building than putting\ltogether a transportation vehicle.
data/maps/SlateportCity_SternsShipyard_2.SlateportCity_SternsShipyard_2F_Text_Flo: Don't you think it's strange that a\nship made of heavy iron floats?\pIt floats because of a principle\ncalled buoyancy.
data/maps/SlateportCity_SternsShipyard_2.UnknownString_817C882:
The sea between SLATEPORT and
PACIFIDLOG has a fast-running tide.\pOrdinary ships can't make headway
through there.\pYou'd need substantial propulsion
to plow through those waters...

data/maps/SootopolisCity/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_CaveOfOriginPleaseLe: Who might you be?\pThis is the CAVE OF ORIGIN.\pThe spirits of POKéMON, becalmed at\nMT. PYRE, are said to be revived here.\pPlease leave.
data/maps/SootopolisCity/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_PhysicallyFitLivingH: Diving in the sea. Climbing up and\ndown stairs all the time...\pIf you live in this town, you end up\ngetting physically fit.
data/maps/SootopolisCity/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_WonderWhatWorldIsLik: I... I've never been out of this city.\pI wonder what the world is like on the\nother side of this round sky?
data/maps/SootopolisCity/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_NoOrdinaryTourist1: Hm!\nYou've come all the way to SOOTOPOLIS?\lYou're no ordinary tourist.\pBut I suppose that doesn't make you an\nextraordinary tourist, either.
data/maps/SootopolisCity/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_SootopolisSkyBeautif:
SOOTOPOLIS sprang up as a town in the
crater of a volcano.\pIf you look up at the sky, the lip of
the crater is also visible.\lSo, all you see is the sky in a circle.\pBut that's what makes the sky above
SOOTOPOLIS the most beautiful.
data/maps/SootopolisCity/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_YouCameInRainstorm: STEVEN: {PLAYER}{KUN}, you came, too?\nIn this terrible rainstorm, yet...\pOh, yes, can you hear out what my\nfriend has to say?
data/maps/SootopolisCity/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_MyNameIsWallaceDownp:
My name is WALLACE.
I'm this town's GYM LEADER.\pI've also been entrusted with the
protection of the CAVE OF ORIGIN.\pThis downpour is caused by a power
emanating from the CAVE OF ORIGIN.
data/maps/SootopolisCity/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_ThatIsTheBlueOrb: That... That is the BLUE ORB.\pI see.\nFollow me.
data/maps/SootopolisCity/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_PeopleNeedRainToLive: STEVEN: This rain...\pPeople and POKéMON need water to live...\pBut why does this rain fill us with\nso much dread?\pThe rain clouds over SOOTOPOLIS will\nkeep building and soon extend all\lover HOENN...\pIf that were to happen...
data/maps/SootopolisCity/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_CaveOfOriginWithBlue:
WALLACE: The CAVE OF ORIGIN is ahead.\pNo one from SOOTOPOLIS is permitted
to enter the CAVE OF ORIGIN.\pBut you must go.
Together with your BLUE ORB.\pYou must go regardless of what awaits
you inside the CAVE...
data/maps/SootopolisCity/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_NeverExpectedHolding: STEVEN: {PLAYER}{KUN}, I never expected you\nto be holding the BLUE ORB.\pYou'll be okay. With your POKéMON,\nyou'll get things done no matter what.\pI'm convinced of it!
data/maps/SootopolisCity/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_YouMustGoWithBlueOrb: WALLACE: You must go together with\nyour BLUE ORB.\pYou must go regardless of what awaits\nyou inside the CAVE...
data/maps/SootopolisCity/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_YoullBeOkaySapphire: STEVEN: You'll be okay. With your\nPOKéMON, you'll get things done\lwhatever happens.\pI'm convinced of it!
data/maps/SootopolisCity/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_YouCameInScorchingSu: STEVEN: {PLAYER}{KUN}, you came, too?\nUnder this scorching sun, yet...\pOh, yes, can you hear out what my\nfriend has to say?
data/maps/SootopolisCity/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_MyNameIsWallaceSunsh:
My name is WALLACE.
I'm this town's GYM LEADER.\pI've also been entrusted with the
protection of the CAVE OF ORIGIN.\pThis sunshine is caused by a power
emanating from the CAVE OF ORIGIN.
data/maps/SootopolisCity/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_ThatIsTheRedOrb: That... That is the RED ORB.\pI see.\nFollow me.
data/maps/SootopolisCity/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_PeopleNeedSunlightTo:
STEVEN: This sunlight...\pPeople and POKéMON need sunlight
to live...\pBut why does this sunlight fill us
with so much dread?\pThe blazing sun over SOOTOPOLIS is
intensifying... Soon, all of HOENN\lwill be under its withering glare...\pIf that were to happen...
data/maps/SootopolisCity/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_CaveOfOriginWithRedO:
WALLACE: The CAVE OF ORIGIN is ahead.\pNo one from SOOTOPOLIS is permitted
to enter the CAVE OF ORIGIN.\pBut you must go. 
Together with your RED ORB.\pYou must go regardless of what awaits
you inside the CAVE...
data/maps/SootopolisCity/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_NeverExpectedHolding: STEVEN: {PLAYER}{KUN}, I never expected you\nto be holding the RED ORB.\pYou'll be okay. With your POKéMON,\nyou'll get things done no matter what.\pI'm convinced of it!
data/maps/SootopolisCity/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_YouMustGoWithRedOrb: WALLACE: You must go together with\nyour RED ORB.\pYou must go regardless of what awaits\nyou inside the CAVE...
data/maps/SootopolisCity/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_YoullBeOkayRuby: STEVEN: You'll be okay. With your\nPOKéMON, you'll get things done\lwhatever happens.\pI'm convinced of it!
data/maps/SootopolisCity/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_TheLegendWasTrue: The legend told by the old man on\nMT. PYRE... It wasn't a made-up story.
data/maps/SootopolisCity/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_NaturalBalanceIsShif: The natural balance of HOENN is going\nthrough a wrenching shift...
data/maps/SootopolisCity/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_WeOweItAllToYou:
STEVEN: {PLAYER}{KUN}, we owe it all to you.\pThe sky above SOOTOPOLIS has returned
to normal. For that, WALLACE sends his\lthanks, too.\pAnd, that same WALLACE is waiting for
you inside.\pHe's strong.
But the way you are now, you should be\lon equal footing with him.\pGive it your best shot.
data/maps/SootopolisCity/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_AllLifeStartsAtTheCa: All life starts at the CAVE OF ORIGIN,\nand it all ends on MT. PYRE...\pWhere do people and POKéMON come\nfrom? Where are we bound?
data/maps/SootopolisCity/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_YoureGoingToChalleng: Let me guess, you're going to challenge\nWALLACE?\pOh, you are really?\nYou're awfully brave!
data/maps/SootopolisCity/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_BecomeYourFan: Let me guess, you've beaten WALLACE!\nOh, you did, really?\pMaybe I'll become your fan!
data/maps/SootopolisCity/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_NoOrdinaryTourist2: Hm!\nYou've come all the way to SOOTOPOLIS?\lYou're no ordinary tourist.\pBut I suppose that doesn't make you an\nextraordinary tourist, either.
data/maps/SootopolisCity/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_NightSkyFavoriteScen: A circle of a night sky framed by the\ncrater of a volcano...\pAnd in that ring, stars flicker and\nblink as if they were alive...\lIt's my favorite scenery.
data/maps/SootopolisCity/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_GymSign: SOOTOPOLIS CITY POKéMON GYM\nLEADER: WALLACE\p“Artist, and lover of WATER.”
data/maps/SootopolisCity/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_CitySign: SOOTOPOLIS CITY\p“The mystical city where history\nslumbers.”

data/maps/SootopolisCity_Gym_1F/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Gym_1F_Text_GymGuideAdvic:
Yo! How's it going, CHAMPION-
bound {PLAYER}?\pSOOTOPOLIS's GYM LEADER WALLACE is
a master of WATER-type POKéMON.\pAnd, to get to WALLACE, an icy floor
will hamper your progress...\pListen, I'm sorry, but that's all the
advice that I have for you.\pThe rest of the way, you have to
go for it yourself!
data/maps/SootopolisCity_Gym_1F/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Gym_1F_Text_GymGuidePostV: Yow! You've beaten even WALLACE, who\nwas supposedly the best in all HOENN!\pOkay! Check out your TRAINER's CARD.\pIf you've gotten all the BADGES, you're\nset for the POKéMON LEAGUE challenge!
data/maps/SootopolisCity_Gym_1F/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_AndreaIntro: I'll show you the sublime techniques\nI learned from our LEADER WALLACE!
data/maps/SootopolisCity_Gym_1F/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_AndreaPostBa: Watch what happens if you crack all\nthe floor tiles.
data/maps/SootopolisCity_Gym_1F/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_CrissyIntro: You came all the way here, but you won't\nget to see WALLACE.\pNot if you lose to me, you won't!
data/maps/SootopolisCity_Gym_1F/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_CrissyDefeat: You're strong!\nI was fooled by your cute looks!
data/maps/SootopolisCity_Gym_1F/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_CrissyPostBa: You might be good enough to avoid\nbeing wiped out in one hit by WALLACE.
data/maps/SootopolisCity_Gym_1F/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_BriannaIntro: The sight of WALLACE conducting a\nbattle...\pThe very beauty of it compelled me to\nbecome a TRAINER.
data/maps/SootopolisCity_Gym_1F/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_BriannaDefea: You battled with more beauty than\nI could muster...
data/maps/SootopolisCity_Gym_1F/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_BriannaPostB: The grace you bring to battle is\nfabulous.\pOh... I'm so fortunate to have found\nPOKéMON.
data/maps/SootopolisCity_Gym_1F/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Gym_1F_Text_ConnieIntro: I should teach you how harsh battles\ncan be.
data/maps/SootopolisCity_Gym_1F/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_ConniePostBa: I'll tell you something good.\pIf you want to reach WALLACE, you\nneed to walk on each floor tile once.
data/maps/SootopolisCity_Gym_1F/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Gym_1F_Text_BridgetIntro: The POKéMON GYM of the highest level\nin the HOENN region...\pThat's the SOOTOPOLIS GYM.
data/maps/SootopolisCity_Gym_1F/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Gym_1F_Text_BridgetDefeat: What a high level you are!
data/maps/SootopolisCity_Gym_1F/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Gym_1F_Text_BridgetPostBa: Rather than being satisfied by being\nin a strong GYM, I imagine training in\lother places will make you stronger.\lBut above all, it looks more fun.
data/maps/SootopolisCity_Gym_1F/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Gym_1F_Text_OliviaIntro: I train my POKéMON together with\nWALLACE.\pDon't think I'm a pushover.
data/maps/SootopolisCity_Gym_1F/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Gym_1F_Text_OliviaPostBat: I think you have potential.\nWhy don't you stay and train with us?
data/maps/SootopolisCity_Gym_1F/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Gym_1F_Text_TiffanyIntro: A graceful glide across the ice while\ncrossing no lines...\pA TRAINER putting on that performance\nwould be elegantly beautiful!
data/maps/SootopolisCity_Gym_1F/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Gym_1F_Text_TiffanyPostBa: This is really obvious, but how strong\nyou are as a TRAINER has nothing to do\lwith how young or old you are.
data/maps/SootopolisCity_Gym_1F/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Gym_1F_Text_MarissaIntro: When I'm with my POKéMON, the time\nflies by before you can say, “Oops!”
data/maps/SootopolisCity_Gym_1F/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Gym_1F_Text_MarissaPostBa: I wish I can forget about lost causes\nbefore I can manage an “Oops!”
data/maps/SootopolisCity_Gym_1F/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Gym_1F_Text_WallaceIntro:
Allow me to formally introduce
myself.\pI am WALLACE.
The GYM LEADER of SOOTOPOLIS.\pThere's something about you...
A difference in your demeanor.\pI think I sense that in you.\pWhat happened inside the CAVE OF
ORIGIN, and what you did, I will likely\llearn through our upcoming battle.\pNow, show me. Show me the power you
wield with your POKéMON.\pAnd I, in turn, shall present you with
a performance of illusions in water\lby me and my POKéMON!
data/maps/SootopolisCity_Gym_1F/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Gym_1F_Text_WallaceDefeat:
Bravo.\pI realize now your authenticity and
magnificence as a POKéMON TRAINER.\pI find much joy in having met you and
your POKéMON.\pYou have proven yourself worthy of
the RAIN BADGE. Accept it.
data/maps/SootopolisCity_Gym_1F/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Gym_1F_Text_ExplainRainBa:
Having that BADGE assures you the
full obedience of all your POKéMON to\levery command you make.\pThe BADGE also allows the use of the
HM move WATERFALL to scale walls\lof cascading water.\pAnd, so that you never forget the
battle we shared, take this...
data/maps/SootopolisCity_Gym_1F/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Gym_1F_Text_ExplainWaterP: The TM I handed you contains\nWATER PULSE.\pIn use, it will occasionally confuse\nthe target with ultrasonic waves.
data/maps/SootopolisCity_Gym_1F/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Gym_1F_Text_WallacePostBa: TRAINERS who have gathered all the\nGYM BADGES of HOENN should make way\lfor the ultimate destination.\pThe POKéMON LEAGUE.\pTravel to the easternmost reaches\nof HOENN, to the island EVER GRANDE.\lThe POKéMON LEAGUE is there.
data/maps/SootopolisCity_Gym_1F/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Gym_1F_Text_GoGetFortreeB: There remains but one BADGE to\nobtain in HOENN.\pIf you wish to challenge the POKéMON\nLEAGUE, you must obtain the last\lBADGE from the GYM in FORTREE.
data/maps/SootopolisCity_Gym_1F/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Gym_1F_Text_GymStatueCert: SOOTOPOLIS CITY POKéMON GYM\pWALLACE'S CERTIFIED TRAINERS:\n{PLAYER}

data/maps/SootopolisCity_House1/text.inc.SootopolisCity_House1_Text_DevelopedThis: For thirty years I've remained in\nSOOTOPOLIS honing my skills.\pI developed a shattering TM.\nI bequeath it to you!
data/maps/SootopolisCity_House1/text.inc.SootopolisCity_House1_Text_ExplainBrickB: TM31 contains BRICK BREAK! It's a move\nso horrible that I can't describe it.

data/maps/SootopolisCity_House2/text.inc.SootopolisCity_House2_Text_DidYouKnowAbo: MT. PYRE...\pAt its peak are two orbs placed side\nby side. Did you know?
data/maps/SootopolisCity_House2/text.inc.SootopolisCity_House2_Text_YesTwoOrbsSid: Yes, two orbs side by side...\pThe sight of them together...\nIt is somehow soothing...
data/maps/SootopolisCity_House2/text.inc.SootopolisCity_House2_Text_OughtToVisitA: Is that so?\nPerhaps you ought to visit and see...

data/maps/SootopolisCity_House3/text.inc.SootopolisCity_House3_Text_WallaceHasMan: You're a POKéMON TRAINER, aren't you?\pSOOTOPOLIS's GYM LEADER WALLACE has\nmany fans.\lDo you have any?
data/maps/SootopolisCity_House3/text.inc.SootopolisCity_House3_Text_YouMustBePret: Oh, then you must be pretty strong.
data/maps/SootopolisCity_House3/text.inc.SootopolisCity_House3_Text_LonesomeTryWo: Oh, dear...\nThat's a little lonesome.\pTry working a little harder to get a\nfan following.
data/maps/SootopolisCity_House3/text.inc.SootopolisCity_House3_Text_TrainerFanClu: Dedicated fans come over from even\nKANTO and JOHTO.\pIt was really wild when I went to the\nTRAINER FAN CLUB in LILYCOVE.

data/maps/SootopolisCity_House4/text.inc.SootopolisCity_House4_Text_AncientTreasu:
Listen up, and I'll tell you something
good.\pThere's supposed to be an ancient
ruin in the sea around here.\pThere could be treasures just waiting
to be discovered down there.
data/maps/SootopolisCity_House4/text.inc.SootopolisCity_House4_Text_StrollUnderwa: Ancient treasures...\pIt would be nice if they existed, but\neven if they didn't, it would be so\lbeautiful to take an underwater\lstroll with my POKéMON.

data/maps/SootopolisCity_House5/text.inc.SootopolisCity_House5_Text_SootopolisMtP: There appears to be some connection\nbetween SOOTOPOLIS and MT. PYRE.\pMy friends and I did some research on\nit at the lab where I used to work.
data/maps/SootopolisCity_House5/text.inc.SootopolisCity_House5_Text_BrotherUsedTo: My big brother used to study the sea.

data/maps/SootopolisCity_House6/text.inc.SootopolisCity_House6_Text_FirstGuestInW: Hello! You're our first guest in a\ngood while.\pYou've brightened up my day, so I'll\ngive you a big WAILMER DOLL.
data/maps/SootopolisCity_House6/text.inc.SootopolisCity_House6_Text_IllHoldItForY: Oh, you want it, but not right now?\nOkay, then I'll hold it for you.
data/maps/SootopolisCity_House6/text.inc.SootopolisCity_House6_Text_DontWantThisD: Are you sure?\nYou don't want this DOLL?

data/maps/SootopolisCity_House7/text.inc.SootopolisCity_House7_Text_CityFromErupt:
An underwater volcano erupted and
forced itself up from the depths.\pIts crater emerged from the sea and
became filled with rainwater.\pThat's how SOOTOPOLIS CITY came into
being.
data/maps/SootopolisCity_House7/text.inc.SootopolisCity_House7_Text_CaveMadeToKee: The cave that links SOOTOPOLIS and\nthe outside world...\pIt seems as if the cave was made to\nkeep something from getting out.\pOr am I just imagining things?

data/maps/SootopolisCity_House8/text.inc.SootopolisCity_MonSizeRecordHouse_Text_P:
Do you know the POKéMON SHROOMISH?
It's hardly ever seen in SOOTOPOLIS.\pAnyway, I love big SHROOMISH.
The bigger the better.\pBut my younger brother, he says that
BARBOACH is bigger.\pThat's silly. SHROOMISH has to be
bigger than that!\pHuh? Do you have a SHROOMISH with you?
P-p-please, show me!
data/maps/SootopolisCity_House8/text.inc.SootopolisCity_MonSizeRecordHouse_Text_G:
{STR_VAR_2} inches!
Oh, my gosh, this is a big one!\pIt might even beat the big BARBOACH
my younger brother saw!\pThanks for showing me.
This is my thanks!
data/maps/SootopolisCity_House8/text.inc.SootopolisCity_MonSizeRecordHouse_Text_S: {STR_VAR_2} inches, is it?\pHmm... I've seen a bigger SHROOMISH\nthan this one.
data/maps/SootopolisCity_House8/text.inc.SootopolisCity_MonSizeRecordHouse_Text_T: Oh, now this is quite something...\nBut it's not a SHROOMISH!
data/maps/SootopolisCity_House8/text.inc.SootopolisCity_MonSizeRecordHouse_Text_D: You don't have a big SHROOMISH?\nThat's too bad...\pIf you get a big SHROOMISH, please\ncome show me.
data/maps/SootopolisCity_House8/text.inc.SootopolisCity_MonSizeRecordHouse_Text_B: The biggest SHROOMISH in history!\n{STR_VAR_2}'s {STR_VAR_3}-inch giant!\pA SHROOMISH bigger than a BARBOACH\nalways wanted!
data/maps/SootopolisCity_House8/text.inc.SootopolisCity_MonSizeRecordHouse_Text_P:
Do you know the POKéMON BARBOACH?
It's rarely seen in SOOTOPOLIS.\pI love, I mean love, big BARBOACH!\pMy big brother says that SHROOMISH is
bigger.\pBut that's wrong! Everyone knows that
BARBOACH is a lot bigger.\pHunh? Do you have a BARBOACH?
P-p-please show me!
data/maps/SootopolisCity_House8/text.inc.SootopolisCity_MonSizeRecordHouse_Text_W:
{STR_VAR_2} inches!
Wow, that is big!\pIt might be even bigger than the huge
SHROOMISH my big brother saw.\pThanks for showing me!
This is my thanks!
data/maps/SootopolisCity_House8/text.inc.SootopolisCity_House8_Text_BagIsFull: Whoops, looks like your BAG is full.
data/maps/SootopolisCity_House8/text.inc.SootopolisCity_MonSizeRecordHouse_Text_S: {STR_VAR_2} inches?\pHmm... I've seen a bigger BARBOACH\nthan this one here.
data/maps/SootopolisCity_House8/text.inc.SootopolisCity_MonSizeRecordHouse_Text_T: Well, isn't this something!\nBut it's no BARBOACH!
data/maps/SootopolisCity_House8/text.inc.SootopolisCity_MonSizeRecordHouse_Text_D: Don't you have a big BARBOACH?\nHow disappointing...\pIf you get a big BARBOACH, please\ncome show me!
data/maps/SootopolisCity_House8/text.inc.SootopolisCity_MonSizeRecordHouse_Text_B: The biggest BARBOACH in history!\n{STR_VAR_2}'s {STR_VAR_3}-inch colossus!\pA BARBOACH bigger than a SHROOMISH\nalways wanted!

data/maps/SootopolisCity_Mart/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Mart_Text_PPUpIsGreat: PP UP is great!\pIt raises the POWER POINTS, the PP,\nof a POKéMON move.
data/maps/SootopolisCity_Mart/text.inc.SootopolisCity_Mart_Text_FullRestoreItem: Do you know FULL RESTORE?\pFull restoration of HP!\nEradication of all status problems!\pIt's truly an item of your dreams!

data/maps/SootopolisCity_PokemonCenter_1.SootopolisCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Wal:
WALLACE, this town's GYM LEADER, is a
powerful TRAINER.\pHe's rumored to be the best in the
whole HOENN region.\pBut the ELITE FOUR...\pThey're said to be even stronger than
WALLACE. How strong could they be?
data/maps/SootopolisCity_PokemonCenter_1.SootopolisCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Eve: Everyone in town has taken refuge\nand won't come out of their homes.\pThis weather..\nCould it be the prelude to something?
data/maps/SootopolisCity_PokemonCenter_1.SootopolisCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Alw: Whenever, wherever, and whatever\nhappens, I will always be friends with\lPOKéMON.\pBecause it's fun to be with POKéMON!
data/maps/SootopolisCity_PokemonCenter_1.SootopolisCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_ImR: I don't know why...\nBut... I'm really scared...

data/maps/Underwater_SeafloorCavern/text.Underwater_SeafloorCavern_Text_197435:
“SUBMARINE EXPLORER 1” is painted
on the hull.\pThis is the submarine TEAM {EVIL_TEAM}
stole in SLATEPORT!\pTEAM {EVIL_TEAM} must have gone
ashore here.

data/maps/VerdanturfTown/text.inc.VerdanturfTown_Text_ManTryingToDigTunnel:
My papa told me.\pHe says this tunnel is full of
timid POKéMON.\pThey get all scared of loud noise and
make a big uproar.\pSo they had to stop the big tunnel
project.\pBut there's one man.
He's trying to dig the tunnel by himself!
data/maps/VerdanturfTown/text.inc.VerdanturfTown_Text_ManDugTunnelForLove: There was a man who dug a tunnel for\na lady he loved.\pI don't really get it, but hey!
data/maps/VerdanturfTown/text.inc.VerdanturfTown_Text_AirCleanHere: The way the winds blow, volcanic ash\nis never blown in this direction.\pThe air is clean and delicious here.\nLiving here should do wonders for even\lfrail and sickly people.
data/maps/VerdanturfTown/text.inc.VerdanturfTown_Text_MakeContestDebut: I'm feeling a little confident about the\ncuteness of my POKéMON.\pI wanted to make its CONTEST debut,\nso that's why I'm here.
data/maps/VerdanturfTown/text.inc.VerdanturfTown_Text_GuyTryingToBustThrou:
Did you see the cave next to the
POKéMON MART?\pThere's a guy in there who's trying to
bust up boulders so he can bust out\lthrough to the other side.\pIt'd be great if we could go through...
It'll make it easy to visit RUSTBORO.
data/maps/VerdanturfTown/text.inc.VerdanturfTown_Text_EasyToGetToRustboroN: That cave next to the POKéMON MART\nis now a tunnel to the other side.\pIt's great - it's easy to go shop for new\nDEVON products in RUSTBORO now.
data/maps/VerdanturfTown/text.inc.VerdanturfTown_Text_TownSign: VERDANTURF TOWN\p“The windswept highlands with the\nsweet fragrance of grass.”
data/maps/VerdanturfTown/text.inc.VerdanturfTown_Text_ContestHallSign: POKéMON CONTESTS\nNORMAL RANK REGISTRATION\p“Gather here, all ye POKéMON TRAINERS!”
data/maps/VerdanturfTown/text.inc.VerdanturfTown_Text_RusturfTunnelSign: RUSTURF TUNNEL\n“Linking RUSTBORO and VERDANTURF\p“The tunnel project has been\ncanceled.”

data/maps/VerdanturfTown_ContestHall/tex.VerdanturfTown_ContestHall_Text_177FB4:
Which CONTEST are you entering?
Want a piece of advice?\pIn any CONTEST, for example, a CUTE
CONTEST, I don't think they judge you\lonly on cuteness in the first round.\pYou need to work out ways for raising
POKéMON better.
data/maps/VerdanturfTown_ContestHall/tex.VerdanturfTown_ContestHall_Text_178091: I raised my POKéMON to be cute.\pI found out you can put POKéMON in\na CONTEST for cuteness!\pI'm so glad I raised my POKéMON with\nloving care...
data/maps/VerdanturfTown_ContestHall/tex.VerdanturfTown_ContestHall_Text_178120: My POKéMON rules!\pIt's cool, tough yet beautiful, cute,\nand smart. It's complete!\pI may as well go for wins in every\nsingle CONTEST.

data/maps/VerdanturfTown_ContestLobby/te.VerdanturfTown_ContestLobby_Text_177D6C: I went in through the entrance and\ntook a look around the CONTEST hall.\pGetting up on that big stage...\nIt's going to be tense!
data/maps/VerdanturfTown_ContestLobby/te.VerdanturfTown_ContestLobby_Text_177DEC:
Oh, my love for POKéMON...
The attraction they evoke in me...\pWhoops!
You weren't meant to see that!\lWell, anyway.\pIf you're entering a CONTEST, try this
move on for size.
data/maps/VerdanturfTown_ContestLobby/te.VerdanturfTown_ContestLobby_Text_177E98: My feelings for POKéMON...\nOh, they attract me so...
data/maps/VerdanturfTown_ContestLobby/te.VerdanturfTown_ContestLobby_Text_177ECD:
Which CONTEST are you planning on
entering?\pIf you're entering a COOL CONTEST,
a cool POKéMON has to be the one!\pPick a POKéMON worthy of the CONTEST
theme, and make sure it has the\lright set of moves to match.\pThat's fundamental!

data/maps/VerdanturfTown_FriendshipRater.VerdanturfTown_FriendshipRatersHouse_Tex: Let me see your POKéMON.\nI'll check to see how much it likes you.\pOh.\nYour POKéMON...
It adores you.\nIt can't possibly love you any more.\lI even feel happy seeing it.
It seems to be very happy.\nIt obviously likes you a whole lot.
It likes you quite a lot.\nIt seems to want to be babied a little.
It's getting used to you.\nIt seems to believe in you.
It's not very used to you yet.\nIt neither loves nor hates you.
It's very wary.\nIt has scary viciousness in its eyes.\lIt doesn't like you much at all.
This is a little hard for me to say...\pYour POKéMON simply detests you.\nDoesn't that make you uncomfortable?

data/maps/VerdanturfTown_House/text.inc.VerdanturfTown_House_Text_TrainersGather: Far away, deep in EVER GRANDE CITY,\nis the POKéMON LEAGUE.\pThe TRAINERS who gather there are\nall frighteningly well skilled.
data/maps/VerdanturfTown_House/text.inc.VerdanturfTown_House_Text_DefeatEliteFou: In the POKéMON LEAGUE, I think the\nrules say that you have to battle the\lELITE FOUR all in a row.\pIf you lose to any of them, you have\nto begin your challenge again from the\lfirst one.

data/maps/VerdanturfTown_Mart/text.inc.VerdanturfTown_Mart_Text_XSpecialIsCruci: For any POKéMON match, X SPECIAL\nis crucial.\pIt jacks up the power of some moves\neven though it's only for one battle.
data/maps/VerdanturfTown_Mart/text.inc.VerdanturfTown_Mart_Text_NoStrategyGuide: They don't sell any items that will let\nyou win CONTESTS...\pIt means you have to raise POKéMON\ndiligently on an everyday basis.
data/maps/VerdanturfTown_Mart/text.inc.VerdanturfTown_Mart_Text_NestBallOnWeake: The NEST BALL works better on\nweakened POKéMON.\pVERDANTURF is the only place you can\nbuy it.

data/maps/VerdanturfTown_PokemonCenter_1.VerdanturfTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Tra: I daresay a TRAINER isn't qualified if\nPOKéMON aren't settled and friendly.\lHave you given them any {POKEBLOCK}S?
data/maps/VerdanturfTown_PokemonCenter_1.VerdanturfTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_All: Let me hazard a guess why you're in\nVERDANTURF. The reason: CONTESTS.\pAll CONTEST challenges originate here.

data/maps/VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse/tex.VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_Text_Stronger:
WALLY: I lost to you, {PLAYER}, but I'm
not feeling down anymore.\pBecause I have a new purpose in life.
Together with my RALTS, I'm going\lto challenge POKéMON GYMS and become\la great TRAINER.\pPlease watch me, {PLAYER}.
I'm going to be stronger than you.\pWhen I do, I'm going to challenge you
to another battle.
WALLY: Please watch me, {PLAYER}.\nI'm going to get stronger than you.\pWhen I do, I'm going to challenge you\nto another battle.
data/maps/VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse/tex.VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_Text_WallysNe:
UNCLE: Oh! {PLAYER}{KUN}!
WALLY's next door.\pBut, boy, there's something I have to
tell you.\pThis natural environment is doing
wonders for WALLY's health.\pMaybe it's not just the environment.
It could be POKéMON that are giving the\lboy hope.
data/maps/VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse/tex.VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_Text_WallySli: WALLY's gone away...\nHe slipped off on his own...
data/maps/VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse/tex.VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_Text_WallyGon: UNCLE: Is that right?\nWALLY's gone away that far all by\lhimself...\pWell, I have to give him credit - he is\nmy little brother's son.
data/maps/VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse/tex.VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_Text_MeetWand:
WANDA: You are?
Oh, right, I get it!\pYou're the {PLAYER} who WALLY was
telling me about.\pI'm WALLY's cousin.
Glad to meet you!\pI think WALLY's become a lot more lively
and healthy since he came here.
data/maps/VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse/tex.VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_Text_DontWorr: WANDA: Don't worry about WALLY.\nHe'll be just fine.\pI know my little cousin, and he has\nPOKéMON with him, too.
data/maps/VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse/tex.VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_Text_CanSeeGi: Thanks to you, I can see my girlfriend\nevery day.\lHappy? You bet I am!
data/maps/VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse/tex.VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_Text_Daughter:
My daughter's boyfriend is a very
driven and passionate sort of person.\pHe's been digging a tunnel nonstop
just so he can see my daughter.\pMy daughter's a little concerned,
so she goes out to the tunnel a lot.
It's amazing. My daughter's boyfriend\nwas digging the tunnel by hand!\pIt's so incredible!
data/maps/VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse/tex.VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_Text_IfAnythi: If anything were to happen to WALLY,\nI would never be able to look his\lparents in PETALBURG in the eye...
data/maps/VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse/tex.VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_Text_WallyWas: WALLY was in EVER GRANDE?\pHis parents in PETALBURG would be\nastonished to hear that!

data/maps/VictoryRoad_1F/text.inc.VictoryRoad_1F_Text_WallyNotGoingToLoseA:
WALLY: Hi! {PLAYER}!\pI bet you're surprised to see me here!\pI made it all the way here, and it's
all thanks to you!\p{PLAYER}, losing to you that time
made me stronger!\pBut I'm not going to lose anymore!\pI'm going to win! For the POKéMON who
gave me courage and strength!\pOkay... Here I come!
data/maps/VictoryRoad_1F/text.inc.VictoryRoad_1F_Text_WallyEntranceDefeat: Wow!\n{PLAYER}, you are strong, after all!
data/maps/VictoryRoad_1F/text.inc.VictoryRoad_1F_Text_WallyPostEntranceBat: WALLY: I couldn't beat you today,\n{PLAYER}, but one of these days, I'll\lcatch up to you!
data/maps/VictoryRoad_1F/text.inc.VictoryRoad_1F_Text_WallyIntro: WALLY: Hi! {PLAYER}!\pI've gotten stronger since that last\ntime! I wanted to show you, {PLAYER}!\pOkay... Here I come!
data/maps/VictoryRoad_1F/text.inc.VictoryRoad_1F_Text_WallyDefeat: Wow!\n{PLAYER}, you are strong, after all!
data/maps/VictoryRoad_1F/text.inc.VictoryRoad_1F_Text_WallyPostBattle: WALLY: I couldn't beat you this time,\ntoo... But one of these days, {PLAYER},\lI'm going to catch up to you...\pAnd challenge the POKéMON LEAGUE!
data/maps/VictoryRoad_1F/text.inc.VictoryRoad_1F_Text_EdgarIntro: I've made it this far a couple times,\nbut the last stretch is so long...
data/maps/VictoryRoad_1F/text.inc.VictoryRoad_1F_Text_EdgarPostBattle: You've made it this far. Keep the\nmomentum going and become the\lCHAMPION! If anyone can, it's you!
data/maps/VictoryRoad_1F/text.inc.VictoryRoad_1F_Text_AlbertIntro: I didn't come all this way to lose now.\nThat possibility doesn't exist!
data/maps/VictoryRoad_1F/text.inc.VictoryRoad_1F_Text_AlbertPostBattle: I lost here...\pThat means I lack the qualifications\nto become the CHAMPION...
data/maps/VictoryRoad_1F/text.inc.VictoryRoad_1F_Text_HopeIntro: This seemingly infinite and harsh road\nlives up to its name of VICTORY.
data/maps/VictoryRoad_1F/text.inc.VictoryRoad_1F_Text_HopePostBattle: You seem to have the potential for\nbecoming the CHAMPION.

data/maps/VictoryRoad_B1F/text.inc.VictoryRoad_B1F_Text_SamuelIntro: The thought that I'm getting closer to\nthe POKéMON LEAGUE...\pI'm getting stage fright...
data/maps/VictoryRoad_B1F/text.inc.VictoryRoad_B1F_Text_SamuelPostBattle: The POKéMON LEAGUE became distant\nagain... What a letdown...
data/maps/VictoryRoad_B1F/text.inc.VictoryRoad_B1F_Text_ShannonIntro: To win your way through the POKéMON\nLEAGUE, you need the trust of your\lPOKéMON.
data/maps/VictoryRoad_B1F/text.inc.VictoryRoad_B1F_Text_ShannonDefeat: Your relationship is based on\nsolid trust.
data/maps/VictoryRoad_B1F/text.inc.VictoryRoad_B1F_Text_ShannonPostBattle: By being together all the time, trust\ngrows between POKéMON and TRAINERS.
data/maps/VictoryRoad_B1F/text.inc.VictoryRoad_B1F_Text_MichelleIntro: This isn't the goal. It's only a place\non the way to the POKéMON LEAGUE.
data/maps/VictoryRoad_B1F/text.inc.VictoryRoad_B1F_Text_MichellePostBattle: You'll do fine, for sure!\nYour POKéMON are all eager to go!

data/maps/VictoryRoad_B2F/text.inc.VictoryRoad_B2F_Text_VitoIntro: I trained together with my whole family,\nevery one of us!\lI'm not losing to anyone!
data/maps/VictoryRoad_B2F/text.inc.VictoryRoad_B2F_Text_VitoDefeat: Better than my family?!\nIs that possible?!
data/maps/VictoryRoad_B2F/text.inc.VictoryRoad_B2F_Text_VitoPostBattle: I was better than everyone in my\nfamily. I've never lost before...\pI've lost my confidence...\nMaybe I'll go home...
data/maps/VictoryRoad_B2F/text.inc.VictoryRoad_B2F_Text_OwenIntro: I'd heard that there was a tough\nlittle kid around. Do they mean you?
data/maps/VictoryRoad_B2F/text.inc.VictoryRoad_B2F_Text_OwenPostBattle: The rumors I heard, that tough little\nkid is from PETALBURG CITY.
data/maps/VictoryRoad_B2F/text.inc.VictoryRoad_B2F_Text_CarolineIntro: You must be getting a little tired.
data/maps/VictoryRoad_B2F/text.inc.VictoryRoad_B2F_Text_CarolineDefeat: No signs of tiring at all!
data/maps/VictoryRoad_B2F/text.inc.VictoryRoad_B2F_Text_CarolinePostBattle: VICTORY ROAD and the POKéMON LEAGUE\nare long and grueling challenges.\lBeware of fatigue!
data/maps/VictoryRoad_B2F/text.inc.VictoryRoad_B2F_Text_JulieIntro: You shouldn't get complacent just\nbecause you have a lot of GYM BADGES.\pThere's always going to be someone\nwho's better than you!
data/maps/VictoryRoad_B2F/text.inc.VictoryRoad_B2F_Text_JuliePostBattle: Gaze on your collected BADGES and\nremember the TRAINERS you've faced.

data/strings2.s.gMultiText_LinkError: {HIGHLIGHT TRANSPARENT}{COLOR WHITE2}Link error...\nCheck your Game Link cable connection,\nand turn the power off and on.
data/strings2.s.gSystemText_LoadEventPressA: Press the A Button to load event.\n... ... B Button: Cancel
data/strings2.s.gSystemText_DontCutLink: Don't remove the Game Link cable.\nDon't turn off the power.

data/strings2.s.TradeText_OnlyPoke: {COLOR DARK_GREY}{HIGHLIGHT WHITE2}{SHADOW LIGHT_GREY}That's your only\nPOKéMON for battle.
data/strings2.s.TradeText_NonTradablePoke: {COLOR DARK_GREY}{HIGHLIGHT WHITE2}{SHADOW LIGHT_GREY}Your friend can't\ntrade that one.
data/strings2.s.TradeText_WaitingForFriend: {COLOR DARK_GREY}{HIGHLIGHT WHITE2}{SHADOW LIGHT_GREY}Waiting for your\nfriend to finish...
data/strings2.s.TradeText_WantToTrade: {COLOR DARK_GREY}{HIGHLIGHT WHITE2}{SHADOW LIGHT_GREY}Your friend wants\nto trade POKéMON.$

data/strings2.s.gOtherText_ReelTime:
REEL TIME
Here's your chance to take
aim and nail marks!
The Reel Time continues for
as often as the drawn number.
It all ends on a Big Bonus.
data/strings2.s.DaycareText_GetAlongVeryWell: The two seem to get along very well.
data/strings2.s.DaycareText_GetAlong: The two seem to get along.
data/strings2.s.DaycareText_DontLikeOther: The two don't seem to like each other.
data/strings2.s.DaycareText_PlayOther: The two prefer to play with other\nPOKéMON than each other.
data/strings2.s.gOtherText_HatchedFromEgg: {COLOR WHITE2}{HIGHLIGHT TRANSPARENT}{SHADOW DARK_GREY}{STR_VAR_1} hatched from the EGG!
data/strings2.s.gOtherText_NickHatchPrompt: {COLOR WHITE2}{HIGHLIGHT TRANSPARENT}{SHADOW DARK_GREY}Would you like to nickname the newly\nhatched {STR_VAR_1}?
data/strings2.s.gOtherText_DeleteOlderMove:
{STR_VAR_1} is trying to learn
{STR_VAR_2}.\pBut {STR_VAR_1} can't learn more
than four moves.\pDelete an older move to make
room for {STR_VAR_2}?
data/strings2.s.gOtherText_GiveUpTeachingMove: Give up trying to teach a new move\nto {STR_VAR_1}?
data/strings2.s.gOtherText_EggDayCare: An odd POKéMON EGG found\nby the DAY CARE couple.
data/strings2.s.gOtherText_EggNicePlace: A peculiar POKéMON EGG\nobtained at the nice place.
data/strings2.s.gOtherText_EggObtainedInTrade: A peculiar POKéMON EGG\nobtained in a trade.
data/strings2.s.gOtherText_EggHotSprings: A POKéMON EGG obtained\nat the hot springs.

This document certifies
that you have successfully
completed your POKéDEX.

data/strings2.s.gOtherText_PressAToStart: Press the A Button to start.
data/strings2.s.gOtherText_BlendAnotherBerryPrompt: Would you like to blend another BERRY?
data/strings2.s.gOtherText_OutOfBerries: You've run out of BERRIES for\nblending in the BERRY BLENDER.\p
data/strings2.s.gOtherText_NoBerriesForBlend: has no BERRIES to put in\nthe BERRY BLENDER.

data/text/ability_descriptions.inc.gAbilityDescription_FlashFire: Powers up if hit by fire.
data/text/ability_descriptions.inc.gAbilityDescription_Overgrow: Ups GRASS moves in a pinch.
data/text/ability_descriptions.inc.gAbilityDescription_Blaze: Ups FIRE moves in a pinch.
data/text/ability_descriptions.inc.gAbilityDescription_Torrent: Ups WATER moves in a pinch.
data/text/ability_descriptions.inc.gAbilityDescription_Swarm: Ups BUG moves in a pinch.

data/text/aqua_awakening.inc.UnknownString_81B41D5: ARCHIE: Fufufu...\nSo it was you, after all.
data/text/aqua_awakening.inc.UnknownString_81B4201: ARCHIE: Behold!\pSee how beautiful it is, the sleeping\nform of the ancient POKéMON KYOGRE!\pI have waited so long for this day to\ncome...
data/text/aqua_awakening.inc.UnknownString_81B4289: ARCHIE: It surprises me, how you've\nmanaged to chase me here.\pBut that's all over now.\pFor the realization of my dream,\nyou must disappear now!
data/text/aqua_awakening.inc.UnknownString_81B432C: ARCHIE: Fufufu...\pI commend you. I must recognize that\nyou are truly gifted.\pBut!\nI have this in my possession!\pWith this RED ORB, I can make KYOGRE...
data/text/aqua_awakening.inc.UnknownString_81B43C4: The RED ORB suddenly began shining\nby itself!
data/text/aqua_awakening.inc.UnknownString_81B43F2: ARCHIE: What?!\pI didn't do anything.\nWhy did the RED ORB...\pWhere did KYOGRE go?
data/text/aqua_awakening.inc.UnknownString_81B4443: ARCHIE: Hm? It's a message from our\nmembers outside...
data/text/aqua_awakening.inc.UnknownString_81B447A:
ARCHIE: Yes, what is it?\pHm...
It's raining heavily?\pGood... That should have happened.
That is why we awakened KYOGRE,\lto realize TEAM AQUA's vision of\lexpanding the sea.\pWhat?!\pIt's raining far harder than we
envisioned? You're in danger?\pThat can't be...
That's just not possible...\pHold your position and monitor the
situation!
data/text/aqua_awakening.inc.UnknownString_81B45C6: ARCHIE: There's something wrong...\pThe RED ORB is supposed to awaken\nand control KYOGRE...\pBut... Why?\nWhy did KYOGRE disappear?\pWhy?!
data/text/aqua_awakening.inc.UnknownString_81B464D:
MAXIE: What have you wrought?\pARCHIE... You've finally awoken KYOGRE,
haven't you?\pWhat will happen to the world if this
downpour continues for all eternity?\pThe world's landmass will drown in
the deepening sea...
data/text/aqua_awakening.inc.UnknownString_81B4723: ARCHIE: What are you saying?\pThe RED ORB should let me control\nKYOGRE...\lThat can't be possible...
data/text/aqua_awakening.inc.UnknownString_81B4786: MAXIE: We don't have the time to\nargue about it here!\pGet outside and see for yourself!\pSee if what you've wrought is the\nworld that you desired!
data/text/aqua_awakening.inc.UnknownString_81B4818: MAXIE: {PLAYER}{KUN}, come on, you have\nto get out of here, too!

data/text/aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B2DEE:
The power contained in the
METEORITE...\pBy amplifying its power with this
machine, MT. CHIMNEY's volcanic activity\lwill stop.\pFufufu... Eventually, the cooled-down
crater will fill with rainwater, giving\lWATER POKéMON a place to live.
data/text/aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B2ED9:
ARCHIE: You again...\pNow listen.
All life depends on the sea.\pThe sea is everything!
Its importance is paramount!\pThat is why we of TEAM AQUA are
committed to expanding the sea.\pDoing so will result in the emergence
of new POKéMON species.\pWe will return the world back to
nature for the good of POKéMON.\pThat is TEAM AQUA's vision!\pI can't allow an ignorant child like
you to get in our way.\pI, ARCHIE, will show you the
consequences of meddling!
data/text/aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3099: What?!\pI, ARCHIE, was caught off guard?!
data/text/aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B30C2: ARCHIE: Ah, whatever.\nI will give up our plans for MT.\lCHIMNEY for the time being...\pBut no one can ever stop us!\nTEAM AQUA will prevail!\pDon't you ever forget that!
data/text/aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3168: Hehehe!\pSo you've come all the way here!\pBut you're too late!\nI've already delivered the METEORITE\lfrom METEOR FALLS to the BOSS!
data/text/aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B31EA: Hehehe...\nSo I lost...\pI'm sure glad I never took you on back\nat METEOR FALLS.
data/text/aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3239: Hehehe!\pYou might have beaten me, but you don't\nstand a chance against the BOSS!\pIf you get lost now, you won't have to\nface a sound whipping!
data/text/aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B32C8: We of TEAM AQUA are working hard for\neveryone's sake.\pLike, if there's more water around,\nWATER POKéMON will be happy, and it'll\lgive people more fun places to swim!
data/text/aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B336E: Hunh?\nWhat do you mean I lost?
data/text/aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B338D: Our BOSS says, “It will make everyone\nhappy.”\pBut why does everyone keep getting\nin our way?
data/text/aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B33EA: That annoying TEAM MAGMA...\nThey always mess with our plans!
data/text/aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3446: Go! Stomp TEAM MAGMA!\nAnd expand the sea!
data/text/aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3470: Stay out of our way, okay?\pWe're trying to enlarge the sea for\nthe good of everybody!
data/text/aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B34DC: We're going to keep expanding the sea!
data/text/aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B350B: MAXIE: Oh, {PLAYER}{KUN}!\pPlease, you must stop TEAM AQUA\nfor me!\pThey're trying to make this volcano\ninactive by using the stolen\lMETEORITE's power!
data/text/aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3598: MAXIE: {PLAYER}{KUN}!\pPlease, you've got to stop TEAM AQUA\nfor me!\pDealing with these three thugs is\na lot, even for me!
data/text/aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3608:
MAXIE: {PLAYER}{KUN}! Thank you!\pWith your help, we thwarted TEAM
AQUA's destructive plan!\pBut... This victory doesn't mean the
end of their evil plans.\pWe will remain vigilant and keep up
our pursuit of TEAM AQUA.\p{PLAYER}{KUN}, we shall meet again!
data/text/aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B36F1: Darn... TEAM AQUA outnumbers us!\nWe can't keep up with them!
data/text/aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B372E: If they expand the sea, there'll be less\nhabitats for POKéMON and people!
data/text/aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3778: TEAM AQUA wants to expand the sea...\nHow's that for insane?

data/text/aqua_settled.inc.UnknownString_81B4F29: KYOGRE appears to have settled\ninto sleep again...
data/text/aqua_settled.inc.UnknownString_81B4F6C: ARCHIE: ... ... ... ... ... ...\n... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...\pThis is good-bye.\nThis is the last you've seen of me...

data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B50C3: I'll show you exactly how scary\nTEAM AQUA can be!
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B50F5: So you think you can stand up alone\nto TEAM AQUA's might...
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B5131: Yeah, so you are strong...\nBut there're a lot of us!
