data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B5166: What's up with you?\nWhat does a single kid expect to do?
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B51B5: You don't know anything.\nQuit messing around with us!
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B51EB: Hey, I remember you from MT. CHIMNEY!\nIt's payback time!
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B5248: Heh, it doesn't matter!\nWe bought ourselves some time!\pThe BOSS should have snatched what\nhe was after!
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B52B0:
ARCHIE: Not you again...\pYou've impeded our plans repeatedly,
but this time you're too late.\pThe RED ORB that rested atop
MT. PYRE...\lI, ARCHIE, claim it as mine!\pFufufu... Finally, I can realize my
grand design...\pCome on, crew!
It's SLATEPORT next!
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B53AB:
Oh, no...
This cannot happen...\pHow could they take the RED ORB?\pThe BLUE ORB and RED ORB must never
be separated. They belong together.\p... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...
Hmm...\pFine!
You take the remaining BLUE ORB.\pPlease take after that foul man and
get the other ORB back!
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B54BE: The BLUE ORB you have been entrusted\nwith and the stolen RED ORB...\pThey must never be apart...\nSomething terrible will happen...
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B5540:
So...
KYOGRE has awoken...\pThe wondrous ORB that is said to have
becalmed the raging KYOGRE...\lIt is the BLUE ORB you bear.\pThat BLUE ORB was found buried inside
the CAVE OF ORIGIN in SOOTOPOLIS...\pThere is perhaps a link between
KYOGRE and the CAVE OF ORIGIN...
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B5647: That man, he returned the RED ORB.\pAre you going to return the BLUE ORB\nto its rightful place, too?
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B56AB: What's that?!\pIf the balance is not restored, there\nis no telling what could happen.\pYou will return the BLUE ORB to its\nrightful place, yes?
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B5739: {PLAYER} handed the BLUE ORB to the\nold woman.
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B5762: Yes...\nThe two ORBS should remain here.\pIt is how it should be for the good\nof all HOENN...
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B57BE: The spirit of the sea...\pThat is what KYOGRE is said to be in\nPOKéMON form...\pIn the same manner that we and POKéMON\nhave life, the sea is alive...\pKYOGRE has taught us that...
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B586F:
MT. PYRE is where we calm the spirits
of POKéMON that have passed on...\pThis is a high place where one can
see all of HOENN...\pThe disembodied spirits of POKéMON
must find solace here...\pIs it coincidence that you are here...\pWill you hear out my tale? A tale long
told in the HOENN region?
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B5992:
It happened long, long ago...\pThe world was wracked by a ferocious
clash between the POKéMON of the sea\land the POKéMON of the land...\pThe POKéMON of the sea raised huge
waves and carved out oceans...\pThe POKéMON of the land raised
mountains and created continents...\pTheir fierce duel raged without end.\pThe world was engulfed in massive
infernos and vicious storms.\pThe BLUE ORB and the RED ORB brought
an end to the calamity.\pLight poured from the two ORBS and
becalmed the enraged adversaries.\pThe pair, made docile, dove deep into
the sea where eventually they\ldisappeared...
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B5BD7: I see...\nWell, that, too, is fine...
data/text/aqua_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B5BFC:
ARCHIE: You...
So you stopped KYOGRE...\pI shouldn't be surprised...\pI understand now that humans cannot
freely control the balance between\lthe land and the sea...\pSo I have come to return the
RED ORB...\pI doubt that we will cross paths again...
Farewell...

data/text/barboach.inc.UnknownString_81C426C: I'm very interested in big {STR_VAR_1}.\nThe bigger the better.\pHuh? Do you have a {STR_VAR_1}?\nP-p-please, show me!
data/text/barboach.inc.UnknownString_81C42CE: Oh, my gosh, this is a big one!\nThis is a grand {STR_VAR_1}!\pThanks for showing me.\nThis is my thanks!
data/text/barboach.inc.UnknownString_81C4360: Hmm... I've seen a bigger {STR_VAR_1}\nthan this one.
data/text/barboach.inc.UnknownString_81C438C: Oh, now this is quite something...\nBut it's not a {STR_VAR_1}!
data/text/barboach.inc.UnknownString_81C43C2: You don't have a big {STR_VAR_1}?\nThat's too bad...\pIf you get a big {STR_VAR_1},\nplease come show me.

data/text/bard.inc.gTextBard_HiImTheBard: Hi, I'm the BARD.\nWould you like to hear my song?
data/text/bard.inc.gTextBard_OhYouveLeftMe: Oh...\nYou've left me feeling the blues...
data/text/bard.inc.gTextBard_OhWhatAMovingSong: Oh, what a moving song...\nI wish I could play it for others...
data/text/bard.inc.gTextBard_SoHowDoYouLikeMySong:
So?
How do you like my song?\pBut I'm none too happy about the
lyrics.\pHow would you like to write some new
lyrics for me?
data/text/bard.inc.gTextBard_OhYouveLeftMe2: Oh...\nYou've left me feeling the blues...
data/text/bard.inc.gTextBard_ThankYouKindly: Thank you kindly!\nLet me sing it for you.
data/text/bard.inc.gTextBard_WasThatHowYouWanted: Was that how you wanted your song\nto go?
data/text/bard.inc.gTextBard_OkayThatsIt: Okay! That's it, then.\nI'll sing this song for a while.

data/text/berries.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_GiveEnigmaBerry: DAD: Hi, {PLAYER}!\pI just received a very rare BERRY.\nI'd like you to have it.
data/text/berries.inc.Route104_Text_1C55B9: If you see BERRIES growing in loamy\nsoil, feel free to take them.\pBut make sure you plant a BERRY in the\nsame spot. That's common courtesy.\pHere, I'll share this with you.
data/text/berries.inc.Route104_Text_1C5665:
The way you look, you must be a
TRAINER, no?\pTRAINERS often make POKéMON hold
BERRIES.\pIt's up to you whether to grow BERRIES
or use them.
data/text/berries.inc.Route111_Text_1C56F0:
I watered my plants lots and lots!
A whole bunch of flowers bloomed!\pAnd then a whole bunch of BERRIES
appeared!\pHere you go!
You can have this!
data/text/berries.inc.Route111_Text_1C5781: I'm going to try really hard and make\nsome RED {POKEBLOCK}S!\pI hope you try hard, too!
data/text/berries.inc.Route111_Text_1C57D2: I wonder what color BERRIES I'll look\nfor today?
data/text/berries.inc.Route114_Text_1C5803: I'm gathering BERRIES so I can win a\nPOKéMON CONTEST.\pIf you'd like, I'll share one with you.
data/text/berries.inc.Route114_Text_1C5878: What BERRIES should I plant today?\nWhat color {POKEBLOCK}S should I make?\pFretting over stuff like that is fun\nin its own way.
data/text/berries.inc.Route120_Text_1C58F1: Give the case a shake, and out pops\na {POKEBLOCK}...\pAnd that {POKEBLOCK} is caught and eaten\nby a POKéMON...\pIt's an expression of love, isn't it?
data/text/berries.inc.Route120_Text_1C5979: Yes, yes.\nYou understand what I mean.\pYou should take this.
data/text/berries.inc.Route120_Text_1C59B5: Oh... But it is important to make your\nown impressions, I guess...\pYou can have this.
data/text/berries.inc.Route120_Text_1C5A0B: I think that BERRY is rare.\nI hope you raise it with loving care.
data/text/berries.inc.Route120_Text_1C5A4D: I'll get more BERRIES from the\nBERRY MASTER.
data/text/berries.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_BerrySuitsYou: When it gets right down to it...\pThe same way suits suit me perfectly,\na crisp breeze suits the sea.\pAnd you, a BERRY suits you to a “T”...\pWhy should that be so?
data/text/berries.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_BecauseYoureTrainer: When it gets right down to it...\pIt's because you're a TRAINER!
data/text/berries.inc.LilycoveCity_Text_PokeblocksSuitPokemon: When it gets right down to it...\pThe way dignified simplicity suits me,\n{POKEBLOCK}S perfectly suit POKéMON.
data/text/berries.inc.Route123_BerryMastersHouse_Text_1C5BC4: You may call me the BERRY MASTER.\pI dream of filling the world with\nbeautiful flowers, so I raise BERRIES\land hand them out to everyone.\pYou're deserving of one!
data/text/berries.inc.Route123_BerryMastersHouse_Text_1C5C83: Be sure to visit the PRETTY PETAL\nflower shop near RUSTBORO.\pLet flowers fill the world!
data/text/berries.inc.Route123_BerryMastersHouse_Text_1C5CDC: I'm done for today.\nCome again another day.\pLet flowers fill the world!
data/text/berries.inc.Route123_BerryMastersHouse_Text_1C5D24: The way my husband grows BERRIES,\noh, he's the best in the world.\pHe makes me proud, that he does.\pIncidentally, child, have you heard\na good saying lately?
data/text/berries.inc.Route123_BerryMastersHouse_Text_1C5DC1: Ah! What a remarkable saying!\nInspirational, it is!\pI want you to have this.
data/text/berries.inc.Route123_BerryMastersHouse_Text_1C5E0E: Oh! A good saying it is.\nYou're quite remarkable.\pI want you to have this.
data/text/berries.inc.Route123_BerryMastersHouse_Text_1C5E59: Our four grandchildren should become\nmore accomplished than my husband.\pJoy never goes out of my life!
data/text/berries.inc.Route104_PrettyPetalFlowerShop_Text_1C5E: Hello!\pThis is the PRETTY PETAL flower shop.\nSpreading flowers throughout the world!
data/text/berries.inc.Route104_PrettyPetalFlowerShop_Text_1C5F: {PLAYER}{KUN}, would you like to learn about\nBERRIES?
Your name is?\p{PLAYER}{KUN}.\nThat's a nice name.\p{PLAYER}{KUN}, would you like to learn about\nBERRIES?

BERRIES grow on trees that thrive
only in dark, loamy soil.\pIf you take some BERRIES, be sure to
plant one in the loamy soil again.\pA planted BERRY will soon sprout,
grow into a plant, flower beautifully,\lthen grow BERRIES again.\pI want to see the whole wide world
filled with beautiful flowers.\lThat's my dream.\pPlease help me, {PLAYER}{KUN}. Plant BERRIES
and bring more flowers into the world.
data/text/berries.inc.Route104_PrettyPetalFlowerShop_Text_1C61: Flowers bring so much happiness to\npeople, don't they?
Hello!\pThe more attention you give to flowers,\nthe more beautifully they bloom.\pYou'll like tending flowers. I'm sure\nof it. You can have this.

While BERRY plants are growing,
water them with the WAILMER PAIL.\pOh, another thing.\pIf you don't pick BERRIES for a while,
they'll drop off onto the ground.\lBut they'll sprout again.\pIsn't that awesome?
It's like they have the will to live.
data/text/berries.inc.Route104_PrettyPetalFlowerShop_Text_1C62: I'm trying to be like my big sisters.\nI'm growing flowers, too!\pHere you go! It's for you!
data/text/berries.inc.Route104_PrettyPetalFlowerShop_Text_1C63: You can plant a BERRY and grow it big,\nor you can make a POKéMON hold it.\pBut now they have a machine that mixes\nup different BERRIES and makes candies\lfor POKéMON.\pI want some candy, too.
data/text/berries.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_NameIsKiriHaveOneOfT: Hi, what's your name?\p... ... ...  ... ... ...  ... ... ...\nOkay. That's nice!\pMy name is KIRI.\pMy mommy and daddy named me that so\nI would grow healthy and warmhearted.\lThat's what they wished.\pYou can have one of these.
data/text/berries.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_GiveYouThisBerryToo: KIRI will give you this BERRY, too!\nI really like it lots!
data/text/berries.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_WhatKindOfWishInYour: I wonder what kind of wish is included\nin your name.
data/text/berries.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_KiriBornInSeasons: Spring, summer, autumn, and winter.\pIf you're born in springtime, do you like\nthe spring, and if you're born in the\lsummer, do you like the summer?
data/text/berries.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_ThenILoveAutumn: Then KIRI was born in the autumn,\nso I love the autumn!\pWhich season do you like?
data/text/berries.inc.SootopolisCity_Text_OhDoesntMatter: Oh...\nIt doesn't matter...\pThere's so much that I want to know...

data/text/berry_tree.inc.Route102_Text_1A16CD: It's soft, loamy soil.\nWant to plant a BERRY?
data/text/berry_tree.inc.Route102_Text_1A16FB: {PLAYER} planted one {STR_VAR_1} BERRY in\nthe soft, loamy soil.
data/text/berry_tree.inc.Route102_Text_1A17C0: There are {STR_VAR_2} {STR_VAR_1} BERRIES!\pDo you want to pick the\n{STR_VAR_1} BERRIES?
data/text/berry_tree.inc.Route102_Text_1A181A: {PLAYER} put away the {STR_VAR_1} BERRIES\nin the BAG's BERRIES POCKET.\pThe soil returned to its soft and\nloamy state.
data/text/berry_tree.inc.Route102_Text_1A1881: The BAG's BERRIES POCKET is full.\pThe {STR_VAR_1} BERRIES couldn't be taken.
data/text/berry_tree.inc.Route102_Text_1A18E6: Want to water the {STR_VAR_1} with the\nWAILMER PAIL?
data/text/berry_tree.inc.Route102_Text_1A1925: The plant seems to be delighted.

data/text/birch_speech.inc.gBirchSpeech_Welcome: Hi! Sorry to keep you waiting!\pWelcome to the world of POKéMON!\pMy name is BIRCH.\pBut everyone calls me the POKéMON\nPROFESSOR.\p
data/text/birch_speech.inc.gBirchSpeech_ThisIsPokemon: This is what we call a “POKéMON.”
data/text/birch_speech.inc.gBirchSpeech_WorldInhabitedByPokemon:
This world is widely inhabited by
creatures known as POKéMON.\pWe humans live alongside POKéMON,
at times as friendly playmates, and\lat times as cooperative workmates.\pAnd sometimes, we band together
and battle others like us.\pBut despite our closeness, we don't
know everything about POKéMON.\pIn fact, there are many, many
secrets surrounding POKéMON.\pTo unravel POKéMON mysteries,
I've been undertaking research.\lThat's what I do.\p
data/text/birch_speech.inc.gBirchSpeech_AreYouBoyOrGirl: Are you a boy?\nOr are you a girl?
data/text/birch_speech.inc.gBirchSpeech_AhOkayYouArePlayer: Ah, okay!\pYou're {PLAYER}{KUN} who's moving to my\nhometown of LITTLEROOT.\lI get it now!
data/text/birch_speech.inc.gBirchSpeech_AreYouReady:
All right, are you ready?\pYour very own adventure is about
to unfold.\pTake courage, and leap into the
world of POKéMON where dreams,\ladventure, and friendships await!\pWell, I'll be expecting you later.
Come see me in my POKéMON LAB.\p

data/text/cable_club.inc.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A4510: Welcome to the POKéMON CABLE CLUB\nCOLOSSEUM.\pYou may battle with your friends here.\pWould you like to battle?
data/text/cable_club.inc.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A457E: Welcome to the POKéMON CABLE CLUB\nTRADE CENTER.\pYou may trade your POKéMON here\nwith a friend.\pWould you like to trade POKéMON?
data/text/cable_club.inc.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A45FE: Welcome to the POKéMON CABLE CLUB\n
data/text/cable_club.inc.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A4696:
There are three link battle modes.\pSINGLE BATTLE is for two TRAINERS
with one or more POKéMON each.\pEach TRAINER can have one POKéMON
in battle at a time.\pDOUBLE BATTLE is for two TRAINERS
with two or more POKéMON each.\pEach TRAINER will send out two
POKéMON in battle at a time.\pMULTI BATTLE is for four TRAINERS
with one or more POKéMON each.\pEach TRAINER can have one POKéMON
in battle at a time.
data/text/cable_club.inc.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A4840: Which Battle Mode would you like\nto play?
data/text/cable_club.inc.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A486A: For a DOUBLE BATTLE, you must have\nat least two POKéMON.
data/text/cable_club.inc.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A48A3: For trading, you must have at least\ntwo POKéMON with you.
data/text/cable_club.inc.UnknownString_81A4932: When all players are ready...\nA Button: Confirm   B Button: Cancel
data/text/cable_club.inc.UnknownString_81A4975: Start link with {STR_VAR_1} players.\nA Button: Confirm   B Button: Cancel
data/text/cable_club.inc.UnknownString_81A49E2: Your progress must be saved before\nlinking. Is it okay to save?
data/text/cable_club.inc.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A4A30: Someone is not ready to link.\pPlease come back after everyone has\nmade preparations.
data/text/cable_club.inc.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A4A85: Sorry, we have a transmission error...\nPlease reset and try again.
data/text/cable_club.inc.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A4AC8: Sorry, we have a transmission error.\nYou may not mix records in different\llanguages.
data/text/cable_club.inc.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A4B1D: The link partners appear to have made\ndifferent selections.
data/text/cable_club.inc.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A4B95: The SINGLE Battle Mode cannot be\nplayed by {STR_VAR_1} players.
data/text/cable_club.inc.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A4BCC: The DOUBLE Battle Mode cannot be\nplayed by {STR_VAR_1} players.
data/text/cable_club.inc.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A4C03: There must be four players to play\nthis Battle Mode.
data/text/cable_club.inc.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A4C38: Please confirm the number of players\nand start again.
data/text/cable_club.inc.TradeRoom_WillLinkBeTerminated: The link will be terminated if you\nleave the room. Is that okay?
data/text/cable_club.inc.TradeRoom_TerminatingLink: Terminating link... You will be\nescorted out of the room. Please wait.
data/text/cable_club.inc.CableClub_TooBusyToNotice: This TRAINER is too busy to notice...
data/text/cable_club.inc.CableClub_LookAtTrainerCard1: Score! Got to look at {STR_VAR_1}'s\nTRAINER CARD!
data/text/cable_club.inc.CableClub_LookAtTrainerCard2: Score! Got to look at {STR_VAR_1}'s\nTRAINER CARD! It's a {STR_VAR_2} card!
data/text/cable_club.inc.SingleBattleColosseum_Text_1A4D7E: Please take your seat and start\nyour battle.
data/text/cable_club.inc.TradeCenter_Text_1A4DAB: Please take your seat and start\nyour trade.
data/text/cable_club.inc.RecordCorner_Text_1A4DD7: Please take your seat and wait.
data/text/cable_club.inc.UnknownString_81A4E0A: Please choose your POKéMON for the\nMULTI BATTLE.
data/text/cable_club.inc.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A4E50: The TRAINER CARD data will\nbe rewritten.
data/text/cable_club.inc.OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_1A4E79: I hope to see you again!

data/text/check_furniture.inc.Text_PictureBookshelf: There's a set of POKéMON picture books.
data/text/check_furniture.inc.Text_Bookshelf: It's filled with all sorts of books.
data/text/check_furniture.inc.Text_Vase: This vase looks expensive...\nPeered inside...\pBut, it was empty.
data/text/check_furniture.inc.Text_ShopShelf: The shelves brim with all sorts of\nPOKéMON merchandise.
data/text/check_furniture.inc.Text_Blueprint: A blueprint of some sort?\nIt's too complicated!

data/text/contest_hall.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1A5DFC: Hello, there!\pWe're accepting registrations for\n{STR_VAR_1} Rank POKéMON CONTESTS.
data/text/contest_hall.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1A5E46: Would you like to enter your POKéMON\nin our CONTESTS?
data/text/contest_hall.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1A5E98:
A POKéMON CONTEST involves four
TRAINERS entering one POKéMON each\lin competitive judging.\pA CONTEST has two stages of judging,
primary and secondary.\pPrimary judging is a popularity poll
involving the audience.\pSecondary judging features appeals
by the POKéMON using their moves.\pPlan appeals carefully to earn the
most attention of the JUDGE and\lexcite the audience.\lDo your best to stand out.\pThe primary and secondary scores are
added at the end.\pThe POKéMON garnering the highest
score is declared the winner.
data/text/contest_hall.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1A609B: There are five kinds of CONTESTS.\pCOOL, BEAUTY, CUTE, SMART, and\nTOUGH are the five categories.\pChoose the CONTEST that is right for\nthe POKéMON you plan to enter.
data/text/contest_hall.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1A613F:
There are four ranks of POKéMON
CONTESTS.\pNORMAL, SUPER, HYPER and MASTER
are the four ranks.\pIn the NORMAL Rank, any POKéMON may
enter.\pAny POKéMON that won a NORMAL Rank
CONTEST may move up the SUPER Rank in\lthe same category.\pIn the same way, a SUPER Rank winner
can move up to the HYPER Rank, and a\lHYPER Rank winner can advance to the\lMASTER Rank in the same category.\pA POKéMON that won in the MASTER Rank
may compete in the MASTER Rank as\loften as its TRAINER wants.
data/text/contest_hall.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1A6319: Which POKéMON would you like to enter?
data/text/contest_hall.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1A6340: Anyone with a CONTEST PASS may enter.\pYou may obtain a CONTEST PASS at the\nNORMAL RANK CONTEST HALL in\lVERDANTURF TOWN free of charge.\pPlease obtain a CONTEST PASS and\ncome again.
data/text/contest_hall.inc.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_1A63F4:
I accept registrations only from four
linked players for a POKéMON CONTEST.\pAnyone with a CONTEST PASS may enter.\pYou may obtain a CONTEST PASS at the
NORMAL RANK CONTEST HALL in\lVERDANTURF TOWN free of charge.\pPlease obtain a CONTEST PASS and
come again.
data/text/contest_hall.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1A64F4: Anyone with a CONTEST PASS may enter.\pIf you don't have one, I can issue one\nfor you right now.\pWould you like me to issue you a\nCONTEST PASS?
data/text/contest_hall.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1A6590: Oh?\pWe've already issued you a CONTEST\nPASS, {PLAYER}.\pPlease come back with your CONTEST\nPASS.
data/text/contest_hall.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1A65EA: Please visit whenever you would like\nto enter a CONTEST.
data/text/contest_hall.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1A6623: Which CONTEST would you like to enter?
data/text/contest_hall.inc.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_1A664A: I'm terribly sorry, but your POKéMON\nis not qualified to compete at this\lRank yet...
data/text/contest_hall.inc.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_1A669F: I'm sorry, but an EGG cannot take part\nin a POKéMON CONTEST.
data/text/contest_hall.inc.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_1A66DC: Your POKéMON appears to be in no\ncondition to take part in a CONTEST...
data/text/contest_hall.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1A6724: Oh, but that RIBBON...\pYour POKéMON has won this CONTEST\nbefore, hasn't it?\pWould you like to enter it in this\nCONTEST anyway?
data/text/contest_hall.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1A67C1: Okay, your POKéMON will be entered\nin this CONTEST.\pYour POKéMON is Entry No. 4.\nThe CONTEST will begin shortly.
data/text/contest_hall.inc.VerdanturfTown_ContestLobby_Text_1A6832: Please come in through here.\nGood luck!
data/text/contest_hall.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1A685A: Congratulations! Your POKéMON is the\nCONTEST winner!\pWe have your prize right here.\nPlease, right this way!
data/text/contest_hall.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1A68C6: Please come back for your prize\nlater on.
data/text/contest_hall.inc.LinkContestRoom1_Text_1A68F0: MC: Hello! We're just getting started\nwith a {STR_VAR_3} Rank POKéMON\l{STR_VAR_2} CONTEST!\pThe participating TRAINERS and their\nPOKéMON are as follows:
data/text/contest_hall.inc.LinkContestRoom1_Text_1A6976: MC: Hello! We're just getting started\nwith a 4-player linked POKéMON\l{STR_VAR_2} CONTEST!\pThe participating TRAINERS and their\nPOKéMON are as follows:
data/text/contest_hall.inc.LinkContestRoom1_Text_1A6A1F:
MC: We've just seen the four POKéMON
contestants.\pNow it's time for primary judging!\pThe audience will vote on their
favorite POKéMON contestants.\pWithout any further ado, let the
voting begin!
data/text/contest_hall.inc.LinkContestRoom1_Text_1A6AF5:
Voting is now complete!\pWhile the votes are being tallied,
let's move on to secondary judging!\pThe second stage of judging is the
much anticipated appeal time!\pMay the contestants amaze us with
superb appeals of dazzling moves!\pLet's see a little enthusiasm!
Let's appeal!
data/text/contest_hall.inc.LinkContestRoom1_Text_1A6C21: Thank you all for a most wonderful\ndisplay of quality appeals!\pThis concludes all judging!\nThank you for your fine efforts!
data/text/contest_hall.inc.LinkContestRoom1_Text_1A6C9D: Now, all that remains is the pulse-\npounding proclamation of the winner.\pThe JUDGE looks ready to make the\nannouncement!
data/text/contest_hall.inc.LinkContestRoom1_Text_1A6D16: JUDGE: I will now declare the winner!
data/text/contest_hall.inc.LinkContestRoom1_Text_1A6D6A: We confer on you this RIBBON as your\nprize!
data/text/contest_hall.inc.LinkContestRoom1_Text_1A6DC5: MC: Here you are!\nPlease accept your prize!
data/text/contest_hall.inc.LinkContestRoom1_Text_1A6E1F: Please pick up your prize at the\nreception counter later.\lPlease do compete again!

data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_Text_1B25CB: I'm the DAY-CARE MAN.\pI help take care of the precious\nPOKéMON of TRAINERS.\pIf you'd like me to raise your POKéMON,\nhave a word with my wife.
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_Text_1B2659: Ah, it's you!\pWe were raising your POKéMON, and my\ngoodness, were we surprised!\pYour POKéMON had an EGG!\pWe don't know how it got there,\nbut your POKéMON had it.\pYou do want it, yes?
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_Text_1B2710: Ah, it's you! Good to see you.\nYour {STR_VAR_1}'s doing fine.
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_Text_1B2766: You have no room for it...\nCome back when you've made room.
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_Text_1B27A2: {PLAYER} received the EGG from\nthe DAY-CARE MAN.
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_Text_1B27E3: By the way, about your {STR_VAR_1},\nit seemed to be friendly with\l{STR_VAR_2}'s {STR_VAR_3}.\pI may even have seen it receiving\na piece of MAIL.
data/text/day_care.inc.UnknownString_81B2858: If you want to pick up your POKéMON,\nhave a word with my wife.
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_Text_1B2897: Ah, it's you! Your {STR_VAR_1} and\n{STR_VAR_2} are doing fine.
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_Text_1B28C4: I really will keep it.\nYou do want this, yes?
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_PokemonDayCare_Text_1B28F2: I'm the DAY-CARE LADY.\pWe can raise POKéMON for you.\pWould you like us to raise one?
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_PokemonDayCare_Text_1B2947: Which POKéMON should we raise for you?
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_PokemonDayCare_Text_1B296E: Fine, we'll raise your {STR_VAR_1} for\na while.\pCome back for it later.
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_PokemonDayCare_Text_1B29AD: We can raise two of your POKéMON.\nWould you like us to raise one more?
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_PokemonDayCare_Text_1B29F4: My husband was looking for you.
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_PokemonDayCare_Text_1B2A4F: Will you take back the other one, too?
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_PokemonDayCare_Text_1B2A88: Ah, it's you! Good to see you.\nYour POKéMON can only be doing good!
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_PokemonDayCare_Text_1B2AEF: Your POKéMON team is full.\nMake room, then come see me.
data/text/day_care.inc.UnknownString_81B2B27: Which POKéMON will you take back?
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_PokemonDayCare_Text_1B2B49: If you want your {STR_VAR_1} back,\nit will cost ¥{STR_VAR_2}.
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_PokemonDayCare_Text_1B2BBB: Oh? But you have just one POKéMON.\pCome back another time.
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_PokemonDayCare_Text_1B2BF6: Will you take your POKéMON back?
data/text/day_care.inc.Route117_PokemonDayCare_Text_1B2C17: If you leave me that POKéMON,\nwhat will you battle with?\pCome back another time.

data/text/eon_ticket.inc.UnknownString_81C5033: DAD: {PLAYER}! Good to see you!\nThere's a letter here for you, {PLAYER}.
data/text/eon_ticket.inc.UnknownString_81C5070: DAD: I guess this is a PASS for a ship.\nBut I've never seen this ship before.\pYou should find out what this is about\nin LILYCOVE.
data/text/eon_ticket.inc.EventTicket_Text_ThatPass: The ferry to SLATEPORT is...\pOh?\nThat PASS...
data/text/eon_ticket.inc.EventTicket_Text_ShowEonTicket:
Aye, mate, are you the one who brought
that mighty odd PASS?\pI'll tell you, you're trying to reach a
tiny spit of an island far in the south.\pThere's no telling what we'll encounter
once we reach there, aye.\lThat shivers my timbers!\pAll aboard!
data/text/eon_ticket.inc.SouthernIsland_Exterior_Text_1C5215: Aye, mate, there's nothing here to\nsee or do on this forgettable island.\pWhat say we sail back to LILYCOVE?
data/text/eon_ticket.inc.SouthernIsland_Exterior_Text_1C5281: Aye, right, then!\nSail home we will!
data/text/eon_ticket.inc.SouthernIsland_Exterior_Text_1C52A6: Aye, right, as you like, then.
data/text/eon_ticket.inc.SouthernIsland_Interior_Text_1C52C5: “All dreams are but another reality.\nNever forget...”
data/text/eon_ticket.inc.SouthernIsland_Exterior_Text_1C52FB: “Those whose memories fade seek to\ncarve them in their hearts...”

data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route111_Text_1ABED8: GABBY: Oh! We've just spotted a tough-\nlooking TRAINER here of all places!\pOkay, roll camera!\nLet's get this interview.
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route120_Text_1ABF50: GABBY: Oh! You're {PLAYER}! Hi!\nDo you remember us from last time?\pCan you show us how much stronger\nyou've become? Okay, cue interview!
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route111_Text_1ABFD3: GABBY: My eyes didn't lie!\nI did discover an astonishing TRAINER!
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route111_Text_1AC015:
GABBY: Awesome! Awesome!
Who are you?!\pI knew we were onto something wild
when we spotted you!\pOh, please let me explain. We travel
around everywhere interviewing all\lsorts of TRAINERS.\pSo, would you give us a bit of your time
for an interview?
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route111_Text_1AC10A: GABBY: “{STR_VAR_1}!”\pDo you remember? That's the quote you\ngave us as the battle clincher last time.\pI never, ever forget stuff like that!
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route111_Text_1AC18D: The last time we battled, you stomped\nus before we could brace ourselves...\pAnyway, what do you think?\nDo you want to be interviewed again?
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route111_Text_1AC219:
The last time we battled, didn't you
throw a POKé BALL at us?\pWe were shocked! So we told everyone,
just everyone, about it!\pAnyway, what do you think?
Do you want to be interviewed again?
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route111_Text_1AC2D6: The last time we battled, your item\nskills cleverly did us in.\pAnyway, what do you think?\nDo you want to be interviewed again?
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route111_Text_1AC355: The last time we battled, we managed\nto look respectable.\pAnyway, what do you think?\nDo you want to be interviewed again?
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route111_Text_1AC3CF: Anyway, what do you think?\nDo you want to be interviewed again?
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route111_Text_1AC40F: You will?\nThank you!\pOkay, I need you to describe your\nfeelings about our battle, but it\lhas to be short and sweet. Go!
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route111_Text_1AC487:
GABBY: Mmm, yeah!
That's the perfect clincher!\pI get the feeling that this will make
a great TV show.\pThere's a chance that they'll air this
on TV, so make sure to look for us!\pOkay!
We'll be seeing you!
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route111_Text_1AC553: GABBY: Oh...\pOkay, but don't give up!\nWe'll be keeping an eye out for you!
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route120_Text_1AC59E: GABBY: We'll be keeping an eye out\nfor you!
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route120_Text_1AC5CA: GABBY: Is there a strong TRAINER\nanywhere with a lot of POKéMON?
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route111_Text_1AC60B:
GABBY: Wow, you are something!\pYou've gotten a lot stronger - a lot -
since we last battled.\pWe were right about you when we
spotted you as a hot TRAINER.\pSo, anyway, what do you think?
Are you willing to give us an interview\lthis time?
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route120_Text_1AC6F8: GABBY: That was an intense battle!\nDid you get all that on camera?
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route111_Text_1AC73B: TY: Hey, lookie here! A tough-looking\nTRAINER here, of all places!\lCamera's rolling!
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route120_Text_1AC790: TY: Hey, lookie here!\nI remember you!\pI'll get this battle all on this\nhere camera!
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route120_Text_1AC7E4: TY: You're a natural!\nGot me some prime footage right here!
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route120_Text_1AC820: TY: Do you only have the one POKéMON\nand that's it?\pIf you had more POKéMON, it'd make for\nbetter footage, but...
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route111_Text_1AC892: TY: Yep, we sure spotted a hot TRAINER.\nThis is a huge scoop for us!
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route120_Text_1AC8D7: TY: Yep, I got it all.\nThat whole battle's on camera.
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.gTVGabbyAndTyText1:
IN SEARCH OF TRAINERS...\pGABBY: Hi! Today I'm visiting an area
near {STR_VAR_1}.\pWe're trying to spot some up-and-coming
new talent in the field.\pToday, we turned our lens on the
TRAINER {PLAYER}.\pThere's something about this TRAINER
that piqued our interest.
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.gTVGabbyAndTyText2: We've battled {PLAYER} before, but we\ncan attest that the TRAINER has most\ldefinitely improved from before.\pI knew we were onto someone special\nwhen we spotted this TRAINER!
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.gTVGabbyAndTyText3:
The best way to determine how strong
a TRAINER is...\pWell, the fastest way is to battle.
And so we began our investigation!\p... ...\pThat's how we ended up in battle
with {PLAYER}.\pIn a dominating performance, we were
flattened, rolled up, and tossed aside!\p{PLAYER} is ruthlessly strong...\pWe asked the TRAINER for a succinct
summation of the battle we shared.
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.gTVGabbyAndTyText4:
The combination of {STR_VAR_1} and
{STR_VAR_3} was divine!\pThe sight of them - {STR_VAR_1} and
{STR_VAR_3} - selflessly supporting\leach other in the thick of battle...\pIt was a marvelous sight to behold!\p{STR_VAR_2} was the move the TRAINER
used last in our battle.\pThe move {STR_VAR_2} is {STR_VAR_1}
and {STR_VAR_3}'s sign of friendship!
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.gTVGabbyAndTyText5:
...I lost confidence in myself as
a result of our encounter.\pWe were beaten before we could launch
a single attack.\lOhhh... Snivel...\pIn spite of that, {PLAYER}'s battles
are worth seeing.\pI recommend confident TRAINERS to
challenge {PLAYER}.
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.gTVGabbyAndTyText6:
There's only one thing to be said.
Don't you dare throw a POKé BALL during\la TRAINER battle!\p{PLAYER} is certainly strong, but has
no clue about the basic rules.\pTo our TV audience, I have a request.\pIf you see {PLAYER}, please caution
the TRAINER!
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.gTVGabbyAndTyText7: {PLAYER} is adept at reading the\nopponent's actions.\pThe timing of item usage was remarkably\neffective!
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.gTVGabbyAndTyText8:
Honestly speaking, I thought that
I might even be pretty good.\pWhile we did end up losing, we did have
a hotly contested battle.\pBut if you're struggling against me,
you have a ways to go, {PLAYER}!
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.gTVGabbyAndTyText9:
After our battle, we asked {PLAYER} for
a succinct summary.\pThe TRAINER replied, “{STR_VAR_1}.”\p{PLAYER}'s POKéMON {STR_VAR_2} and
{STR_VAR_3}...\lAnd “{STR_VAR_1}”...\pMmm! That's deep! There's deep
significance behind that quote!\pIt's no surprise - a good TRAINER has
good things to say.\pThat's all for today!
See you again on our next broadcast!

data/text/giddy.inc.gTextGiddy_Introduction: I'm GIDDY!\nI have a scintillating story for you!\pWould you like to hear my story?
data/text/giddy.inc.gTextGiddy_ByeBye: That's about it, I think...\pWe should chat again!\nBye-bye!

data/text/hipster.inc.gTextHipster_TheyCallMeTheHipster: Hey, yo! They call me the HIPSTER.\nI'll teach you what's hip and happening.
data/text/hipster.inc.gTextHipster_TaughtYouAlready: But, hey, I taught you what's hip and\nhappening already.\pI'd like to spread the good word to\nother folks.
data/text/hipster.inc.gTextHipster_YouAlreadyKnowALot: But, hey, you already know a lot about\nwhat's hip and happening.\pI've got nothing new to teach you!
data/text/hipster.inc.gTextHipster_HaveYouHeardAbout: Hey, have you heard about\n“{STR_VAR_1}”?\pWhat's it mean? Well...\nAsk your daddy or mommy, okay?

data/text/lottery_corner.inc.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_1F_Text_Lot:
This is the POKéMON LOTTERY CORNER.\pAll shoppers visiting our DEPARTMENT
STORE get to draw a POKéMON LOTO\lTICKET.\pIf the LOTO TICKET's number matches
the ID number of any of your POKéMON,\lyou will receive a fabulous gift.\pWould you like to draw a POKéMON
LOTO TICKET?
data/text/lottery_corner.inc.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_1F_Text_Tic: The LOTO TICKET number is {STR_VAR_1}.\pI need to run a check on this number\nto see if it matches any of your\lPOKéMON's ID numbers. Please wait.
Congratulations!\pThe ID number of your team's\n{STR_VAR_1} matches your LOTO TICKET's\lnumber!
Congratulations!\pThe ID number of your PC-boxed\n{STR_VAR_1} matches your LOTO TICKET's\lnumber!
data/text/lottery_corner.inc.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_1F_Text_NoN: I'm sorry.\nNone of the numbers matched.
data/text/lottery_corner.inc.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_1F_Text_Two: Two digits matched, so you win the\nthird prize!\lYou've won the {STR_VAR_1}!
data/text/lottery_corner.inc.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_1F_Text_Thr: Three digits matched, so you win the\nsecond prize!\lYou've won the {STR_VAR_1}!
data/text/lottery_corner.inc.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_1F_Text_Fou: Four digits matched, so you win the\nfirst prize!\lYou've won the {STR_VAR_1}!
data/text/lottery_corner.inc.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_1F_Text_All: Oh, my goodness, all five digits matched!\pYou've won the jackpot prize!\nYou've won the {STR_VAR_1}!
data/text/lottery_corner.inc.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_1F_Text_NoR: Oh?\nYou seem to have no room for this.\pPlease make room in your BAG and\nlet me know.
data/text/lottery_corner.inc.LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_1F_Text_Pri: {PLAYER}?\nYes, I've been expecting you.\pThis is the prize we've been holding\nfor you.

data/text/magma_awakening.inc.SeafloorCavern_Room9_Text_1B486C: MAXIE: Fufufu...\nSo it was you, after all.
data/text/magma_awakening.inc.SeafloorCavern_Room9_Text_1B4897: MAXIE: Behold!\pSee how beautiful it is, the sleeping\nform of the ancient POKéMON GROUDON!\pI have waited so long for this day to\ncome...
data/text/magma_awakening.inc.SeafloorCavern_Room9_Text_1B491F: MAXIE: It surprises me, how you've\nmanaged to chase me here.\pBut that's all over now.\pFor the realization of my dream,\nyou must disappear now!
data/text/magma_awakening.inc.SeafloorCavern_Room9_Text_1B49C1:
MAXIE: Fufufu...\pI commend you. I must recognize that
you are truly gifted.\pBut!
I have this in my possession!\pWith this BLUE ORB, I can make
GROUDON...
data/text/magma_awakening.inc.SeafloorCavern_Room9_Text_1B4A5A: The BLUE ORB suddenly began shining\nby itself!
data/text/magma_awakening.inc.SeafloorCavern_Room9_Text_1B4A89: MAXIE: What?!\pI didn't do anything.\nWhy did the BLUE ORB...\pWhere did GROUDON go?
data/text/magma_awakening.inc.SeafloorCavern_Room9_Text_1B4ADB: MAXIE: Hm? It's a message from our\nmembers outside...
data/text/magma_awakening.inc.SeafloorCavern_Room9_Text_1B4B11:
MAXIE: Yes, what is it?\pHm...
The sun is burning brightly?\pGood... That should have happened.
That is why we awakened GROUDON,\lto realize TEAM MAGMA's vision of\lexpanding the world's landmass.\pWhat?!\pIt's far hotter than we envisioned?
It's so hot that it's dangerous?\pThat can't be...
That's just not possible...\pHold your position and monitor the
situation!
data/text/magma_awakening.inc.SeafloorCavern_Room9_Text_1B4C79: MAXIE: There's something wrong...\pThe BLUE ORB is supposed to awaken\nand control GROUDON...\pBut... Why?\nWhy did GROUDON disappear?\pWhy?!
data/text/magma_awakening.inc.SeafloorCavern_Room9_Text_1B4D02:
ARCHIE: What have you wrought?\pMAXIE... You've finally awoken GROUDON,
haven't you?\pWhat will happen to the world if this
sunshine continues for all eternity?\pThe world's seas will all dry up and
disappear...
data/text/magma_awakening.inc.SeafloorCavern_Room9_Text_1B4DD3: MAXIE: What are you saying?\pThe BLUE ORB should let me control\nGROUDON...\lThat can't be possible...
data/text/magma_awakening.inc.SeafloorCavern_Room9_Text_1B4E37: ARCHIE: We don't have the time to\nargue about it here!\pGet outside and see for yourself!\pSee if what you've wrought is the\nworld that you desired!
data/text/magma_awakening.inc.SeafloorCavern_Room9_Text_1B4ECA: ARCHIE: {PLAYER}{KUN}, come on, you have\nto get out of here, too!

data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B37BB: The power contained in the METEORITE...\pBy amplifying its power with this\nmachine, MT. CHIMNEY's volcanic activity\lwill instantly intensify...\pFufufu... The volcano will erupt, spewing\nlava that will cool and harden.\lIt will expand the landmass...
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B38B3:
MAXIE: You again...\pNow listen.
We humans have grown on dry land.\pThe land is everything!
Its importance is paramount!\pThat is why we of TEAM MAGMA are
committed to expanding the landmass.\pIt will create space for new species
of POKéMON to evolve.\pIt will give us humans more space to
advance.\pThat is TEAM MAGMA's vision!\pI can't allow an ignorant child like
you to get in our way.\pI, MAXIE, will show you the
consequences of meddling!
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3A68: What?!\pI, MAXIE, was caught off guard?!
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3A90: MAXIE: Ah, whatever.\nI will give up our plans for MT. CHIMNEY\lfor the time being...\pBut no one can ever stop us!\nTEAM MAGMA will prevail!\pDon't you ever forget that!
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3B36: Hehehe!\pSo you've come all the way here!\pBut you're too late!\nI've already delivered the METEORITE\lfrom METEOR FALLS to the BOSS!
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3BB8: Hehehe...\nSo I lost...\pI'm sure glad I never took you on back\nat METEOR FALLS.
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3C07: Hehehe!\pYou might have beaten me, but you don't\nstand a chance against the BOSS!\pIf you get lost now, you won't have to\nface a sound whipping!
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3C96: We of TEAM MAGMA are working hard for\neveryone's sake.\pLike, if there's more land, there'd be\nmore places to live.\lEveryone'd be happy!
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3D1E: Hunh?\nWhat do you mean I lost?
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3D3D: Our BOSS says, “It will make everyone\nhappy.”\pBut why does everyone keep getting\nin our way?
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3D9A: That annoying TEAM AQUA...\nThey always mess with our plans!
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3DF5: Go! Stomp TEAM AQUA!\nAnd expand the land!
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3E1F: Stay out of our way, okay?\pWe're trying to enlarge the landmass\nfor the good of everybody!
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.UnknownString_81B3E94: We're going to keep making more land!
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3EC1:
ARCHIE: Oh, {PLAYER}{KUN}!\pPlease, you must stop TEAM MAGMA
for me!\pThey're trying to make this volcano
erupt by using the stolen METEORITE's\lpower!\pIt's all a part of their plans to
expand the world's landmass!
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3F8C: ARCHIE: {PLAYER}{KUN}!\pPlease, you've got to stop TEAM MAGMA\nfor me!\pDealing with these three thugs is\na lot, even for me!
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3FFE:
ARCHIE: {PLAYER}{KUN}! Thank you!\pWith your help, we thwarted TEAM
MAGMA's destructive plan!\pBut... This victory doesn't mean the
end of their evil plans.\pWe will remain vigilant and keep up
our pursuit of TEAM MAGMA.\p{PLAYER}{KUN}, we shall meet again!
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B40EA: Darn... TEAM MAGMA outnumbers us!\nWe can't keep up with them!
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B4128: If they expand the land, there'll be\nless habitats for WATER POKéMON!
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B416E: TEAM MAGMA wants to expand the\nlandmass... How's that for insane?

data/text/magma_settled.inc.CaveOfOrigin_B4F_Text_1B5009: GROUDON appears to have settled\ninto sleep again...
data/text/magma_settled.inc.UnknownString_81B504C: MAXIE: ... ... ... ... ... ...\n... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...\pThis is good-bye.\nThis is the last you've seen of me...

data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B5CFD: I'll show you exactly how scary\nTEAM MAGMA can be!
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B5D30: So you think you can stand up alone\nto TEAM MAGMA's might...
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B5D6D: Yeah, so you are strong...\nBut there're a lot of us!
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B5DA2: What's up with you?\nWhat does a single kid expect to do?
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B5DF1: You don't know anything.\nQuit messing around with us!
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B5E27: Hey, I remember you from MT. CHIMNEY!\nIt's payback time!
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B5E84: Heh, it doesn't matter!\nWe bought ourselves some time!\pThe BOSS should have snatched what\nhe was after!
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B5EEC:
MAXIE: Not you again...\pYou've impeded our plans repeatedly,
but this time you're too late.\pThe BLUE ORB that rested atop
MT. PYRE...\lI, MAXIE, claim it as mine!\pFufufu... Finally, I can realize my
grand design...\pCome on, crew!
It's SLATEPORT next!
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B5FE6:
Oh, no...
This cannot happen...\pHow could they take the BLUE ORB?\pThe BLUE ORB and RED ORB must never
be separated. They belong together.\p... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...
Hmm...\pFine!
You take the remaining RED ORB.\pPlease take after that foul man and
get the other ORB back!
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B60F9: The RED ORB you have been entrusted\nwith and the stolen BLUE ORB...\pThey must never be apart...\nSomething terrible will happen...
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B617B:
So...
GROUDON has awoken...\pThe wondrous ORB that is said to have
becalmed the raging GROUDON...\lIt is the RED ORB you bear.\pThat RED ORB was found buried inside
the CAVE OF ORIGIN in SOOTOPOLIS...\pThere is perhaps a link between
GROUDON and the CAVE OF ORIGIN...
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B6283: That man, he returned the BLUE ORB.\pAre you going to return the RED ORB\nto its rightful place, too?
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B62E7: What's that?!\pIf the balance is not restored, there\nis no telling what could happen.\pYou will return the RED ORB to its\nrightful place, yes?
data/text/magma_summit.inc.UnknownString_81B6374: {PLAYER} handed the RED ORB to the\nold woman.
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B639C: Yes...\nThe two ORBS should remain here.\pIt is how it should be for the good\nof all HOENN...
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B63F8: The spirit of the land...\pThat is what GROUDON is said to be in\nPOKéMON form...\pIn the same manner that we and POKéMON\nhave life, this very land is alive...\pGROUDON has taught us that...
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B64B3:
MT. PYRE is where we calm the spirits
of POKéMON that have passed on...\pThis is a high place where one can
see all of HOENN...\pThe disembodied spirits of POKéMON
must find solace here...\pIs it coincidence that you are here...\pWill you hear out my tale? A tale long
told in the HOENN region?
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B65D6:
It happened long, long ago...\pThe world was wracked by a ferocious
clash between the POKéMON of the land\land the POKéMON of the sea...\pThe POKéMON of the land raised
mountains and created continents...\pThe POKéMON of the sea raised huge
waves and carved out oceans...\pTheir fierce duel raged without end.\pThe world was engulfed in vicious
storms and massive infernos.\pThe RED ORB and the BLUE ORB brought
an end to the calamity.\pLight poured from the two ORBS and
becalmed the enraged adversaries.\pThe pair, made docile, burrowed deep
under the ground where eventually\lthey disappeared...
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B6823: I see...\nWell, that, too, is fine...
data/text/magma_summit.inc.MtPyre_Summit_Text_1B6848:
MAXIE: You...
So you stopped GROUDON...\pI shouldn't be surprised...\pI understand now that humans cannot
freely control the balance between\lthe land and the sea...\pSo I have come to return the
BLUE ORB...\pI doubt that we will cross paths again...
Farewell...

data/text/mart_clerk.inc.Text_DiscountSaleToday: Welcome!\pWe're having a discount sale today!
data/text/mart_clerk.inc.Text_PlayerWhatCanIDoForYou: {PLAYER}{KUN}, welcome!\pWhat can I do for you?

data/text/mystery_event_club.inc.PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_1B1C: Hello there, TRAINER!\nYou've got a wonderful smile, there.\pI have a hobby - collecting the profiles\nof POKéMON TRAINERS.
data/text/mystery_event_club.inc.PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_1B1D: So, how about it?\nMay I see your profile?

You make your own profile by putting
together four words or phrases.\pHere, I'll show you an example of a
profile using four pieces of text.\pYou can switch those four pieces with
other text pieces any which way you\llike to make your own profile.\pThere are a lot of text pieces that you
can use.\pThey are arranged in groups like
POKéMON, lifestyles, and hobbies so\lit is easier to look them up.\pSo, first, choose the group of text
pieces to display a list of choices.\pThen, pick the choice you want.\pRepeat for the remaining text choices,
and you'll have your very own profile.
data/text/mystery_event_club.inc.PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_1B1F: Yes! Thank you!\nMay I see your profile?
Oh, no, really?\pI imagine someone like you would have\na wonderful profile...
Oh? You're not into it right now?\pWell, anytime is good by me!
data/text/mystery_event_club.inc.PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_1B20: Hello there, TRAINER!\nYou've got a wonderful smile.
May I see your new profile?
Yes! Thank you!\pI hope it's even better than the profile\nyou showed me before.
Oh, you like your profile the way it is.\pI don't blame you - it's a wonderful\nprofile the way it is now.
data/text/mystery_event_club.inc.PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_1B21: F-fantastic!\pYour profile, it's wonderful!\nIt really says what you're about.\pWhy, anyone hearing this profile would\nbe captivated by you!\pThank you!
Oh?\nYou know the secret saying!\pThat means you're now a fellow member\nof the MYSTERY EVENT CLUB!

data/text/obtain_item.inc.Text_NoRoomLeftForAnother: Too bad! There's no room left for\nanother {STR_VAR_2}...

data/text/pkmn_center_nurse.inc.gText_NurseJoy_Welcome: Hello, and welcome to the POKéMON\nCENTER.\pWe restore your tired POKéMON to\nfull health.\pWould you like to rest your POKéMON?
data/text/pkmn_center_nurse.inc.gText_NurseJoy_WeHopeToSeeYouAgain: We hope to see you again!
data/text/pkmn_center_nurse.inc.gText_NurseJoy_ThankYouForWaiting: Thank you for waiting.\pWe've restored your POKéMON to\nfull health.
data/text/pkmn_center_nurse.inc.UnknownString_81A0B57: Welcome to the POKéMON CABLE CLUB\nTRADE CENTER.
data/text/pkmn_center_nurse.inc.UnknownString_81A0B87: Welcome to the POKéMON CABLE CLUB\nCOLOSSEUM.
data/text/pkmn_center_nurse.inc.UnknownString_81A0BB4: Welcome to the POKéMON CABLE CLUB\nTIME CAPSULE.

data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B6E63: Oh? Did you want to make some {POKEBLOCK}S\nwith this old-timer?
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B6ED0: Do you know how to make a {POKEBLOCK}?
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B6EF1: Let's get started, then!\pLet's BERRY BLENDER!
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B6F1F: Okay, a little explanation, then.\pOh, don't worry, it's quite simple.\pWhen the BLENDER's arrow comes to\nyour marker, just press the A Button.\pThat's all you have to do.\nYou'll see how easy it is when you try.
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B6FF0: Oh?\nYou don't have any BERRIES?\pIf you don't have any BERRIES,\nyou can't make any {POKEBLOCK}S.
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B704A: Well, that won't do at all now, will it?\pIf you don't mind leftovers, you can\nhave one of my BERRIES.\pThat way, we could make some {POKEBLOCK}S\ntogether using the BERRY BLENDER.
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B70F6: If I had some BERRIES left over,\nI'd gladly give you one...\pBut, I don't have any to spare today.\nWe'll have to do this another time.
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B717C: But your {POKEBLOCK} CASE is full.\pYou should use some {POKEBLOCK}S before\nyou come see me again.
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B71D2: But you don't have a {POKEBLOCK} CASE.\pYou should get a {POKEBLOCK} CASE and then\ncome see me.
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_1B7241: I wonder what kind of {POKEBLOCK} I'll get?\nThis is so exciting!
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B727C: {POKEBLOCK}S will be made with your friends \nfrom BERRIES in the BERRY BLENDER.\pIs it okay to save the game before\nlinking with your friends?
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B7304: Searching for your friends...\n... ... B Button: Cancel
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B7381: You have no BERRIES.\nThe BERRY BLENDER can't be used.
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B73B7: Your {POKEBLOCK} CASE is full.\nThe BERRY BLENDER can't be used.
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B73F1: You don't have a {POKEBLOCK} CASE.\nThe BERRY BLENDER can't be used.
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B742F: I love making {POKEBLOCK}S.\pI always have some BERRIES with me.
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B7469: If you'd like, we could make some\n{POKEBLOCK}S together using the\lBERRY BLENDER.
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B74B4: Oh?\nYou don't have any BERRIES?\pWell, that won't do at all now, will it?\pIf you don't mind leftovers, you can\nhave one of my BERRIES.
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B753A: We'll use it to make {POKEBLOCK}S together\nusing the BERRY BLENDER.
data/text/pokeblocks.inc.FallarborTown_ContestLobby_Text_1B7578:
Oh?
You don't have any BERRIES?\pIf I had some left over, I'd gladly
give you one...\pBut, I don't have any to spare today.
Sorry about that.

data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_ComeToShowMePokedex: PROF. BIRCH: Ah, {PLAYER}{KUN}!\pHave you come to show me how your\nPOKéDEX is coming along?
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_Cancel: Hm? Oh, you haven't caught enough\nPOKéMON to make it worthwhile.
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_SoYouveSeenAndCaught: Hmhm...\pSo, you've seen {STR_VAR_1} POKéMON,\nand you've caught {STR_VAR_2} POKéMON...
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan10: You should go into grassy areas more\nand look for POKéMON more carefully.
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan20: I guess you're getting the hang of it.\nBut, it gets harder from here.
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan30: Some POKéMON only appear in certain\nareas. You'll need to be persistent.
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan40: Well, it could use more quantity, but\nthis is looking more like a POKéDEX now.
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan50: This is coming along pretty good.\nKeep up the effort.
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan60: Are you using any RODS?\nThere are many POKéMON in the sea.
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan70: Instead of just catching POKéMON,\nhow about making them evolve, too?
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan80: This is going to be a fantastic POKéDEX.\nThat's the feeling I'm getting.
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan90: You've collected this many...\nYour talent is remarkable!
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan100: Have you visited the SAFARI ZONE?\pI hear there are some POKéMON that\ncan only be caught there.
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan110: You've finally reached the 100-kind\nmark. This is an impressive POKéDEX!
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan120: There might be POKéMON that can be\nfound using ROCK SMASH.
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan130: You should get some more POKéMON by\ntrading with others.
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan140: I've heard of POKéMON that evolve when\nthey come to fully love their TRAINERS.
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan150: I had no idea that there were so many\nPOKéMON species in the HOENN region.
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan160: On occasion, some POKéMON appear in\nlarge numbers like wild outbreaks.\lDon't miss opportunities like those.
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan170: One can get a very good idea about the\nPOKéMON of the HOENN region by looking\lthrough your POKéDEX.
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan180: I'd say you already qualify as a POKéMON\nPROFESSOR, and a good one, too!
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan190: With a POKéDEX this complete, you're\na real professional at this!
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_LessThan200: You're very close to completing this\nPOKéDEX. I can feel it in my bones!
data/text/pokedex_rating.inc.gBirchDexRatingText_OnANationwideBasis: Hmhm...\nOn a nationwide basis...\pYou've seen {STR_VAR_1} POKéMON,\nand you've caught {STR_VAR_2} POKéMON...

data/text/pokemon_news.inc.gTVNewsText_EnergyGuru1:
Greetings!
It's time for POKéMON NEWS.\pSLATEPORT's most popular kind of guy,
the ENERGY GURU, is in the news again!\pHe promises to, “Stupendously go for
it in just this many days: {STR_VAR_1}!”\pWhile he refused to elaborate on what
he will stupendously go for, the\lENERGY GURU advised, “Save up your\lmoney. That'll be good...”\pIt sounds like a trip to SLATEPORT
would be well worth your while that day.\pThat's the news on POKéMON NEWS.
data/text/pokemon_news.inc.gTVNewsText_EnergyGuru2:
Greetings!
It's time for POKéMON NEWS.\pThis is the news you've all been
waiting for!\pSLATEPORT'S ENERGY GURU is going
for it stupendously in the MARKET!\pHe promises unbeatable bargain
prices on CALCIUM and PROTEIN!\pA trip to SLATEPORT CITY sounds
worthwhile. Why not visit and shop\lto your heart's content?\pThat's the news on POKéMON NEWS.
data/text/pokemon_news.inc.gTVNewsText_EnergyGuru3:
Greetings!
It's time for POKéMON NEWS.\pThis is the news you've all been
waiting for!\pSLATEPORT'S ENERGY GURU is going
for it stupendously in the MARKET!\pHe promises unbeatable bargain
prices on CALCIUM and PROTEIN!\pAccording to the ENERGY GURU, he
still has ample merchandise left.\pWhy not visit SLATEPORT CITY for
a most enjoyable shopping trip?\pThat's the news on POKéMON NEWS.
data/text/pokemon_news.inc.gTVNewsText_GameCorner1:
Greetings!
It's time for POKéMON NEWS.\pIt's approaching!
It's finally coming!\pThe GAME CORNER's service day will be
here in just this many days: {STR_VAR_1}!\pEven those who are usually unlucky
may be lucky on this particular day!\pThat's the news on POKéMON NEWS.
data/text/pokemon_news.inc.gTVNewsText_GameCorner2:
Greetings!
It's time for POKéMON NEWS.\pIt's here!
It's finally arrived!\pGAME CORNER's service day has finally
arrived!\pCould you be lucky at the SLOTS 
and ROULETTE?\pThe location is MAUVILLE CITY.
This is the place!\pThat's the news on POKéMON NEWS.
data/text/pokemon_news.inc.gTVNewsText_GameCorner3:
Greetings!
It's time for POKéMON NEWS.\pIt's here!
It's finally arrived!\pGAME CORNER's service day has finally
arrived!\pCould you be lucky at the SLOTS
and ROULETTE?\pTime is limited and has almost run out.
The location is MAUVILLE CITY.\pThat's the news on POKéMON NEWS.
data/text/pokemon_news.inc.gTVNewsText_LilycoveDepartment1:
Greetings!
It's time for POKéMON NEWS.\pWe've just received wonderful news
from LILYCOVE DEPARTMENT STORE.\pThe DEPARTMENT STORE's clear-out sale
will be in just this many days: {STR_VAR_1}!\pThat thingamajig or that doodad that
you've always wanted could be yours!\pThat's the news on POKéMON NEWS.
data/text/pokemon_news.inc.gTVNewsText_LilycoveDepartment2:
Greetings!
It's time for POKéMON NEWS.\pThis is the news you've all been
waiting for!\pLILYCOVE DEPARTMENT STORE's clear-out
sale has finally arrived!\pAll the thingamajigs and doodads that
you've always dreamt about...\pYou may be in for fateful encounters
with them all!\pThat's the news on POKéMON NEWS.
data/text/pokemon_news.inc.gTVNewsText_LilycoveDepartment3:
Greetings!
It's time for POKéMON NEWS.\pThis is the news you've all been
waiting for!\pLILYCOVE DEPARTMENT STORE's clear-out
sale has finally arrived!\pAll the thingamajigs and doodads that
you've always dreamt about...\pYou may be in for fateful encounters
with them all!\pThat's the news on POKéMON NEWS.
data/text/pokemon_news.inc.gTVUnusedText_DevonCorporation: This program has been brought to you\nby the DEVON CORPORATION.
data/text/pokemon_news.inc.gTVUnusedText_Contests: What's important is love for POKéMON.\pWhat you need is a little courage.\pLet your cherished POKéMON take\ncenter stage! POKéMON CONTESTS!
data/text/pokemon_news.inc.gTVUnusedText_DayCare: We raise your beloved POKéMON with\nall of our love!\pFor all your POKéMON-training needs,\nvisit our DAY CARE on ROUTE 117.
data/text/pokemon_news.inc.gTVUnusedText_LavaridgeSpa: The cauldron of good times and laughs!\nLAVARIDGE SPA.
data/text/pokemon_news.inc.gTVUnusedText_LilycoveDepartment:
Overflowing with great merchandise
and excitement!\pA great place to find that something
you need!\pVisit LILYCOVE DEPARTMENT STORE for
all your shopping needs!

data/text/record_mix.inc.UnusedMixRecordsPromptText: Would you like to mix records with other\nTRAINERS?
data/text/record_mix.inc.UnusedMixRecordsSeeYouAgainText: We hope to see you again!

data/text/roulette.inc.UnknownString_81C40DF: The minimum wager at this table is {STR_VAR_1}. \nDo you want to play?
data/text/roulette.inc.gUnknown_081C4157: Place your wager with the + Control Pad,\nthen press the A Button.
data/text/roulette.inc.UnknownString_81C41F1: The ROULETTE board will be cleared.
data/text/roulette.inc.UnknownString_81C4215: You don't have a COIN CASE.
data/text/roulette.inc.UnknownString_81C4231: Your COIN CASE is full!\nCoins can be exchanged for prizes.

data/text/safari_zone.inc.UnknownString_81C34B2: Would you like to exit the SAFARI ZONE\nright now?
data/text/safari_zone.inc.UnknownString_81C34E4: Ding-dong! Time's up!\nYour SAFARI Game is over.
data/text/safari_zone.inc.UnknownString_81C3514: You've run out of SAFARI BALLS.\nYour SAFARI Game is over.
data/text/safari_zone.inc.UnknownString_81C354E: Would you like to place a {POKEBLOCK}\non the {POKEBLOCK} FEEDER?
data/text/safari_zone.inc.UnknownString_81C3583: The {STR_VAR_1} you left\nbefore is still here.
data/text/safari_zone.inc.Route121_SafariZoneEntrance_Text_1C35D0:
Welcome to the SAFARI ZONE!\pHere, you may witness many kinds of
POKéMON rarely seen in HOENN.\pAnd, you'll see them in their wild,
untamed state in natural habitats.\pWhat's more, we've thrown open the
gates to POKéMON TRAINERS.\pYou're encouraged to catch POKéMON
for keeps!\pCome in and enjoy the SAFARI ZONE!
data/text/safari_zone.inc.Route121_SafariZoneEntrance_Text_1C3704: Welcome to the SAFARI ZONE!\nIs it your first time here?
data/text/safari_zone.inc.Route121_SafariZoneEntrance_Text_1C373C: Come in and enjoy the SAFARI ZONE!
data/text/safari_zone.inc.Route121_SafariZoneEntrance_Text_1C375F: When you enter the SAFARI ZONE, you\nstart with 30 SAFARI BALLS for\lcatching POKéMON.\pThe SAFARI Game is over when you run\nout of SAFARI BALLS, or when you've\lwalked 500 steps.\pCome in and enjoy the SAFARI ZONE!
data/text/safari_zone.inc.Route121_SafariZoneEntrance_Text_1C3832: Welcome to the SAFARI ZONE!\pAll you can catch for just ¥500!\nWould you like to play a SAFARI Game?
data/text/safari_zone.inc.Route121_SafariZoneEntrance_Text_1C392D: We'll let you know when your game\nis over.\pSo, until then, enjoy yourself, please!\nOff you go on your wild excursion!
data/text/safari_zone.inc.Route121_SafariZoneEntrance_Text_1C39A3: Excuse me!\nYour PC BOX is full.
data/text/safari_zone.inc.Route121_SafariZoneEntrance_Text_1C39C3: Excuse me!\nYou seem to be without a {POKEBLOCK} CASE.\pYour SAFARI Game will be much more\nfruitful if you use {POKEBLOCK}S.\pPlease come back with a {POKEBLOCK} CASE.
data/text/safari_zone.inc.SafariZone_Southeast_Text_1C3A56: You still have time left. Would you like\nto exit the SAFARI ZONE now?
data/text/safari_zone.inc.SafariZone_Southeast_Text_1C3A9C: Please enjoy the rest of your wild\nadventure!
data/text/safari_zone.inc.SafariZone_Southeast_Text_1C3ACA: Okay.\pI'll take back your remaining SAFARI\nBALLS.\pThank you for playing.\nWe hope to see you again.
data/text/safari_zone.inc.SafariZone_Southeast_Text_1C3B2D: Good luck!\pIf you need anything, don't hesitate\nto tell me, please!
data/text/safari_zone.inc.SafariZone_Southeast_Text_1C3B71: Did you know?\pIf you put a {POKEBLOCK} in that square box,\nPOKéMON gather around.
data/text/safari_zone.inc.SafariZone_Southeast_Text_1C3BBD: I want to keep going deeper, but I\nforgot to bring a BIKE.\pSomething tells me that rare POKéMON\nlive in the outlying areas.
data/text/safari_zone.inc.SafariZone_Southwest_Text_1C3C39: Sometimes, when I toss a {POKEBLOCK} at \nPOKéMON, it gets ignored.\pDo POKéMON have likes and dislikes\nabout what they eat?
data/text/safari_zone.inc.SafariZone_Northwest_Text_1C3CAE: Gasp... Gasp...\nI...made it out here...but...\pI'm exhausted... I don't have the\nenergy to catch POKéMON...
data/text/safari_zone.inc.SafariZone_Northeast_Text_1C3D19: I'm on a mission to find WATER POKéMON\nyou don't see in HOENN.\pDo you have any idea where the lake is?
data/text/safari_zone.inc.SafariZone_Northeast_Text_1C3D80: I'm going to catch a lot of rare POKéMON\nhere and trade them with my friends!
data/text/safari_zone.inc.SafariZone_Southeast_Text_1C3DCE: I put a {POKEBLOCK} on the {POKEBLOCK} FEEDER.\nBut it seems to have disappeared.\pI guess POKéMON must have eaten it\nwithout me noticing.
data/text/safari_zone.inc.Route121_SafariZoneEntrance_Text_1C3E4B: SAFARI ZONE TRAINER TIP!\pThrow {POKEBLOCK}S at wild POKéMON to make\nthem less likely to flee.
data/text/safari_zone.inc.SafariZone_RestHouse_Text_1C3EC9: I don't have any {POKEBLOCK}S, but I caught\na good number of POKéMON.\pYou can improve your chances of making\na catch by getting closer to them\lbefore throwing a SAFARI BALL.
data/text/safari_zone.inc.SafariZone_RestHouse_Text_1C3F71: If you use {POKEBLOCK}S, wild POKéMON won't\nbe so quick to run away.\pIt's not much use to give {POKEBLOCK}S to\nPOKéMON that don't flee easily.
data/text/safari_zone.inc.SafariZone_RestHouse_Text_1C3FF4: If you put a {POKEBLOCK} on the FEEDER,\nPOKéMON are attracted to it.\pI think POKéMON with the same sort of\nnature are drawn by a certain {POKEBLOCK}.

data/text/sample_message.inc.Text_SampleMessage1: This is sample message 1.\pWelcome to the world of\nPOKéMON AGB!\lWe hope you enjoy this!
data/text/sample_message.inc.Text_SampleMessage2: This is sample message 2.\pWelcome to the world of\nPOKéMON AGB!\lWe hope you enjoy this!
data/text/sample_message.inc.Text_SampleMessage3: This is sample message 3.\pWelcome to the world of\nPOKéMON AGB!\lWe hope you enjoy this!

data/text/save.inc.UnknownString_81C6C85: Would you like to save the game?
data/text/save.inc.UnknownString_81C6CA6: There is already a saved file.\nIs it okay to overwrite it?
data/text/save.inc.UnknownString_81C6D26: There is a different game file that is\nalready saved.\pIs it okay to overwrite it?

data/text/secret_base.inc.SecretBase_Text_AllDecorationsWillBeRetu: All decorations and furniture in your\nSECRET BASE will be returned to your PC.\pIs that okay?
data/text/secret_base.inc.SecretBase_Text_WantToRegisterSecretBase: Do you want to register\n{STR_VAR_1}'s SECRET BASE?
data/text/secret_base.inc.SecretBase_Text_AlreadyRegisteredDelete: This data is already registered.\nWould you like to delete it?
data/text/secret_base.inc.SecretBase_Text_TooManyBasesDeleteSome: Up to 10 locations can be registered.\pDelete a location if you want to\nregister another location.
data/text/secret_base.inc.SecretBase_Text_WhatWouldYouLikeToDo: What would you like to do?
data/text/secret_base.inc.SecretBase_Text_RegistryInfo: The registered SECRET BASE will remain\nunless the owner moves away.\pIf it is removed from the registry,\nanother SECRET BASE may take its place.\pUp to ten locations can be registered.{PAUSE_UNTIL_PRESS}
data/text/secret_base.inc.SecretBase_Text_BattleTowerShield: A shield of {STR_VAR_2} that marks winning\n{STR_VAR_1} times in a row at the BATTLE TOWER.
data/text/secret_base.inc.SecretBase_Text_ToyTV: A realistic toy TV. It could be easily\nmistaken for the real thing.
data/text/secret_base.inc.SecretBase_Text_SeedotTV: A toy TV shaped like a SEEDOT.\nIt looks ready to roll away on its own...
data/text/secret_base.inc.SecretBase_Text_SkittyTV: A toy TV shaped like a SKITTY.\nIt looks ready to stroll away...
data/text/secret_base.inc.UnknownString_81A3C71: You may only make one SECRET BASE.\pWould you like to move from the SECRET\nBASE near {STR_VAR_1}?
data/text/secret_base.inc.UnknownString_81A3CC9: Moving completed.\pWould you like to use the SECRET POWER?

data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.UnknownString_81A1948: If some vines drop down, this tree can\nbe climbed.
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.UnknownString_81A197B: If some vines drop down, this tree can\nbe climbed.\pUse the SECRET POWER?
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.UnknownString_81A19DF: Want to make your SECRET BASE here?
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.UnknownString_81A1A03: If this clump of grass can be moved,\nit might be possible to go inside.
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.UnknownString_81A1A4B: If this clump of grass can be moved,\nit might be possible to go inside.\pUse the SECRET POWER?
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.UnknownString_81A1AC6: Want to make your SECRET BASE here?
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A1AEA: Have you made a SECRET BASE already?\pI went here, there, everywhere before\nchoosing this place.\pSince you're already here, how would\nyou like to battle?
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.UnknownString_81A1BB2: Waaargh! You're too strong!\nAbout me losing... Please keep it secret!
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A1BF8: What do you think of my SECRET BASE?\nCome visit me again tomorrow.
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A1C3B: Have you made a SECRET BASE already?\pI went here, there, everywhere before\nchoosing this place.\pFeel free to hang out!
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A1CB2: There're a lot of places where you can\nmake a SECRET BASE.\pBut I like this spot best.\nDon't you think it's nice?\pOh, would you like to have a battle?
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.UnknownString_81A1D74: Hmmm... It's our loss...\nBut don't tell anyone!\lIt's a confidential secret!
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A1DC0: If you're in this area again, I hope\nyou'll visit me.
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A1DF6: There're a lot of places where you can\nmake a SECRET BASE.\pBut I like this spot best.\nDon't you think it's nice?
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A1E67:
This is a popular spot.
It's always taken.\pOh! Were you thinking about taking this
spot, too?\pI'll tell you what, you can have this
spot if you can beat me.
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A1F04: Okay!\nI'm going to defend my SECRET BASE!
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A1F2E: Hunh? Is that right?\nYou're not interested in this spot?
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A1F88: Okay, when I move one day, this place\nwill be yours!
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A1FBD: This is a popular spot.\nIt's always taken.\pI waited a long time for it to open.\nI finally got to use it!
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A2026: Welcome to my POKéMON LAB.\pI carry out research on battling in\nsecrecy.\pWould you like to see how strong I am?
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A2095: I'm going to go all out!
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.UnknownString_81A20C9: Hmm... I've still got lots to learn.\nI have to study some more.
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A2109: Thanks for battling with me.\nPlease come back again tomorrow.
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A2147: Welcome to my POKéMON LAB.\pI carry out research on battling in\nsecrecy.
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A218F: A big mansion is nice, but I like this\nsort of place more.\pI like it because all kinds of people\ncome visit me.\pSo, how would you like a battle?
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A2230: When you're ready, give me a shout!
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.UnknownString_81A2254: Aww! Done in!\nBut it's still fun to battle!
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A2280: Well, anyway, I should go buy some\ndecorations and furniture.\pI want my SECRET BASE to be a place\nother people can enjoy.
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A22FA: A big mansion is nice, but I like this\nsort of place more.\pI like it because all kinds of people\ncome visit me.
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A236A:
I simply adore shopping for decorations
and furniture.\pI also love raising POKéMON just
as much.\pIf you would be so kind, will you battle
with my POKéMON?
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A2446: That was all in good fun!\nI should go enjoy shopping now.
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A2480: I simply adore shopping for decorations\nand furniture.\pI also love raising POKéMON just\nas much.
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A24E1: Some people make their SECRET BASES in\nhard-to-find places.\lDo they want to just lie low?\pBut since you found me, how about we\nhave a battle?
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A258A: Oh... Are you maybe tired from searching\nfor this place?
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A25D2: Where's your SECRET BASE?\nI should go visit you there.
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A2609: Some people make their SECRET BASES in\nhard-to-find places.\lDo they want to just lie low?
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A2663: People have told me that you can get\ndecorations in several ways.\pWe should have a race to see who can\nget nicer decorations and furniture!\pIn the meantime, want to battle?
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A2710: This is my SECRET BASE.\nI can't lose!
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A276A: I won't lose at collecting decorations.\nCome visit again!
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A27A4: People have told me that you can get\ndecorations in several ways.\pWe should have a race to see who can\nget nicer decorations and furniture!
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A2830:
I found a spot I liked, and I did it up
with my favorite decorations.\pI raise my favorite POKéMON and grow
stronger with it.\pThat's what I do.
Want to battle with me?
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A28D7: Show me what you're made of!
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A28F4: I guess there are times when you're not\ninto it.
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.UnknownString_81A2925: I know exactly what you're made of now.
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A294D: We can both become stronger.\nLet's keep at it!
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A297C: I found a spot I liked, and I did it up\nwith my favorite decorations.\pI raise my favorite POKéMON and grow\nstronger with it.\pEvery day is a great day.
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A2A13: You can learn a lot about the taste\nand sense of people by the kinds of\ldecorations they have, and how they\ldisplay them.\pWhat do you think of my taste?\nAre you speechless?\pWant to see my taste in battling?
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A2AFB: I'll be happy to demonstrate my style\nanytime.
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.UnknownString_81A2B2A: You're supremely talented!\nYour power seems to be limitless...
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A2B69: What did you think of my style?\nI'll keep on polishing it!
data/text/secret_base_trainers.inc.SecretBase_RedCave1_Text_1A2BA4: You can learn a lot about the taste\nand sense of people by the kinds of\ldecorations they have, and how they\ldisplay them.\pWhat do you think of my taste?\nAre you speechless?

data/text/secret_power_tm.inc.Route111_Text_1A3520:
What's that?
What am I doing?\pI'm thinking about making my own room
here using a POKéMON move.\pI know! I'll give you this TM.
Will you use it to make your own room?
data/text/secret_power_tm.inc.Route111_Text_1A35C5:
Find a big tree that looks like it might
drop some vines.\pUse SECRET POWER in front of the tree.
Some vines should get free and drop\ldown, so you can climb the tree.\pYou'll find a lot of space for putting
your favorite things.\pIt'll be your own secret room...
A SECRET BASE!\pYou should make one, too.\pAnother thing, you don't always have
to make your SECRET BASE in a tree.\pTry using SECRET POWER on rock walls
that have small indents in them.\pI'm going to look for other places, too.
Okay, bye!
data/text/secret_power_tm.inc.Route111_Text_1A37B5: Oh, you don't want this?\nIf you change your mind, tell me, okay?
data/text/secret_power_tm.inc.Route111_Text_1A37F6: Oh, you don't have any room for this.\pI'll hold on to it, so come back for it\nanother time, okay?

data/text/shoal_cave.inc.ShoalCave_LowTideEntranceRoom_Text_1C666:
Are you planning on going deep in
there?\pHow about bringing me back some
SHOAL SALT and SHOAL SHELLS?\pI can make you something good if
you bring me the ingredients.
data/text/shoal_cave.inc.ShoalCave_LowTideEntranceRoom_Text_1C670: If you bring me four each of the\nSHOAL SALT and SHOAL SHELLS,\lI can make you a SHELL BELL...\pYou can get those ingredients\nevery day.
data/text/shoal_cave.inc.ShoalCave_LowTideEntranceRoom_Text_1C679: Oh, hey! SHOAL SALT and SHOAL\nSHELLS! And enough of them, too!\pWould you like me to make you a\nSHELL BELL with them?
data/text/shoal_cave.inc.ShoalCave_LowTideEntranceRoom_Text_1C680: All righty, then! I'll make you a\nSHELL BELL right away.\p... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...\n... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...\pThere! Done!
data/text/shoal_cave.inc.ShoalCave_LowTideEntranceRoom_Text_1C688:
Have a POKéMON hold on to that.
It'll love it, that's for certain.\pWhy, the SHELL BELL's chime...
It's simply sublime!\pYou can get its ingredients every
day, so I can make you more.
data/text/shoal_cave.inc.ShoalCave_LowTideEntranceRoom_Text_1C694: Oh... Is that so...\nI wanted to make a SHELL BELL...
data/text/shoal_cave.inc.ShoalCave_LowTideStairsRoom_Text_1C6979: There was some SHOAL SALT here.\nBut, there's nothing here now.
data/text/shoal_cave.inc.ShoalCave_LowTideInnerRoom_Text_1C69B8: There was a SHOAL SHELL here.\nBut, there's nothing here now.
