data/text/shoal_cave.inc.ShoalCave_LowTideEntranceRoom_Text_1C69F: You don't have space in your BAG\nif I were to make it for you.\pYou should make room and come back\nfor a SHELL BELL.

data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Introduction: I'm the STORYTELLER.\nI'll tell you tales of legendary\lTRAINERS.\pWill you hear my tale?
data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_WhichTale: I know of these legends.\nWhich tale will you have me tell?
data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_ButIKnowOfNoLegendaryTr: But, I know of no legendary TRAINERS.\nHence, I know no tales.\pWhere does one find a TRAINER worthy\nof a legendary tale?
data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_BirthOfANewLegend:
What's that?!
You... You...\p{STR_VAR_2}
{STR_VAR_1} time(s)?!\pThat is indeed magnificent!
It's the birth of a new legend!
data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_CouldThereBeOtherTraine: It gets me thinking, could there be\nother TRAINERS with more impressive\llegends awaiting discovery?
data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_HaveYouAnyTales: Are you a TRAINER?\pThen tell me, have you any tales that\nare even remotely legendary?
data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_HearAnotherLegendaryTal: Incidentally... Would you care to hear\nanother legendary tale?
data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_ImNotSatisfied: Hmm...\nI'm not satisfied...\pI wish you would bring me news worthy\nof being called a legend.
data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_WishMorePeopleWould: I wish more people would be interested\nin hearing my epic tales of legendary\lTRAINERS.
data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story1Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER saved the game
{STR_VAR_1} times!\pA more cautious TRAINER than
{STR_VAR_3} one will never find!
data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story2Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER started new trends
{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} is setting trends for all
the HOENN region!
data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story3Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER planted BERRIES
{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} is a legendary lover of
BERRIES!
data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story4Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER swapped BIKES
{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} must love BIKES deeply
and passionately!
data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story5Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER got interviewed
{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} must be a TRAINER who's
attracting much attention!
data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story6Text: This is a tale of a TRAINER\nnamed {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER battled {STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} must be a TRAINER who can\nnever refuse a chance to battle!
data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story7Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER caught
{STR_VAR_1} POKéMON!\p{STR_VAR_3} is a legendary catcher of
wild POKéMON!
data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story8Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER caught
{STR_VAR_1} POKéMON while fishing!\p{STR_VAR_3} is a legendary fishing
expert!
data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story9Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER hatched {STR_VAR_1} POKéMON
from EGGS!\p{STR_VAR_3} is a legendary warmer
of EGGS!
data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story10Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER made {STR_VAR_1} POKéMON
evolve!\p{STR_VAR_3} is the ultimate evolver
of POKéMON!
data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story11Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER healed POKéMON
{STR_VAR_1} times at POKéMON CENTERS!\pThere could be no greater lover of
POKéMON CENTERS than {STR_VAR_3}!
data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story12Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER healed POKéMON
{STR_VAR_1} times at home!\pThere could be no more of a homebody
than {STR_VAR_3}!
data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story13Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER went into the SAFARI ZONE
{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} is a TRAINER whose wild side
must come out in the SAFARI ZONE!
data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story14Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER used CUT
{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} is a TRAINER who just must
love to CUT!
data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story15Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER used ROCK SMASH
{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} must be a TRAINER who
can't leave a stone unsmashed!
data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story16Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER moved the SECRET BASE
{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} is a TRAINER who loves
to move houses often!
data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story17Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER used SPLASH
{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} is a TRAINER who must love
SPLASHING around!
data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story18Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER had to rely on STRUGGLE
{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} is a tenacious TRAINER
who never gives in to adversity!
data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story19Action: Won the jackpot on the SLOTS
data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story19Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER won the jackpot on
the SLOTS {STR_VAR_1} times.\p{STR_VAR_3} is a TRAINER who was lucky
on the SLOTS!
data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story20Text:

named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER won in ROULETTE
{STR_VAR_1} times in a row.\p{STR_VAR_3} was lucky when the ball
bounced in ROULETTE!

This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER took the BATTLE TOWER
challenge {STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} is a TRAINER who aspires
for excellence in the BATTLE TOWER!
data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story22Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER made {POKEBLOCK}S
{STR_VAR_1} times!\pThere is none better at using a BERRY
BLENDER than {STR_VAR_3}!
data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story23Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER entered CONTESTS
{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} must love showing off
POKéMON to others!
data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story24Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER won CONTESTS
{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} must be an incredible
CONTEST master!
data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story25Text:
This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER bought items in shops

This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER used an ITEMFINDER

This is a tale of a TRAINER
named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER got soaked by rain

data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story28Text:

data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story29Text:

named {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER jumped down ledges

data/text/storyteller.inc.gTextStoryteller_Story31Text: This is a tale of a TRAINER\nnamed {STR_VAR_3}.\pThis TRAINER watched TV\n{STR_VAR_1} times!\p{STR_VAR_3} must love watching TV!

baby-smooth skin!

data/text/surf.inc.gText_WantToUseSurf: The water is dyed a deep blue...\nWould you like to SURF?

data/text/trader.inc.gTextTrader_Introduction: Hi, I'm the TRADER.\nWant to trade decorations with me?
data/text/trader.inc.gTextTrader_TradedAlready: But we've traded decorations already,\nyou and I.
data/text/trader.inc.gTextTrader_MenuPrompt: If you see any decorative item that\nyou want of mine, speak up.
data/text/trader.inc.gTextTrader_DontWantAnything: You don't want anything?\nI feel unwanted...
data/text/trader.inc.gTextTrader_ItemOnceBelongedTo: That decorative item once belonged\nto {STR_VAR_1}.\pDo you want it?
data/text/trader.inc.gTextTrader_YouDontHaveDecorations: Uh... Wait a second. You don't have a\nsingle piece of decoration!
data/text/trader.inc.gTextTrader_PickDecorationYoullTrade: Okay, pick the decoration that you'll\ntrade to me.
data/text/trader.inc.gTextTrader_FeelUnwanted2: You won't trade with me?\nI feel unwanted...
data/text/trader.inc.gTextTrader_NoRoomForThis: You've got all the {STR_VAR_2}S that can\nbe stored. You've no room for this.
data/text/trader.inc.gTextTrader_SoWellTrade: Okay, so we'll trade my {STR_VAR_3}\nfor your {STR_VAR_2}?
data/text/trader.inc.gTextTrader_InUseYouCantTradeIt: That piece of decoration is in use.\nYou can't trade it.
data/text/trader.inc.gTextTrader_ThenWellTrade: Then we'll trade!\nI'll send my decoration to your PC.
data/text/trader.inc.gTextTrader_ICantTradeThatOneAway: Oops! Sorry!\nThat's a really rare piece of decoration.\lI can't trade that one away!\pCan I interest you in something else?

data/text/trainers.inc.Route102_Text_1B79C3: If you have POKéMON with you, then\nyou're an official POKéMON TRAINER!\lYou can't say no to my challenge!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route102_Text_1B7A2C: Arrgh, I lost...\nI should have trained mine more...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route102_Text_1B7A60: Listen, you. If you're strong, you\nshould have told me before!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route102_Text_1B7A9F: Ever since I lost to you, I desperately\ntrained my POKéMON.\lYou can't say no to my challenge!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route102_Text_1B7AFD: Arrgh, I lost...\nIs my training method not right?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route102_Text_1B7B2F: If you're going to get stronger, I'll\nget stronger, too.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route102_Text_1B7B68: Did you just become a TRAINER?\nWe're both beginners!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route102_Text_1B7B9D: I called you because I thought I\ncould beat you...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route102_Text_1B7BD0: I haven't won once yet...\nI wish I would win soon...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route102_Text_1B7C05: Hahah! Our eyes met!\nI'll take you on with my BUG POKéMON!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route102_Text_1B7C52: If you lock eyes with a TRAINER,\nyou have to challenge! It's a rule!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route102_Text_1B7C97: I'm going to keep winning and aim\nto be the best TRAINER.\pHelp me further my career!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route102_Text_1B7CEC: I ended up furthering your career...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route102_Text_1B7D11: To keep winning my way up, I see that\nI have to catch more POKéMON.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route103_Text_1B7D55: Did you feel the tug of our soul-\nsoothing fragrance?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route103_Text_1B7D8B: You weren't led astray by our aroma...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route103_Text_1B7DB2: Aromatherapy is a form of mental\nhealing that works with fragrances.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route103_Text_1B7DF7: AMY: I'm AMY.\nAnd this is my little sister LIV.\lWe battle together!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route103_Text_1B7E50: AMY: You have to think about all\nkinds of things when you're battling\lagainst two TRAINERS.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route103_Text_1B7EAC: AMY: Uh-oh, you have only one\nPOKéMON with you.\lYou can't battle us like that.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route103_Text_1B7EFB: LIV: We battle together as one\nteam.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route103_Text_1B7F20: LIV: Oh, we lost, big sister...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route103_Text_1B7F40: LIV: We work perfectly together, me\nand my big sister...\pBut we still lost...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route103_Text_1B7F8E: LIV: If you want to battle us, you\nhave to have two POKéMON!\lIt's not fair if you don't!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route103_Text_1B7FE7: AMY: I'm AMY.\nAnd this is my little sister LIV.\lWe battle together!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route103_Text_1B802B: AMY: Aww, boo!\nWe couldn't win again...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route103_Text_1B8053: AMY: You have to think about all\nkinds of things when you're battling\lagainst two TRAINERS.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route103_Text_1B80AF: AMY: Uh-oh, you have only one\nPOKéMON with you.\lYou can't battle us like that.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route103_Text_1B80FE: LIV: We battle together as one\nteam.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route103_Text_1B8123: LIV: Awww, we lost again...\nBig sister...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route103_Text_1B814D: LIV: We work perfectly together, me\nand my big sister...\pBut why did we lose again?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route103_Text_1B81A1: LIV: If you want to battle us, you\nhave to have two POKéMON!\lIt's not fair if you don't!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route103_Text_1B81FA: Gah! My fishing line's all snarled up!\nI'm getting frustrated and mean!\lThat's it! Battle me!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route103_Text_1B8258: Gah! Lost it!\nI'm even more annoyed now!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route103_Text_1B82A9: My POKéMON is delightfully adorable!\nDon't be shy - I'll show you!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route103_Text_1B830D: My delightful POKéMON looks darling\neven when it's fainted!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route103_Text_1B8349: Hi, you! My delightfully adorable\nPOKéMON has become more darling!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route103_Text_1B83A4: The more I spend time with it, the\nmore adorable my POKéMON becomes.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route104_Text_1B83E9: GINA: Okay, let's battle with our\nPOKéMON!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route104_Text_1B842C: GINA: {STR_VAR_1} is strong!\nWe have to train lots more!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route104_Text_1B845C: GINA: Oh? Only one POKéMON?\nThen, we don't battle with you.\pIf there's only one POKéMON, it will\nbe lonesome. That's not nice.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route104_Text_1B84DB: MIA: We are twins, so we battle\nPOKéMON together.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route104_Text_1B850D: MIA: We battled together, but we\nboth lost...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route104_Text_1B853B: MIA: We will train our POKéMON more\nand be strong like you.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route104_Text_1B8577: MIA: You want to battle with us?\pIt's a big no-no if you don't have two\nPOKéMON with you.\lWe're too strong for you!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route104_Text_1B85EB: Why keep it a secret?\nI'm the WATER POKéMON expert!\pHuh?\nYou don't know me?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route104_Text_1B8637: I thought I wasn't too bad, if I may\nsay so, but I guess not... Bleah...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route104_Text_1B8680: I got too into fishing.\nI forgot I had to raise my POKéMON...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route104_Text_1B86BE: Leaving footprints in the sand is\nso fun!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route104_Text_1B86E8: Waah! I got sand in my runners!\nThey're all gritty!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route104_Text_1B871C: I want to leave my footprints in the\nsand everywhere, but they disappear\lquickly...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route104_Text_1B8770: Should I...\nOr shouldn't I?\pOkay, sure, I will battle!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route104_Text_1B87C3: If you're faced with a decision and\nyou let someone else choose for you,\lyou will regret it, however things\lturn out.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route104_Text_1B8872: I made the decision to battle, so I\ncan accept this loss in grace.\pI am still upset about losing!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route104_Text_1B88D4: Oh, sure, I'll accept your challenge.\nI have a lot of money.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route104_Text_1B8925: There are some things money can't buy.\nThat's POKéMON...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route104_Text_1B895E: After I lost to you, I learned a bunch\nof things about POKéMON.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route104_Text_1B899E: I lost again?\nWhy couldn't I win?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route104_Text_1B89C0: I'm fabulously wealthy, but I can't\nseem to win at POKéMON...\pIt's so deep, the world of POKéMON...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route104_Text_1B8A24: We must have been fated to meet.\nMay I ask you for a battle?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route104_Text_1B8A69: “Hello” is the beginning of “good-bye.”\nI hope we meet again.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route104_Text_1B8AA7: Hello, we meet again.\nMay I ask you for a battle?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route104_Text_1B8AD9: Oh, my...\nI did the best that I could...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route104_Text_1B8B02: “Hello” is the beginning of “good-bye.”\nI hope we meet again.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route105_Text_1B8B40: There's supposed to be a mystical\nrock around here.\lDo you know anything about it?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route105_Text_1B8B93: I was thinking too much about that\nrock, while my POKéMON remained weak...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route105_Text_1B8BDE: I can spend hours and hours staring\nat a nice rock without growing bored.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route105_Text_1B8C28: Whew! I was worried that a kid was\ndrowning when I saw you.\pYou seem to be okay, so what do you\nsay to a battle?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route105_Text_1B8CA9: If you are drowning, the signal is to\nwave one arm toward the beach.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route105_Text_1B8CEE: Swimming the deep blue sea...\nIt feels the greatest!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route105_Text_1B8D45: Why is the sea blue?\pI learned about that at the MUSEUM in\nSLATEPORT, but I forgot.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route105_Text_1B8D99: My body feels lighter in the water.\nIt's as if I've gotten slimmer!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route105_Text_1B8DED: Your body weight is reduced to just\none tenth in the water.\pThat would make me...\nWhoops! I'm not telling you my weight!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route105_Text_1B8E66: The blue, blue sky...\nThe vast sea...\lIt's so peaceful...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route105_Text_1B8EA0: I lost while I was lounging!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route105_Text_1B8EBD: I want to be told I'm relaxing to be\nwith. Giggle.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route106_Text_1B8EF0: Which do you prefer, fishing in the\nsea or a stream?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route106_Text_1B8F25: Like in deep-sea fishing, I lost\nspectacularly!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route106_Text_1B8F55: Fishing is the greatest whether it's\nin the sea or a stream.\lYou agree with me, right?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route106_Text_1B8FAC: I caught a bunch of POKéMON fishing.\nI'll show you an impressive battle!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route106_Text_1B9011: Win or lose, POKéMON are the greatest!\nYou agree with me, right?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route106_Text_1B9052: What do people do if they need to go\nto a washroom?\pWhat if my ROD hooks a big one while\nI'm in the washroom? I just can't go...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route106_Text_1B90D3: I lost because I'm trying to not go\nto the washroom...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route106_Text_1B910A: Oh, no! I've got this feeling I'll hook\na big one!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route106_Text_1B913D: Hahahah! I'm a lousy runner, but in\nthe water you can't catch me!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route106_Text_1B918A: I wouldn't lose in a swim race...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route106_Text_1B91AC: The sea is my backyard. I'm not going\nto take it easy because you're a kid!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route106_Text_1B91F8: Did you take it easy on me by any\nchance?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route106_Text_1B9222: Drifting along with the waves...\nI love it! Why don't you give it a try?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route107_Text_1B926B: Yawn...\pI must have drifted off to sleep while\nI was drifting in the waves.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route107_Text_1B92B7: Ahaha, I lost...\nI'll take a snooze, I think...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route107_Text_1B92E7: Floating and being rocked by the\nwaves - it's like sleeping in a plush,\lcomfy bed.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route107_Text_1B933A: The sea is like my backyard.\nLet's battle!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route107_Text_1B9365: I lost on my home field...\nI'm in shock!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route107_Text_1B938E: I swim the seas with a heart full of\ndreams...\pIt's a song!\nAnyways, I'm swimming some more.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route107_Text_1B93EB: Swimming in the big, wide sea, my\nPOKéMON has grown stronger!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route107_Text_1B9429: What a shock!\pMy POKéMON has gotten stronger, but\nI stayed weak as a TRAINER!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route107_Text_1B9477: What you learn in battle makes you a\nstronger TRAINER.\lThe waves taught me that.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route107_Text_1B94C8: Do you know a little town called\nDEWFORD?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route107_Text_1B94FF: A weird saying is getting really\ntrendy at DEWFORD HALL.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route107_Text_1B9538: Did you want to battle me?\nSure, I'll go with you!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route107_Text_1B956B: I wasn't good enough for you.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route107_Text_1B9589: I think you're going to keep getting\nbetter. I'll go for it, too!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route107_Text_1B95CB: LISA: We challenge you as a sister\nand brother!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route107_Text_1B95FB: LISA: Awesome.\nYou're in a different class of tough.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route107_Text_1B9630: LISA: Do you have any friends who\nwould go to the beach with you?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route107_Text_1B9672: LISA: If you want to battle with us,\nbring more POKéMON.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route107_Text_1B96AB: RAY: We always battle POKéMON, me\nand my sister.\pI always lose, but we can beat you\n2-on-2!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route107_Text_1B9707: RAY: Wowee, you're at a higher level\nthan us!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route107_Text_1B9735: RAY: My sister gave me my POKéMON.\nI raised it, and now it's my important\lpartner!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route107_Text_1B9788: RAY: If you want to battle us, go\nbring some more POKéMON!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route108_Text_1B97C3: My dream is to swim the world's seven\nseas!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route108_Text_1B97EF: I won't be able to swim the seven seas\nlike this...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route108_Text_1B9823: Playing with marine POKéMON is one of\nthe pleasures of swimming!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route108_Text_1B9864: Ahoy, there! Are you going out to the\nABANDONED SHIP, too?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route108_Text_1B98BC: Some people even go inside that\nABANDONED SHIP.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route108_Text_1B98EC: My liar of a boyfriend told me that\nI look great in a bikini...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route108_Text_1B9935: Even if it's a lie, I love being told\nI look great...\lWe girls are so complex...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route108_Text_1B9986: I love the sea!\nI forget all my worries when I swim!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route108_Text_1B99BB: When I lose a battle, I get all\nstressed out!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route108_Text_1B99E9: Work off your stress by swimming!\nIt's so healthy!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route109_Text_1B9A1C: Hiyah! Look at my chiseled abs!\nThis is what you call “cut”!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route109_Text_1B9A6D: Hiyah!\pMy sculpted abs have nothing to do\nwith POKéMON battles!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route109_Text_1B9AAD: Are you properly protected against\nthe sun?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route109_Text_1B9AEB: Cheeks are the most prone to burning!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route109_Text_1B9B11: I've laid anchor in ports around the\nworld, but SLATEPORT's the best.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route109_Text_1B9B68: In the best port was the best\nTRAINER...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route109_Text_1B9BD3: I'm usually stronger than this!\nI'm just seasick as a dog!\pI'm a SAILOR, but...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route109_Text_1B9C23: I'm thirsty... I could go for a SODA POP\nat the SEASHORE HOUSE...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route109_Text_1B9C6E: I'm getting famished... My inner tube\nlooks like a giant doughnut...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route109_Text_1B9CB3: I'm hungry, but I've got enough pep in\nme for a battle!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route109_Text_1B9D10: When you eat on a beach, everything\nseems to taste a little better.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route109_Text_1B9D54: Doesn't a beach umbrella look like\na giant flower?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route109_Text_1B9D8E: If you look at the beach from the sky,\nit looks like a big flower garden!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route109_Text_1B9DD8: I'm not losing to you again!\nThat's why I have my inner tube!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route109_Text_1B9E1D: If I have an inner tube, me and my\nPOKéMON's cuteness goes way up!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route109_Text_1B9E60: I can't swim without my inner tube,\nbut I won't lose at POKéMON!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route109_Text_1B9EA1: Did I lose because I have an inner\ntube?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route109_Text_1B9ECA: My inner tube is a fashion item.\nI can't be seen without it.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route109_Text_1B9F07: Hi, big TRAINER.\nWill you battle with me?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route109_Text_1B9F44: How did you get to be so strong?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route109_Text_1B9F65: Wahahah! This dude's going to catch\nhimself a big one!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route109_Text_1B9FB7: This dude thinks you're a big one.\nNo, you're a big-one-to-be!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route109_Text_1B9FF6: PAUL: Well, this is a mood-breaker.\pI wish you wouldn't disturb our\nprecious time together.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route109_Text_1BA069: PAUL: Well, don't tell anyone that\nwe're here.\lThis is just our private world of two!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route109_Text_1BA0BF: PAUL: We're totally, deeply in love.\nThat's why we make our POKéMON battle\ltogether.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route109_Text_1BA114: MEL: We're, like, totally in love.\nOur romance is heating up all of HOENN!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route109_Text_1BA15F: MEL: We lost, and it's my fault!\nPAUL will hate me!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route109_Text_1BA193: MEL: Um, PAUL, are you angry with me?\nPlease don't be angry.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route109_Text_1BA1D0: MEL: We're, like, deeply and truly in love.\nThat's why we make our POKéMON\lbattle together.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route110_Text_1BA22C: Whoa! Watch it!\nI guess you're not used to BIKE racing.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route110_Text_1BA27C: Flat tires and brake problems can\ncause serious injury!\lInspect your BIKE for problems!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route110_Text_1BA2D4: Yo, you!\nCan you keep up with my speed?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route110_Text_1BA30C: Speed alone won't let me win at POKéMON.\nI need to reconsider this...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route110_Text_1BA352: Don't panic if your BIKE's going fast!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route110_Text_1BA3A5: There's no need to panic or stress.\nTake it easy. There's plenty of time.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route110_Text_1BA3EF: Aren't you going a little too fast?\nTake it easy and let's battle.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route110_Text_1BA432: I didn't panic, but I still lost...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route110_Text_1BA456: There's no need to panic or stress.\nTake it easy. There's plenty of time.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route110_Text_1BA4A0: The triathlon is hard in the extreme.\pYou have to complete the three events\nof swimming, cycling, and running.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route110_Text_1BA52E: I'm exhausted, so I need a break.\nIt's important to get proper rest.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route110_Text_1BA573: Isn't it neat to hold a battle while\ncycling?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route110_Text_1BA5A1: Wow...\nHow could you be so strong?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route110_Text_1BA5C4: Were you going after a record?\pI'm sorry if I held you up!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route110_Text_1BA5FF: I've been riding without stopping.\nMy thighs are like rocks!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route110_Text_1BA65F: Oh, you have some GYM BADGES?\nNo wonder you're so strong!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route110_Text_1BA699: I have foreseen your intentions!\nI cannot possibly lose!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route110_Text_1BA6D2: I failed to prophesize my own demise!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route110_Text_1BA6F8: I see your future...\pHmm...\nI see a shining light...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route110_Text_1BA72D: Ahahahaha!\nI'll dazzle you with my wonders!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route110_Text_1BA76C: You managed to win only because it was\na wonder! Yes, a wonder!\lDon't think you can win all the time!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route110_Text_1BA7D2: Could I see your POKéMON?\nJust one look, please?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route110_Text_1BA829: When I see a POKéMON that I don't know,\nmy passion as a collector is ignited!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route110_Text_1BA877: Hi, have you caught any new POKéMON?\pCould I see your POKéMON?\nJust one look, please?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route110_Text_1BA8E9: Oh, I long to make all rare POKéMON\nmine!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route110_Text_1BA913: Hey!\nDon't sneak up behind me like that!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route110_Text_1BA94A: Fishing is all about concentration.\nYou have to focus on the floater.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route110_Text_1BA990: Ahahaha! I would go anywhere to show\noff my delightful POKéMON.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route110_Text_1BA9E9: Perhaps I should groom my POKéMON for\nCONTESTS rather than battles.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route110_Text_1BAA2D: Ahahahaha! I would be happy to show\noff my POKéMON as often as you like!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route110_Text_1BAA8F: CONTESTS are delightful, but I like\nto battle, too.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route110_Text_1BAAC3: I found some cool POKéMON in the grass\naround here!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route110_Text_1BAAF7: Being cool isn't enough to win...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route110_Text_1BAB19: It's hard to battle with POKéMON you\njust caught.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route111_Text_1BAB4B: Oh, hey! Those GO-GOGGLES suit you.\nBut I think they look better on me.\pLet's decide who they look better on\nwith a battle!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route111_Text_1BABC7: I couldn't see what was happening at my\nsides because of the GO-GOGGLES.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route111_Text_1BAC10: The GO-GOGGLES make it possible to\nget through sandstorms.\lThat makes me happy!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route111_Text_1BAC60: I'm having a picnic in the desert.\pYou can always find a TRAINER, so\nI can enjoy a battle here, too!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route111_Text_1BACD8: When you're battling in a sandstorm,\nwatch out for your POKéMON's HP.\pIt can faint if you don't keep an eye\non it!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route111_Text_1BAD4B: Wearing these GO-GOGGLES makes me\nfeel like a superhero.\lRight now, nobody can beat me!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route111_Text_1BADA3: I can't win on spirit alone...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route111_Text_1BADC2: I'm going to be a real hero one day.\nI'm going to work harder to make me\land my POKéMON stronger.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route111_Text_1BAE24: I heard there are fossils to be found\nin the desert. Where could they be?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route111_Text_1BAE81: If they can find fossils in the desert,\nit must have been a sea before.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route111_Text_1BAEC9: For thirty years I have searched for\nancient ruins!\lI am to be challenged?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route111_Text_1BAF14: While I have searched for ruins, I've\nnot searched for strong POKéMON.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route111_Text_1BAF5B: For thirty years I have searched for\nancient ruins!\pNo, wait, was that forty years?\nWhich was it now?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route111_Text_1BAFC1: For thirty years I have searched for\nancient ruins!\pNo, wait, was that forty years?\nAnyway, am I to be challenged?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route111_Text_1BB034: I've found no ruins, nor have I found\nany strong POKéMON...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route111_Text_1BB070:
For thirty years I have searched for
ancient ruins!\pNo, wait, was that forty years I've
searched?\pHmm... It could even be fifty...
How long have I been at this?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route111_Text_1BB111: I'm full of pep!\nAnd my POKéMON is peppy, too!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route111_Text_1BB15B: When I see a TRAINER with a lot of pep,\nI can't help looking.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route111_Text_1BB199: I don't know where you're going, but\nwould you like to battle?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route111_Text_1BB1F6: I'm thinking that I should go to\nMT. CHIMNEY, but the view around\lhere is very nice, too.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route111_Text_1BB250: To train myself, I challenge all\nwhom I meet!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route111_Text_1BB290: All I can do is keep training until\nI can defeat strong TRAINERS such\las yourself.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route111_Text_1BB2E3: Show me how much you've toughened\nyour POKéMON.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route111_Text_1BB33E: POKéMON and TRAINERS learn much\nthrough battling.\pWhat's important is to never give up\neven if you lose.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route111_Text_1BB3A7: We're training here to elevate our\ngame to the next level.\lStay and train with us!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route111_Text_1BB40E: Since you're that strong, you should\naim for the POKéMON LEAGUE.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route111_Text_1BB44F: Oh, your POKéMON look like serious\nactors.\lI have to ask you for an engagement.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route111_Text_1BB49F: They didn't just look strong, they\nare strong!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route111_Text_1BB4CE: I thought I was raising my POKéMON\ndiligently, but, oh no, there is still\lmuch to be done.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route111_Text_1BB529: You can make POKéMON stronger or\nweaker depending on the moves you\lteach them.\pWhat kinds of moves do your POKéMON\nknow?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route111_Text_1BB5C1: Maybe I should have stopped my\nPOKéMON from evolving until they\llearned better moves...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route112_Text_1BB619: Hahahaha!\nHow about we have a battle?\lYou and me!\lHahahaha!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route112_Text_1BB667: Hahahahaha! Something flew up my nose!\nHahahaha-hatchoo!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route112_Text_1BB6A0: My legs are solid from pounding up\nand down the mountains.\pThey're not going to buckle easily,\nfriend!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route112_Text_1BB721: Try hiking, and I mean really\npounding, on these mountain trails\lwith a heavy pack weighing dozens of\lpounds.\pThat, my friend, will get your body\ninto serious shape.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route112_Text_1BB7C7: I've been keeping fit by hiking.\nPower, I have in spades!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route112_Text_1BB819: I hear there are some seriously tough\nTRAINERS on top of MT. CHIMNEY.\pI intend to get up there and give them\na challenge!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route112_Text_1BB893: I'm strong.\nI won't cry if I lose.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route112_Text_1BB8BE: I'm not crying because I miss my mommy!\nSnivel...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route112_Text_1BB8F0: When you're out on a picnic, why, you\nsimply have to sing!\lCome on, sing with me!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route112_Text_1BB958: It doesn't matter if you're good or bad\nat singing or POKéMON.\pIf you have the most fun, you win!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route113_Text_1BB9BA: Can you guess why it's so cool\naround here?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route113_Text_1BB9FB: The volcanic ash blocks the sun, so it\ndoesn't get very warm.\pThat's good for me - I can't stand heat!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route113_Text_1BBA62: The volcano's eruption is proof that\nthe earth is alive.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route113_Text_1BBAB7: Ouch! Owww! I can't see!\nI got ashes in my eyelashes!\pGet it? Ashes and eyelashes?\pOkay, that was bad, sorry...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route113_Text_1BBB27: I use this parasol to ward off this\nfilthy, yucky volcanic ash from my\ldear NUMEL.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route113_Text_1BBB9A: You're very good at this.\nI must say I'm impressed!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route113_Text_1BBBCE: Oh, hello, hasn't it been a while?\nMay I invite you to battle?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route113_Text_1BBC1C: You've remained very good at this.\nI must say I'm impressed!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route113_Text_1BBC59: From out of the ashes I leap! Hiyah!\nI challenge thee!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route113_Text_1BBCAB: I must refine the art of concealment.\nI bid thee farewell.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route113_Text_1BBCE6: From out of the ashes I leap! Hiyah!\nI challenge thee!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route113_Text_1BBD38: My flawless concealment was let down\nby my immature battle skills...\pI bid thee farewell.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route113_Text_1BBD92: Thanks for finding me!\nBut we still have to battle!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route113_Text_1BBDC6: I'll use my ninjutsu on you...\n“VOLCANIC ASH SWIRL CLOAK”!\p...What? It's already over?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route113_Text_1BBE1D: You know what's crummy about hiding?\nIt's lonely if no one comes along.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route113_Text_1BBE65: TORI: Both of us, we collect ashes.\nWe battle POKéMON, too.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route113_Text_1BBEA1: TORI: We lost... It's boring, so I'm going\nto get some more ashes.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route113_Text_1BBEE4: TORI: How much ash do we have?\nEnough for a WHITE FLUTE, I hope.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route113_Text_1BBF25: TORI: We want to battle 2-on-2.\nIf we didn't, we would lose!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route113_Text_1BBF62: TIA: Both of us, we collect ashes.\nWe battle POKéMON, too.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route113_Text_1BBF9D: TIA: We couldn't win... It's boring,\nso I'm getting some more ashes.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route113_Text_1BBFE2: TIA: We have a lot of ashes!\nI think enough for a WHITE FLUTE!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route113_Text_1BC021: TIA: We want to battle 2-on-2.\nIf we don't, we won't win!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route114_Text_1BC05B: Yodelayhihoo!\p... ...\pYou're supposed to shout\n“yodelayhihoo” since it doesn't\lecho here!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route114_Text_1BC0C3: When I was a wee tyke, I believed there\nwas someone copying me and shouting\lback, “Yodelayhihoo.”
data/text/trainers.inc.Route114_Text_1BC125: If you're not prepared, you shouldn't\nbe up in the mountains!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route114_Text_1BC184: In the winter, mountains turn deadly\nwith blizzards and avalanches.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route114_Text_1BC1C8: Camping's fun! You can fish, roast\nmarshmallows, and tell spooky stories!\pBut the best of all are the POKéMON\nbattles!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route114_Text_1BC24F: I think it's great that I can go\ncamping with my POKéMON.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route114_Text_1BC289: I need to exercise after a meal.\nLet's have a match!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route114_Text_1BC2C6: I just had a tasty meal.\nI'm getting drowsy...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route114_Text_1BC2F5: Ufufufufufu...\nWant to battle against my POKéMON?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route114_Text_1BC337: A big body that's all lumpy and hard,\nenormous horns, and vicious fangs...\pUfufufufu...\nI wish I had a POKéMON like that...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route114_Text_1BC3E0: I feel so lucky getting to see your\nPOKéMON...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route114_Text_1BC40F: Ufufufufufu...\pWhen I see POKéMON battling, I get all\nshivery and shaky...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route114_Text_1BC45A: If you're lighting a campfire, make\nsure you have water handy.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route114_Text_1BC4B5: You really do have to be careful with\nany sort of fire in a forest.\pDon't ever underestimate the power\nof fire.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route114_Text_1BC525: Have you learned to keep water handy\nfor campfires?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route114_Text_1BC559: I got hosed down before I could flare\nup, I guess.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route114_Text_1BC58C: You really do have to be careful with\nany sort of fire in a forest.\pDon't ever underestimate the power\nof fire.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route114_Text_1BC5FC: If we were fishing, you wouldn't stand\na chance against me.\lSo, bring on your POKéMON!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route114_Text_1BC653: If we were fishing, I would've won...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route114_Text_1BC679: I think I'll try my luck at landing\na big one at METEOR FALLS.\pThere has to be something in there.\nI just know it.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route114_Text_1BC6EC: I like to fish. But I also like to\nbattle!\pIf anyone challenges me, I'm there,\neven if I'm fishing.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route114_Text_1BC750: I like to battle, but that doesn't\nmean I'm good at it...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route114_Text_1BC78A: This time I'll do it!\pI always think that, so I can't walk\naway from fishing or POKéMON.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route114_Text_1BC7E3: TYRA: Well, sure.\nI'm in the mood for it.\lI'll teach you a little about POKéMON.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route114_Text_1BC834: TYRA: What an amazing battle style!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route114_Text_1BC858: TYRA: I was teaching my junior IVY\nabout POKéMON.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route114_Text_1BC88A: TYRA: Giggle...\nIf you want to battle with us, just one\lPOKéMON isn't enough!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route114_Text_1BC8D8: IVY: Who taught you about POKéMON?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route114_Text_1BC8FB: IVY: What an amazing battle style!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route114_Text_1BC91E: IVY: I started training POKéMON\nbecause TYRA, my student mentor,\ltaught me!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route114_Text_1BC96A: IVY: Do you only have one POKéMON?\nI think it must feel lonesome.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route115_Text_1BC9AC: Hm...\nYou seem rather capable...\lLet me keep you company!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route115_Text_1BCA0E: There is no such thing as a born genius.\nIt all depends on effort!\lThat is what I believe...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route115_Text_1BCA6B: Hm... As always, your agility speaks\nfor itself.\lCome, keep me company!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route115_Text_1BCAC6: All it takes is effort!\pI lost because I haven't put in enough\neffort!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route115_Text_1BCB40: My MACHOP crew!\pSo long as they seek power, I will\ngrow strong with them!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route115_Text_1BCB8A: My strongest skill is busting bricks\nwith my forehead!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route115_Text_1BCBDE: I've been teaching my POKéMON karate.\pIt looks like they'll get a lot better\nthan me. I'm excited about that.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route115_Text_1BCC4C: After you beat me, we trained hard to\nimprove our skills.\lCome on, give us a rematch!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route115_Text_1BCCBA: My POKéMON will grow stronger!\nI'll redouble my training!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route115_Text_1BCCF4: This beach is my secret training spot!\nDon't come butting in!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route115_Text_1BCD4C: The sand acts as a cushion to reduce\nimpact and prevent injury.\lThis is the perfect place to train.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route115_Text_1BCDB0: Okay, let's get this battle on!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route115_Text_1BCDD0: I can battle but my POKéMON...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route115_Text_1BCDEF: Even when I lose, I still get some\nenjoyment out of it.\lIt must be that I love POKéMON.
data/text/trainers.inc.UnknownString_81BCE47: I have a rare POKéMON!\nWould you like me to show you?
data/text/trainers.inc.UnknownString_81BCE7D: You...\nYou want my POKéMON, don't you?
data/text/trainers.inc.UnknownString_81BCEA4: I have this rare POKéMON.\nIt's enough to keep me satisfied.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route115_Text_1BCEE0: I have a rare POKéMON!\nWould you like me to show you?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route115_Text_1BCF16: You...\nYou want my POKéMON, don't you?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route115_Text_1BCF3D: I have this rare POKéMON.\nIt's enough to keep me satisfied.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route116_Text_1BCF79: If the tunnel doesn't go through, then\nI'll just go over the top.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route116_Text_1BCFE3: It's no big deal if there's no tunnel.\nTo a HIKER, mountains are roads!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route116_Text_1BD04C: Ouch! A scrape!\nI have to put on a bandage!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route116_Text_1BD078: Bandages are signs of toughness!\nI've got another one!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route116_Text_1BD0AF: My BUG POKéMON are tough!\nLet's battle!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route116_Text_1BD0D7: I lost!\nI thought I had you!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route116_Text_1BD0F4: BUG POKéMON evolve quickly.\nSo they get strong quickly, too.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route116_Text_1BD131: Let me teach you how strong my\nadorable POKéMON is!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route116_Text_1BD180: POKéMON that possess cuteness and\npower, that's ideal, I think.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route116_Text_1BD1C0: We learn all sorts of things at the\nTRAINER'S SCHOOL.\pI want to test things out for real!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route116_Text_1BD21A: I slacked off in school...\nThat's why I lost.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route116_Text_1BD248: I'll have to redo some courses at the\nTRAINER'S SCHOOL.\lIf I don't, ROXANNE will be steamed.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route116_Text_1BD2A5: I've been studying seriously at the\nTRAINER'S SCHOOL.\lI won't lose like I did last time.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route116_Text_1BD31A: I'll have to redo some courses at the\nTRAINER'S SCHOOL.\lIf I don't, ROXANNE will be steamed.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route116_Text_1BD377: I study at school, and I study on the\nway home, too!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route116_Text_1BD3C3: Awww, I'll never become an elegant\nTRAINER like ROXANNE this way!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route116_Text_1BD405: I studied a whole lot since I saw you.\nYou must see my achievements!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route116_Text_1BD44A: I'm in shock. I lost again?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route116_Text_1BD466: You've beaten ROXANNE?\nI can't beat you, then. Not yet.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BD49E: Listen, could I get you to battle the\nPOKéMON I'm raising?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BD4F9: POKéMON isn't all about power.\pPolishing a unique aspect of one's\ncharacter is another way of enjoying\lPOKéMON.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BD569: The POKéMON I've been raising are\nlooking good, just like before.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BD5AB: You know how to raise them properly.\nYou might have DAY CARE skills...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BD5F2: Your POKéMON are growing good!\nYou should enter them in CONTESTS.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BD634: Please, allow me to evaluate if you\nhave raised your POKéMON properly.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BD69B: If you feed {POKEBLOCK}S to POKéMON, the\nunique aspects of their character\lwill be enhanced.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BD6F2: Allow me to reevaluate if you have\nraised your POKéMON properly.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BD74F: POKéMON seem to like different kinds\nof {POKEBLOCK}S, depending on their nature.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BD79A: I'm in the middle of a triathlon, but,\nwhatever, let's have a battle!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BD7F5: I may have blown it...\pI might have dropped to last during\nthat battle...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BD83F: I'm smack in the middle of a triathlon,\nbut I'm comfortably ahead.\lLet's make this a quick battle!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BD8A2: I ran out of energy again!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BD8BD: I was tops in swimming and cycling, but\nI'm not quite that confident with\lPOKéMON yet.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BD914: I do my triathlon training with POKéMON,\nso I'm pretty confident about my speed.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BD965: I need to get more practices in,\nI guess.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BD98F: Training is meaningful only if you\nkeep it up regularly.\pOkay! I'll resume my training!\nTomorrow!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BD9F1: Are you keeping up with your training?\nI sure am!\lLet me show you the evidence!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BDA41: I need to get more practices in,\nI guess.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BDA6B: I'll resume training tomorrow.\nLet's battle again sometime!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BDAA7: Once a BUG CATCHER!\nAnd now a BUG MANIAC!\pBut my love for POKéMON remains\nunchanged!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BDB24: All I did was follow my heart, and now\nthey call me a BUG MANIAC...\pStill, I am an expert on BUG POKéMON,\nso it's only natural that they call me\la BUG MANIAC.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BDBC3: ANNA: I'm with my pretty junior student\npartner. I have to do good!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BDC07: ANNA: I'm with my pretty junior student\npartner! Let me win!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BDC44: ANNA: Your POKéMON have some good\ncombinations.\pI'd say you're second only to us!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BDC96: ANNA: If you want to battle us, bring\ntwo POKéMON with you.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BDCD2: MEG: I'm going to tag up with my super\nsenior student partner and beat you!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BDD1E: MEG: Oh, no!\nI'm sorry, ANNA! I let you down...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BDD4E: MEG: I dragged ANNA down...\nIf I didn't, she would have won!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BDD8B: MEG: Do you only have one POKéMON?\nWe can't battle with you, then.\pWe want to have a 2-on-2 battle.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BDDEF: ANNA: I can't keep losing in front of\nmy junior partner, right?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BDE2F: ANNA: I couldn't get into the groove.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BDE55: ANNA: Your POKéMON have some good\ncombinations.\pI'd say you're second only to us!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BDEA7: ANNA: If you want to battle us, bring\ntwo POKéMON with you.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BDEE3: MEG: I'm going to tag up with my\nsenior partner and win this time!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BDF37: MEG: I battled together with my\nsenior partner, but we lost...\pThat's so discouraging...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route117_Text_1BDF90: MEG: Do you only have one POKéMON?\nWe can't battle with you, then.\pWe want to have a 2-on-2 battle.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route118_Text_1BDFF4: The aroma of flowers has a magical\npower. It cleanses us body and soul.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route118_Text_1BE03C: Oh, dear me.\nI seem to have lost.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route118_Text_1BE05E: Flowers, POKéMON...\nI love whatever smells nice.\pStinky things...\nI'll pass.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route118_Text_1BE0AB: Were you drawn here by the sweet\naroma?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route118_Text_1BE0D3: The power of aroma...\nIt didn't seem to do much.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route118_Text_1BE104: If you use a sweet aroma properly,\nPOKéMON will be attracted by it.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route118_Text_1BE148: BIRD POKéMON that FLY elegantly in\nthe sky... They're the best!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route118_Text_1BE19D: You've got great POKéMON.\nI'll have to train mine better.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route118_Text_1BE20D: If they'd get stronger, they'd be able\nto fly more freely...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route118_Text_1BE24A: I'm a FISHERMAN, but also a TRAINER.\nI'm raising the POKéMON I caught.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route118_Text_1BE291: I thought I was doing okay in my\ntraining...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route118_Text_1BE2BE: I couldn't win by training POKéMON\nwhile I fished...\pWas I doing things in half measures?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route118_Text_1BE318: For FISHERMEN, equipment is the key.\pBut for TRAINERS, the key ingredients\nare POKéMON and heart, of course!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route118_Text_1BE39C: Come to think of it, fishing is a battle\nbetween a FISHERMAN and a POKéMON.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route118_Text_1BE3E8: Let my melody rock your soul!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route118_Text_1BE413: An electric guitar doesn't always\nhave to be noisy...\pIt can be strummed to squeeze out\nthis heart-stirring melody...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route118_Text_1BE489: A melody from my POKéMON and me...\nLet us deliver it to your soul.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route118_Text_1BE4D9: When I play, my emotions should reach\nyou through my electric guitar...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route119_Text_1BE521: We're the MIMIC CIRCLE!\nWe MIMIC what you do!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route119_Text_1BE561: What's so good about mimicry?\pFufufu...\nYou'll never understand...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route119_Text_1BE5A4: So, we finally meet!\nMy BUG POKéMON will keep you company!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route119_Text_1BE5F8: I want to MIMIC you some more.\pCan you hurry up and move?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route119_Text_1BE632: If you step forward, we step forward.\pIf you turn right, we turn, too...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route119_Text_1BE67B: But if you win, I lose...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route119_Text_1BE695: I can't MIMIC you winning the match.\nThat's just impossible...\lIt's burning me up...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route119_Text_1BE6EA: Yep, you've finally caught me!\nOr were you trying to avoid me?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route119_Text_1BE729: Whoop, that was a great match!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route119_Text_1BE748: We're the MIMIC CIRCLE!\nI hope you enjoyed our performance.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route119_Text_1BE784: You don't know who I am, do you?\pBut, I also don't know you.\nSo, we'll battle!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route119_Text_1BE7E9: Until you go away somewhere, we'll\nkeep on mimicking your every move.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route119_Text_1BE82F: The MIMIC CIRCLE was formed by people\nwho like to MIMIC.\pA battle starts the instant we meet!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route119_Text_1BE89A: Won't you join our MIMIC CIRCLE?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route119_Text_1BE8BB: Who has the knowledge and the\ntechnique for survival?\pPOKéMON RANGERS, that's who!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route119_Text_1BE937: To break away from civilization and\nawaken the wild spirit within!\pThat's our vision.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route119_Text_1BE98D: I'm going to regain my wild spirit by\nbeing together with POKéMON.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route119_Text_1BE9E8: Believe in your POKéMON.\nBelieve in yourself.\pThe road will reveal itself to you.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route119_Text_1BEA3A: Oh? Look at you.\pFor someone on an adventure, you're\ntraveling awfully light.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route119_Text_1BEAB3: You're traveling light but you have\neverything you need.\pYou're on top of things mentally and\nphysically, too.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route119_Text_1BEB68: In the same way that you, as a TRAINER,\nrely on your POKéMON, your POKéMON\lrely on you.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route119_Text_1BEBC0: The vast sky holds untold promise!\pNothing can compare to the sheer\nexhilaration of flight!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route119_Text_1BEC2A: My BIRD POKéMON made my dreams of\nflying come true!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route119_Text_1BEC5E: I'll show you the true potential of me\nand my BIRD POKéMON!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route119_Text_1BECB1: Ever since I was a little kid, I always\nadmired BIRD POKéMON...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route119_Text_1BECF1: To lurk in shadows, and live in\ndarkness... That is my destiny.\pI emerge to challenge you!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route119_Text_1BED5C: Those defeated in battle withdraw\nquietly back into the shadows.\lThat, too, is destiny...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route119_Text_1BEDB6: If you're not on your guard, you're in\nfor some pain!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route119_Text_1BEE2D: To hide a tree, use a forest!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route119_Text_1BEE66: To hide a tree, use a forest!\nTo hide a POKéMON, use a POKéMON!\pThere is no deep, hidden meaning\nto that.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route119_Text_1BEED0: You spoke to me...\nSo you want to challenge me!\pSure! I'll try out the POKéMON I caught\nwhile SURFING!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route119_Text_1BEF37: I don't have a clue about what it\ntakes to win.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route119_Text_1BEF67: Go for a SURF on my POKéMON...\pThen fish off its back...\pIt's an indescribably luxuriant moment!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route120_Text_1BEFC8: Do you have any moves that can strike\na flying POKéMON?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route120_Text_1BF015: The move FLY is convenient, don't\nyou think?\pWhile the POKéMON is flying, almost\nno moves can strike it.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route120_Text_1BF07E: My POKéMON is strong!\nHow about yours?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route120_Text_1BF0C3: A POKéMON that grows steadily is one\nyou can count on.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route120_Text_1BF0FA: A POKéMON that grows steadily is one\nyou can count on.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route120_Text_1BF154: My POKéMON are growing stronger.\nI have to grow stronger, too.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route120_Text_1BF193: I'll check your POKéMON and see if\nthey're fit for the outdoors.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route120_Text_1BF1D4: With POKéMON that strong, you're in\nno danger of needing rescue!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route120_Text_1BF215: To travel wherever your heart desires\nwith POKéMON...\lThat's the joy of being a TRAINER.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route120_Text_1BF26E: How's your physical fitness?\nIf you're not fit, you could have a\lrough time in critical situations.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route120_Text_1BF2EA: Fitness training is in my routine.\nI always run with my POKéMON.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route120_Text_1BF43E: ... ... ... ... ... ...\n... ... ... ... ... ...\lI'll try harder...\lFor my precious BUG POKéMON...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route120_Text_1BF4A0: POKéMON have many special abilities.\nIf you want to become a first-class\lTRAINER, learn about them.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route120_Text_1BF51F: The special abilities of POKéMON\nwill make battle styles change.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route120_Text_1BF560: Who might you be?\pAre you perhaps searching for ancient\nruins that are rumored to possibly\lexist according to legend?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route120_Text_1BF5F4: That giant rock... I would like to\nbelieve it may indeed contain ancient\lruins. But I see no entrance.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route120_Text_1BF65B: Why am I carrying this parasol?\pI'll tell you if you can win against me.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route120_Text_1BF6A4: A parasol can't ward off POKéMON\nattacks...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route120_Text_1BF6D0: I don't think strong sunlight is good\nfor my POKéMON.\lSo I shield them with my parasol.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route120_Text_1BF728: Me, POKéMON, and my parasol...\pIf any one of them is missing, the\npicture of beauty will be ruined.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route120_Text_1BF7B2: A parasol wouldn't suit you at all.\pWhy, something like this would only\nget in your way.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route120_Text_1BF80B: I will adopt the movements of POKéMON\nand create new ninja techniques.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route120_Text_1BF852: The creation of new ninja techniques\nis but a distant dream...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route120_Text_1BF891: Perhaps I ought to apprentice under\na ninja sensei.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route120_Text_1BF8C5: We ninja conceal ourselves under our\ncamouflage cloaks.\lI bet you didn't know where I was!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route120_Text_1BF920: I lost!\nI should camouflage my shame!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route121_Text_1BF96E: Will you play with my delightfully\npretty POKéMON?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route121_Text_1BF9BA: I'm going to a CONTEST in LILYCOVE.\pMy POKéMON should have no problem\nsweeping the MASTER CLASS.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route121_Text_1BFA1B: With my POKéMON, I have traveled the\nworld's four corners.\pYou might say I have some confidence\nin my abilities.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route121_Text_1BFA9D: I would like to circle the globe once\nagain with my POKéMON.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route121_Text_1BFADA: With my POKéMON, I have traveled the\nworld's four corners.\pYou might say I have some confidence\nin my abilities.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route121_Text_1BFB5C: Your POKéMON and you...\pYour prowess together will be\nconsidered strong, even overseas.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route121_Text_1BFBB4: There are powers beyond our\nunderstanding in the world...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route121_Text_1BFBFD: MT. PYRE...\nThere is a mysterious power\lat work there...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route121_Text_1BFC36: KATE: Together, we're fearless!\nWe'll demonstrate how tough we are!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route121_Text_1BFC7A: KATE: I blew it in front of my junior\nstudent partner...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route121_Text_1BFCB3: KATE: When someone's relying on me,\nI get this urge to look cool in front\lof them...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route121_Text_1BFD08: KATE: If you've only got one POKéMON,\nwe can't battle with you.\pThat would be bullying.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route121_Text_1BFD60: JOY: Together, we're fearless!\nWe'll demonstrate how tough we are!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route121_Text_1BFDC1: JOY: Ehehe, I'll have to train with KATE,\nmy senior student partner, again.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route121_Text_1BFE0D: JOY: You need at least two POKéMON\nif you're going to challenge us!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route121_Text_1BFE51: Stop! Have a good look at my precious\nPOKéMON!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route121_Text_1BFE80: Oh, how dare you!\nDon't take it so seriously!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route121_Text_1BFEAE: Maybe I'll go catch more POKéMON at\nthe SAFARI.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route121_Text_1BFEDE: My precious POKéMON grew!\nHave a good look!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route121_Text_1BFF0A: Oh, how dare you!\nYou still won't take it easy!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route121_Text_1BFF3A: Maybe I'll go catch more POKéMON at\nthe SAFARI.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route123_Text_1BFF6A: Want to determine how strong you are?\nI'll be the test!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route123_Text_1BFFC1: To best even me...\nYour strength is marvelous!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route123_Text_1BFFF0: You seem to have a big collection\nof GYM BADGES.\pLet me see if you're actually worthy of\nthose BADGES!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route123_Text_1C0075: You did your BADGES proud in that\nmatch!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route123_Text_1C009E: They say that good times are filled\nwith good aromas.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route123_Text_1C00D4: Oh...\nI smell the bitter scent of misery...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route123_Text_1C0100: The BERRY MASTER's garden is filled\nwith uplifting fragrances.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route123_Text_1C013F: Being a psychic is about willpower.\pI've willed myself not to lose to\nanyone. That makes me strong!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route123_Text_1C01B1: Being a psychic is about willpower.\nI thought I wouldn't lose to you...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route123_Text_1C01F9: I've convinced myself that I won't\nlose anymore. That makes me strong!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route123_Text_1C024E: I should train at MT. PYRE...\nI'll never beat you this way...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route123_Text_1C028C: Don't be too happy if your POKéMON\ndevelop psychic powers.\pYou need to refine those powers to\nmake them really useful.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route123_Text_1C030F: We all have psychic powers.\nWe've just forgotten how to use them.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route123_Text_1C0351: Have you awoken the psychic powers\nwithin you?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route123_Text_1C038C: Your power with POKéMON...\nThat could be a psychic power, too.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route123_Text_1C03CB: MIU: Hello, TRAINER. I hope your\nPOKéMON won't cry when they lose.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route123_Text_1C0423: MIU: TRAINER, your POKéMON are\nstrong because you are friends.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route123_Text_1C0462: MIU: It's no fun to battle if you\ndon't have two POKéMON.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route123_Text_1C049C: YUKI: Okay!\nWe're beating the TRAINER's POKéMON!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route123_Text_1C04E3: YUKI: Why are you so strong?\nWe've never lost before.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route123_Text_1C0519: YUKI: It's no fun to battle if you\ndon't have two POKéMON.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route123_Text_1C0554: MT. PYRE...\nWhere the spirits of POKéMON sleep...\lWill your POKéMON sleep?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route123_Text_1C05BC: MT. PYRE...\nWhere the spirits of POKéMON sleep...\pIt must overflow with a power that\nsoothes spirits...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route124_Text_1C0624: Hey, are you lost at sea?\pIf you can beat my POKéMON, I can\nserve as your pilot.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route124_Text_1C0675: I lost my bearings in battle!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route124_Text_1C0693: Many people lose their bearings at sea.\pIf you're that sort, you should refer\nto the POKéNAV's MAP.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route124_Text_1C06F7: Hm! You're riding a POKéMON instead\nof swimming yourself...\pI am envious!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route124_Text_1C0750: I'm getting chilled...\nI've been in the water too long...\pI wish I could ride a POKéMON like you...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route124_Text_1C07B4: If you just float in the sea like\nthis, POKéMON come around to play.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route124_Text_1C080E: While swimming, I noticed that some\nPOKéMON attack, and some just watch.\pI guess POKéMON have personalities\nof their own.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route124_Text_1C0888: If you just float in the sea like this,\nTRAINERS challenge you!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route124_Text_1C08EA: This has nothing to do with anything,\nbut maybe I'll visit the TRICK HOUSE.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route124_Text_1C0936: I'm growing bored of swimming...\nHow about a battle?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route124_Text_1C096B: I had no idea that you were\nthis strong!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route124_Text_1C0994: All the effort you put in must have\nmade you this strong.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route124_Text_1C09CE: Fufufufu... I dive deep underwater\nto go deep under cover.\lPlumbing the depths is where I excel!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route124_Text_1C0A52: I have it on good authority that\nthere's a DIVE spot around here.\pIt gives me the urge to go deep\nagain...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route124_Text_1C0ABD: RITA: Sigh...\pHere I am in the sea, but who's with me?\nMy little brother!\pLet's battle so I won't have to dwell\non that!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route124_Text_1C0B36: RITA: SAM! It's your fault we lost!\nYou're in for it later!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route124_Text_1C0B72: RITA: Sigh...\pIf only it wasn't my little brother\nnext to me, but a nice boyfriend...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route124_Text_1C0BC8: RITA: You're planning to battle us?\nNot unless you have more POKéMON.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route124_Text_1C0C0E: SAM: My big sister is tough at POKéMON!\pDon't cry when you lose!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route124_Text_1C0C4F: SAM: Uh-oh...\nMy big sister will chew me out...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route124_Text_1C0C7F: SAM: My big sister is really scary\nwhen she gets angry.\pThat's why she doesn't have a\nboyfriend.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route124_Text_1C0CE0: SAM: Did you want to battle us?\nBring some more POKéMON, then.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route124_Text_1C0D1F: RITA: Sigh...\pHere I am in the sea, but who's with me?\nMy little brother!\pOh, hi, it's been a while. Let's battle\nso I won't have to dwell on things!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route124_Text_1C0DB5: RITA: SAM!\nIt's your fault we lost again!\pWe're having a training session later!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route124_Text_1C0E06: RITA: Sigh...\pIf I had a nice boyfriend, we'd beat\nanyone with lovely combinations...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route124_Text_1C0E5C: RITA: You're planning to battle us?\nNot unless you have more POKéMON.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route124_Text_1C0EA2: SAM: If we lose, I'll catch heck.\nI'm going to go totally all out!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route124_Text_1C0EE5: SAM: Uh-oh...\nMy big sister will chew me out again.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route124_Text_1C0F19: SAM: My big sister is really scary\nwhen she gets angry.\pShe's going to make me train really\nhard with POKéMON later...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route124_Text_1C0F90: SAM: Did you want to battle us?\nBring some more POKéMON, then.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route125_Text_1C0FCF: I heard you approaching, so I hung\naround for you!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route125_Text_1C1013: Sound travels faster in water than\nit does through air.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route125_Text_1C104B: Hey, there!\nCheck out my sweet POKéMON!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route125_Text_1C1083: I was blown away by HORSEA's charm,\nso I started swimming, too.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route125_Text_1C10C3: I'm tired of swimming.\nAre you up for a battle with me?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route125_Text_1C110C: Whew...\nWhich way is it to MOSSDEEP CITY?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route125_Text_1C1136: How would you like to take on the\nWATER-type POKéMON I raised?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route125_Text_1C117F: Your power... You're the real deal.\nI'm amazed!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route125_Text_1C11AF: Ahoy! I'm a buff, tough SAILOR!\nI've braved the world's seas!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route125_Text_1C1208: The tide ebbs and flows inside the\nSHOAL CAVE.\pBy the way, it's about six hours from\nhigh tide to low tide. Did you know?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route125_Text_1C1282: It's high time I get my payback\nfrom you! Come on, we're battling!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route125_Text_1C12C5: I couldn't win!\nI flat out couldn't win!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route125_Text_1C12EE: The SHOAL CAVE...\pThere are places you can and can't\nget to depending on the rise and fall\lof the tide.\pBy the way, it's about six hours from\nhigh tide to low tide. Don't forget!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route125_Text_1C13A1: KIM: A funny old man lives in the\nSHOAL CAVE. Someone told me.\lAre you going to see him, too?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route125_Text_1C13FF: KIM: I thought we would win.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route125_Text_1C141C: KIM: A funny old man lives in the\nSHOAL CAVE, doesn't he?\pLet's go see him, IRIS!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route125_Text_1C146E: KIM: No, no, no! You need two POKéMON,\nor it's just no good!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route125_Text_1C14AB: IRIS: KIM, can you tell me what we're\nlooking for out here?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route125_Text_1C14E7: IRIS: Oh, we came sort of close.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route125_Text_1C1508: IRIS: KIM, are we really going into\nthe SHOAL CAVE?\lWe'll get all wet.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route125_Text_1C154F: IRIS: Oh, we could never, ever do\nanything like a 2-on-1 battle.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route126_Text_1C1590: Swimming is a full-body workout!\nYou will get fit!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route126_Text_1C15D8: Thanks to my daily swimming routine...\nLook! Feast your eyes on this physique!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route126_Text_1C1627: This towering white mountain of rock\nis SOOTOPOLIS CITY.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route126_Text_1C166F: I can't find the entrance to\nSOOTOPOLIS. Where could it be?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route126_Text_1C16C5: My fantasy burst as if it were a bubble!\nBlub, blub, blub...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route126_Text_1C1702: You thrashed me... I want to\ndisappear in a wave of despair...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route126_Text_1C1741: Hello, kiddo!\nWant a battle with me?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route126_Text_1C1773: I love frolicking with POKéMON in\nthe sea like this!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route127_Text_1C17A8: I can see it in your face. You want\nto challenge me.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route127_Text_1C17EC: A well-played match leaves me feeling\nrefreshed and serene.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route127_Text_1C1828: Do you have a rival whom you just\nhate to lose against?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route127_Text_1C1877: If you have a rival, don't you get the\nfeeling that you have to keep getting\lbetter?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route127_Text_1C18CC: Through fishing, I have attained a\nstate of becalmed serenity...\lPlease, allow me to demonstrate...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route127_Text_1C1930: Though I have lost, my heart remains\ncalm...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route127_Text_1C195D: It matters not that I catch nothing.\nThe line remains in the water...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route127_Text_1C19A3: Whoops! Don't tell me I snagged\na SURFING POKéMON?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route127_Text_1C19E7: Your POKéMON look pretty strong.\nThey'd be a handful if I hooked them!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route127_Text_1C1A2E: Well, hey! This is a match between a\nPOKéMON fan and a fishing buff!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route127_Text_1C1A73: No! My line's all tangled!\nThe party's over!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route127_Text_1C1AA0: My fishing line's doing a dance!\nThe tangle tango! Hahaha, snarl!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route127_Text_1C1AE2: What I learned at DEWFORD's POKéMON\nGYM, I will put into practice here.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route127_Text_1C1B39: BRAWLY, DEWFORD's GYM LEADER, used\nto train with a guy named BRUNO in\lKANTO, I've heard.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route127_Text_1C1B92: BIRD POKéMON have excellent vision.\nThey spot prey from great heights.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route127_Text_1C1BEC: There're lots of diving spots in the\nsea around here.\pYou can spot them easily from the sky\nbecause of their darker color.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route128_Text_1C1C67: EVER GRANDE CITY is still a long ways\naway...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route128_Text_1C1C95: My first victory seems to be far\naway, too...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route128_Text_1C1CC3: My whole life has been about losing,\nbut I will never give up!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route128_Text_1C1D02: I'm still feeling good. I'll keep on\nswimming to EVER GRANDE CITY.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route128_Text_1C1D45: I've yet to taste my first victory...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route128_Text_1C1D6B: I'll eventually reach EVER GRANDE CITY\nwhere I can eventually win...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route128_Text_1C1DB0: You have to swim, cycle, and then run\na marathon in a triathlon.\pIt's a grueling race that consists\nof three events.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route128_Text_1C1E25: A POKéMON battle is grueling, too...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route128_Text_1C1E4A: I have to ride a BIKE next, but...\nI'm about to throw in the towel...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route128_Text_1C1E90: A triathlon is long. But I guess the\nroad to become the POKéMON CHAMPION\lis also a long and grueling one.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route128_Text_1C1EFA: A POKéMON battle really is harsh\nand unforgiving...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route128_Text_1C1F2E: You should give serious thought to\nchallenges on VICTORY ROAD.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route128_Text_1C1F6D: We've been working so hard to mount\na POKéMON LEAGUE challenge...\pWe can't afford to lose now!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route128_Text_1C1FE8: After all I've done to get here, I won't\ngive up after one setback.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route128_Text_1C202C: There is no stronger TRAINER than I!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route128_Text_1C2060: There probably is no stronger TRAINER\nthan you!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route128_Text_1C2090: I want to visit EVER GRANDE, so I\ncaught myself a POKéMON that knows\lthe move WATERFALL to crest the falls.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route128_Text_1C210D: Awww, phooey!\pMy POKéMON know WATERFALL, but\nI don't have the SOOTOPOLIS GYM BADGE!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route129_Text_1C2161: This is my first triathlon.\nI'm all tense and nervous!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route129_Text_1C21B4: If I'm all tensed up, I won't be able to\ngive it my all.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route129_Text_1C21ED: I'm in the middle of a triathlon, but,\nsure, why don't we battle?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route129_Text_1C2243: Do you know what's the greatest thing\nabout triathlons?\pTesting the limits of your own\nstrength and endurance against\lMother Nature!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route129_Text_1C22C8: Say hey, hey!\nLet's get on with it!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route129_Text_1C230F: There's nothing for a loser.\nTime for me to beat it home.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route129_Text_1C2349: What's the hurry?\nLet's take it slow and easy.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route129_Text_1C2378: Oh, my.\nI wanted to relax a little more...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route129_Text_1C23A3: Don't you hate making mistakes when\nyou're in a rush?\pThat's why I try to take things\nslowly.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route130_Text_1C2401: What a surprise! I didn't expect to\nsee a TRAINER out in the sea.\pI think we should battle!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route130_Text_1C2479: Your eyes have that look of someone\nwho's experienced harsh challenges\land won. It suits you well!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route130_Text_1C24DC: In the deep blue sea,\nmy shattered blue heart finds\lcomfort among waves.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route130_Text_1C2525: Like the vast blue sea,\nthe world of POKéMON spans\ldepths beyond belief.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route130_Text_1C256E: The world's children dream\nof one day becoming the\lPOKéMON CHAMPION.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route131_Text_1C25B3: The sea is teeming with POKéMON.\nIt's not easy swimming, I tell you.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route131_Text_1C25F8: POKéMON raised by TRAINERS are\nseriously tough...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route131_Text_1C262A: Gasp... Gasp... I'm wiped out...\pThe going's easy. It's the leaving\nthat's the hard part.\pWill I have any energy left to make\nthe return trip?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route131_Text_1C26B9: The sea... The sea... The sea...\nThe sea as far as these eyes can see!\lI'm sick and tired of the sea!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route131_Text_1C2726: Bored I am by the sea, but swim I must.\pI'm a born swimmer!\nThat's what I am.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route131_Text_1C2774: Hi, sweetie, wait!\nWe should battle, you and I!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route131_Text_1C27A4: You're tough in spite of the way\nyou look!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route131_Text_1C27CF: Did you see a guy over there who whines\nthat he's bored of the sea?\pThat's all talk.\nHe's hopelessly in love with the sea!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route131_Text_1C284A: Why do men love bathing suits so much?\pThey all ogle me!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route131_Text_1C2898: Maybe it's not my bathing suit that\nmakes men look. It must be my beauty!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route131_Text_1C28E2: RELI: We'll work together as siblings\nto take you on!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route131_Text_1C2918: RELI: We couldn't win even though we\nworked together...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route131_Text_1C2950: RELI: The people of PACIFIDLOG are\ntogether with the sea and POKéMON from\lthe time they are born.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route131_Text_1C29B2: RELI: You don't have two POKéMON?\nWe can't enjoy a battle, then.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route131_Text_1C29F3: IAN: I'm doing my best together with\nmy sis!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route131_Text_1C2A20: IAN: I did my best with my sis, but\nwe still couldn't win...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route131_Text_1C2A5D: IAN: You know how PACIFIDLOG is\na floating town?\pSo, wherever there is the sea, that's\na part of PACIFIDLOG!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route131_Text_1C2ACA: IAN: If you have two POKéMON, we'll\ntake you on!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route132_Text_1C2AFB: I used to catch colds all the time as\na kid, but I became totally fit after\lI started swimming.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route132_Text_1C2B71: TRAINERS travel the fields and\nmountains, so they must be fit, too.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route132_Text_1C2BB5: I try not to swim where the currents\nare too strong.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route132_Text_1C2BFA: If I get swept away, I'll lose all my\nsense of place...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route132_Text_1C2C32: Win or lose, you'll never know until\nyou try!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route132_Text_1C2C78: I never battle when I know I'll win.\nI like to battle at the razor's edge of\lvictory and defeat!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route132_Text_1C2CD9: I contemplate POKéMON 24 hours a day.\nHow could you possibly beat me?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route132_Text_1C2D3E: Urggh...\nYou're a POKéMON fanatic, aren't you?\pYou must contemplate POKéMON 24 hours\na day, don't you?
data/text/trainers.inc.Route133_Text_1C2DA5: Did the currents carry you here, too?\nThis must have been fated. Let's battle!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route133_Text_1C2E09: It's just my luck that a tough TRAINER\nlike you would drift here...\lI must be cursed...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route133_Text_1C2E61: I've led a life of woe and misery...\nI've been cast away, and this is where\lI've drifted...
data/text/trainers.inc.Route133_Text_1C2ECD: A life adrift...\nI don't want it anymore!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route133_Text_1C2F25: A strong child TRAINER...\nThat's so annoying!
data/text/trainers.inc.Route133_Text_1C2F53: I want to win like everyone else, but I\nwon't raise POKéMON like everyone else.
data/text/trainers.inc.Route133_Text_1C2FA3: Darn it!\nMy way is still too slack!
