src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1010: CRAWDAUNT has an extremely violent\nnature that compels it to challenge\nother living things to battle.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1011: Other life-forms refuse to live in\nponds inhabited by this POKéMON,\nmaking them desolate places.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1012: As soon as it spots others of its kind,\nBALTOY congregates with them and\nthen begins crying noisily in unison.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1013: This POKéMON sleeps while cleverly\nbalancing itself on its one foot.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1014: BALTOY moves while spinning around on\nits one foot. Primitive wall paintings\ndepicting this POKéMON living among
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1015: people were discovered in some ancient\nruins.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1016: CLAYDOL is an enigma that appeared\nfrom a clay statue made by an ancient\ncivilization dating back 20,000 years.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1017: This POKéMON shoots beams from both\nits hands.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1018: CLAYDOL are said to be dolls of mud made\nby primitive humans and brought to life\nby exposure to a mysterious ray.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1020: LILEEP is an ancient POKéMON that was\nregenerated from a fossil. It remains\npermanently anchored to a rock.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1021: From its immobile perch, this POKéMON\nintently scans for prey with its two\neyes.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1022: LILEEP became extinct approximately\na hundred million years ago.\nThis ancient POKéMON attaches itself
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1023: to a rock on the seafloor and catches\napproaching prey using tentacles \nshaped like flower petals.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1024: CRADILY's body serves as an anchor,\npreventing it from being washed away in\nrough seas.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1025: This POKéMON secretes a strong\ndigestive fluid from its tentacles.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1026: CRADILY roams around the ocean floor\nin search of food. This POKéMON freely\nextends its tree trunk-like neck and
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1027: captures unwary prey using its eight\ntentacles.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1028: ANORITH is said to be a type of \nPOKéMON predecessor, with eight wings\nat the sides of its body.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1029: This POKéMON swam in the primordial sea\nby undulating these eight wings.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1030: ANORITH was regenerated from a\nprehistoric fossil. This primitive\nPOKéMON once lived in warm seas.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1031: It grips its prey firmly between its\ntwo large claws.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1032: ARMALDO is a POKéMON species that\nbecame extinct in prehistoric times.\nThis POKéMON is said to have walked on
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1033: its hind legs, which would have been\nmore convenient for life on land.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1034: ARMALDO's tough armor makes all attacks\nbounce off. This POKéMON's two\nenormous claws can be freely extended
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1035: or contracted. They have the power to\npunch right through a steel slab.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1036: While FEEBAS's body is in tatters,\nit has a hardy and tenacious life force\nthat enables it to live anywhere.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1037: However, this POKéMON is also slow and\ndimwitted, making it an easy catch.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1038: FEEBAS's fins are ragged and\ntattered from the start of its life.\nBecause of its shoddy appearance, this
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1039: POKéMON is largely ignored.\nIt is capable of living in both the sea\nand in rivers.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1040: MILOTIC live at the bottom of large\nlakes. When this POKéMON's body glows a\nvivid pink, it releases a pulsing wave of
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1041: energy that brings soothing calm to\nrestless spirits.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1042: MILOTIC is said to be the most\nbeautiful of all the POKéMON.\nIt has the power to becalm such
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1043: emotions as anger and hostility to quell\nbitter feuding.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1044: CASTFORM borrows the power of nature\nto transform itself into the guises of\nthe sun, rain clouds, and snow clouds.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1045: This POKéMON's feelings change with the\nweather.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1046: CASTFORM's appearance changes with\nthe weather.\nThis POKéMON gained the ability to use
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1047: the vast power of nature to protect\nits tiny body.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1048: KECLEON alters its body coloration to\nblend in with its surroundings, allowing\nit to sneak up on its prey unnoticed.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1049: Then it lashes out with its long,\nstretchy tongue to instantly ensnare\nthe unsuspecting target.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1050: KECLEON is capable of changing its body\ncolors at will to blend in with its\nsurroundings.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1051: There is one exception - this POKéMON\ncan't change the zigzag pattern on its\nbelly.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1052: SHUPPET grows by feeding on dark\nemotions, such as vengefulness and \nenvy, in the hearts of people.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1053: It roams through cities in search of\ngrudges that taint people.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1054: SHUPPET is attracted by feelings\nof jealousy and vindictiveness.\nIf someone develops strong feelings of
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1055: vengeance, this POKéMON will appear\nin a swarm and line up beneath the eaves\nof that person's home.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1056: A cursed energy permeated the stuffing\nof a discarded and forgotten plush doll,\ngiving it new life as BANETTE.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1057: The POKéMON's energy would escape if it\nwere to ever open its mouth.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1058: BANETTE generates energy for laying\nstrong curses by sticking pins into its\nown body.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1059: This POKéMON was originally a pitiful\nplush doll that was thrown away.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1060: DUSKULL wanders lost among the deep\ndarkness of midnight. There is an oft-\ntold admonishment given to misbehaving
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1061: children that this POKéMON will spirit\naway bad children who earn scoldings\nfrom their mothers.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1062: DUSKULL can pass through any wall no\nmatter how thick it may be.\nOnce this POKéMON chooses a target,
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1063: it will doggedly pursue the intended\nvictim until the break of dawn.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1064: DUSCLOPS absorbs anything, however\nlarge the object may be. This POKéMON\nhypnotizes its foe by waving its hands
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1065: in a macabre manner and by bringing its\nsingle eye to bear. The hypnotized foe\nis made to do DUSCLOPS's bidding.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1066: DUSCLOPS's body is completely hollow -\nthere is nothing at all inside.\nIt is said that its body is like a black
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1067: hole. This POKéMON will absorb anything\ninto its body, but nothing will ever come\nback out.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1068: Children of the southern tropics eat\nas snacks the fruit that grows in\nbunches around the neck of TROPIUS.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1069: This POKéMON flies by flapping the\nleaves on its back as if they were\nwings.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1070: The bunches of fruit around TROPIUS's\nneck are very popular with children.\nThis POKéMON loves fruit, and eats it
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1071: continuously. Apparently, its love for\nfruit resulted in its own outgrowth\nof fruit.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1072: In high winds, CHIMECHO cries as it\nhangs from a tree branch or the eaves\nof a building using a suction cup on its
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1073: head.\nThis POKéMON plucks berries with its\nlong tail and eats them.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1074: CHIMECHO makes its cries echo\ninside its hollow body. When this\nPOKéMON becomes enraged, its cries
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1075: result in ultrasonic waves that have\nthe power to knock foes flying.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1076: ABSOL has the ability to foretell the\ncoming of natural disasters.\nIt lives in a harsh, rugged mountain
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1077: environment. This POKéMON very rarely\nventures down from the mountains.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1078: Every time ABSOL appears before people,\nit is followed by a disaster such as an\nearthquake or a tidal wave.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1079: As a result, it came to be known as the\ndisaster POKéMON.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1080: WYNAUT gather on moonlit nights to play\nby squeezing up against each other.\nBy being squeezed, this POKéMON gains
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1081: endurance and is trained to dole out\npowerful counterattacks.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1082: WYNAUT can always be seen with a big,\nhappy smile on its face. Look at its tail\nto determine if it is angry.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1083: When angered, this POKéMON will be\nslapping the ground with its tail.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1084: SNORUNT survives by eating only snow\nand ice.\nOld folklore claims that a house visited
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1085: by this POKéMON is sure to prosper for\nmany generations to come.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1086: SNORUNT live in regions with heavy\nsnowfall. In seasons without snow, such\nas spring and summer, this POKéMON
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1087: steals away to live quietly among\nstalactites and stalagmites deep in\ncaverns.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1088: GLALIE has the ability to freely\ncontrol ice. For example, it can\ninstantly freeze its foe solid.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1089: After immobilizing its foe in ice, this\nPOKéMON enjoys eating it in leisurely\nfashion.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1090: GLALIE has a body made of rock, which it\nhardens with an armor of ice.\nThis POKéMON has the ability to freeze
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1091: moisture in the atmosphere into any\nshape it desires.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1092: SPHEAL always travels by rolling\naround on its ball-like body. When the\nseason for ice floes arrives, this
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1093: POKéMON can be seen rolling about on\nice and crossing the sea.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1094: SPHEAL is much faster rolling than \nwalking to get around. When groups of\nthis POKéMON eat, they all clap at once
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1095: to show their pleasure. Because of this,\ntheir mealtimes are noisy.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1096: SEALEO often balances and rolls\nthings on the tip of its nose. While the\nPOKéMON is rolling something, it checks
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1097: the object's aroma and texture to\ndetermine whether it likes the object\nor not.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1098: SEALEO has the habit of always juggling\non the tip of its nose anything it sees\nfor the first time.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1099: This POKéMON occasionally entertains\nitself by balancing and rolling a SPHEAL\non its nose.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1100: WALREIN swims all over in frigid\nseawater while crushing icebergs with\nits grand, imposing tusks.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1101: Its thick layer of blubber makes enemy\nattacks bounce off harmlessly.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1102: WALREIN's two massively developed\ntusks can totally shatter blocks of\nice weighing ten tons with one blow.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1103: This POKéMON's thick coat of blubber\ninsulates it from subzero temperatures.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1104: CLAMPERL grows while being protected\nby its rock-hard shell. When its body\nbecomes too large to fit inside the
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1105: shell, it is sure evidence that this\nPOKéMON is getting close to evolution.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1106: CLAMPERL's sturdy shell is not only good\nfor protection - it is also used for\nclamping and catching prey.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1107: A fully grown CLAMPERL's shell will be\nscored with nicks and scratches all\nover.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1108: HUNTAIL's tail is shaped like a fish.\nIt uses the tail to attract prey, then\nswallows the prey whole with its large,
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1109: gaping mouth.\nThis POKéMON swims by wiggling its\nslender body like a snake.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1110: HUNTAIL's presence went unnoticed by\npeople for a long time because it lives\nat extreme depths in the sea.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1111: This POKéMON's eyes can see clearly\neven in the murky dark depths of the\nocean.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1112: Although GOREBYSS is the very picture\nof elegance and beauty while swimming,\nit is also cruel. When it spots prey, this
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1113: POKéMON inserts its thin mouth into the\nprey's body and drains the prey of its\nbody fluids.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1114: GOREBYSS lives in the southern seas\nat extreme depths. Its body is built to\nwithstand the enormous pressure of
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1115: water at incredible depths. Because of\nthis, this POKéMON's body is unharmed\nby ordinary attacks.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1116: RELICANTH is a rare species that was\ndiscovered in deep-sea explorations.\nThis POKéMON's body withstands the
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1117: enormous water pressure of the ocean\ndepths. Its body is covered in tough\nscales that are like craggy rocks.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1118: RELICANTH is a POKéMON species that\nexisted for a hundred million years\nwithout ever changing its form.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1119: This ancient POKéMON feeds on\nmicroscopic organisms with its\ntoothless mouth.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1120: LUVDISC's heart-shaped body is a\nsymbol of love and romance.\nIt is said that any couple meeting this
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1121: POKéMON is promised a loving\nrelationship that never ends.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1122: LUVDISC live in shallow seas in the\ntropics. This heart-shaped POKéMON\nearned its name by swimming after
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1123: loving couples it spotted in the\nocean's waves.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1124: BAGON harbors a never-ending dream of\none day soaring high among the clouds.\nAs if trying to dispel its frustration
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1125: over its inability to fly, this POKéMON\nslams its hard head against huge rocks\nand shatters them into pebbles.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1126: BAGON has a dream of one day soaring\nin the sky. In doomed efforts to fly,\nthis POKéMON hurls itself off cliffs.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1127: As a result of its dives, its head has \ngrown tough and as hard as tempered\nsteel.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1128: Covering SHELGON's body are outgrowths\nmuch like bones. The shell is very hard\nand bounces off enemy attacks.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1129: When awaiting evolution, this POKéMON\nhides away in a cavern.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1130: Inside SHELGON's armor-like shell, cells\nare in the midst of transformation\nto create an entirely new body.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1131: This POKéMON's shell is extremely heavy,\nmaking its movements sluggish.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1132: By evolving into SALAMENCE, this\nPOKéMON finally realizes its long-held\ndream of growing wings.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1133: To express its joy, it flies and wheels\nall over the sky while spouting flames\nfrom its mouth.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1134: SALAMENCE came about as a result of a\nstrong, long-held dream of growing\nwings. It is said that this powerful
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1135: desire triggered a sudden mutation in\nthis POKéMON's cells, causing it to\nsprout its magnificent wings.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1136: BELDUM keeps itself floating by\ngenerating a magnetic force that\nrepels earth's natural magnetism.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1137: When it sleeps, this POKéMON anchors\nitself to a cliff using the hooks on\nits rear.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1138: Instead of blood, a powerful magnetic\nforce courses throughout BELDUM's\nbody. This POKéMON communicates with
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1139: others by sending controlled pulses of\nmagnetism.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1140: When two BELDUM fuse together, METANG\nis formed. The brains of the BELDUM are\njoined by a magnetic nervous system.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1141: This POKéMON turns its arms to the rear\nfor traveling at high speed.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1142: When two BELDUM fuse together, METANG\nis formed. The brains of the BELDUM are\njoined by a magnetic nervous system.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1143: By linking its brains magnetically,\nthis POKéMON generates strong\npsychokinetic power.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1144: METAGROSS is the result of two METANG\nachieving fusion. When hunting, this\nPOKéMON pins the prey to the ground
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1145: under its massive body. It then eats\nthe helpless victim using the large \nmouth on its stomach.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1146: METAGROSS has four brains in total.\nCombined, the four brains can breeze\nthrough difficult calculations faster
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1147: than a supercomputer.\nThis POKéMON can float in the air by\ntucking in its four legs.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1148: REGIROCK's body is composed entirely of\nrocks. Recently, a study made the\nstartling discovery that the rocks
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1150: REGIROCK was sealed away by people\nlong ago. If this POKéMON's body is\ndamaged in battle, it is said to seek
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1151: out suitable rocks on its own to repair\nitself.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1152: REGICE cloaks itself with frigid air of\nnegative 328 degrees F.\nThings will freeze solid just by going
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1153: near this POKéMON.\nIts icy body is so cold, it will not melt\neven if it is immersed in magma.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1154: REGICE's body was made during an ice\nage. The deep-frozen body can't be\nmelted, even by fire.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1155: This POKéMON controls frigid air of\nminus 328 degrees F.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1156: REGISTEEL was imprisoned by people\nin ancient times.\nThe metal composing its body is thought
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1157: to be a curious substance that is not\nof this earth.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1158: REGISTEEL has a body that is harder\nthan any kind of metal.\nIts body is apparently hollow.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1159: No one has any idea what this POKéMON\neats.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1160: LATIAS is highly intelligent and capable\nof understanding human speech.\nIt is covered with a glass-like down.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1161: The POKéMON enfolds its body with its\ndown and refracts light to alter its\nappearance.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1162: LATIAS is highly sensitive to the\nemotions of people. If it senses any\nhostility, this POKéMON ruffles the
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1163: feathers all over its body and cries\nshrilly to intimidate the foe.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1164: LATIOS will only open its heart to a\nTRAINER with a compassionate spirit.\nThis POKéMON can fly faster than a jet
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1165: plane by folding its forelegs to minimize\nair resistance.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1166: LATIOS has the ability to make its foe\nsee an image of what it has seen or\nimagines in its head.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1167: This POKéMON is intelligent and\nunderstands human speech.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1168: KYOGRE is named in mythology as the\nPOKéMON that expanded the sea by\ncovering the land with torrential rains
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1169: and towering tidal waves.\nIt took to sleep after a cataclysmic\nbattle with GROUDON.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1170: KYOGRE has the power to create massive\nrain clouds that cover the entire sky\nand bring about torrential downpours.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1171: This POKéMON saved people who were\nsuffering from droughts.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1172: GROUDON has the power to scatter rain\nclouds and make water evaporate with\nlight and heat.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1173: It came as a savior to people who had\nbeen suffering from terrible floods.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1174: GROUDON has long been described in \nmythology as the POKéMON that raised\nlands and expanded continents.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1175: This POKéMON took to sleep after a\ncataclysmic battle with KYOGRE.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1176: RAYQUAZA is said to have lived for\nhundreds of millions of years in the\nearth's ozone layer, above the clouds.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1177: Its existence had been completely\nunknown because it lived so high in\nthe sky.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1178: RAYQUAZA lived for hundreds of millions\nof years in the earth's ozone layer, \nnever descending to the ground.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1179: This POKéMON appears to feed on water\nand particles in the atmosphere.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1180: JIRACHI will awaken from its sleep of\na thousand years if you sing to it in a\nvoice of purity.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1181: It is said to make true any wish that\npeople desire.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1182: A legend states that JIRACHI will make\ntrue any wish that is written on notes\nattached to its head when it awakens.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1183: If this POKéMON senses danger, it will\nfight without awakening.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1184: DEOXYS emerged from a virus that came\nfrom space. It is highly intelligent and\nwields psychokinetic powers.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1185: This POKéMON shoots lasers from the\ncrystalline organ on its chest.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1186: The DNA of a space virus underwent a\nsudden mutation upon exposure to a\nlaser beam and resulted in DEOXYS.
src/data/pokedex_entries_en.h.string_1187: The crystalline organ on this POKéMON's\nchest appears to be its brain.

src/data/text/contest_en.h.string_1: After this move, the user is\nmore easily startled.
src/data/text/contest_en.h.string_2: Makes a great appeal, but\nallows no more to the end.
src/data/text/contest_en.h.string_3: Can be repeatedly used\nwithout boring the JUDGE.
src/data/text/contest_en.h.string_4: Can avoid being startled\nby others once.
src/data/text/contest_en.h.string_6: Can avoid being startled\nby others a little.
src/data/text/contest_en.h.string_7: After this move, the user is\nless likely to be startled.
src/data/text/contest_en.h.string_9: Slightly startles those\nthat have made appeals.
src/data/text/contest_en.h.string_10: Startles the POKéMON that\nappealed before the user.
src/data/text/contest_en.h.string_11: Startles all POKéMON that\nhave done their appeals.
src/data/text/contest_en.h.string_13: Badly startles those that\nhave made appeals.
src/data/text/contest_en.h.string_14: Startles the POKéMON that\nappealed before the user.
src/data/text/contest_en.h.string_15: Startles all POKéMON that\nappealed before the user.
src/data/text/contest_en.h.string_17: Startles the POKéMON that\nhas the JUDGE's attention.
src/data/text/contest_en.h.string_18: Jams the others, and misses\none turn of appeals.
src/data/text/contest_en.h.string_19: Startles POKéMON that\nmade a same-type appeal.
src/data/text/contest_en.h.string_20: Badly startles POKéMON\nthat made COOL appeals.
src/data/text/contest_en.h.string_21: Badly startles POKéMON\nthat made BEAUTY appeals.
src/data/text/contest_en.h.string_22: Badly startles POKéMON\nthat made CUTE appeals.
src/data/text/contest_en.h.string_23: Badly startles POKéMON\nthat made SMART appeals.
src/data/text/contest_en.h.string_24: Badly startles POKéMON\nthat made TOUGH appeals.
src/data/text/contest_en.h.string_25: Makes one POKéMON after\nthe user nervous.
src/data/text/contest_en.h.string_26: Makes all POKéMON after\nthe user nervous.
src/data/text/contest_en.h.string_27: Worsens the condition of\nthose that made appeals.
src/data/text/contest_en.h.string_29: The appeal works great if\nperformed first.
src/data/text/contest_en.h.string_30: The appeal works great if\nperformed last.
src/data/text/contest_en.h.string_31: Makes the appeal as good\nas those before it.

src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_0: Becalm fighting emotions.$Fragrant GRASS POKéMON$Soothing aromas make the$body and mind healthy.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_1: Overwhelm with power!$Craggy ROCK POKéMON$In search of ancient lore,$I travel the world.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_2: I'm going to try hard!$Good swimmer POKéMON$I wish I could swim without$using an inner tube.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_3: I don't know. I'll try hard.$WATER POKéMON are buddies.$It's not like I can't swim.$I just like my inner tube.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_4: We split our duties.$We like friendly POKéMON.$We enjoy POKéMON together$as sister and brother.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_5: Exploit the foe's weakness.$Balance is crucial.$My goal is to become the$POKéMON CHAMPION.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_6: Upset the opponent.$Type doesn't matter.$I'm a top student at the$TRAINER'S SCHOOL.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_7: Slow, steady suffering$Scary to meet at night.$I see things that others$can't see...
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_8: Anything to win.$Gorgeous type!$I have a pool specially for$my POKéMON at home.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_9: I'll lead you astray.$Cute, of course.$I love the SAFARI ZONE.$I seem to end up there.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_10: Strategy? Who needs it?$I spent big money on it!$I, being rich, sleep in a$custom POKéMON bed.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_11: Wrestle down with power.$Took all night to catch...$Big, burly, and buff$POKéMON are the best...
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_12: Ram at full speed!$Funky WATER type!$If I can't be out swimming,$I'll be pumping weights.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_13: Grand slam pummeling!$FIGHTING type$Not to brag, but I can bust$ten roof tiles!
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_14: I'll electrify you!$They're ELECTRIC!$I want to make people cry$with songs from my heart.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_15: Burn it all down!$Burn-inducing POKéMON$When you light a campfire,$be sure there's some water.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_16: Hang in and be tenacious!$I'll raise any POKéMON.$POKéMON raised in the wild$grow strong!
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_17: Our love lets us prevail.$We've had them for years.$Married 50 years, we've$devotedly raised POKéMON.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_18: Attack in waves!$BUG POKéMON are cool.$I go into the forest every$day to catch BUG POKéMON.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_19: Daze and confuse!$Ones with weird powers.$I can see through exactly$what you're thinking!
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_20: Battle at full power.$POKéMON of many mysteries$When we spoke, I was really$using telepathy.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_21: Calm and collected.$POKéMON of distinction$We enjoy a spot of tea$every day. It's imported.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_22: I use my head to battle.$I love any kind of POKéMON!$My daddy gives me spending$money if I ace a test.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_23: My knowledge rules!$Any smart POKéMON!$I want to be a POKéMON$researcher in the future.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_24: We talk it over first.$POKéMON that we both like.$We're senior and junior$students into POKéMON!
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_25: Go for it, my dears!$I have no likes or dislikes.$While out shopping for$supper, I battle too.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_26: I battle with love!$A POKéMON raised with love!$It's important to build$trust with your POKéMON.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_27: I see through your moves!$The essence of FIGHTING.$I'm not ready to give way$to the young yet!
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_28: Attack while defending$The FIGHTING type$Being old, I have my own$style of battling.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_29: I do what I can.$I use different types.$I'm going to keep working$until I beat a GYM LEADER.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_30: I battle patiently.$WATER POKéMON to battle!$I'm the world's only guy to$catch a huge POKéMON!
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_31: Defense is crucial.$My POKéMON is solid.$I started this for dieting,$but I got right into it.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_32: Push and push again!$The strength of STEEL$If you're sweating, get$fluids into you regularly.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_33: Exploit the environment!$All hail the WATER type!$I won't be beaten by some$beach bum SWIMMER!
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_34: All-out offensive!$WATER POKéMON rule!$I must swim over 6 miles$every day.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_35: Speed above all!$I use a speedy POKéMON.$A marathon is a challenge$against your own self.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_36: Strike before stricken!$A fast-running POKéMON!$If you ran and ran, you'd$become one with the wind.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_37: It's about POKéMON power!$See the power of DRAGONS!$I'll become legendary as the$strongest one day!
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_38: I'll show you my technique!$Elegantly wheeling BIRDS$My BIRD POKéMON, deliver my$love to that girl!
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_39: You'll suffer from poison!$Poisonous POKéMON$I undertake training so$that I may become a ninja.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_40: The first strike wins!$Speedy FIGHTING type$If my POKéMON lose,$I'll carry on the fight!
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_41: Go, go, my POKéMON!$I'll raise anything.$UV rays are your skin's$enemy. Get protected.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_42: No mercy!$Cute WATER POKéMON$I have too many fans.$I was interviewed on TV.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_43: I think about this & that.$I like all POKéMON.$What lies beyond that$yonder hill?
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_44: We battle together!$We train together!$We like the same POKéMON,$but different desserts.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_45: I force things with power!$WATER and FIGHTING types$Seamen are rough spirits!$Any complaints?
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_46: Protect POKéMON from harm.$I love rare POKéMON.$I want to collect all the$world's rare POKéMON.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_47: I count on power.$POKéMON are my children.$It takes knowledge and$love to raise POKéMON.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_48: Full-on attack!$Anything. I'll raise it.$I give them {POKEBLOCK}S for$going after CONTEST titles.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_49: I believe in my POKéMON.$I like strong POKéMON.$I'm training for rescue$work with my POKéMON.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_50: I attack in waves.$Different types$Those who destroy nature$must never be forgiven!
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_51: I'll show you some guts!$Cute POKéMON are my faves!$After a battle, I always$bathe with my POKéMON.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_52: Lightning-fast attack!$BUG POKéMON are number 1!$If you want to catch BUG$POKéMON, wake up early.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_53: I battle with power.$Hard-bodied POKéMON$I've been planning a month$for today's hike.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_55: We let it all hang out.$The 1st POKéMON I caught.$POKéMON and I have grown$stronger together.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_56: ROCK-type power attack$Rock-solid types are good.$Through battling, I want to$learn all about POKéMON.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_57: Direct physical action!$FIGHTING POKéMON rule!$The world awaits me as the$next big wave!
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_58: I choose to electrify.$Get shocked by electricity!$Wahahahaha! The secret to$health is laughter!
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_59: Battle aggressively.$Burn with passion!$Wash away daily fatigue in$hot springs completely!
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_60: I flexibly adapt my style.$Grown in a balanced manner.$POKéMON are my life.$My chosen path is harsh...
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_61: I take advantage of speed.$Graceful sky dancers$I can see the ebb and flow$of the winds.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_62: We battle in cooperation.$Always friendly POKéMON.$We understand each other,$and we understand others.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_63: Dignity and respect$I prefer POKéMON of grace.$Aquatic illusions best suit$my distinctive elegance.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_64: Offense over defense$The DARK side's beauties$You can talk all you want -$might is right!
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_65: Confuse and confound$There's nothing definite.$I wonder how my grandma at$MT. PYRE is doing?
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_66: I use items for help.$Flaming passion in icy cold!$The ICE type can be better$trained in this hot land.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_67: Harness strong abilities.$The raw power of DRAGONS!$I live to battle every day$to learn about POKéMON.
src/data/text/trainer_eye_descriptions_e.string_68: Pick on the foe's weakness.$The ultimate STEEL POKéMON$When it comes down to it,$I'm still the strongest!
